c8bb68dd.title: Public Cloud Security Engineer - Vulnerability & Exposure Management (MultiCloud)(Lead)
c8bb68dd.description:
Role Overview
 



 To lead and drive the end\-to\-end Vulnerability Management and Remediation program across multi\-cloud environments, with primary focus on Microsoft Azure and secondary exposure to Google Cloud Platform (GCP), ensuring proactive identification, prioritization, and resolution of security vulnerabilities while mentoring and managing a high\-performing team.
 



 This role supports and secures the customer's public cloud environments as the firm evolves from a predominantly Azure\-based footprint into a multi\-cloud operating model, with increasing adoption of Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and — as a longer\-term.
 



 The Vulnerability Management Lead / Public Cloud Security Engineer serves as a technical leader responsible for identifying, engineering, and operating cloud\-native vulnerability and exposure management capabilities across public cloud platforms — reducing systemic risk by detecting control breaks, insecure configurations, and exploitable vulnerabilities before they result in incidents, while ensuring security tooling scales with cloud adoption rather than slowing it down.
 



 This position sits at the intersection of cloud engineering, security engineering, and reliability, with accountability for designing, onboarding, and operating security platforms that protect cloud workloads in a highly regulated environment.
 



 Location
 



 • Pune (Work from Offshore Development Center — ODC)
 



 • Chennai (Client location)
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Lead the Vulnerability Management function across cloud and hybrid environments
 



 • Define strategy, roadmap, and operating model for vulnerability management
 



 • Lead the engineering, onboarding, and production support of cloud security and vulnerability management platforms
 



 • Own the architecture, deployment, and lifecycle management of cloud security platforms
 



 • Design and operate security controls that support Azure today while scaling into GCP
 



 • Perform vulnerability scanning, assessment, prioritization, and remediation
 



 • Detect, analyze, and remediate cloud vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and control gaps
 



 • Engineer control\-break detection techniques to identify systemic security failures early
 



 • Ensure closure of vulnerabilities within defined Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
 



 • Manage the vulnerability lifecycle: Discovery → Assessment → Remediation → Reporting
 



 • Define and measure security\-focused SLIs and SLOs in partnership with stakeholders
 



 • Drive automation and reporting dashboards
 



 • Act as escalation point for critical vulnerabilities; contribute to incident response, mitigation, and post\-incident reviews from a cloud security perspective
 



 • Partner with cloud engineering teams to embed security controls into platform design
 



 • Research, evaluate, and recommend cloud security technologies aligned to the customer's risk posture
 



 • Lead, mentor, and guide the vulnerability management team; develop junior security engineers, promoting strong engineering discipline and operational excellence
 



 • Prioritize team tasks and workload
 



 Cloud Environment \& Security Scope
 



 • Microsoft Azure (primary / incumbent platform) — heavy hands\-on exposure, approximately 70%
 



 • Google Cloud Platform (GCP) for emerging data, platform, and AI workloads — working exposure, approximately 30%
 



 • Multi\-region cloud architectures supporting production, pre\-production, and development environments
 



 • Shared responsibility security models across infrastructure, platform, and application layers
 



 Cloud Security Focus Areas
 



 • Cloud vulnerability management across compute, container, platform, and managed services
 



 • Identify, prioritize, and remediate cloud misconfigurations and vulnerabilities across Azure and GCP, including via Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Azure Security Center, Azure Policy, Azure Resource Graph, and cloud security posture management (CSPM)
 



 • GCP\-side visibility via Security Command Center, Cloud Asset Inventory, and Identity and Access Management (IAM)
 



 • Detection of misconfigurations, control drift, and insecure cloud patterns
 



 • Exposure management spanning identity, network, data, and workload layers
 



 • Reducing systemic risk through automation, standardization, and preventative controls
 



 Security Platforms \& Tooling
 



 • Vulnerability management tools: Qualys, Tenable (Nessus), Rapid7, and cloud\-native security tools across Azure and GCP
 



 • Cloud\-native and enterprise security platforms, including vulnerability scanning and posture management tools; SIEM and centralized logging platforms; endpoint and workload protection technologies (EDR/XDR); packet capture and network visibility tooling where required
 



 • Integration of security platforms via APIs into cloud and DevOps workflows
 



 • Configuration management and automation across large\-scale security platforms
 



 • Working knowledge of network, operating system, endpoint, application, and cloud security
 



 Infrastructure \& Automation
 



 • Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and configuration management for security controls
 



 • Terraform and cloud\-native tooling to enforce secure\-by\-default patterns
 



 • CI/CD and DevSecOps integrations to shift vulnerability detection left (basic DevSecOps understanding required)
 



 • Python\-based scripting and automation for control validation and response
 



 Reliability, Operations \& Risk
 



 • Apply Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles to security platforms to reduce outages and operational friction
 



 • Participate in system design, platform management, and capacity planning
 



 • Ensure audit\-ready documentation, operational hygiene, and clear escalation paths
 



 • Maintain a strong understanding of enterprise risk culture, control frameworks, and risk reduction techniques
 



 Experience \& Required Qualifications
 



 • 10–12\+ years of overall experience in Cybersecurity, Infrastructure Security, Cloud Security, or Vulnerability Management
 



 • Majority of that experience must be in Vulnerability Management, Vulnerability Assessment, Remediation Governance, and Security Operations
 



 • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent engineering experience
 



 • Senior\-level experience engineering and operating security platforms in public cloud environments
 



 • Strong hands\-on Microsoft Azure experience (\~70%), with working knowledge of Google Cloud Platform (\~30%)
 



 • Deep experience in vulnerability management, configuration assessment, and exposure reduction
 



 • Proficiency in Python for security automation and tooling
 



 • Experience operating large\-scale distributed systems in regulated environments
 



 • Strong understanding of UNIX/Linux internals, networking, and cloud infrastructure
 



 • Proven leadership experience managing vulnerability management programs, remediation tracking, stakeholder governance, and technical teams
 



 Preferred Qualifications
 



 • Financial services or highly regulated industry experience
 



 • Experience integrating security platforms using APIs
 



 • Familiarity with SIEM query languages (e.g., Splunk SPL, SQL\-based analytics)
 



 • Experience with DevSecOps and CI/CD security integrations
 



 • Exposure to containerized and Kubernetes\-based environments
 



 • Experience applying AI/ML techniques to security analytics or detection
 



 Key Competencies
 



 • Strong problem\-solving and remediation mindset
 



 • Excellent communication and stakeholder management
 



 • Leadership with ownership\-driven accountability
 



 • Self\-starter and motivated
 



 Success Criteria (KPIs)
 



 • Reduction in high and critical vulnerabilities
 



 • Improvement in remediation SLAs
 



 • High\-quality candidate validation and team product
 



  





 Budget \- Upto 40LPA
 



  





 Please do not send resumes if having 3 months or 2 months notice period 15 day to 25 days would work.
 



  





 Only those profiles would be considered who are sent on mail\-manjiri.sonawane@newvision\-software.com

6aa3a544.title: Senior Cloud Solution Architect
6aa3a544.description:
**Job Description** 




  





 An experienced AWS Cloud Solution Architect with strong expertise in designing, architecting, and implementing enterprise\-scale cloud solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep knowledge of AWS services and hands\-on experience with one or more hyperscalers such as Microsoft Azure or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
 



 The candidate will work closely with customers, delivery teams, and business stakeholders to define cloud strategies, migration roadmaps, modernization initiatives, and managed cloud solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Rich in presales and solutions experience who can showcase the demo / solution to the customer
* Implemented AI Powered BAU Operations for L0/L1 Operations
* Design scalable, secure, resilient, and cost\-optimized cloud architectures on AWS.
* Lead cloud transformation and application modernization initiatives.
* Develop cloud adoption frameworks, landing zones, governance models, and security architectures.
* Design hybrid and multi\-cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
* Conduct cloud readiness assessments and migration planning.
* Define Disaster Recovery (DR), Business Continuity (BCP), backup, and high\-availability architectures.
* Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform or AWS CloudFormation.
* Architect containerized workloads using Kubernetes (EKS) and Docker.
* Design serverless architectures using AWS Lambda and API Gateway.
* Work with DevOps teams to implement CI/CD pipelines.
* Optimize cloud infrastructure with Finops for performance, availability, security, and cost.
* Conduct architecture reviews and ensure alignment with AWS Well\-Architected Framework.
* Collaborate with security teams to implement Zero Trust and cloud security best practices.
* Provide technical leadership during customer workshops, solution presentations, and proposal development.
* Mentor cloud engineers and solution architects.



  





**Need of this JD** 



* Year of Experience 18 to 22
* BE or MBA education qualification
* Work location will be in Chennai
* Will to travel with short notice
* 40% Travel to customer location across the globe in an year.
* Excellent communication

c03cb325.title: Cybersecurity Technology Solutions Practice Lead
c03cb325.description:
Position Description  

Company Profile:  

Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\-to\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.  

  

Job Title: Cybersecurity Technology Solutions Practice Lead
  

Position:MCD
  

Experience: 13\-15 years  

Category: Software Development/ Engineering  

Shift: Canda shift (EST) – 5:30 PM to 2:30 AM IST  

Main location: Bangalore, Chennai  

Position ID: J0726\-0793  

Employment Type: Full Time  

Education Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field or higher with minimum 10 years of relevant experience.  

  

Primary skill :
  

o Minimum of 6 years of cybersecurity technology solutions experience.  

o SOC, SIEM/SOAR platform, EDR, Threat intel, Threat hunting, Vulnerability Management, Pen testing (Basics) and Cloud Security  

o Security advisory
  

o Security Architecture  

  

Position Description  

Did you ever wish for a role where you would be part of a global success story, helping hundreds of businesses protect their value? Have you dreamed of collaborating with hundreds of like\-minded colleagues across India and Canada and thousands more across the globe, in setting technology solution strategy, and building compelling cyber offerings?  

  

How about working across a diverse vendor ecosystem, creating leverage through partnerships, with the technology independent latitude to innovate, and being a thought leader and a brand builder!  

  

Are you \#CGIready to be part of our Canadian Cybersecurity team and drive our national cybersecurity technology solutions strategy, and services portfolio management and evolution?  

  

You will join a diverse team of colleagues equally committed to ensuring Canadian businesses achieve the most effective and appropriate security for their particular needs.  

  

As we are a technology independent provider, the technology solutions lead will have the entire cybersecurity vendor landscape as their sandbox, with the versatility to define and build best in class offerings, and set exciting roadmaps.  

  

We are all particularly proud of our 20\+ year record of continually adapting to meet our client cybersecurity obligations. Your deep technical strength, solution development discipline, innovative mindset, and strong sense of team will ensure you fit right in.  

  

The Role:  

* The Technology Solutions Practice Lead drives a disciplined program of cybersecurity services and offering development.
* The Lead understands the constantly changing cyber marketplace, identifies solution opportunities, and leads the development of compelling offerings from business case through to operations and market readiness.
* In this highly collaborative role you will bring together diverse functions such as architecture and engineering, security operations, finance, vendor management, and marketing, to establish a differentiated market position and accelerate time to revenue.
* Your deep cybersecurity and technical experience are balanced by a strong business acumen enabling effective engagement at all stages of the solution development lifecycle.


Responsibilities include:  

* Works collaboratively with colleagues to define, prioritize, and build offerings.
* Accelerates operations, market, and sales readiness for new offerings and manages product development lifecycle.
* Engages key cross\-functional stakeholders for most effective packaging and positioning.
* Acts as key market evangelist for solutions – events, whitepapers, blogs etc.
* Supports the sales and proposal process – education, presentations, content development etc.
* Supports technology vendor engagement and strategy.
* Drives and refines product improvements informed by client and sales team feedback

  

Your future duties and responsibilities  

* Works collaboratively with colleagues to define, prioritize, and build offerings.
* Accelerates operations, market, and sales readiness for new offerings and manages product development lifecycle.
* Engages key cross\-functional stakeholders for most effective packaging and positioning.
* Acts as key market evangelist for solutions – events, whitepapers, blogs etc.
* Supports the sales and proposal process – education, presentations, content development etc.
* Supports technology vendor engagement and strategy.
* Drives and refines product improvements informed by client and sales team feedback
* Establishes Portfolio KPI's to measure success

  

Required qualifications to be successful in this role  

* First and foremost, an innovative and inquisitive mindset, and a passion to build.
* Minimum of 6 years of cybersecurity technology solutions experience.
* Strong understanding of the cybersecurity market and the challenges faced by organizations.
* Understanding of, and passion for, differentiated packaging, productization, and positioning.
* Representative balance of business and financial, sales and marketing, and technical acumen.
**Your future duties and responsibilities**

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**  

  

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.  

  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.  

  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
  

  

That same commitment to fairness extends to how we use technology. To support our recruitment team, AI tools may be used to help assess applications though they never replace human judgement. All hiring decisions remain entirely in the hands of our recruitment professionals.  

  

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

f3297b45.title: Productivity Solutions Engineer
f3297b45.description:
**About us**

  

At ExxonMobil, our vision is to lead in energy innovations that advance modern living and a net\-zero future. As one of the world’s largest publicly traded energy and chemical companies, we are powered by a unique and diverse workforce fueled by the pride in what we do and what we stand for.

  

The success of our Upstream, Product Solutions and Low Carbon Solutions businesses is the result of the talent, curiosity and drive of our people. They bring solutions every day to optimize our strategy in energy, chemicals, lubricants and lower\-emissions technologies.

  

We invite you to bring your ideas to ExxonMobil to help create sustainable solutions that improve quality of life and meet society’s evolving needs. Learn more about **our What and our Why** and how we canwork **together**.

**ExxonMobil’s affiliates in India**
------------------------------------

  

ExxonMobil’s affiliates have offices in India in Bengaluru, Mumbai and the National Capital Region.

  

ExxonMobil’s affiliates in India supporting the Product Solutions business engage in the marketing, sales and distribution of performance as well as specialty products across chemicals and lubricants businesses. The India planning teams are also embedded with global business units for business planning and analytics.

  

ExxonMobil’s LNG affiliate in India supporting the upstream business provides consultant services for other ExxonMobil upstream affiliates and conducts LNG market\-development activities.

  

The Global Business Center \- Technology Center provides a range of technical and business support services for ExxonMobil’s operations around the globe.

  

ExxonMobil strives to make a positive contribution to the communities where we operate and its affiliates support a range of education, health and community\-building programs in India. Read more about our Corporate Responsibility Framework.

  

To know more about ExxonMobil in India, visit ExxonMobil India and the Energy Factor India.

**What role you will play in our team**
---------------------------------------

  

Employees in this job provide the highest level of consultative support on the corporation’s collaboration tools and services. Employees have a strong understanding of Business Users Needs and Requirements, the Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the best practices with respect to the planning, design, implementation and use of SaaS(Software as a Service) tools and processes. They set direction and provide critical support in the strategic and tactical planning for the tools and techniques, established strong vendor management relationship for the evaluation and recommendations for selection of tools; construct and develop user’s training and education; MOC experts to support the tools deployment and retirement of existing services.

**Your benefits**
-----------------

  

An ExxonMobil career is one designed to last. Our commitment to you runs deep: our employees grow personally and professionally, with benefits built on our core categories of health, security, finance and life. We offer you:

  

* Competitive compensation
* Medical plans, maternity leave and benefits, life, accidental death and dismemberment benefits
* Retirement benefits
* Global networking \& cross\-functional opportunities
* Annual vacations \& holidays
* Day care assistance program
* Training and development program
* Tuition assistance program
* Workplace flexibility policy
* Relocation program
* Transportation facility

  

Please note benefits may change from time to time without notice, subject to applicable laws. The benefits programs are based on the Company’s eligibility guidelines.

**What you will do**
--------------------

  

* Evaluates and recommends emerging technologies, tools and services, the potential business impact, and facilitates adoption of leading technologies
* Performs technical troubleshooting with the customers and vendors on issue resolution and continuous improvement on the reliability of the services
* Suggests alternate technical solutions to meet client requirements efficiently and/or with greater reusability and/or longer life.
* Fosters collaborative relationships with the SaaS vendors, practitioners and industry organizations with an emphasis on business user’s satisfaction
* Maintains an awareness of the user’s needs and initiatives and identifies key business implications and impacts.
* Aligns and partners with project management and solutions architect to identify potential roadblocks and develop plans to overcome them.
* Maintains professional and technical knowledge by attending technical forums; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; participating in professional societies to gather information and insights
* Aid in driving stability and innovation with the user’s current and future state to create solutions based on client requirements.
* Helps drive appropriate product enhancements and changes to technology roadmaps
* Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed
**About you**
-------------

 **Skills and Qualifications**

  

* Extensive industry knowledge and experience in the implementation and use of information technology and collaborations tools
* Strong knowledge in security and controls
* Knowledge and understanding of SaaS technology is available to determine and develop solutions.
* Strong understanding of low\-code platforms and their capabilities
* Strong understanding of AI\-powered tools and their applications.
* Knowledge in virtualization including but not limited to VMware, V Cloud Suite, APIs development and consumption
* Knowledge of current information technology initiatives and strategies.
* Knowledge of cloud environment and technology
* Considerable technical problem solving and analytical skills.
* Ability to work with the vendor community and managed services providers in the business
* Ability to research, analyze, and evaluate current industry technology direction and standards and make recommendations at a management level.
* Ability to convey information technology concepts and business impact to senior management as well as address more detailed training requirements of users and technical staff
* Knowledge in network and applications or IT infrastructure (Windows Server, Unix, Storage, Backup) will be an added advantage

 **Preferred Qualifications/ Experience**

  

* Experience working with global / multi\-cultural teams in different time zones.
* Communication skills (including the ability to understand highly technical concepts and communicate those accurately to a non\-technical audience).
* Good application troubleshooting skills.
* Good verbal and written communication skills (English)
* Strong interpersonal, organization, diligence and team player abilities
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Self\-initiator, responsive, willingness to mentor others and able to work under minimum supervision
* Ability to perform under pressure and with changing priorities
**Stay connected with us**
--------------------------

  

* Learn more about ExxonMobil in India, visit ExxonMobil India and Energy Factor India.
* Follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram
* Like us on Facebook
* Subscribe our channel at YouTube
**EEO Statement**
-----------------

  

ExxonMobil is an Equal Opportunity Employer:


All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin or disability status.

**Business solicitation and recruiting scams**
----------------------------------------------

  

ExxonMobil does not use recruiting or placement agencies that charge candidates an advance fee of any kind (e.g., placement fees, immigration processing fees, etc.). Follow the LINK to understand more about recruitment scams in the name of ExxonMobil.

**Functional Skills**
---------------------


Infrastructure \- Operating Systems
End User Computing Systems Management \& Automation
Network \- Infrastructure  

Nothing herein is intended to override the corporate separateness of local entities. Working relationships discussed herein do not necessarily represent a reporting connection, but may reflect a functional guidance, stewardship, or service relationship.

  

Exxon Mobil Corporation has numerous affiliates, many with names that include ExxonMobil, Exxon, Esso and Mobil. For convenience and simplicity, those terms and terms like corporation, company, our, we and its are sometimes used as abbreviated references to specific affiliates or affiliate groups. Abbreviated references describing global or regional operational organizations and global or regional business lines are also sometimes used for convenience and simplicity. Similarly, ExxonMobil has business relationships with thousands of customers, suppliers, governments, and others. For convenience and simplicity, words like venture, joint venture, partnership, co\-venturer, and partner are used to indicate business relationships involving common activities and interests, and those words may not indicate precise legal relationships.

308d3deb.title: Audit & Assurance - Managed Services - Senior Associate
308d3deb.description:
At PwC, our people in audit and assurance focus on providing independent and objective assessments of financial statements, internal controls, and other assurable information enhancing the credibility and reliability of this information with a variety of stakeholders. They evaluate compliance with regulations including assessing governance and risk management processes and related controls.
   

  

 In financial statement audit at PwC, you will focus on obtaining reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes the auditor’s opinion.
   

  

 Focused on relationships, you are building meaningful client connections, and learning how to manage and inspire others. Navigating increasingly complex situations, you are growing your personal brand, deepening technical expertise and awareness of your strengths. You are expected to anticipate the needs of your teams and clients, and to deliver quality. Embracing increased ambiguity, you are comfortable when the path forward isn’t clear, you ask questions, and you use these moments as opportunities to grow.
   

  

**Skills**
 Examples of the skills, knowledge, and experiences you need to lead and deliver value at this level include but are not limited to:
   

  

* Respond effectively to the diverse perspectives, needs, and feelings of others.
* Use a broad range of tools, methodologies and techniques to generate new ideas and solve problems.
* Use critical thinking to break down complex concepts.
* Understand the broader objectives of your project or role and how your work fits into the overall strategy.
* Develop a deeper understanding of the business context and how it is changing.
* Use reflection to develop self awareness, enhance strengths and address development areas.
* Interpret data to inform insights and recommendations.


 Uphold and reinforce professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), the Firm's code of conduct, and independence requirements.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 As part of the Managed Services team you will lead large projects and innovate processes in Fund Level Reporting \& Accounting. As a Senior Associate you will serve as a trusted advisor, maintaining alignment between client business goals and our offerings while upholding operational excellence. This role offers the chance to deepen client relationships and drive long\-term success through strategic guidance and performance\-driven solutions.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Foster enduring client relationships to promote sustained excellence
* Provide strategic guidance to secure performance\-driven solutions
* Maintain a focus on operational excellence throughout project execution
* Work with cross\-functional teams to achieve project goals
* Overview and delivery of services for client reporting and finance oversight
* Analyze and interpret data to inform decision\-making


**What You Must Have**
* Bachelor's Degree in Accounting \& Finance
* At least 4 years of experience in a managed services, shared services, or outsourced finance environment


**What Sets You Apart**
* Certified Public Accountant (CPA) preferred
* Demonstrating in\-depth team leadership abilities
* Developing scalable and reliable Fund Finance solutions
* Supporting customized proposals and client presentations
* Understanding estimation methodology and cost management
* Creating and managing financial models effectively
* Architecting significant Fund Finance managed services solutions
* Adapting to new technologies and learning quickly

c073af22.title: Delivery Lead Senior Manager-Messaging
c073af22.description:
**Skill required:** Omnichannel \- Customer Service  

**Designation:** Delivery Lead Senior Manager  

**Qualifications:**Any Graduation
  

**Years of Experience:**16 to 25 years
  

**About Accenture**  

Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
  

**What would you do?** The Customer Service Senior Manager role supports a large, global client in the energy sector, delivered through Accenture’s BPMS / Customer Operations function. The role operates within a complex, large\-scale, multi\-channel customer service environment, supporting B2B and B2C service delivery across multiple entities, processes, or regions. The Senior Manager has end\-to\-end accountability for service delivery excellence, overseeing operational performance, client governance, financial discipline, risk management, and transformation execution for their assigned scope. The role acts as a key interface between the client and Accenture leadership, ensuring delivery outcomes align with contracted commitments and Accenture standards. Client identity and data are handled in strict accordance with Accenture confidentiality and information security policies.  

**What are we looking for?** Extensive experience leading large\-scale Customer Operations delivery in a BPMS / managed services environment Strong understanding of service governance, financial levers, and operational performance management Proven ability to lead managers and senior leaders in complex delivery environments Demonstrated experience managing client relationships, executive escalations, and delivery risk Strong commercial and financial acumen, including cost\-to\-serve, productivity, and value tracking Ability to drive transformational change and continuous improvement at scale Strong analytical, decision\-making, and problem\-solving capabilities Excellent stakeholder\-management and executive communication skills Deep familiarity with CRM platforms, operational dashboards, and performance reporting frameworks Fluent proficiency in English (spoken and written) for executive client communication, governance, and reporting Additional language requirements may apply depending on client scope and supported markets Role operates within client\-defined service windows with senior leadership coverage expectations Flexibility required for: Executive escalation management outside core hours Peak periods, incidents, or transformation milestones Multi\-region or global delivery support Ability to operate in a high\-accountability, client\-facing leadership role with flexible availability is essential.
  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** •As a Customer Service Senior Manager, you will lead a large delivery area or service tower, managing multiple Managers and Associate Managers, with accountability for strategic and operational outcomes. You will be responsible for: Owning end\-to\-end service delivery across multiple teams or service lines, including SLA, KPI, quality, productivity, and customer satisfaction outcomes Providing senior leadership and direction to Managers and Associate Managers, ensuring strong execution, governance, and leadership capability Acting as the primary client operations partner for the assigned scope, leading service reviews, governance forums, and escalation management Ensuring service stability, resilience, and compliance, proactively identifying and mitigating delivery, regulatory, and operational risks Driving financial and commercial discipline, including cost\-to\-serve optimization, utilization efficiency, scope adherence, and value realization Overseeing capacity planning and demand\-supply management across the delivery organization in partnership with Workforce Management Leading performance governance rhythms, including executive\-level reporting, trend analysis, and corrective action execution Sponsoring and driving continuous improvement and transformation initiatives, including process standardization, automation, and digital enablement Supporting transitions, transformations, and scope expansions, ensuring smooth onboarding and stabilization of new services or geographies Contributing to account strategy, growth opportunities, and client value creation, in collaboration with Sales and Account Leadership Ensuring strong focus on people development, succession planning, engagement, and retention Championing Accenture core values, delivery excellence, and a culture of accountability and continuous improvement This role carries significant people\-management and financial accountability and is responsible for the overall health, performance, and client satisfaction of the assigned service portfolio.


  

Any Graduation

c24315d8.title: Technical Program Manager
c24315d8.description:
What You'll Do:

The Global Analytics \& Insights (GAI) team is seeking a Technical Program Manager to organize, coordinate, and accelerate delivery across Data \& Analytics Engineering programs. You will work with engineering teams, analytics stakeholders, product partners, and business leaders to ensure complex projects are delivered in a coordinated, transparent, and predictable manner.


As a Technical Program Manager, you will play a key role in managing integrated delivery plans, tracking dependencies, driving release readiness, and ensuring teams have the clarity, resources, and communication needed to deliver successfully. You will be the source of truth for program status, risks, timelines, scope, and delivery health. You'll be collaborative and comfortable working across engineering, analytics, and business teams to solve complex delivery problems. You will report to Director, Data \& Analytics Engineering.


What Your Responsibilities Will Be:

As a Technical Program Manager, you will work with teams to organize and accelerate delivery, ensuring that you align all teams, manage dependencies, and make outputs production ready at launch.

* You will plan, execute, and deliver projects from inception to completion related to data platforms, analytics engineering, cloud infrastructure, and business\-critical data programs.
* You will describe and maintain integrated plans that account for internal and external dependencies, differing delivery approaches, delivery constraints, and contingencies for unplanned delays.
* You will manage the end\-to\-end delivery of engineering work across the organization and dependent teams.
* You will report progress, identify gaps between teams and processes, and remove blockers that impact delivery. Colleagues will look to you as the first contact for program status and delivery coordination.
* You will provide the right information and supporting data to the right audience at the right time.
* You will transform raw thoughts, ambiguity, and scattered inputs into clear, concise, actionable communications.
* Plan, execute, and deliver Data \& Analytics Engineering programs from inception to completion, ensuring alignment across engineering, analytics, product, and business stakeholders.
* You'll build and maintain integrated program plans covering scope, milestones, owners, dependencies, risks, delivery timelines, release readiness, and contingency plans.
* Track delivery health and provide clear, data\-driven updates on progress, blockers, scope, timing, milestone status, and production launch readiness.
* You'll manage cross\-team dependencies, identify gaps between teams or systems, and remove blockers to ensure outputs are production ready at launch.
* Run planning sessions, delivery reviews, dependency reviews, retrospectives, stakeholder updates, and launch readiness meetings.
* Partner with data engineers, analytics engineers, architects, and technical leads to understand technical scope, implementation risks, and delivery dependencies across SQL, Snowflake, dbt, Power BI, AWS, Terraform, CI/CD, and related data platform capabilities.
* Support initial merge request reviews by validating delivery readiness, documentation completeness, dependency impact, test evidence, and alignment to agreed scope before deeper technical review by engineers or SMEs.
* Maintain high\-quality documentation, including project plans, decision logs, risk registers, dependency trackers, launch plans, meeting notes, and stakeholder communications.
* Use AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT Enterprise, or approved internal AI assistants to improve productivity, summarize meetings, draft clear communications, strengthen documentation, identify risks, and improve overall program effectiveness.
* Build relationships with engineers, managers, peers, product partners, finance stakeholders, and analytics consumers while improving delivery processes using data and retrospectives.


What You'll Need to be Successful:
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Analytics, Business, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 7\+ years of experience in technical program management, engineering program management, data platform delivery, analytics program delivery, or related roles.
* Experience with Data \& Analytics Engineering concepts, including data pipelines, data modeling, analytics platforms, cloud data warehouses, and modern data stack delivery.
* Working knowledge of SQL, Snowflake, dbt, Power BI, AWS, Terraform, CI/CD practices, and infrastructure\-as\-code delivery models.
* Experience managing cross\-functional technical programs with multiple teams, team members, dependencies, delivery constraints, and production launch requirements.
* The ability to convert complex technical details and raw inputs into clear, audience\-appropriate updates.
* Stakeholder management and identify blockers, evaluate tradeoffs, and lead practical decisions.
* Experience running meetings and maintaining delivery artifacts using tools such as Jira, Confluence, Smartsheet, Google Workspace, or equivalent tools.
* Perform initial MR reviews for delivery completeness, documentation quality, test evidence, dependency impact, and scope alignment while partnering with engineers for detailed technical validation.
* Practical experience using AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT Enterprise, or approved internal AI assistants to improve productivity, communication quality, meeting summaries, documentation, risk identification, and decision support.
* Define program strategy while trying to find direction from peers or managers.

 **Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience working in Data \& Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Engineering, Finance Analytics, or cloud data platform organizations.
* Experience supporting programs involving Snowflake, dbt, AWS, Power BI, Airflow, Python, or similar data engineering technologies.
* Experience working with Finance, Sales, Marketing, Customer, or Product data domains.
* Experience managing release readiness, production launch planning, dependency management, or enterprise\-scale delivery coordination.
* Experience creating executive\-level program updates, dashboards, delivery scorecards, or operational reporting.
* Experience with Agile, Scrum, Kanban, SAFe, or hybrid delivery models.
* PMP, CSM, SAFe, AWS, Snowflake, dbt, or other relevant certifications.
* Experience working with globally distributed teams across multiple time zones.


\#LI\-Onsite


Avalara is an AI\-first Company:

AI is embedded in our workflows, decision\-making, and products. Success here requires embracing AI as an essential capability.* You’ll bring experience using AI and AI\-related technologies, ready to thrive here.
* You’ll apply AI every day to business challenges \- improving efficiency, contributing solutions, and driving results for your team, our company, and our customers.
* You’ll grow with AI by staying curious about new trends and best practices, and by sharing what you learn so others can benefit too.


How We'll Take Care of You:

Total Rewards


In addition to a great compensation package, paid time off, and paid parental leave, many Avalara employees are eligible for bonuses.

  

Health \& Wellness  

Benefits vary by location but generally include private medical, life, and disability insurance.  

Inclusive culture and diversity  

Avalara strongly supports diversity, equity, and inclusion, and is committed to integrating them into our business practices and our organizational culture. We also have a total of 8 employee\-run resource groups, each with senior leadership and exec sponsorship.  


What You Need To Know About Avalara:

We’re defining the relationship between tax and tech.  

We’ve already built an industry\-leading cloud compliance platform, processing over 54 billion customer API calls and over 6\.6 million tax returns a year. Our growth is real \- we're a billion dollar business \- and we’re not slowing down until we’ve achieved our mission \- to be part of every transaction in the world.  

We’re bright, innovative, and disruptive, like the orange we love to wear. It captures our quirky spirit and optimistic mindset. It shows off the culture we’ve designed, that empowers our people to win. We’ve been different from day one. Join us, and your career will be too. **We’re An Equal Opportunity Employer**
Supporting diversity and inclusion is a cornerstone of our company — we don’t want people to fit into our culture, but to enrich it. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, age, gender, national orientation, disability, sexual orientation, US Veteran status, or any other factor protected by law. If you require any reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know.

32b63074.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Relay Central (TTS)
32b63074.description:
**Description**
 If you are looking for an opportunity to solve deep technical problems and drive large\-scale cross\-functional initiatives in a fast\-paced environment working with smart, passionate engineers and business leaders, this might be the role for you.
   

  

 Within the Transportation Technology and Services organization, Relay Central delivers a seamless, intelligent, and trusted foundation that empowers Amazon’s middle mile carriers to thrive in a fast\-moving, complex environment. We believe that great products and experiences should enable carriers to focus on what matters most — safety, reliability, operational excellence, and growing their business with Amazon.
   

  

 Relay Central’s mission is to help carriers succeed while insisting on the highest standards across safety, compliance, trust, and delivery quality. We are building the systems, experiences, and operational mechanisms that simplify complexity, reduce friction, and create confidence for carriers operating within Amazon’s transportation network.
   

  

 By unifying essential capabilities into one cohesive experience, we enable smooth onboarding, effective trip management, trusted operational support, and engaging loyalty experiences. Our vision is to become the trusted control tower for carriers — delivering the right insights, tools, and intelligent experiences that unlock carrier potential and help shape the future of transportation.
   

  

 Our team is actively seeking motivated and multi\-talented individuals who are passionate about reinventing and transforming transportation and logistics operations while maintaining a relentless focus on customer trust and operational excellence.
   

  

 As a Senior Technical Program Manager, you will lead complex, cross\-functional programs that power the Relay Central platform and carrier experience. You will partner closely with engineering, product, operations, and business stakeholders to deliver scalable solutions that improve carrier success while upholding Amazon’s high bar for quality, reliability, and customer trust.
   

  

 You will own roadmap planning, dependency management, execution mechanisms, and delivery for strategic initiatives spanning multiple teams and organizations. This role requires strong technical depth, excellent judgment, and the ability to influence across organizations. You should be a self\-starter with a bias for action who can balance long\-term vision with operational rigor in highly ambiguous environments.
   

  

 Successful candidates will have a proven track record of driving large\-scale technical programs, simplifying complex problems, and delivering measurable business impact while maintaining high standards in execution.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Lead large\-scale technical programs and strategic initiatives across Relay Central and partner organizations
   

  

 Drive initiatives that improve carrier experience, operational efficiency, platform scalability, and trust
   

  

 Partner with engineering teams to design simple, scalable, and sustainable solutions to complex business and technical challenges
   

  

 Establish mechanisms that raise the bar on execution, operational excellence, and delivery quality
   

  

 Drive roadmap planning, execution tracking, dependency management, and release coordination across multiple teams
   

  

 Work backwards from carrier and business needs to influence product and technical direction
   

  

 Identify risks proactively and drive alignment across technical and non\-technical stakeholders
   

  

 Communicate program status, risks, and trade\-offs clearly to senior leadership and partner teams
   

  

 Use data\-driven decision making to improve customer outcomes and operational performance
   

  

 Help build a culture of ownership, continuous improvement, and high standards across teams
   

  

 Professional traits that are not unique to this position, but necessary for Amazon leaders
   

  

 Exhibits excellent judgment
   

  

 Earns trust across technical and business teams
   

  

 Has relentlessly high standards and insists on operational excellence
   

  

 Is able to dive deep and stay connected to both business and technical details
   

  

 Thinks strategically while maintaining strong execution focus
   

  

 Demonstrates strong ownership and bias for action
   

  

 Has passion and conviction and the ability to inspire others
   

  

 Thinks big while remaining customer obsessed
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical discipline
   

  

 3\+ years of technical program management experience working directly with software engineering teams
   

  

 Experience managing large\-scale cross\-functional technical programs
   

  

 Experience driving roadmap strategy, execution planning, and release coordination
   

  

 Experience working with distributed systems and scalable software architectures
   

  

 Excellent written and verbal communication skills
   

  

 Experience that will make you successful in this role
   

  

 Strong technical depth with the ability to engage deeply with engineers and architects
   

  

 Proven track record of delivering complex technical initiatives in fast\-paced environments
   

  

 Ability to influence across organizations and align diverse stakeholders toward common goals
   

  

 Experience defining mechanisms and processes that improve execution at scale
   

  

 Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with attention to detail
   

  

 Ability to balance strategic thinking with operational execution
   

  

 Passion for improving customer and carrier experiences through technology and operational excellence
   

  

 Experience in transportation, logistics, marketplace, or operational technology domains is a plus
   

  

 Exceptional customer focus and ability to translate business needs into scalable technical solutions
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

71755a4c.title: Program Manager
71755a4c.description:
**What You’ll Do**
 The Bangalore Site Program Manager will be responsible for leading Integrated Project Teams to successfully execute projects according to the Eaton PROLaunch Process through effective guidance, product development, customer satisfaction, efficient resource allocation and reliable reporting to leadership. This includes Transitions Projects (STP), New Product Introductions (NPI) and/or critical business projects and their budget allocations.
   

  

* Manages the Profit and Loss of New Product Introduction (NPI) and Standard Transition Projects (STP). Responsibility, Authority and Accountability for every project scope delivery and successful execution within, technical, schedule, budget, cost, and quality commitments.
* Executes Integrated Product Team (IPT) leadership across all projects. Seeks team input to promote rapid resolution to issues. Coaches and provide feedback on performance indicators.
* Maintain the Master Plan of assigned Projects and Schedules. Forecast, provide and maintain the program milestone attainment metrics with Integrated Program Schedule on a regular basis. Provide critical path analysis, schedule change impact statements and schedule recovery planning.
* Establishes objectives and goals and provides direction to the program and project teams in areas of customer concerns, potential changes in scope and risk assessment.
* Facilitates the implementation of program management processes at the site.
* Ensure standard program management processes are utilized and adequate support to the program and project teams by coordinating Program Management reviews, preparing \& publishing metrics and reports.
* Manage effective customer communications. Provides overall Program interface with the customer. Improve organization responsiveness to customer requirements. Communication and managing customer expectations and contractual commitments internal to the business.
* Effectively manages program risks. Leads IPT teams to define project risks and proactively identify risk mitigation actions. Coordinates all risks and requirements of the program into a completely integrated entity. This is accomplished by planning, controlling, and integrating all projects into the programs, and measuring all elements to ensure the requirements and goals are successfully achieved.
* Manages customer contract, pricing, terms and conditions and contractual flow\-down through the organization. Establish and negotiate pricing strategies by system and/or product, market and by customer. Develop contract negotiation strategies. Ensure effective change management processes are utilized.
* Provides monthly program updates of current situation relating to contractual milestones and problem/high risk areas (e.g., technical, cost, and schedule). Provides updates to the business units as well as divisional, and group levels.
* Plays a key role in developing new business proposals and executing the overall program plan.


**Qualifications**
* B.E/B.Tech; MBA an added advantage.
* 8\-10 years in Project/Program Management. Experience of managing manufacturing projects across global teams is essential.


**Skills**
* PMP, ProLaunch or equivalent
* Excellent communication skills; Strong leadership skills; Proficient in English

7f53b534.title: Principal Program Manager, LMAQ
7f53b534.description:
**Description**
 When you attract people who have the DNA of pioneers and the DNA of explorers, you build a company of like\-minded people who want to invent. And that’s what they think about when they get up in the morning: how are we going to work backwards from customers and build a great service or a great product” – Jeff Bezos. Amazon.com’s success is built on a foundation of customer obsession.
   

  

 Have you ever thought about what it takes to successfully deliver millions of packages to Amazon customers seamlessly every day like clock work? In order to make that happen, behind those millions of packages, billions of decisions get made by machines and humans. What is the accuracy of the customer provided address? Do we know exact location of the address on a Map? Is there a safe place to leave the package at? Can we make an unattended delivery? Would a signature be required? Is the address a commercial property? Do we know open business hours of the address? What if customer is not home? Is there an alternate delivery address? Does the customer have any special delivery preference? What are the other addresses that also have packages to be delivered on the same day? Are we optimizing the delivery associate’s route? Does the delivery associate know the locality well enough? Is there an access code to get inside the building? And the list simply goes on. At the core of it all is the underlying data that can help make those decisions in time. The Last Mile Analytics and Quality (LMAQ) team capitalizes on Amazon’s scale, speed, and ability to invent and simplify to accelerate the data flywheel and curate fresh and authoritative geospatial datasets to improve customer delivery experience. We work closely with tech and science teams on multiple initiatives to automate processes to operate at scale across all regions.
   

  

**Skills**
 Amazon is seeking an experienced leader to drive the executive customer escalations process for all Geospatial teams. As a Principal Program Manager with the Last Mile Analytics and Quality (LMAQ) team, you will partner with program, technology, science and operations teams to deep dive on customer reported delivery defects and identify strategic long term solutions to improve customer delivery experience. As a key member of the LMAQ org, you will continually raise the bar on innovation for great customer experience. You will bring innovation, a strategic perspective, a passionate voice, and an ability to prioritize and execute on a fast\-moving set of priorities, competitive pressures, and operational initiatives. You will partner closely with product, technology and sciences teams to define and build innovative and delightful experiences for customers. You must be highly analytical, able to work extremely effectively in a matrix organization, and have the ability to break complex problems down into steps that drive product development at Amazon speed. You will set the tempo for defect reduction through continuous improvement and drive accountability across multiple business units in order to deliver large scale high visibility/ high impact projects. Excellent communication and writing skills and executive presence to get in front of VPs and SVPs across Amazon will be imperative. You will need to work in a high pace environment with pressing timelines. The successful candidate will be able to:
   

  

* Effectively manage customer expectations and resolve conflicts that balance client and company needs.
* Drive effective teamwork, communication, collaboration and commitment across multiple disparate groups with competing priorities.
* Develop process to effectively maintain and disseminate project information to stakeholders.
* Be successful in a delivery focused environment and determine the right processes to innovate on behalf of customers.
* This opportunity requires excellent technical, problem solving, and communication skills. The candidate is not just a policy maker/spokesperson but drives to get things done.
* Possess superior analytical abilities and judgment. Use quantitative and qualitative data to prioritize and influence, show creativity, experimentation and innovation, and drive projects with urgency in this fast\-paced environment.
* Partner with key stakeholders to develop the vision and strategy for customer experience on our platforms. Influence product roadmaps based on this strategy to identify medium and long term goals.
* With the business growing rapidly, this leader will not have the luxury of having a tunnel\-vision for any one area; rather, this individual will need to exhibit excellent judgment on how to prioritize between competing priorities.
* Serve as a role model for Amazon Leadership Principles inside and outside the organization.
* Actively seek to implement and distribute best practices across teams.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Write executive responses on the escalations and anecdotes working with Geo Spatial product, tech, program, sciences and operations teams.
* Define, own and drive large cross\-functional programs spanning multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Collaborate with product, tech and sciences teams within the Last Mile Technology to drive global programs and systems improvements and reduce customer defects.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 7\+ years of program or project management experience
* 7\+ years of managing, analyzing and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Experience implementing repeatable processes and driving automation or standardization
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience delivering projects within scope, time, budget and quality


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ

dee330a2.description:
**Program Manager ADAS Infotainment Cockpit\- India Region Chennai**
 Help shape the future of mobility.
   

  

 Imagine a world with zero vehicle accidents, zero vehicle emissions, and wireless vehicle connectivity all around us. Every day, we move closer to making that world a reality. Aptiv’s passionate team of engineers and developers creates advanced safety systems, high\-performance electrification solutions and data connectivity solutions so that automakers can bring advanced capabilities to more people around the globe. This is how we enable sustainable mobility and help to prevent accidents caused by human error.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Drive \& own E2E program planning and execution including program P\&L margins; ensure high customer satisfaction for programs delivered.
* Drive end\-to\-end planning (from Program award to Program end of life) and execution of all programs for assigned customer(s)
* Drive global program P\&L for the assigned customer group including above market margin growth for all programs leveraging relevant products \& services
* Define and execute global program strategy for assigned customers leveraging program management targets set by Region MDs and coordinating planning and execution with sales, Regional Mfg., S.C., and Quality Lead, and engineering teams
* Manage implementation and iteration for assigned customer groups and coordinate roll out with Product org, Service org, and Regional Eng. team
* Own program lifecycle for assigned customer groups (from Program award to Program end of life)
* Work closely with Engineering Program Leaders (EPLs) to manage overall program budget and timeline
* Drive / coordinate material improvement initiatives to improve financial metrics together with engineering and CPO team
* Maintain high customer satisfaction and ensure timely and quality resolution of all customer escalations and complaints through Flawless Launch
* Work with Customer Sales Lead to ensure adherence to contract throughout program delivery

**Your Background**
 Key ingredients for succeeding in this role are your:
   

  

* BE/B.Tech (Electricals/Electronics/ Communication/ Instrumentation/ Robotics)/Any PG with an experience of 14\-20 years
* \#EXP\[14\-20]
* Automotive program management experience in customer interfacing roles
* Ability to create a joint force with commercial and engineering executives and drive flawless execution of programs within defined budget by supporting growth over market
* Proven experience managing a variety of tasks and ensuring all employees responsible are empowered with E2E accountability
* Strong understanding in early program risk identification and initiating countermeasures or installing task force teams in time
* Embodiment of company values and adherence to highest professional standards
* Ability to promote strong collaboration across other OEM groups, programs, products, and services to support a unified and coordinated commercial approach
* Provider of honest feedback, and employs rigorous talent management practices to develop and retain talent


**Why join us?**

Aptiv provides an inclusive work environment where all individuals can grow and develop, regardless of gender, ethnicity or beliefs.
* You can have an impact. Safety is a core Aptiv value; we want a safer world for us and our children, one with: Zero fatalities, Zero injuries, Zero accidents.
* You have support. Our team is our most valuable asset. We ensure you have the resources and support you need to take care of your family and your physical and mental health with a competitive health insurance package.


**Your Benefits at Aptiv:**

23e95328.title: Sr. Program Manager AI
23e95328.description:
**Job Description**
**Purpose of the Job**
 The purpose of the Senior Project Manager (AI Transformation) role is to work together with SBG leaders and AI evangelists in HTCS to implement and adopt AI tools across HTCS, and to lead a structured upskilling initiative that builds a strong AI culture, defines and enables key AI roles, and delivers role\-based AI trainings across all job levels. The role partners closely with SBG Engineering leaders, HR leaders, and cross\-functional stakeholders to translate the AI transformation roadmap into measurable business outcomes, sustainable operating rhythms, and scaled change adoption.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Principal Responsibilities**
 The principal responsibility is to plan, execute, and govern HTCS AI transformation initiatives by contributing in the following areas:
   

  

* Own and manage the HTCS AI Transformation program plan (scope, milestones, budget/benefits, dependencies, risks, and change impacts) and establish the governance cadence (steering committee, workstream reviews, and KPI reporting).
* Drive implementation and scaled adoption of priority AI tools within HTCS (e.g., copilots, knowledge assistants, automation, analytics/ML solutions), ensuring alignment to business problems, data/security requirements, and user needs.
* Build and maintain a prioritized AI use\-case portfolio with SBG Engineering and HTCS function leaders; define value hypotheses, success metrics, and realization tracking (productivity, quality, cycle time, cost, and user satisfaction).
* Lead the HTCS AI upskilling program end\-to\-end: training needs assessment, role\-based curricula, learning pathways, communications, learning logistics, completion tracking, and effectiveness measurement.
* Partner with HR/L\&D to define AI capability frameworks and key AI roles across HTCS (e.g., AI Product Owner, Citizen Developer, Prompt Engineer, Data Steward, AI Champion) and embed them into talent processes (hiring, onboarding, performance and career paths).
* Establish and run change management and communications to build AI culture (campaigns, showcases, communities of practice, office hours, playbooks, adoption toolkits) and drive engagement across all job levels.
* Coordinate cross\-functional readiness for AI deployments (IT, Cybersecurity, Legal, Data Privacy, Procurement, Finance) including access models, data governance, responsible AI controls, and operational support models.
* Develop standard processes and templates for AI use\-case intake, evaluation, delivery, and scaling (business case, data assessment, model/tool selection, validation, rollout, and sustainment).
* Facilitate alignment between HTCS and SBG Engineering leaders on priorities, resourcing, and decision\-making; prepare executive\-level materials (status, risks, decisions required, benefits realized).
* Track and report program health and adoption outcomes using dashboards (training completion, active users, usage patterns, NPS, productivity indicators) and drive corrective actions to ensure delivery.
* Ensure knowledge transfer and long\-term sustainment by establishing an AI community network, documenting standards, and enabling function owners to run AI tools and trainings as part of normal operations.


**Principal Networks \& Contact Links**
* HTCS leadership team and function leaders; SBG Engineering leaders; AI/Digital leaders and product owners.
* HR / L\&D leaders and training partners; change management and communications teams.
* IT, Cybersecurity, Legal, Data Privacy, Procurement, Finance, and other enabling functions supporting AI deployments.


**Supervisory Responsibilities**
* No direct reports; leads through influence in a matrix organization and coordinates cross\-functional workstreams (AI tools, training, change management, governance) to deliver outcomes.
* Ability to mobilize stakeholders, facilitate decision\-making, remove blockers, and ensure delivery across multiple sites and time zones.


**Geographic Scope \& Travel Requirements**
 The position is based out of Bangalore, India, and may require occasional travel to other HTCS and SBG Engineering locations globally as required.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Education Required**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related discipline. Master’s degree (MBA/MS) is a plus.
* Project/Program Management certification (PMP/PRINCE2/Agile) preferred. AI/ML, data analytics, or cloud certifications are a strong advantage


**Work Experience Required**
 10\+ years of experience managing complex transformation programs and cross\-functional initiatives in a matrix environment, including strong exposure to digital/AI enablement, technology adoption, and organizational change.
   

  

**Experience Essential In**
* Program/project management for enterprise\-scale deployments (multiple stakeholders, dependencies, and workstreams).
* Driving adoption of technology products/tools (user journeys, change management, training enablement, and communications).
* Working knowledge of AI concepts and tooling (GenAI, copilots, prompt practices, automation, data/analytics), with the ability to translate between business and technical teams.
* Stakeholder management and executive communication, including steering committee facilitation and decision documentation.
* Operating in environments with strong governance expectations (data privacy, cybersecurity, compliance) and experience coordinating approvals and controls.
* Benefits realization and KPI tracking for transformation outcomes (productivity, quality, cycle time, cost, and user adoption).


**Experience Not Essential But Desirable**
* Experience with learning design/academy programs, communities of practice, or enterprise capability building initiatives.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Demonstrated delivery of digital/AI initiatives from concept through rollout, including adoption and sustainment.
* Strong facilitation and storytelling skills to simplify AI concepts for non\-technical audiences and influence leaders.
* Hands\-on proficiency with common productivity and collaboration tools (e.g., MS 365\) and familiarity with AI enablement tools/workflows.


**Behavioural Competencies Required**
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills – able to operate across functions, countries, and cultural boundaries.
* Should be able to demonstrate all Honeywell behaviours, specifically Act with Urgency, Think big and make it happen, Be courageous and inspire greatness


**Language Requirements**
* Must be able to effectively communicate in English


**About Us**
 Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.
