bb5c42fc.title: PRE-SALES & POST-SALES TECHNICAL CONSULTANT
bb5c42fc.description:
**Company Description** 
 Corponizers is a corporate facilitator dedicated to connecting job seekers with roles that align with their skills and aspirations. The organization partners with businesses worldwide to deliver recruitment services focused on high\-quality talent acquisition and tailored solutions. Corponizers emphasizes innovative practices, collaboration, and integrity, creating an environment where team members and clients can succeed together. Trusted as a go\-to recruitment expert, the company is committed to promoting diversity, equity, and positive change in the global workforce. Its mission is to help organizations meet their goals while enabling individuals to build meaningful careers.
   

**Role Description** 
 The PRE\-SALES \& POST\-SALES TECHNICAL CONSULTANT is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Sundargarh. This position involves engaging with prospective clients to understand their technical and business needs, preparing solution proposals, and supporting product demonstrations. The consultant will collaborate with sales teams to design tailored solutions, respond to technical queries, and assist in closing deals. Post\-sales, the role includes providing technical support, troubleshooting issues, guiding clients through implementation, and ensuring successful adoption of solutions. The consultant will document client requirements, maintain accurate records of interactions, and contribute to continuous improvement of services and processes.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong Analytical Skills to assess client requirements, evaluate solutions, and interpret technical and business data.
* Consulting experience to advise clients on best\-fit solutions and align offerings with their strategic objectives.
* Technical Support and Troubleshooting skills to resolve issues, provide guidance during implementation, and ensure customer satisfaction.
* Sales\-related capabilities to assist in pre\-sales activities, support the sales team, and help drive successful deal closures.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills to interact with clients, explain technical concepts clearly, and prepare documentation.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams and manage multiple client engagements simultaneously.
* Relevant academic background in Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or a related field is preferred.
* Prior experience in a technical consulting, pre\-sales, or post\-sales support role will be an advantage.

f0b3282e.title: Client Solution Manager-JL6-CSG
f0b3282e.description:
* Collaborate with sales teams to identify customer requirements and pain points through active listening and insightful questioning.
* Design and present compelling network solutions that address customer challenges and business objectives, utilizing clear and concise communication.
* Develop and deliver impactful presentations and demonstrations to showcase our network solutions, leveraging your presentation skills.
* Work closely with internal teams (engineering, marketing) to develop proposal responses/solution documents.
* Stay up to date on the latest network technologies and industry trends through continuous learning.
* Participate in industry events and conferences to build relationships and generate new leads, utilizing your strong interpersonal skills and client relationship building abilities.

61c6cf0b.title: Senior Pre-Sales Consultant
61c6cf0b.description:
****Responsibilities:****
* To work closely with Sales / Channel Team in approaching new engagements/prospects to find out and document the requirements and key findings. Perform solution mapping and relay requirements to Pre\-Sales Team for demonstrations.
* To conduct product demonstrations with focus on Microsoft Defender, Entra ID, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Sentinel, Defender for Cloud \& Azure Security.
* To provide assistance to the Sales / Channel Team in preparing Presentation Slides, Solution Proposals, solution BOM, Response to RFP and Tenders.
* Work closely with Sales / Channel Teams to ensure customer security requirements are addressed using Microsoft\-native security solutions, with or without the inclusion of approved third\-party products distributed by the company.
* Assist Sales / Channel Teams in preparing presentation decks, security solution proposals, BOMs, RFP/Tender responses, and technical compliance documentation.
* To perform research on respective solution domain technologies and how it can enhance solution or product positioning. If there are other technologies that can value add to the position, it should also be incorporated.
* To work closely with the Sales / Channel Team and Post\-Sales Team in preparing Solution Plays \& blueprints for enablement.
* Support In\-Country Pre\-Sales team with technical guidance.
* To assist and jointly execute a hand\-over meeting upon successful win to the Post\-Sales Team with the Sales / Channel Team and Pre\-Sales Team.
* To be updated with latest changes or new products introduced by principals and/or 3rd party vendors.
* To fulfill and undergo product certification trainings as required.
* To understand and execute company's marketing strategies and understand competitors' products, services and strategies, feedback to management on plans and strategies.
* Participate in exhibitions to showcase products/solutions, capture leads, network with audiences to be closely updated with industry trends and needs.
* Represent solutions at Tech Data, vendor, and partner\-led events
* Any other duties as and when assigned from time to time.
* Validates pre\-sales solutions design and sizing.
* Coaches and mentor pre\-sales team
* Leads the technical discussion with suppliers on new initiatives.
* Responsible for cross solutions bundles.
* Continuously upskill and maintain relevant product certifications.
* Open to expand technical skills around Azure.
* Attends QBR sessions with sales.


****Knowledge, Skills and Experience:****
* Proficient knowledge in Microsoft 365 Security, Entra ID, Defender Suite, Microsoft Sentinel, Azure Security (Defender for Cloud, Azure Network Security, Key Vault, IAM)
* Bachelor's degree in information technology/computer science or equivalent experience certifications preferred.
* 7\+ years of experience with Minimum of 4 years relevant working experience, ideally in IT multinational environment.
* Track record on the assigned line Cards experience is an added advantage.
* IT Distributor and/or SI experience would also be an added advantage.
* Have good communication in English, on the job understanding and problem\-solving skills.
* Proven ability to work independently, effectively in an off\-site environment and under high pressure.


 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* **Elective Benefits:** 
 Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* **Grow Your Career:** 
 Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on\-demand courses.
* **Elevate Your Personal Well\-Being:** 
 Boost your financial, physical, and mental well\-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* **Diversity, Equity \& Inclusion:** 
 It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer\-to\-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* **Make the Most of our Global Organization** 
 : Network with other new co\-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* **Connect with Your Community:** 
 Participate in internal, peer\-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. This data will be used solely to improve our hiring practices and ensure fair treatment for all candidates.

0de0a0cb.title: Customer Solutions Design Specialist
0de0a0cb.description:
Job Title: Customer Solutions Design Specialist
   

  

 Req ID: 60657
   

  

 Job Function: Design
   

  

 Posting Start Date: 17/07/2026
   

  

 Posting End Date: 21/07/2026
   

  

 Division: UK Business
   

  

 Job Location: IND Gurugram \- Tower B and C
   

  

 Advertised Salary: Competitive
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Customer Solutions Design Specialist independently executes a range of workstreams in the creation of end\-to\-end technical designs, ensuring that business requirements are successful translated into deliverable solutions, which meet customer needs whilst considering the impact of those solutions on all technical and business areas.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Captures detailed customer technical requirements and translation to detailed solution design in accordance with design methodologies.
* Manages and recommends on the technical direction and helps determine the optimum solution design for customers.
* Manages the review and validation processes for both new developments and in\-life products and services, ensuring full integration across all aspects, considering the broad impact of solutions on the product roadmap.
* Drives the improvement of design and delivery capabilities for end\-to\-end technical solutions.
* Manages customer solution design engagement and statement of work creation, including any 3rd party deliverables.
* Facilitates the development of strong customer relationships at the senior level through providing specialist service design expertise, and influencing the customer's service strategy and operational decisions.
* Drives consistency in architecture and technical processes, with the aim of reducing costs and increasing productivity.
* Undertakes customer migration planning and implementation.
* Coordinates impact assessments and design documentation updates.
* Resolves complex solution and service issues, leads root cause analysis, troubleshooting and escalation.
* Pursues the identification of potential risks and the implementation of controls and mitigations, ensuring compliance with relevant industry and company policies.
* Ensures the delivery of thought leadership in complex bids and agreeing strategic approach as part of customer solution design.
* Mentors other customer solution designers, helping to improve the team's abilities by acting as a technical resource.
* Champions, continuously develops and shares with team knowledge on emerging trends and changes in customer solution design.


**Essential Skills / Experience**
**Desirable Skills / Experience**
**Our Package**

07ada9ce.title: Senior Microsoft Fabric Data Architect / Technical Lead
07ada9ce.description:
**Location:** Banglore  
**Experience:** 8\+ years

We are looking for a hands\-on Microsoft Fabric Data Architect to design and lead a modern enterprise data platform for a global manufacturing company.

This is not a traditional SAP implementation role. The focus is on extracting SAP and non\-SAP data, building scalable data models, automating reporting and preparing the platform for future AI use cases.

Responsibilities

· Design the Microsoft Fabric architecture using OneLake, Lakehouse, Warehouse and Power BI.

· Define SAP\-to\-Fabric data integration and incremental\-loading strategies.

· Build and guide ETL/ELT pipelines using Fabric Data Factory or Azure Data Factory.

· Design fact tables, dimensions, semantic models and business KPIs.

· Lead Excel\-report automation and executive dashboard development.

· Define data governance, security, quality and deployment standards.

· Work directly with business, SAP and technical stakeholders.

· Guide the Data Engineer and review technical implementation.

Required Skills

· Microsoft Fabric, OneLake, Lakehouse and Warehouse

· Strong SQL and dimensional data modelling

· Azure Data Factory or Fabric Data Factory

· Power BI and semantic modelling

· Python and ETL/ELT pipelines

· SAP ECC or S/4HANA data extraction

· Data governance and security

· Strong communication and technical leadership

Nice to Have

SAP CDS Views, SAP APIs, Spark, Synapse, Purview, Copilot, RAG, AI agents and manufacturing\-domain experience.

Pay: ₹1,000,000\.00 \- ₹2,600,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

ecdc00e5.title: Junior Solution Architect for System Design
ecdc00e5.description:
Junior Solution Architect / Technical Architect (Project Planning \& System Design Only)

We are looking for an experienced Solution Architect / Technical Architect to design the complete technical blueprint for our software projects before development begins.

This is NOT a development or coding role. Your responsibility is to analyze our requirements and prepare a complete implementation plan that our development team can follow.

What You’ll Do

For every new software project (CRM, ERP, SaaS, Admin Panel, Mobile App, etc.), you will create a detailed technical plan covering every aspect of the system.

**Example:**

\* CRM Platform  
\* Admin Dashboard  
\* Payment Management System  
\* Gym Management Platform  
\* Coach Management  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Finance \& Reporting

**Your Responsibilities**

Requirement Analysis

\* Understand the business workflow.  
\* Break down requirements into modules.  
\* Identify user roles and permissions.

System Architecture

\* Design the complete application architecture.  
\* Recommend frontend, backend, database, and cloud infrastructure.  
\* Explain why each technology is the best choice.

Database Design

\* Design SQL database schema.  
\* Create ER diagrams.  
\* Define tables, relationships, indexes, constraints, and naming conventions.  
\* Plan scalability and performance.

**User Roles \& Permissions**

Example:

\* Super Admin  
\* Company Owner  
\* Manager  
\* Coach  
\* Staff  
\* Accountant  
\* Customer  
\* Member

Define exactly what each role can access and modify.

**Module Planning**

Examples:

\* Dashboard  
\* CRM  
\* Lead Management  
\* Member Management  
\* Coach Management  
\* Staff Management  
\* Attendance  
\* Payments  
\* Cash Payments  
\* Online Payments  
\* Subscription Plans  
\* Expenses  
\* Invoices  
\* Notifications  
\* Reports  
\* Audit Logs  
\* Settings

**Payment Planning**

Plan complete payment workflows including:

\* Cash Payments  
\* Manual Payments  
\* UPI  
\* Credit/Debit Cards  
\* Subscription Billing  
\* Payment Links  
\* Payment History  
\* Refunds  
\* Failed Payments  
\* Reconciliation  
\* Accounting Reports

**Technology Recommendations**

Recommend the best stack, such as:

\* Frontend Framework  
\* Backend Framework  
\* SQL Database  
\* Authentication  
\* Email Service  
\* SMS Provider  
\* Push Notifications  
\* File Storage  
\* Cloud Hosting  
\* CDN  
\* Cache  
\* Queue System  
\* Search Engine  
\* Logging  
\* Monitoring  
\* Analytics

**API Planning**

\* API documentation  
\* Endpoint mapping  
\* Authentication flow  
\* Third\-party integrations  
\* Webhooks  
\* Error handling

**Documentation**

Prepare complete documentation including:

\* System Architecture  
\* Database Design  
\* ER Diagram  
\* API Specification  
\* Feature Mapping  
\* Workflow Diagrams  
\* User Flow  
\* Development Roadmap  
\* Milestones  
\* Technical Decisions  
\* Security Guidelines  
\* Deployment Strategy

**Example Project**

A Gym CRM Platform may include:

\* Super Admin Dashboard  
\* Gym Owner Dashboard  
\* Coach Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Membership Management  
\* Cash \& Online Payment Tracking  
\* Manual Payment Entry  
\* Subscription Management  
\* Reports \& Analytics  
\* Notifications  
\* Attendance  
\* Workout \& Nutrition Modules  
\* Invoice Generation  
\* Audit Logs

You will define exactly how every module works, how data flows between them, which SQL tables are required, which APIs are needed, and how the entire platform should be built.

**Required Skills**

* Solution Architecture
* System Design
* \* Database Architecture\* SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL)\* SaaS Architecture\* REST API Design\* Microservices (preferred)\* Cloud Architecture\* Security Best Practices\* UML / ER Diagrams\* Technical Documentation\* Business Process MappingDeliverablesWe expect a complete technical blueprint that allows developers to begin implementation immediately, with minimal clarification required. The documentation should include architecture diagrams, database schema, workflows, API planning, technology recommendations, security considerations, deployment strategy, and a structured development roadmap.

Pay: ₹25,000\.00 \- ₹40,000\.00 per month

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Ludhiana, Punjab (Ludhiana)

**Preferred Qualifications:**

2fb8216f.title: Infrastructure Architect
2fb8216f.description:
**Employment Type** 
 : Full Time
 



**Location** 
 : Remote
 



**Experience** 
 : Infrastructure Architecture, Cloud Infrastructure, Systems Architecture, or Enterprise Infrastructure Roles
 



  





**Company Description** 




 Scry AI is a research\-led enterprise AI company that builds intelligent platforms for BFSI, insurance, logistics, and industrial enterprises to drive efficiency, insight, and compliance. Our product suite includes Auriga for conversational AI, Collatio for document intelligence, and Concentio for cognitive IoT and operational intelligence. These platforms help clients convert complex, fragmented data into actionable enterprise intelligence.
 



  





 We are looking for an Infrastructure Architect to design, optimize, and manage scalable infrastructure that powers Scry AI’s enterprise AI platforms. This role is critical in ensuring high availability, security, performance, and scalability across our technology ecosystem.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 As an Infrastructure Architect at Scry AI, you will be responsible for designing cloud and on\-premises infrastructure, defining architecture standards, and supporting deployment strategies for enterprise applications. You will work closely with engineering, DevOps, security, and product teams to build resilient and future\-ready infrastructure.
 



  





 This role is ideal for someone who is technically strong, strategic, and experienced in designing enterprise\-scale infrastructure in a fast\-paced environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Infrastructure Architecture \& Design** 



* Design scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure solutions
* Define architecture standards, deployment models, and infrastructure roadmaps
* Ensure infrastructure supports business growth and product scalability



  





**Cloud \& Platform Management** 



* Architect solutions across cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Optimize compute, storage, networking, and resource utilization
* Support hybrid and multi\-cloud infrastructure strategies where applicable



  





**Security \& Reliability** 



* Implement infrastructure security best practices and access controls
* Ensure high availability, disaster recovery, backup, and business continuity planning
* Monitor infrastructure health and optimize system performance



  





**Collaboration \& Technical Leadership** 



* Work closely with engineering, DevOps, and security teams
* Provide technical guidance on infrastructure\-related decisions
* Support architecture reviews and infrastructure planning initiatives



  





**Governance \& Continuous Improvement** 



* Develop infrastructure standards, documentation, and best practices
* Identify opportunities for automation and operational efficiency
* Stay updated with emerging infrastructure technologies and architecture trends



  





**Required Qualifications and Skills** 



* Strong experience in infrastructure architecture or enterprise infrastructure roles
* Expertise in cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Strong understanding of networking, virtualization, storage, and security
* Experience with infrastructure automation and container technologies
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities



  





**Our Ideal Candidate** 



* Is strategic and technically driven
* Can design secure, scalable, and resilient infrastructure
* Is proactive in optimizing performance and reliability
* Collaborates effectively with engineering and operations teams
* Thrives in a fast\-paced, technology\-driven environment
* Is interested in AI, cloud technologies, and enterprise architecture



  





 If this role interests you, follow our page to stay updated on more job opportunities and insights into how AI companies build secure, scalable, and high\-performance technology infrastructure.

d05008db.title: Solution Architect
d05008db.description:
**About The Role**
 We are seeking a skilled Solution Architect to join our dynamic GMDIT team in Bangalore, India. In this role, you will be accountable for designing the overall structure and organization of an organization's data assets within an Azure based modern data estate. You’ll be responsible for defining how data is stored, organized, integrated, and accessed within an organization. You will work closely with business and technical stakeholders from various departments to understand their data needs and requirements, while leading the team of GM associates located in the GCC working in Data \& Analytics. You should have a good understanding of data modeling, data architecture, and database design principles to ensure that the systems created are scalable, reliable, secure and efficient.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the team of GM associates in GCC for Data \& Analytics (D\&A) needs while developing and coordinating team activities with the D\&A Leader.
* Work across business stakeholders and technical teams to create solution architectures that align the technical solution to the business objectives.
* Oversee the development, testing and deployment of solutions for processing and analyzing data using Azure services including Databricks.
* Create and maintain detailed documentation of architecture designs and processes inclusive of reference architecture, data models, patterns, best practices, and guidance.
* Identify the need for, oversee the creation of, and monitor the alignment to applicable standards and principles.
* Oversee the performance monitoring and optimization of data pipelines, while ensuring chosen solutions implement applicable security measures (e.g., encryption, access controls, auditing) and regional compliance rules.
* Implement data governance to ensure data quality, consistency, and compliance within and across pipelines.
* Within a data catalog maintain metadata to describe data models, their structures, and their semantics.
* Participate in, or lead when needed, governance processes including intake, prioritization, and root cause analysis.
* Keep up to date with the latest data\-related technologies, trends, and industry standards to be able to provide recommendations to enhance analytics capabilities on Azure.


**Required Qualifications**
* Minimum bachelor’s degree in computer science or related area (or equivalent).
* Minimum 6 years of industry experience.
* Proficiency in Azure, Databricks environment, as well as Fabric (PBI).
* Strong understanding of data structures, data architecture, modeling, governance \& management.
* Effective communication with an ability to collaborate with global team members and business stakeholders, with ability to translate business objectives into technical solutions.
* Demonstrated problem solving and systems thinking.
* Travel \~10%.


**Desired Qualifications**
* Experience in Azure DevOps, GitHub.
* Working Experience in SDLC Process.
* Experience with machine learning frameworks and tools.

831a7dd1.title: Software Architect
831a7dd1.description:
**About Ennoventure** 




 Ennoventure is a B2B SaaS company delivering invisible product authentication and anti\-counterfeiting technology embedded directly into packaging. Our platform empowers global enterprises like Nestle, Unilever, Denso, CNH, Gulf Oil, Godrej, and many more to protect their products, safeguard supply chains, and eliminate counterfeit risks.Our mission is to build a world where authenticity prevails and every product and experience is verifiably genuine.
 



  





**Your role** 




 As Software Architect, you will own the end\-to\-end technical architecture of our platform — front\-end, backend, data, and infrastructure — as we scale a system that authenticates products for global enterprise brands in real time, at massive volume.
 



 You will set the architectural foundation for a company built with an “agentic\-first” engineering culture, where AI agents are first\-class participants in how we design, build, and ship software. You will partner closely with engineering, product, data science, and leadership to translate our roadmap into resilient, secure, and scalable systems.
 



  





**What will you do?** 




  





 •
 **End\-to\-End Architecture Ownership:** 
 . Own and evolve the end\-to\-end technical architecture across web, mobile, back\-end, data, and cloud infrastructure, ensuring scalability, reliability, and consistency across the platform.
 



 •
 **Platform Scalability \& Reliability** 
 : Architect systems that authenticate products at global scale — high\-throughput image and ML pipelines, sub\-second API response targets, and horizontal scalability across regions.
 



 •
 **Full\-Stack Technology Strategy** 
 : Define and document architectural decisions across front\-end frameworks, backend microservices, data infrastructure, and DevOps — balancing build\-vs\-buy, technical debt, and long\-term maintainability.
 



 •
 **Agentic\-Ready Architecture:** 
 Partner with engineering leadership to architect systems, contracts, and workflows that work equally well for human engineers and AI coding/QA agents — including agent\-consumable APIs and MCP\-based tooling.
 



 •
 **Data \& ML Infrastructure** 
 : Design data storage and pipeline strategy across relational, NoSQL, and vector/RAG stores to support both application data and ML\-driven authentication workloads.
 



 •
 **Cloud \& DevOps Architecture:** 
 Define cloud infrastructure architecture (containerized, Kubernetes\-based, multi\-region), CI/CD strategy, observability, and security posture across the stack.
 



**•Governance, Standards \& Mentorship:** 
 Establish architectural principles, design review processes, and coding/API standards; run architecture reviews and mentor engineers across front\-end, backend, data, and DevOps disciplines.
 



 •
 **Security \& Compliance:** 
 Ensure the architecture meets the security, privacy, and compliance expectations of enterprise clients operating in regulated industries.
 



 •
 **Stakeholder Collaboration:** 
 Work with product, engineering, and data science leadership to translate business and product roadmaps into scalable, sequenced technical architecture.
 



  





**What do we look for at Ennoventure?** 




  





**Must Have** 




 •Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
 



 •7\-8 years of software engineering experience, including meaningful time in an architecture\-focused role designing and shipping production systems on a scale.
 



 •Backend depth, full\-stack breadth: Deep, hands\-on expertise in backend architecture — microservices, REST/GraphQL API design, idempotency, and machine\-readable contracts — plus working fluency across front\-end, data, and DevOps.
 



 •Front\-end: Solid understanding of modern frameworks (React/Next.js) and mobile app architecture (native or cross\-platform) and how they integrate with backend and agent\-driven workflows.
 



 •Data: Experience architecting relational and NoSQL data stores (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and the data pipelines that feed them.
 



 •Cloud/DevOps: Hands\-on experience architecting on AWS, GCP, or Azure, with containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure\-as\-code (Terraform or equivalent).
 



 •Architecting for Scale: Proven track record designing for scale, performance, and reliability — SLAs, fault tolerance, observability, and graceful degradation underload.
 



 •Security Mindset: Strong grasp of security best practices for a multi\-tenant, enterprise\-grade SaaS platform, including data protection and compliance requirements.
 



 •Communication \& Influence: Excellent communication skills, with the ability to influence technical direction, drive alignment across teams, and present architecture clearly to both engineers and leadership.
 



  





**Nice\-to\-Have** 




  





 •Experience architecting systems that integrate AI/LLM agents into production workflows or applying “agentic\-first” design principles.
 



 •Familiarity with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agent orchestration frameworks such as Lang Chain, Lang Graph, or Crew AI.
 



 •Experience with computer vision or ML\-serving infrastructure operating at scale.
 



 •Background in a high\-growth B2B SaaS company, ideally in security, brand protection, fraud, or trust \& safety.
 



 •Experience with event\-driven architectures and message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS).
 



 •Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector) and RAG architecture.
 



 •Prior experience standing up architecture governance and review processes inside a scaling engineering organization.
 



  





**What do we offer?** 




  





 We believe that our people are the driving force behind our success, fueling big ambitions with bigger impact. We are building more than just a workplace, we are crafting a space where everyone feels seen, heard, and unstoppable. Here, you don’t just thrive, you grow, innovate, and leave a mark that matters.
 



 That is why we are committed to equipping you with the best: a Total Rewards Policy that integrates\-
 



 •Pay: A Competitive Salary that reflects your talent and drive!
 



 •Financial Rewards: Performance\-based Rewards that recognize your impact.
 



 •Well\-being: Comprehensive Health Insurance \& Mental Health Programs to keep you at your best!
 



 •Learning: An ongoing investment in you and your skills.
 



 •Personalized Development: Self\-growth plans crafted to match your performance and career aspirations.
 



 •Compensation Reviews: Regular reviews to ensure your value aligns with market trends.

001f4c4f.title: Amazon Connect Lead / Architect
001f4c4f.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are looking for an experienced AWS Connect SME with strong expertise in Amazon Connect architecture, contact flows, AWS Lambda, and enterprise integrations to lead design, implementation, migration, optimization, and support of contact center solutions. The role involves working as the technical authority, collaborating with customer stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams to drive scalable Amazon Connect solutions and ensure operational excellence.
 



  




* **Role: Amazon Connect Lead / Architect**
* **Location: All Persistent Location**
* **Experience: 8 to 16 Years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* Act as the AWS Connect SME and technical lead for implementation, migration, optimization, and support programs.
* Lead Amazon Connect architecture discussions, design reviews, solution recommendations, and technical governance.
* Configure contact flows, routing profiles, queues, security profiles, user management, and contact center components.
* Support contact center migration, modernization, managed services, hyper care, and operational excellence initiatives.
* Design integrations with ServiceNow, CRM, IAM, APIs, and enterprise platforms using serverless architectures.
* Develop AWS Lambda\-based automation and API integrations, and provide L3 support, RCA, and production stabilization.
* Participate in governance meetings, discovery workshops, customer workshops, and stakeholder discussions with Sydney\-based teams.



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* 8\+ years of overall IT experience with 4\+ years of hands\-on Amazon Connect experience.
* Strong capability in Amazon Connect, contact flows, routing profiles, queues, IVR design, user management, and contact center operations.
* Hands\-on experience with AWS Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, CloudWatch, DynamoDB, S3, Event Bridge, Step Functions, Python, Node.js, REST APIs, JSON, Git, and CI/CD.
* Experience delivering Amazon Connect implementations, contact center migrations, and cloud\-native solutions for global customers.
* Preferred exposure to Amazon Lex, Polly, Transcribe, Translate, Bedrock, conversational AI, contact center analytics, managed services, and cloud migration programs.
* Preferred certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Developer, AWS Certified SysOps Administrator, and AWS Cloud Practitioner.
* Strong ability to collaborate with distributed teams, customer stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents



  





**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:** 




  





 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
 



  




* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment



  





**Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent \- persistent.com/careers** 




  





***“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”***

6152c40d.title: Senior BI Solutions Architect
6152c40d.description:
This is an architect\-level role for someone who has spent years designing enterprise data and analytics platforms, has the technical depth to make hard architectural decisions under client scrutiny, and has developed the commercial instinct to translate that expertise into winning proposals and strategic client engagements.
 



 Reporting directly to a Director, you will be the most technically authoritative voice in pre\-sales conversations — not a consultant who presents slides, but an architect who designs solutions in real time, challenges assumptions with evidence, and earns client trust through the quality of thinking, not the polish of the pitch.
 



 You will lead the architectural design of Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, and AI\-integrated data solutions across pre\-sales engagements, RFP responses, and client strategy sessions. You will own the "what should we build and why" question before a single sprint is planned — and your answer will be the foundation on which delivery teams execute.
 



 Critically, you will bring a forward\-leaning AI capability to every engagement — not as a feature to demonstrate, but as an architectural discipline: knowing where LLMs, Copilot, Azure OpenAI, and machine learning genuinely belong in a data solution, and where they don't.
 



 If you are an architect who is energised by the complexity of real client environments, comfortable owning the technical direction of high\-value engagements, and ready to operate at the intersection of data architecture, AI integration, and strategic pre\-sales — this is the role.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * **Architect end\-to\-end data and analytics solutions** 
 across pre\-sales engagements — designing the full stack from data ingestion and transformation through semantic modelling, reporting, and AI enrichment, tailored precisely to the client's environment, maturity, and strategic goals.
* **Lead technical pre\-sales engagements** 
 as the senior architectural voice: own solution design sessions, technical discovery workshops, and architecture review conversations with client data teams, enterprise architects, and C\-suite technology leaders.
* **Design and deliver bespoke, architecture\-led Power BI and Fabric demonstrations** 
 — not product showcases, but live proof\-of\-concept environments built around the client's actual data challenges, showing the proposed architecture in motion rather than in theory.
* **Define AI integration architecture for data\-driven solutions** 
 — determining where Azure OpenAI, Copilot in Fabric, LLM\-powered natural language querying, machine learning models, and AI\-enriched pipelines genuinely add business value, and designing the technical patterns to implement them responsibly and at scale.
* **Respond to RFPs, RFIs, and tender documents** 
 as the primary technical author — producing architectural proposals, solution diagrams, data flow documentation, and technical narratives that are credible under expert scrutiny and compelling to executive decision\-makers simultaneously.
* **Conduct data and AI maturity assessments** 
 with enterprise clients, diagnosing architectural gaps, governance weaknesses, and strategic misalignments — then designing a structured roadmap that positions Microsoft Fabric and AI capabilities as the architectural foundation for their next phase of growth.
* **Own solution sizing, platform architecture, and licensing design** 
 — including Microsoft Fabric SKU selection, Premium vs. Fabric capacity planning, Azure OpenAI deployment models, and total cost of ownership modelling that holds up under commercial and technical scrutiny.
* **Collaborate with delivery architects and engineering leads** 
 at handover, ensuring the solution architecture designed in pre\-sales is technically executable, properly documented, and free of the ambiguity that causes delivery misalignment and commercial risk.
* **Maintain and evolve a pre\-sales architecture asset library** 
 — reference architectures, Fabric solution patterns, AI integration blueprints, reusable demo environments, and technical proposal templates that accelerate future engagements without sacrificing rigour.
* **Represent the organisation externally** 
 at industry forums, Microsoft partner events, and client roundtables as a credible Power BI, Fabric, and data AI architecture thought leader — contributing to the organisation's technical reputation, not just its sales pipeline.
* **Track the Microsoft data and AI roadmap** 
 with architectural intent — evaluating Direct Lake, Fabric Real\-Time Intelligence, Copilot extensibility, Azure AI Foundry, and emerging LLM integration patterns, and proactively feeding architectural recommendations into both pre\-sales strategy and internal practice development.


 Must\-Have Requirements
 * 10\+ years of experience in data and analytics, with a clear architectural track record — designing enterprise\-grade solutions, not just delivering within them.
* Deep Power BI expertise at architectural depth: semantic model design, enterprise deployment patterns, governance frameworks, performance engineering, and the ability to make and defend architectural trade\-offs under expert challenge.
* Hands\-on experience architecting on Microsoft Fabric — Lakehouses, Warehouses, Data Pipelines, Dataflows Gen2, Direct Lake semantic models, and Fabric Real\-Time Intelligence — not just awareness of the platform.
* Demonstrated experience integrating AI and machine learning into data solutions: Azure OpenAI Service, Copilot in Power BI and Fabric, Azure Machine Learning, or LLM\-powered analytical features embedded into production data products.
* Proven pre\-sales or client\-facing architectural experience — leading solution design for high\-value, complex engagements with enterprise clients, including multi\-stakeholder discovery, architecture definition, and proposal authorship.
* Expert\-level verbal communication: capable of presenting a complex solution architecture to a client's CTO, defending technical choices against a client's enterprise architect, and explaining AI integration decisions to a non\-technical CDO — in the same meeting, without losing credibility with any of them.
* Strong written communication: technical architecture documents, solution proposals, and executive briefing papers of a publishable, client\-ready standard.
* Solid grounding in the broader Microsoft Azure data stack: Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure SQL, Azure Data Lake Storage, and their architectural relationships with Fabric.


 Good\-to\-Have / Bonus Skills
 * Microsoft DP\-600 (Fabric Analytics Engineer) or DP\-100 (Azure Data Scientist) certification — signals architectural depth across both the Fabric and AI dimensions of the role.
* Hands\-on experience with Azure AI Foundry or Azure OpenAI Studio — building, deploying, and governing LLM\-powered solutions integrated into data platforms.
* Experience designing
 **Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures** 
 — combining Azure OpenAI with enterprise data stored in Fabric Lakehouses, Azure AI Search, or vector databases to power intelligent, grounded analytical applications.
* Familiarity with
 **AI orchestration frameworks** 
 such as Semantic Kernel or LangChain, used to build multi\-step AI workflows that sit alongside or within data pipelines.
* Exposure to
 **MLOps practices** 
 — model versioning, drift monitoring, retraining pipelines, and the governance of ML models deployed into production data products.
* Understanding of data governance frameworks (DAMA\-DMBOK) and enterprise architecture methodologies (TOGAF) — enabling credible engagement with client governance and EA teams during architectural reviews.
* Familiarity with competing and complementary platforms — Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, Tableau, Looker — sufficient to make honest, evidence\-based architectural comparisons and recommendations.
* Public\-facing technical presence: architecture blog posts, conference presentations, GitHub contributions, or Microsoft community activity that demonstrates thought leadership beyond the sales cycle.


 Soft Skills \& Behaviours
 * **Architectural authority under pressure:** 
 Does not reach for a slide deck when challenged — thinks on their feet, draws on the whiteboard, and defends design decisions with technical precision and intellectual honesty.
* **Strategic clarity:** 
 Cuts through client complexity to identify the two or three architectural decisions that will determine whether a data and AI programme succeeds or fails — and makes those the centre of every pre\-sales conversation.
* **AI judgment, not AI enthusiasm:** 
 Approaches LLMs and Copilot features with rigour — evaluates them on actual architectural fit, data quality requirements, governance implications, and business ROI, rather than novelty or market momentum.
* **Technical storytelling:** 
 Translates complex architecture into narratives that resonate with non\-technical executives — not by simplifying to the point of inaccuracy, but by finding the business analogy that makes the architecture decision obvious.
* **Commercial architecture instinct:** 
 Understands that an architecturally elegant solution that cannot be delivered within budget or timeline is not a good solution — designs with commercial constraints as a first\-class architectural concern, not an afterthought.
* **Collaborative precision:** 
 Works openly with delivery teams, data engineers, and ML practitioners; documents architectural decisions thoroughly; and treats handover as an architectural responsibility, not an administrative one.
* **Resilient under expert scrutiny:** 
 Handles deep technical challenge from client architects and procurement\-led technical evaluations with composure — knows the difference between a genuine architectural concern and a test of confidence, and responds appropriately to both.


 Qualifications
 * Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, Information Systems, or a related technical discipline — or equivalent senior architectural experience with a demonstrable portfolio.
* 10–12 years of overall data and analytics experience; with a clear architectural trajectory and at least 3–4 years operating in client\-facing, pre\-sales, or advisory architectural capacity.
* Microsoft PL\-300 required as a baseline; DP\-600 strongly preferred; DP\-100 or AI\-102 (Azure AI Engineer Associate) is a significant differentiator for the AI dimension of this role.
* Portfolio of architectural artefacts required at interview — solution designs, reference architectures, Fabric or Azure data platform blueprints, and evidence of AI integration into production data solutions.
* Demonstrable experience authoring technical proposals or RFP responses that have contributed to successful commercial outcomes.
* Familiarity with responsible AI principles, AI governance frameworks, and the practical implications of deploying LLM\-powered features in regulated or enterprise environments.

0ac9f6e6.title: Sr Technical Architect - Azure Platform, Monitoring & Observability, Identity Access Management
0ac9f6e6.description:
**Scope**
* The Sr Technical Architect \- Cloud is responsible for leading the design, architecture, and governance of cloud\-based infrastructure solutions. This role provides deep technical expertise across public, private, and hybrid cloud environments, ensuring that solutions are secure, scalable, cost\-optimized, and aligned with enterprise strategy. The Sr. Architect partners with leadership, engineering, and operations teams to drive cloud transformation, modernization, and innovation initiatives while mentoring technical teams.


**Our Current Technical Environment**
* Microsoft Azure
* VMWare Esxi


**What You’ll Do**
* Define cloud infrastructure architecture, standards, and best practices across AWS, Azure, and/or GCP.
* Lead the design and delivery of large\-scale cloud solutions including migration, hybrid integration, and modernization initiatives.
* Provide technical leadership for projects involving containerization, microservices, serverless, and DevOps automation.
* Oversee cloud governance, cost management, and security compliance in alignment with organizational policies.
* Evaluate emerging cloud technologies, conduct PoCs, and recommend strategic adoption.
* Collaborate with application, security, and infrastructure teams to ensure end\-to\-end solution alignment.
* Establish capacity planning, performance tuning, and disaster recovery strategies in cloud environments.
* Lead vendor/partner engagements and provide expertise in contract and solution negotiations.
* Mentor and guide architects, engineers, and support teams across cloud and infrastructure domains.
* Present cloud strategy, architecture roadmaps, and recommendations to senior stakeholders.


**What We Are Looking For**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in IT/Computer Science/Electronics or equivalent diploma.
* 12\+ years of progressive infrastructure experience, with 5\+ years in cloud architecture roles.
* Deep expertise in cloud infrastructure design and operations (AWS, Azure, and/or GCP).
* Strong knowledge of networking, security, identity, and hybrid cloud integration.
* Hands\-on experience with IaC and automation tools (Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation, ARM, etc.).
* Proficiency in container and orchestration platforms (Docker, Kubernetes, AKS/EKS/GKE).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and observability solutions.
* Strong knowledge of governance, compliance, and FinOps principles in cloud.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.
* This role involves rotational shifts, including night shifts, to provide 24/7 application support.
* Flexibility to work weekends and public holidays as per shift schedule.
* Ability to handle responsibilities independently during off\-hours.


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

515fed78.description:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a highly experienced Enterprise Architect to drive strategic technology initiatives across large\-scale healthcare, technology, and digital transformation engagements.
 



 This role goes beyond traditional enterprise architecture responsibilities. The successful candidate will act as a trusted advisor to executive stakeholders, lead architecture governance for strategic clients, support business growth through solutioning and pre\-sales activities, and provide architectural leadership for major transformation programs.
 



 The individual will own architecture governance, architecture review boards (ARBs), solution assurance, and enterprise\-level technology strategy while ensuring alignment between business objectives, technology investments, security, compliance, and operational excellence.

 \- Executive Communication

76a7ce2f.title: Cloud Enterprise Architect
76a7ce2f.description:
Job Title: Enterprise Architect
   

  

 Location: Bangalore, Pune
   

  

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Enterprise Architect is responsible for defining and driving the overall enterprise technology strategy, architecture roadmap, and governance framework aligned with business goals. The role ensures scalability, standardisation, and integration across applications, data, infrastructure, and security layers, enabling digital transformation across the organisation.
   

  

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Bachelor s or Master s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
   

  

 12 18 years of overall IT experience with strong enterprise architecture exposure
   

  

 Proven experience in large\-scale transformation programs and architecture governance
   

  

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Define and establish enterprise architecture strategy, standards, and governance frameworks
   

  

 Design and maintain architecture blueprints across Application, Data, Integration, and Infrastructure layers
   

  

 Drive digital transformation, modernization, and cloud adoption initiatives
   

  

 Define and enforce API\-led, microservices, and event\-driven architectures
   

  

 Ensure alignment of technology solutions with business roadmap and enterprise goals
   

  

 Lead architecture review boards (ARB) and ensure adherence to standards
   

  

 Collaborate with security, DevOps, infrastructure, and business teams for end\-to\-end architecture design
   

  

 Evaluate emerging technologies and define technology adoption roadmap
   

  

 Define integration strategies across systems, APIs, middleware, and data platforms
   

  

 Mentor solution architects and engineering teams on architecture best practices
   

  

 Drive cost optimization, performance improvements, and scalability initiatives

**Some Careers Have More Impact Than Others.**
 If you’re looking for a career that will help you stand out, join HSBC and fulfil your potential. Whether you want a career that could take you to the top, or simply take you in an exciting new direction, HSBC offers opportunities, support and rewards that will take you further.
   

  

 HSBC is one of the largest banking and financial services organisations in the world, with operations in 64 countries and territories. We aim to be where the growth is, enabling businesses to thrive and economies to prosper, and, ultimately, helping people to fulfil their hopes and realize their ambitions.
   

  

 We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of
 **Delivery Manager**
**In This Role, You Will Be**
* Project Managers are required to lead change initiatives, and manage stakeholder and senior management relationships. They work largely unsupervised and are expected to exercise independent initiative and judgement in proactively overcoming obstacles to success, dealing with uncertainty and changing circumstances.
* Plans effectively around delivery constraints and optimises the plan to maximise benefits and minimise risk. Ensures the baselined scope, requirements, benefits, schedule and budget are managed as outlined in the change frameworks
* Proactively monitors project execution to effectively identify risks/issues/dependencies as they arise throughout the project lifecycle.
* Collaborates and builds positive stakeholder relationships, providing regular updates, obtains buy\-in from the project sponsor, Steering Committee and other stakeholders for all key project plans, commitments, and changes including requirements
* Analyses management reports, and derives insights to drive the right business decisions
* Manages Change Adoption to ensure the change lands well and sticks, contributing to benefits realisation.
* Identifies and shares the resource requirements of the project, to the Program Manager requesting the appropriate skill set and/or experience.
* Defines high level responsibilities and objectives for members of their project team and ensure the individuals are being used in accordance with their skills and resource request
* Acts as a role model to create and maintain a collaborative team environment which supports and encourages the professionalism and development of our teams


**To Be Successful You Will Be**
* Overall experience of 10 years or more with any graduation.
* Previous experience in managing large scale business transformation projects, and other managerial experience leading diverse, geographically distributed teams.
* Multi\-country delivery rollout exposure. Ability to define right governance structure and forums to drive the project at pace
* Define project/programme\-specific risk and control requirements and align them with organisation and regulatory standards.
* Map key risks and design appropriate controls, embedding them into project plans and risk registers from the outset.
* Practical working knowledge of scaled agile. Expert in tools such as JIRA, Confluence \& MS Project


**You’ll achieve more when you join HSBC**
 www.hsbc.com/careers
   

  

 HSBC is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and, opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. We encourage applications from all suitably qualified persons irrespective of, but not limited to, their gender or genetic information, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, social status, medical care leave requirements, political affiliation, people with disabilities, color, national origin, veteran status, etc., We consider all applications based on merit and suitability to the role.”
   

  

 Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.

64196df4.title: SAP PIPO Service Delivery Manager
64196df4.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**SAP PIPO Service Delivery Manager**
 Enterprise Technology provides reliable, secure and resilient technology services and solutions to support over 300,000 EY people. As part of Enterprise Technology, you’ll be at the forefront of enabling innovative technologies including emerging collaboration tools and world\-class technology infrastructure.
   

  

 Our aim is to build an outstanding customer experience with clear investment in innovation, alongside operational excellence that delivers efficient, quality services and solutions. You will work with technologists and business specialists to meet the increasing pace of our business. That means more growth for you, exciting learning opportunities, career choices, and the chance to make a real impact.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 The PI/PO SDM will play a key role in the support of the Mercury technical landscape and associated technology solutions which leverage or integrate with the core SAP applications, including SAP ECC, BW, CRM, SRM, CLM, CPM and GRC and Cloud based solution such as – SAP CPI, Microsoft Dynamics, C4C, ARIBA Buyer, ARIBA Sourcing. PI/PO SDM will work closely with Application Technology\-PI/PO Integration Lead and the process aligned Service Delivery Managers to provide specific, technical expertise regarding the integrated solution which is required to run each business process, including knowledge of the dependent and impacted applications and the associated inbound or outbound interfaces.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
 SAP PO SDM will assume operational responsibilities, to include day\-to\-day support and management across the integrated technical solution and the functional areas, assess the impact of changes to technical solution, provide guidance and assess/validate estimates provided by 3rd parties and internal teams. They will work closely with the SAP Process Experts and the SAP Managed Service Support team to ensure the proposed solutions are operationalized and consider the ongoing impact to support requirements and the ability to maintain system integrity in line with agreed technical road maps.
   

  

**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Experience with developing custom solutions, and optimization of code in SAP ECC/CRM/SRM/BW\- integration with PI/PO (KEY SKILL)
* Experience on implementing standard integration packages.
* Experienced in SAP PO operations support, production configuration, and implementing/solutioning of change requests.
* Experience with adapters SFTP, SOAP, REST and ODATA methodologies
* Configured JDBC, FILE, HTTP, FTPS, SOAP, REST, IDoc, RFC and Mail adapters, among others.
* Experience with SAP Business Framework Architecture APIs like, BAPIs, ALE, RFC, SOAP.
* Experience with integrating cloud solutions like C4C, ARIBA Buyer, ARIBA Sourcing.
* Good understanding on security concepts – SSL, public cert/private keys, digital signing, and PGP encryption.
* Knowledge and experience on SAP CPI development and support.
* Familiar/experience with SAP BTP Tools and Products.
* Experience on Java Programming is also an advantage.
* Experience din break/fix analysis and solution recommendation for finance related processes.
* Good understanding on SP/release upgrades, new functionality/enhancement assessment
* Good working knowledge with ABAP programming related to IDoc, Proxy, and FMs.
* Good understanding of software development, testing, and release management.
* International experience and experience working with global ERP rolls\-out.


**To qualify for the role you must have**
* Minimum of 8 to 10 years build/development SAP PO middleware experience gained through a combination of implementation projects and post go\-live operations support.
* Experience in requirements gathering, estimation, design, development, configuration, administration, centred around integration based on functional requirements.
* Detail\-oriented – great in doing documentation, noting test and troubleshooting evidence, technical specifications, architecture diagrams, processes, etc
* Teaming and Independence \- A good team\-player but can work independently at the same time.
* Global collaboration – highly collaborative, and can work with resources/teams across the globe, coming from different backgrounds and cultures, from varying business streams and technical expertise.
* Has good sense of ownership, flexible, and able to multitask.
* Assertive and decisive – critical specially during high priority situations that require SDM guidance, and able to report to leadership.
* Process\-centric – consciously uses processes to get optimal business results, from guidelines, standards, naming conventions, operational ways of working.
* Communication – good English communication skills, in both verbal and written.
* Experience in setting up SLD environment and creating technical systems and Business Systems.
* Experience with RFC destinations on R3 and PI side, Configuration of RFC, IDOCs, ALE configuration, configuring Port, Partner Profiles, Logical System and ABAP Proxy configuration
* Experience with ALERTS configurations and designed Transport mechanism.
* Experience with Unit Test plans, Integration Test plans and UAT Test plans for testing of PI based interfaces.
* Experience in Preparing Mapping Specification documents as per Web Methods.
* Deep understanding and experience of SAP technical integration capabilities including PI/PO and all aspects of interface monitoring, error handling and restart / recovery procedures
* In\-depth knowledge of the relevant functional areas: Procurement, Finance, Engagement Management
* Experience in Message Mappings: Graphical Map, JAVA Map and XSLT Maps.


**Ideally, you’ll also have**
* SAP certification preferred


**What We Offer**
 As part of this role, you'll work in a highly integrated, globally diverse team with the opportunity and tools to grow, develop and drive your career forward. Here, you can combine global opportunity with flexible working. The EY benefits package goes above and beyond too, focusing on your physical, emotional, financial and social well\-being. Your recruiter can talk to you about the benefits available in your country. Here’s a snapshot of what we offer:
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
* Success as defined by you: We’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a significant impact, your way.
* Transformative leadership: We’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.
* Diverse and inclusive culture: You’ll be accepted for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

1c4eef23.description:

**Experience: 15\+ years**
**Location: Bangalore**
**Employment Type: Full\-time**

* Project Delivery \& Management:
+ Lead multiple concurrent data science and analytics projects across industry domains.
+ Own project planning, scope, estimation, risk management, and quality assurance.
+ Ensure timely and high\-quality deliverables aligned with client expectations.

* Stakeholder Management:
+ Build strong relationships with key stakeholders including CxOs, Product Owners, and Business SMEs.
+ Drive customer satisfaction and account growth through proactive communication and value delivery.

+ Lead and mentor cross\-functional teams of data engineers, data scientists, and analysts.
+ Participate in recruitment and upskilling of delivery teams to align with emerging tech trends.

b2b0aa1a.title: Technical Solutions Engineer
b2b0aa1a.description:
**ABOUT US**

At Sun360, we are at the forefront of Goa’s solar energy revolution, driving large\-scale adoption of renewable energy across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. Since 2013, we have successfully delivered over 15 MW of solar installations and played a pivotal role in shaping Goa’s Solar Policy.

Our mission is to make clean energy accessible, sustainable, and transformative, while delivering cutting\-edge technology and seamless end\-to\-end services—from consultation to installation and maintenance.

**JOB OVERVIEW**

As a **Technical Solutions Engineer**, you’ll lead the way in customer engagement—combining your technical expertise with a solution\-oriented mindset to deliver tailored solar energy systems.

**CAREER ROADMAP**

Technical Solutions Engineer → Sr. Technical Solutions Engineer → Sales Manager → Sr. Sales Manager → Director \- Sales

**ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES**

1\. **Customer\-Focused Solutions :** Work closely with customers to understand their energy needs and suggest solar solutions that are both technically sound and valuable for them.

2\. **Site Visits \& Presentations:** Visit project sites across Goa and give clear, easy\-to\-follow presentations to help customers understand the proposed solution. Answer their questions confidently and build strong relationships.

3\. **Solar System Knowledge:** Use your understanding of solar PV systems to design efficient and reliable setups. Stay updated with new technologies and trends to keep our solutions modern and competitive.

4\. **Team Support \& Coordination:** Work with internal teams like design, operations, and installation to make sure projects run smoothly. Be available to offer technical help throughout the process and ensure a great customer experience.

**REQUIREMENTS:**

* Degree or Diploma in **Electrical, Mechanical, or Electronics Engineering.**
* **1–4 years** of experience in technical sales; solar industry experience is a plus.
* **Freshers** with strong technical aptitude and interest in renewable energy are welcome.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to simplify technical concepts.
* Proven sales ability and a passion for **renewable energy**
* Willing to **travel independently** for site visits and client meetings.

**BENEFITS:**

* Work on meaningful solar projects, powering homes and businesses across Goa.
* Hands\-on training and mentorship from solar industry experts.
* Competitive salary with performance\-based incentives.
* Opportunities to grow into leadership roles in sales and operations.
* Supportive, collaborative, and learning\-driven culture.
* Be part of a team that values your ideas and celebrates innovation.

Job Type: Full\-time

Application Question(s):

* Do you have an engineering degree in Mechanical/Electrical/Civil ?
* What is your current CTC ?
* What is your expected CTC ?
* What is your Notice Period?

Work Location: In person

87908553.title: Product Manager - Cloud SRX Firewall
87908553.description:
Product Manager \- Cloud SRX Firewall  



This role has been designed as 'Hybrid' with a requirement that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



**About HPE Networking, SASE \& Security**
------------------------------------------


HPE Networking Business Unit, powered by the Aruba Networks, Juniper Networks and Axis Security portfolios, delivers secure, AI\-driven networking solutions that connect users, devices, applications, and data across campus, branch, data centre, WAN, data centre, and cloud environments. HPE Networking BU enables organizations to modernize infrastructure through on\-prem, hybrid and cloud\-native management, automation, AIOps\-driven operations, and high\-performance wired, wireless, routing, and switching and security solutions, while supporting seamless hybrid work experiences with scalability, resiliency, and operational simplicity.


HPE Networking BU’s SASE and Security Group develops solutions that provide a unified, cloud\-delivered architecture that combines networking and security capabilities for the modern edge\-to\-cloud enterprise. The portfolio integrates SD\-WAN, Secure Service Edge (SSE), Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA), Next Generation Firewall (NGFW), CASB, Secure Routing, Unified Endpoint Client and AI\-Native network operations capabilities to deliver secure and optimized access for users regardless of location.


Our technologies help enterprises reduce complexity, improve operational efficiency, strengthen cyber resilience, and accelerate digital transformation initiatives. By leveraging AI\-powered insights, centralized policy enforcement, intelligent network automation, and identity\-based security, HPE delivers comprehensive edge\-to\-cloud networking and security solutions that enable secure, agile, and future\-ready digital infrastructure for enterprises worldwide.


We are looking for a product leader to help shape the future of the vSRX and cSRX portfolio across enterprise, service provider, and public cloud markets. In this role, you will define how SRX succeeds with Cloud Service Providers (CSPs), hyperscaler marketplaces, and public cloud ecosystems including AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud.

**What You’ll****Do**

**Responsibilities**

**Portfolio Strategy and Lifecycle Ownership**

* Set the long\-term product vision, roadmap, investment strategy, and lifecycle plan for vSRX and cSRX.
* Guide portfolio decisions across features, SKUs, pricing, margins, transitions, and end\-of\-life planning.
* Translate market, customer, and competitive insights into differentiated product priorities and business cases.
* Work closely with engineering, supply chain, marketing, sales, and operations to deliver predictable business outcomes.
**Public Cloud and****CSP****Strategy**

* Shape the SRX public cloud security strategy across AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, and hyperscaler marketplace routes to market.
* Build marketplace, private offer, channel, consumption, and enterprise procurement strategies with Cloud Service Providers.
* Engage customers, field teams, and sales organizations to validate requirements and remove adoption blockers.
**How You’ll Work**

* Write clear product requirements and partner with engineering from definition through delivery.
* Use customer feedback, support data, and market trends to refine priorities and improve time\-to\-market.
* Communicate roadmap, strategy, and results clearly to executives, engineering, field teams, partners, and customers.
**What Success Looks Like**

* A differentiated vSRX and cSRX portfolio that scales across enterprise, Cloud Service Provider, and service provider requirements.
* Executive confidence in roadmap, investment, and lifecycle decisions.
* Customer adoption for critical public cloud, hybrid cloud, and security workloads.
* **What****You’ll****Bring**

**Experience**


	+ Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
	+ MBA or advanced technical degree preferred.
	+ 10\+ years of Product Management experience in network security, cloud security, public cloud infrastructure, or related markets.
	+ A track record of owning complex product lifecycles, from strategy and requirements through launch, growth, and transition planning.
	+ Experience with Cloud Service Providers, hyperscaler marketplaces, or large\-scale data center environments.**Technical****and****Market Depth**


	+ A strong understanding of network security, including firewalls, IPS/IDP, threat prevention, and malware protection.
	+ A strong understanding of private cloud, public cloud, hybrid cloud, and cloud\-native networking architectures.
	+ Familiarity with CSP security architectures, marketplace listings, deployment models, and consumption\-based monetization.**Product, Business, and Leadership Skills**


	+ The ability to create and execute product strategies that drive revenue growth, market share, margin performance, and customer adoption.
	+ Experience defining pricing, packaging, positioning, business plans, and product requirements with a customer\-backwards mindset.
	+ The ability to influence cross\-functional teams through data, clarity, executive communication, and strong stakeholder collaboration.
	+ Strategic thinking, financial acumen, resilience, and a bias for measurable outcomes.

 **What We Can Offer You:**

**Health \& Wellbeing**


We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal \& Professional Development**


We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**


We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**


Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
