8ed9a2a7.title: Senior Solution Architect
8ed9a2a7.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are seeking an experienced Senior Solution Architect / Lead .NET Architect with strong expertise in .NET Core, C\#, AWS Cloud, Microservices, and Enterprise Application Architecture. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing scalable, secure, and cloud\-native solutions, leading development teams, driving technical decisions, and supporting pre\-sales and solutioning initiatives. The role requires hands\-on technical leadership, architecture design, and end\-to\-end delivery of enterprise applications. This aligns with internal architecture\-focused role patterns involving .NET Core, cloud architecture, microservices, API design, CI/CD, and technical leadership.
 



  




* **Role: Senior Solution Architect / Lead .NET Architect**
* **Location: Pune, Mumbai, Nagpur**
* **Experience: 12 to 15 Years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* Define end\-to\-end architecture for enterprise\-grade applications using .NET Core and AWS.
* Design scalable, secure, high\-performing, and cloud\-native solutions.
* Create High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) documents.
* Establish architecture standards, design principles, and development best practices.
* Conduct architecture reviews and ensure adherence to enterprise standards
* Lead the design and development of applications using C\#, .NET Core, Microservices, and REST APIs.
* Build API\-driven integration solutions with third\-party cloud and on\-premises systems.
* Drive modernization and migration initiatives for legacy applications.
* Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms using OAuth, NTLM, SAML, and JWT



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* 12 to 15 years of experience in software development and solution architecture.
* Hands\-on experience in .NET Core and C\# development.
* Strong expertise in Software Application Architecture \& Design.
* Experience with AWS Cloud Services and cloud\-native application development.
* Hands\-on experience in developing applications using Microservices Architecture and REST APIs.
* Strong knowledge of Authentication \& Authorization protocols such as:
* OAuth, NTLM, SAML, JWT
* Experience in building API\-based integrations with third\-party cloud and on\-premises applications.
* Experience in Data Processing, Data Transformation, and Data Migration projects.
* Hands\-on experience with AWS services including:
* S3 , Glue, Athena, EMR, Lambda, RDS, AppFlow, Kendra, Quick Sight
* Experience with Source Code Management tools:
* Git, SVN
* Hands\-on experience in CI/CD implementation using:
* Jenkins, GitLab, AWS DevOps Services
* Strong database expertise in:
* Oracle, SQL Server, Teradata, Arango DB
* Experience in pre\-sales activities, including:
* Solutioning
* Proposal/RFP Responses
* Requirement Analysis
* Effort Estimation
* Hands\-on experience with:
* JIRA, Confluence
* Strong understanding of Agile Methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and prioritization skills.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and interpersonal skills.
* Proven ability to work independently and collaborate effectively across cross\-functional teams.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents



  





**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:** 




  





 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
 



  




* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.

**Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent \- persistent.com/careers** 




  





***“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”***

71306068.title: Senior Solutions Architect (Hybrid)
71306068.description:
**Job Title**
 Senior Solutions Architect (Hybrid)
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Senior Solutions Architect (India Offshore) is responsible for designing and overseeing the implementation of artificial intelligence solutions for Kaplan Australia and leading delivery execution through an India\-based engineering pod.
   

  

 This role requires a strong technical background, hands\-on experience designing system architectures, and the ability to translate Australian business requirements into scalable, high\-performance solutions. Operating with a high degree of autonomy, the role leads solution design for complex AI initiatives while also providing day\-to\-day technical leadership for the India pod to support Kaplan Australia’s AI roadmap and delivery pipeline. Reporting to the Head of AI, the role provides day\-to\-day leadership for the offshore pod to ensure coordinated execution across design and delivery.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
****Analysis and Solution Design****
* Design enterprise\-grade architecture solutions for AI products that address scalability, reliability, cost optimisation, and integration with existing platforms and systems.
* Own solution design across multiple technology domains, ensuring architectural coherence and technical integrity.
* Define data architectural patterns and standards that can be reused across multiple AI products or initiatives.
* Guide teams from proof\-of\-concept through to production, ensuring designs mature appropriately to meet operational, performance, and supportability requirements.
* Proactively identify architectural risks or limitations and recommend alternative approaches or trade\-offs.


****Offshore Pod Technical Leadership (Day\-to\-day Oversight)****
* Play a dual role, providing end\-to\-end architectural leadership while also leading the offshore India delivery pod (Data Engineer, QA Engineer and Full Stack Software Engineer).
* Establish a clear point of accountability across solution design and delivery, ensuring alignment between architecture, implementation, and outcomes.
* Provide day\-to\-day leadership for the India pod including work planning, iteration execution, prioritisation, and delivery tracking in collaboration with the Australia\-based AI team and stakeholders.
* Ensure quality and delivery standards are met through effective engineering practices (definition of done, code reviews, testing strategy, release readiness) and by removing blockers.
* Support recruitment activities for the India pod as required and ensure smooth onboarding with clear ways of working aligned to Kaplan Australia delivery expectations.


****Information Security and Compliance****
* Design AI solutions using security\-by\-design principles incorporating responsible and ethical AI considerations into solution designs, ensuring appropriate controls for data access, identity management, model protection, and infrastructure security.
* Ensure AI architectures comply with enterprise security policies, data governance standards, and applicable regulatory requirements.
* Identify, assess, and communicate security, compliance, and operational risks associated with AI solutions, recommending pragmatic mitigations.
* Work closely with security, risk, and governance teams to align AI solutions with enterprise assurance and approval processes.


****Process Documentation****
* Create and maintain clear, structured architectural documentation, including system designs, data flows, integration patterns, and non\-functional requirements.
* Produce solution artefacts such as architecture diagrams, reference architectures, and design rationales that support both delivery and governance.
* Document key architectural decisions, assumptions, constraints, and trade\-offs, ensuring transparency and traceability.
* Ensure documentation is fit\-for\-purpose—detailed enough to support delivery and operations, but pragmatic and aligned with agile delivery practices.


****Stakeholder Engagement****
* Facilitate architecture and solution discussions across cross\-functional teams, including product, engineering, and operations.
* Actively connect with global AI and technology teams to share knowledge, learn from comparable use cases and solution patterns, and leverage proven approaches to accelerate the deployment of similar AI solutions across regions.
* Present solution designs, architectural options, and trade\-offs to mixed audiences, adapting communication style to ensure clarity and alignment.
* Provide technical leadership and guidance during delivery, helping teams resolve design challenges and make informed decisions.
* Influence stakeholders by articulating the business value, risks, and implications of AI architectural choices.


**Qualifications And Skills\- Essential**
* Demonstrated minimum of 10\+ years’ experience designing and implementing AI solutions at an enterprise level.
* Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, Google Cloud) and software architecture principles.
* Proven cloud architecture experience for end\-to\-end delivery, including a modern stack across data, integration, and application layers (e.g., container platforms, CI/CD, data platforms/warehouses, API integration, and monitoring/observability).
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and the ability to think strategically.
* Effective communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to successfully manage multiple tasks and prioritise workload.
* Experience with Jira, Confluence, Lucid and Microsoft 365 tools.
* Experience across Agile, Waterfall and hybrid delivery models.


****Highly Desirable****
* Experience in deploying AI solutions in real\-world environments.
* Familiarity with regulatory and ethical considerations in AI.
* Experience delivering technology solutions within higher education or regulated environments.


**Compliance \& Governance Obligations**
* Demonstrate company values and contribute to a kind, safe, supportive and collaborative workplace.
* Adherence to all Kaplan policies and procedures.
* Compliance with Workplace Health \& Safety legislation and requirements.
* Completion of all mandatory training as required by Kaplan.
* Compliance with information security, privacy, data governance and risk management frameworks.


**Location**
 Bangalore, KA, India
   

  

**Employee Type**
 Employee
   

  

**Job Functional Area**
 IT Development
   

  

 Kaplan lnternational is an equal opportunities employer and positively encourages applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of sex, race, disability, age, sexual orientation, gender reassignment, religion or belief, marital status, or pregnancy and maternity. If you require any adjustments or additional support within the recruitment process, please contact us directly.

9e7e543b.title: Customer Solutions Architect
9e7e543b.description:
**Job Description**
 The Domain Architect is responsible for defining and implementing the Core domain\-wide strategy for Application(Cloud network function) deployment automation and AI\-enabled Automation SW development and delivery across various Nokia blueprint as well as customized product teams. The role requires deep expertise in cloud\-native technologies, Network function deployment automation frameworks, CI/CD ecosystems, and the application of AI capabilities to optimize development workstreams, operational efficiency and delivery velocity. The architect will drive scalable, maintainable automation solutions, enable self\-healing delivery pipelines, and mentor teams in modern DevOps and AI\-assisted SW engineering practices.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Define and evolve the architecture for end\-to\-end application deployment automation across development, testing, staging and production environments.
* Architect cloud\-native deployment automation solutions leveraging Kubernetes, Docker and public cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Design and implement intelligent deployment automation frameworks and solutions using Python, Ansible and AI\-powered capabilities.
* Integrate deployment automation seamlessly into CI/CD and GitOps workflows using GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, ArgoCD, and related technologies.
* Mentor engineers on cloud\-native deployment architectures, CI/CD automation, AI\-assisted software delivery and modern DevOps practices.


**Key Skills And Experience**
 Must Have
   

  

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or Engineering with 15\+ years in software engineering, DevOps, and cloud engineering, including 6\+ years in a solution architect or senior technical leadership role.
* Demonstrate advanced Python or Ansible development skills, with extensive experience building automation frameworks, application deployment tooling, and orchestration solutions.
* Exhibit extensive hands\-on experience with Kubernetes, Docker, containerized application deployments, and cloud\-native architectures, complemented by a basic understanding of YAML and JSON.
* Show deep experience with CI/CD and GitOps technologies, including GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, ArgoCD, FluxCD, Crossplane, or equivalent deployment automation tools and developing automation for Cloud solutions (AWS, Red Hat OpenShift) is a plus, alongside a strong understanding of development tools like GitLab, Gerrit, and JIRA
* Demonstrated experience applying AI and Generative AI to deployment automation and DevOps workflows, including hands\-on use of AI\-assisted development tools and a strong understanding of LLMs, RAG, AI agents, and orchestration frameworks.
* Proven ability to develop or integrate AI\-powered agents for operational automation, release validation, and root cause analysis, coupled with familiarity with AI frameworks (e.g., LangChain, CrewAI) and knowledge of AI governance, security, and responsible AI practices.


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Telecom domain exposure (Packet Core, 4G/5G, network protocols, cloud\-native network functions) and Experience in implementing autonomous deployment platforms or AI\-driven operational automation.
* Knowledge of MLOps, AI platform operations, and deployment of AI/ML workloads in cloud\-native environments and Certifications in cloud platforms or AI/ML specialties


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .

22bbbfc1.title: Palantir Data Solution Architect
22bbbfc1.description:
We are looking for a seasoned
 **Palantir Data Solution Architect** 
 to lead the design and implementation of enterprise\-scale data and AI platforms for Insurance/Reinsurance clients. This role will drive Foundry adoption, AIP\-powered GenAI solutions, and intelligent chatbot ecosystems to enable automation, decision intelligence, and regulatory\-compliant data platforms.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Design and deploy data pipelines, Ontology models and data workflows in Foundry
* Enable end\-to\-end data lifecycle management from ingestion through transformation to consumption
* Implement data lineage, governance and auditability aligned with BFSI compliance
* Architect AI applications using Palantir AIP, including agents for underwriting, claims and risk analysis as well as intelligent decision\-support systems
* Build RAG\-based solutions integrating structured and unstructured BFSI data
* Integrate external LLMs such as Azure OpenAI and GPT securely within enterprise systems
* Design domain\-aware chatbots, assistants and orchestration interfaces for claims processing, policy servicing and regulatory insights
* Leverage LangChain/LangGraph and AIP for multi\-agent workflows and contextual responses
* Build scalable pipelines using Spark, Databricks and Delta Lake across batch and real\-time architectures
* Integrate Foundry with core BFSI systems including Policy Admin, CRM, Risk and Finance
* Lead end\-to\-end solution architecture and platform design, define best practices, reusable frameworks and accelerators
* Mentor engineering teams and drive architecture governance
* Ensure adherence to BFSI regulations including GDPR and PII audit controls, and implement role\-based access control, data security and monitoring







**Requirements** 



* 13 to 18 years of experience in Data Software Engineering
* Expertise in Palantir Foundry including Ontology, Pipelines, Workshop, Quiver, Code Repositories, alongside AIP and Apollo
* Knowledge of GenAI concepts including LLMs, RAG and embeddings
* Skills in prompt engineering, multi\-agent AI architectures and ML flow model lifecycle
* Proficiency in Data Engineering including Spark, SQL and Databricks
* Competency in ETL/ELT design
* Proficiency in Python, with SQL and Scala/Java preferred
* Understanding of distributed systems, cloud platforms and API\-driven design
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to drive technical discussions
* Analytical, problem\-solving mindset that is autonomous, detail\-oriented and collaborative







**Nice to have** 



* Background in Insurance/Reinsurance domain covering Claims, Underwriting and Premium
* Familiarity with Policy, Treaty data and related domain expertise

d581ec46.title: Tech S and T-Tech Cloud dev-AIOPS and Automation Engineer-Senior-GDSF02
d581ec46.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**AIOps automation Senior Engineer**
**Job Summary:**
 We are seeking a highly skilled AIOps Senior Engineer with 5 – 6 yrs of strong experience in intelligent operations, observability, and automation across hybrid cloud environments. The role focuses on designing, deploying, and optimizing AIOps and observability platforms to enable proactive incident management, intelligent alerting, root cause analysis, and operational efficiency for enterprise clients.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have hands\-on technical depth, combined with client\-facing advisory experience, and the ability to drive AIOps adoption, transformation roadmaps, and proof\-of\-concepts across complex hybrid infrastructures.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Evaluate, design, deploy, and optimize AIOps platforms such as Moogsoft, BigPanda, Dynatrace, Splunk, Datadog, and ServiceNow ITOM to enable intelligent alerting, event correlation, and incident prevention.
* Strong competency around Cross tool integration \& implementation among AIOPs observability, ITSM including CMDB tools
* Apply AI/ML\-driven techniques for root cause analysis (RCA), noise reduction, and predictive insights across infrastructure, applications, and cloud services.
* Provide technical advisory support to cross\-functional teams on cloud operations, monitoring strategy, automation, and service reliability.
* Strong Integration AIOps capabilities across hybrid cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, GCP, VMware, OpenStack, Kubernetes, and container\-based environments.
* Strong competency Develop automation scripts and integrations using Terraform, Python, Shell, or PowerShell to enhance operational workflows and incident remediation.
* Support the design and execution of proof\-of\-concepts (PoCs) and pilot implementations for AIOps and observability solutions.
* Develop business case Dashboards \& visualization for client engagement
* Collaborate with ITSM, SRE, and platform teams to align AIOps initiatives with service management and operational governance models.


**Qualifications:**
* 5\-6 years of experience in Observability, AIOps, IT Operations, Service Management, and Automation.
* Solid understanding of AIOps principles including event correlation, anomaly detection, root cause analysis, and automated remediation.
* Strong hands\-on expertise with one or more of the following platforms:
* AIOps \& Observability: Moogsoft, Splunk (Core \& ITSI), Dynatrace (Davis AI), Datadog
* ITOM \& Service Management: ServiceNow, Jira etc
* Proficiency in scripting and automation using Python, Shell, or PowerShell.
* Experience working in client\-facing advisory or consulting roles.
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related discipline.


**Certifications (Minimum 2\):**
* Datadog Certified Monitoring Professional
* Splunk Core Certified Power User / Admin / ITSI
* Dynatrace Associate / Professional Certification
* Moogsoft Certification
* ServiceNow ITOM / ITSM Certifications


**Key Competencies:**
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with an automation\-first mindset.
* Ability to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and business stakeholders.
* Experience working in hybrid cloud, multi\-vendor, and large\-scale enterprise environments.
* Consulting mindset with the ability to drive outcomes, value realization, and client satisfaction.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

8f1399a3.title: Consultant, Managed Services- Google Cloud Platform
8f1399a3.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
* Customer


 The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

**Level:** 
 Consultant Managed Service or equivalent
   

  

 Design and engineer next\-generation commerce experiences on Google Cloud, combining Universal Commerce Platform building blocks with emerging agentic commerce patterns — AI agents that browse catalogs, negotiate, decide, and transact on behalf of consumers and businesses. The role sits at the intersection of GCP, headless commerce, and Vertex AI / Gemini\-based agent stacks, supporting DF\&O AM\&C client engagements end to end from architecture through Operate .
   

  

**Work you’ll do:**
* Architect commerce solutions on GCP across catalog, cart, checkout, fulfillment, and post\-purchase domains.
* Implement agentic commerce capabilities: agent orchestration, tool use, MCP / A2A integrations, and conversational shopping flows.
* Build and integrate APIs and microservices across commerce engines (commercetools, Shopify, SAP CC, or Google's Universal Commerce stack) and Google's commerce AI services — Vertex AI Search for Commerce, Recommendations AI, Discovery AI.
* Design event\-driven architectures using Pub/Sub, Eventarc, Cloud Functions, and Cloud Run.
* Integrate with Google's data and merchant ecosystem (Merchant Center, Shopping APIs, Product Studio).
* Partner with experience in design, frontend, and martech teams on agent\-driven customer journeys and personalization.
* Contribute to Operate runbooks, observability standards, and AI agent guardrails for production deployments.


**The team:**
 Our
 **Digital Foundry Operate \& Innovations** 
 (DFO\&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end\-to\-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever\-evolving digital landscape.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Must Have Skills**
* 3 \- 6 years building production solutions on Google Cloud Platform.
* Hands\-on with core GCP services: Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub, BigQuery, Firestore, Spanner, Apigee.
* Experience with one or more commerce platforms (commerce tools, SAP Commerce Cloud, Shopify, BigCommerce, or Google's Universal Commerce stack).
* Working knowledge of agentic AI patterns: LLM orchestration, function calling, tool use, retrieval, MCP and A2A protocols.
* Strong API design (REST, GraphQL) and proficiency in Python, Node.js, or Java.
* Familiarity with Vertex AI, Gemini, and Agent Builder / Conversational Agents.
* GCP Professional Cloud Developer or Cloud Architect certification preferred.


**Preferred Skills:**
* Prior delivery experience on Vertex AI Search for Commerce or Recommendations AI.
* Exposure to retail, CPG, travel, hospitality, or financial services commerce.
* Experience with payment orchestration (Stripe, Adyen, Braintree).
* Familiarity with composable commerce and MACH architecture principles.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
* Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai


**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 353238

e8a01abf.title: Tech S and T-Tech Cloud dev-AIOPS and Automation Engineer-Senior-GDSF02
e8a01abf.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**AIOps automation Senior Engineer**
**Job Summary:**
 We are seeking a highly skilled AIOps Senior Engineer with 5 – 6 yrs of strong experience in intelligent operations, observability, and automation across hybrid cloud environments. The role focuses on designing, deploying, and optimizing AIOps and observability platforms to enable proactive incident management, intelligent alerting, root cause analysis, and operational efficiency for enterprise clients.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have hands\-on technical depth, combined with client\-facing advisory experience, and the ability to drive AIOps adoption, transformation roadmaps, and proof\-of\-concepts across complex hybrid infrastructures.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Evaluate, design, deploy, and optimize AIOps platforms such as Moogsoft, BigPanda, Dynatrace, Splunk, Datadog, and ServiceNow ITOM to enable intelligent alerting, event correlation, and incident prevention.
* Strong competency around Cross tool integration \& implementation among AIOPs observability, ITSM including CMDB tools
* Apply AI/ML\-driven techniques for root cause analysis (RCA), noise reduction, and predictive insights across infrastructure, applications, and cloud services.
* Provide technical advisory support to cross\-functional teams on cloud operations, monitoring strategy, automation, and service reliability.
* Strong Integration AIOps capabilities across hybrid cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, GCP, VMware, OpenStack, Kubernetes, and container\-based environments.
* Strong competency Develop automation scripts and integrations using Terraform, Python, Shell, or PowerShell to enhance operational workflows and incident remediation.
* Support the design and execution of proof\-of\-concepts (PoCs) and pilot implementations for AIOps and observability solutions.
* Develop business case Dashboards \& visualization for client engagement
* Collaborate with ITSM, SRE, and platform teams to align AIOps initiatives with service management and operational governance models.


**Qualifications:**
* 5\-6 years of experience in Observability, AIOps, IT Operations, Service Management, and Automation.
* Solid understanding of AIOps principles including event correlation, anomaly detection, root cause analysis, and automated remediation.
* Strong hands\-on expertise with one or more of the following platforms:
* AIOps \& Observability: Moogsoft, Splunk (Core \& ITSI), Dynatrace (Davis AI), Datadog
* ITOM \& Service Management: ServiceNow, Jira etc
* Proficiency in scripting and automation using Python, Shell, or PowerShell.
* Experience working in client\-facing advisory or consulting roles.
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related discipline.


**Certifications (Minimum 2\):**
* Datadog Certified Monitoring Professional
* Splunk Core Certified Power User / Admin / ITSI
* Dynatrace Associate / Professional Certification
* Moogsoft Certification
* ServiceNow ITOM / ITSM Certifications


**Key Competencies:**
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with an automation\-first mindset.
* Ability to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and business stakeholders.
* Experience working in hybrid cloud, multi\-vendor, and large\-scale enterprise environments.
* Consulting mindset with the ability to drive outcomes, value realization, and client satisfaction.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

9a0a5df1.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Cloud Platform Migration Engineer
 



**Experience:** 
 7Years
 



**Job Location:** 
 India
 



**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a hands\-on Cloud Platform Migration Engineer to support migrations from Platform9/OpenStack\-managed infrastructure to Spectro Cloud Palette\-managed Kubernetes environments. The ideal candidate should have experience in OpenStack administration, Kubernetes operations, Linux systems, and infrastructure migration activities.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Perform Platform9/OpenStack administration and migration activities.
* Execute OpenStack CLI operations for compute, storage, and infrastructure management.
* Provision and validate Kubernetes clusters using Spectro Cloud Palette or similar platforms.
* Support VM, storage, and infrastructure migration workflows.
* Perform cluster health checks and post\-migration validations.
* Coordinate network\-related migration tasks including VLAN, DHCP, DNS, and PXE validation.
* Monitor environments using Splunk Cloud, SignalFX, or similar tools.
* Follow change management processes, runbooks, and maintain migration documentation.



**Required Skills:** 



* Platform9 and/or OpenStack Administration
* OpenStack CLI
* Kubernetes
* Spectro Cloud Palette
* Linux Administration \& Shell Scripting
* VM \& Storage Migration
* Cinder, Heat, Nova, Ironic / Bare Metal
* Networking (VLAN, DHCP, DNS, PXE)
* Git/GitHub/GitLab
* Splunk Cloud and SignalFX
* Troubleshooting \& Change Management



**Preferred Certifications:** 



* CKA / CKAD / CKS
* RHCSA
* OpenStack Certification



**Qualification:** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.

bec22c17.title: Lead Cloud Platform Engineer
bec22c17.description:
**Summary**
 We are seeking a Lead Cloud Platform Engineer to spearhead the design, implementation, and stability of our core cloud infrastructure, heavily supporting our flagship Cloud and SaaS products. Sitting within the Cloud Operations team, you will be our primary Google Cloud Platform (GCP) expert, ensuring our infrastructure remains highly available, secure, and scalable. By taking ownership of the infrastructure layer, you will work closely and collaboratively with our entire engineering organization—including Development, QA, and DevOps—to create a seamless, automated, and secure environment for our teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, build, and maintain robust, secure, and scalable infrastructure, acting as the primary driver for our GCP environments for our Cloud and SaaS product lines.
* Own the overarching network topology, identity management, and security policies for our cloud footprint.
* Write, manage, and deploy enterprise\-grade Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with the broader technical team (not just DevOps) to ensure seamless integration between core infrastructure and our GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
* Troubleshoot complex, high\-level infrastructure incidents and continuously optimize cloud performance and costs.
* Act as the technical authority on GCP infrastructure, guiding long\-term modernization efforts and architectural decisions while complementing the team's existing Azure expertise.


**Skills And Qualifications Required**
* Extensive, hands\-on architectural and engineering expertise in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) is an absolute must. (Working knowledge of Azure is a plus, but GCP is the primary focus).
* Advanced proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools, specifically Terraform.
* Proven experience working with and securing GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
* Deep understanding of enterprise cloud networking concepts, including VPCs, routing, firewalls, and multi\-cloud transit architectures.
* Strong background supporting high\-availability Cloud and SaaS production environments.
* Highly collaborative mindset with a proven ability to independently drive technical projects while working closely across multiple engineering and product teams.


 See the offer on Jazzhr

edcf7ca8.title: Sr. Managed Services Consultant I
edcf7ca8.description:
**Company Overview**
 Planview has one mission: to build the future of connected work, from ideas to impact.
   

  

 As the global leader in work and resource management, Planview helps organizations accelerate the achievement of what matters most, supporting our customers from need to speed, from passion to progress, and from overhead to optimization. We provide the industry’s most comprehensive solutions designed for strategic planning, portfolio and resource management, Lean and Agile delivery, product portfolio management, capability, and technology management (enterprise architecture), innovation management, and collaborative work and project management. Our connected platform of solutions underpins the business and digital transformations of more than 4,500 customers globally, including 59 of the Fortune 100\.
   

  

 At Planview, our people connections drive our innovation and success. Our global team of 1400\+ work remotely and across our offices including Austin, Vancouver, Hod Hasharon, Bangalore, Sydney, and Stockholm. We’re proud of our world\-class, connected culture built on our shared values, that supports our teams to be successful from anywhere.
   

  

 Learn more about our portfolio at planview.com, and connect with us on LinkedIn, Instagram, and X.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We’re Hiring – Sr. Managed Services Consultant I to support Planview SAAS applications.
   

  

 Working Hours: Night Shift (6:30 PM – 3:30 AM IST)
   

  

 Work Mode: Hybrid
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 As a Sr Managed Services Consultant I, you will support Planview SaaS applications within the Planview portfolio. This role involves monitoring, delivery coordination, reporting, and hands\-on technical troubleshooting in a hosted environment.
   

  

* Support Planview SaaS applications: monitoring, delivery coordination, and reporting.
* Work on trouble tickets, manage scripts, create SQL jobs, and troubleshoot IIS.
* Collaborate with customers, prospects, and internal teams to diagnose connectivity and performance issues.
* Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation.
* Portfolio setup, configuration, and administration.
* User access, security roles, and governance management
* Reporting and dashboard creation (Power BI)
* Strong understanding of project management fundamentals
* Experience with portfolio reporting, risks, dependencies, and resource management
* Budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis knowledge
* Ability to work independently as a Subject Matter Expert (SME)


**What You'll Bring**
**Experience: 6–9 years**
* Strong communication skills (verbal and written fluency in English).
* Willingness to work on night shifts to support US \& European customers.
* Knowledge of MS Office Suite (Excel \& PowerPoint preferred).
* Intermediate\-level knowledge of SQL (Oracle SQL or Microsoft SQL preferred).
* Familiarity with project/agile/lean management tools (Planview, Clarizen, Clarity, CA PPM, Primavera, HP PPM, JIRA, Teamwork) is a plus.


**Education Qualification**
 Bachelor’s degree (BE, MCA, MBA) or foreign equivalent from an accredited institution
   

  

**Benefits At Planview**
 At Planview, you’ll join our global team and culture which reflects the vibrant communities in which our employees live and work. To support you at Planview, you will enjoy:
   

  

* Unplugged Days: 4 company\-wide paid days off per year to recharge and relax.
* Generous PTO offerings (region dependent).
* Region specific competitive benefit plans to support you at any life stage including parental leave, retirement, medical plans, wellness support, and remote work support.
* Paid time to volunteer through Planview’s Force for Good Week.
* Employee Referral bonus program.
* Weekly office lunches for hybrid team members and social events.
* Flexible work hours/environment.


 Now is a great time to join our team. If you are looking for a place to grow your career, innovate with best\-in\-class solutions, and build the future of connected work, Planview is the right place for you!
   

  

**Diversity, Equity and Inclusion at Planview**
 As part of our efforts to build a workforce with diverse talent, we encourage applications from Indigenous, Black, and other racialized communities, 2SLGBTQIA\+ communities, people with neurodivergence, immigrants, people with disabilities, and other equity deserving groups. In addition to building a diverse workforce, we are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible experience. Reasonable accommodations for the interview process can be requested by emailing recruitment@planview.com.

4ca67f55.title: Security Managed Services Practitioner
4ca67f55.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Security Managed Services Practitioner
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Deliver and manage security services across client environments to ensure protection, compliance, and operational resilience.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Business Requirements Analysis
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 You are responsible for maintaining and improving computer systems for KN and our clients, mostly by examining existing IT systems and creating requirements for new ones. You also help implement them and monitor their effectiveness. Your role is critical to smooth operation and safe, secure computer systems that fit the business needs of KN and our clients. You are representing the link between BU, Development and Test teams and provide a strong support to them.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Coordination between several business units and the development team.
* Develop, analyze, prioritize, and organize requirement specifications, data mapping, diagrams, and flowcharts for developers, testers and the team to follow.
* Assist the business unit in transforming their visions to running software.
* Support BU by creating their requirements according to the business needs and system capabilities.
* Translate business requirements into functional and technical software design specifications for development.
* Create data models as part of the design artefacts.
* Prepare and organize BU alignment meetings to find and present solution designs.
* Create test scenarios for the initial Integration test of delivered functions.
* Align external deliveries with other IT departments.
* Plan releases and milestones together with the BU.
* Provide Level 3 support for applications under your responsibility.
* Work together with vendor support on all issues with commercial applications.
* Set up administrator and user profiles.
* Maintain system documentation.
* Create and maintain SLAs.
* Programming in an administrative language.
* Other one\-time tasks assigned by Manager.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Academic degree of computer sciences or equivalent education/knowledge.
* Knowledge regarding agile requirements engineering.
* Proven ability to understand BU requirements, assess business needs and translate them into relevant solutions in form of high quality software design.
* At least basic knowledge of logistics business.
* Profound expertise in system and/or business analysis of complex software systems or industries.
* You like the idea of servant leadership.
* Willingness to establish a cross functional team.
* Good verbal and written communication as well as negotiation and presentation skills. Fluent command of English.
* Ability to learn new areas and new skills quickly.
* Good problem solving/analytical skills.
* Ability to provide good customer service, be a good listener and work well with others.
* Professional attitude and work habits.
* Self\-dependent work in your responsible functional area.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in Business Requirements Analysis.
* This position is based at our Chennai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

6da6c10b.title: Technical Account Manager
6da6c10b.description:
Veeam is the Data and AI Trust Company, specializing in helping organizations ensure their data and AI are fully understood, secured, and resilient to enable the acceleration of safe AI at scale. As the market leader in both data resilience and data security posture management, Veeam is built for the convergence of identity, data, security, and AI risk. Headquartered in Seattle with offices in more than 30 countries, Veeam protects over 550,000 customers worldwide, who trust Veeam to keep their businesses running. Join us as we go fearlessly forward together, growing, learning, and making a real impact for some of the world’s biggest brands.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Technical Account manager is a technical team member responsible for all aspects of the planning, architecture, coordination, and management of professional services engagements.
   

  

 The focus is on architecting and project management of availability solutions, including data protection and monitoring. The Technical Account manager is an expert in the areas of Data Management, Data Analytics, Business Continuity, Data Center, Cloud, Operating Systems, Networking, Storage, and Virtualization.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Provide input to the writing of proposals and Statements of Work
* Support delivery implementation and consulting services to meet Veeam Software solution design and deliverables
* Provide overall project guidance (Project plans, Schedules, Communication Plans, Resource plans, Status updates, etc.)
* Assist with assessment and design of solutions
* Assist with Veeam Software solution implementation effort estimation
* Assist with post\-installation issues
* Create white papers, solutions guides, best practices, custom documentation, etc.
* Deliver onsite knowledge transfer on Veeam Software solutions
* Assist in the selling of Professional Services
* Document configuration and completed activities
* Analyze installed environments and guide optimal Veeam Software configurations
* Facilitate communication between client and Veeam support
* Identify additional needs within the client’s environment that can be resolved with Veeam Software solutions
* Provide input for improvement of process and documentation
* Overnight travel to meet company goals and objectives
* Perform other duties, as assigned


**What You’ll Bring**
* VMware VCP, Microsoft MCSE or equivalent experience
* Prince 2, ITIL, PMP, or equivalent experience
* Bachelor’s Degree in technology required (A combination of education and experience will be considered)
* Hands\-on experience with Veeam’s Core products
* Proven Consulting and Project Management experience
* Excellent communication, interpersonal and relationship\-building skills
* Responsible for understanding customer needs and architecting an appropriate solution.
* Focuses on developing deep technical knowledge of VEEAM solutions and a broad range of associated technologies.
* Significant experience and understanding of virtualisation technologies such as VMware and Hyper\-V
* Experience with disruptive storage systems and technologies (Nimble, Nexsan, Actifio, Veeam, etc.)
* Hands\-on experience with networking protocols and equipment (Fibre Channel, Ethernet, Cloud services)
* Experience with traditional storage and backup architectures (EMC, NetApp, IBM, HP/3PAR, Hitachi, Dell, etc.)
* Hands\-on experience with Enterprise applications (Exchange, SQL, Oracle, etc.)
* Experience with Data Management, Data Protection, Data Analytics
* Extensive experience with Data Center, Business Continuity and Operating Systems
* A proven track record of success (Attitude, Competency, Activity Levels)
* Experience successfully managing multiple simultaneous projects and accounts
* Working knowledge of Cloud technologies, capabilities, and protocols


**What You’ll Get**
* 18 paid vacation days, plus 4 extra global VeeaMe Days for self\-care and 24 paid volunteer hours annually through Veeam Cares
* Private medical coverage for you and up to four dependents
* Life, accident, and disability insurance with enhanced coverage
* Annual flexible wellbeing allowance for physical and mental wellness
* Free confidential counselling and coaching via Employee Assistance Program (EAP), including legal and financial advice
* Meal, fuel, and transportation benefits based on work arrangement
* Daycare reimbursement and safe cab facility for eligible employees
* Opportunities to learn and grow through on\-demand libraries (LinkedIn Learning, O’Reilly), mentoring, workshops, and learning events like our annual Global Day of Learning


**Veeam Software is an equal opportunity employer** 
 and does not tolerate discrimination in any form on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, age, national origin, citizenship, disability, veteran status or any other classification protected by federal, state or local law. All your information will be kept confidential.
   

  

 Personal data collected during the recruitment process will be processed in accordance with our Recruiting Privacy Notice, which explains how your information is collected, used, and handled in connection with hiring activities. By applying for this position, you consent to this processing.
   

  

 By submitting your application, you confirm that the information provided, including any supporting documents, is complete and accurate to the best of your knowledge. Any misrepresentation, omission, or falsification may result in disqualification from consideration or, if discovered after employment begins, termination of employment.

0c36325a.title: Service Delivery Manager - Offshore
0c36325a.description:
**Company Description**
 Nexthink is the leader in digital employee experience management software. The company provides IT leaders with unprecedented insight allowing them to see, diagnose and fix issues at scale impacting employees anywhere, with any application or network, before employees notice the issue. As the first solution to allow IT to progress from reactive problem solving to proactive optimization, Nexthink enables its more than 1,200 customers to provide better digital experiences to more than 15 million employees. Dual headquartered in Lausanne, Switzerland and Boston, Massachusetts, Nexthink has 9 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Service Delivery Manager – MSP (SDM) is the focal point of driving the overall technical services delivery to any MSP customer from Day 1 as the project goes live. SDM is introduced as the SPOC from Technical Services at the beginning of the new logo implementation through any of the packages available with Nexthink. As the project enters the run phase, the SDM manages the delivery of scoped Managed Services (hereafter referred to as “Accelerate”) to Nexthink’s MSP Partner \& their end customer. They play a pivotal role in supporting the MSP \& their customer to realise value from the Nexthink platform. The SDM is supported by one or more Professional Services Consultants (PSC) as well as other support functions like Partner Success Manager, Product Managers, Product Support and more over, backend teams creating new content over the Nexthink platform. The objective of SDM is to ensure that Accelerate services are aligned with the customer success plan, and the value metrics being tracked for the customer, ensuring a continuous value delivery to the customer.
   

  

 The role will coordinate the daily activities of the assigned PSCs, along with the other supporting Accelerate teams located globally and focus on the highest priorities and the biggest impact to the customer, while providing quality assurance, and delivering within the agreed service levels.
   

  

 The role is a combination of technical and business skills; in which the candidate would work with the MSP \& their customer right from doing DEX Management planning, document mutually agreeable success parameters, assigning BAU tasks to Accelerate PSCs and setting a governance to track the achievements of set goals \& ultimately, document and present value achieved to the customer. The candidate should have the ability to assess technical requests, have meaningful discussions with customer on their objectives and map the same back to different product features / packages offered by Nexthink. SDM would be responsible to create and drive the Service Delivery Strategy for the customer and would work internal and external stakeholders across the customer and partner organizations.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Single Point of Contact (SPOC) for the Managed Service Provider (MSP) and their customer, overseeing all deliverables outlined in the Services contract.
   

  

 Participate actively in Customer Steering Group meetings, collaborating with the MSP to discuss Nexthink's role in the customer's Digital Experience (DEX) strategy, understand the partner / customer’s priorities and effectively, ensure timely and qualitative delivery of services.
   

  

 Provide guidance to the PSC \& MSP to drive the Business as Usual (BAU) operations. Recommend new business use cases and engage with the customer / MSP to increase adoption of Nexthink.
   

  

 Analyze customer’s business needs \& pain areas through regular connects, understanding of TCDs from Service Desk \& various data seen from Nexthink. Identify opportunities to increase automation of issues \& leverage existing as well as custom created contents to deliver value to the customer’s / MSP business.
   

  

 Gain a deep understanding of the customer's business goals and objectives as outlined in the MSP contract, aligning Nexthink's deliverables with these objectives.
   

  

 Comprehend the customer's DEX goals, strategic plans, pain points, and limitations to offer informed advice on leveraging Nexthink effectively.
   

  

 Conduct thorough analysis of Nexthink data and present actionable insights to the customer. Create well documented presentations, capturing insights from data and provide recommendations.
   

  

 Organize and coordinate for regular governance calls with MSP as well as bi\-monthly / quarterly business review meetings with a focus on getting things done, based on CSP and mutually agreed road\-map.
   

  

 Collaboratively plan the Customer Success Plan and strategy with the PSM, Sales team, PSC \& SC regularly; ensure to update the CSP based on the customer’s priorities.
   

  

 Lead and manage the PSC / PSCs assigned to specific projects, ensuring their tasks and goals align with the Customer's Success Plan (CSP).
   

  

 Identify and advocate for automation opportunities that bring value to the customer. Prioritize and request custom automation or report creation as needed, working backend with the other support teams of Accelerate.
   

  

 Develop content tailored to customer requirements, collaborating with the Shared Services team for custom scripting, reports using external tools with Nexthink data, custom NQL queries.
   

  

 Support customer initiatives related to Nexthink operations, including existing and upcoming projects. Encourage customer participation in Technical Previews of new features.
   

  

 Organize regular product roadmap workshops to keep customers informed about new features and modules.
   

  

 Meet Service Level Objectives (SLOs) and take prompt action, including internal escalations or partner notifications, in case of any impacts on SLO achievement.
   

  

 Identify and fulfill agreed\-upon use cases, consistently delivering results quarter after quarter.
   

  

 Validate any new service / content requirements from the partner and raise the records in JIRA ticketing system. Assign tasks to self or PSC, post validation.
   

  

 Establish and maintain a regular communication cadence with the MSP and customer through weekly, monthly, and quarterly meetings, ensuring that progress is tracked by PSCs.
   

  

 Maintain updated Action Trackers \& other relevant documents on OneDrive, including customer related insights and roadmap discussions. Update Salesforce records as required.
   

  

 Prepare all customer\-facing and internal deliverables, ensuring they meet high\-quality standards.
   

  

 Coordinate and communicate with cross\-functional teams, including Sales, Support, and Partner Success, to align Managed Services activities.
   

  

 Increase the footprint of Nexthink across different functions of the customer, within IT as well as non\-IT related usage. Enhance stickiness of Nexthink to ensure smooth renewal and possible product upsells.
   

  

 Escalate issues internally and externally when necessary to ensure prompt resolution. Follow\-up with Product Support or relevant resolver groups to ensure timely resolution of issues raised. Raise RED FLAGS to alert in case of any deviations.
   

  

 Stay informed about product development and releases at a level necessary to fulfill the above responsibilities, and inspire PSCs to innovate continuously to maximize Nexthink's value.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Computer Engineering preferred.


**Experience:**
* 8 \- 10 years of experience in technical consulting, analytics, and automation, with a preference for candidates with this background.
* Consulting\-based approach in previous roles coupled with good project management skills.
* Knowledge of Nexthink / competing products would be an advantage.
* Flexible to work in UK / US shifts


**Key Skills and Attributes:**
* Analytical Expertise: Proficient in analyzing data to identify pain points and opportunities, with a strong commitment to providing actionable insights and driving automation.
* Transformation Experience: Demonstrated experience in transformation projects, such as Win10 and O365 migrations.
* End User Computing (EUC) Mastery: Extensive technical knowledge of end user computing (EUC) management.
* Collaborative Aptitude: Skilled at collaborating with dispersed teams, including CTOs, product management, and support, to deliver the right solutions and innovate based on customer input.
* IT Operations Proficiency: Deep understanding of IT operations.
* Quick Learner: Ability to rapidly acquire knowledge of new technologies.
* Customer\-Centric: Proven ability to gather and manage customer feedback, comprehend customer pain points, and propose practical solutions.
* Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with a strong ability to engage with customers and collaborate effectively within a team.
* Problem Management: Exceptional problem\-solving skills to address complex issues effectively.
* Adaptability: Capability to excel in challenging environments and adapt to changing circumstances.
* Enthusiasm for Innovation: Passion for working in an international, collaborative, and fast\-paced environment and eagerness to learn and adopt new technologies.
* Technical Proficiency: Excellent knowledge of Microsoft Windows, Office 365, web browsers, and other standard EUC applications.


**Preferred:**
* Nexthink certified professional / previous experience of working with Nexthink or similar DEM tools.
* Practical knowledge of Windows, Office 365 \& overall EUC insights
* Understanding of SQL, XML, PowerShell, PowerBI would be ideal.
* Practical experience of data integration methods and technologies
+ in any of the following:
+ IT systems
+ Enterprise infrastructure management / Data Centers
+ Application development and management
+ Managed IT Services
+ Security
+ Analytics – EU data

* Project Management skills (ITIL, PMP)


**Additional Information**
 We are the pioneers and trailblazers of a global IT Market Category (DEX) that is shaping the future of how the world works, giving our customers’ IT Teams total digital visibility across their enterprise. Our innovative solutions integrate real\-time analytics, automation, and employee feedback across all endpoints. This enables our IT teams to solve complex technical challenges, create ever more productive workplaces, and deliver happy, satisfied employees in the digital workplace.
   

  

 With over 1000 employees across 5 continents, Nexthink operates as One Team, connecting, collaborating and innovating to continuously grow. We call our employees ‘Nexthinkers’ and our commitment to diversity, inclusion, and equity is second to none. We currently have over 75 nationalities working with us, from all cultures and backgrounds, speaking many different languages.
   

  

 If you are looking for a change and like a nice atmosphere, lots of challenges, and having fun while working, this is a great opportunity for you! Check what we offer:
   

  

* 💼 Permanent Contract and a competitive compensation package.
* 🩺 Health insurance through our partnership with ACKO, including OPD coverage for dental, vision, health check\-ups, consultations, and pharmacy expenses.
* 🏡 Hybrid work model balancing office and remote work, with a structured approach for new hires to foster connections and onboarding.
* 🏖️ Flexible Hours and unlimited vacation (employees have unlimited paid time off on top of the 22 days of holidays we offer). Plus, company\-paid bank holidays (12\), sick days (10\-30\), bereavement leave (5\), and 3 days per year for volunteering.
* 📚 Free access to professional training platforms to explore your interests and enhance your skills.
* 🛡️ Stay covered against accidents, bodily injuries, and disabilities with our personal accident insurance policy, providing assurance with coverage up to three times your annual CTC.
* 🍼 New mothers are entitled to up to 26 weeks of maternity leave, with the flexibility to use up to 8 weeks before the expected delivery and the remaining 18 weeks after. Birth fathers can take 6 weeks of paternity leave, while adoptive parents are eligible for 26 weeks of leave for mothers and 6 weeks for fathers.
* 💰 Under the Payment of Gratuity Act, receive gratuity at the rate of 15 days of basic pay for every completed year of service, provided you've been employed by the company for a minimum of 5 years. Gratuity is payable at retirement or resignation based on your last drawn basic pay.
* 📣  Bonuses for referring successful hires after three months of continuous employment.


*Please note that not all the benefits listed above are available for temporary, contract, and internship roles. To ensure you have the most up\-to\-date information, we recommend checking with your Recruitment Partner.*

11247776.title: Consultant - Cloud Transformation
11247776.description:
The Cloud Transformation practice helps organizations define, design, and deliver enterprise\-wide cloud \& technology strategies that enable growth, resilience, operational efficiency, and measurable business value. The practice works with CIOs, CTOs, CDOs, CAIOs, business leaders, and transformation sponsors to shape integrated strategies across cloud, technology, data, AI, applications, digital platforms and IT operating models
 



 The role is positioned at the intersection of business strategy and technology transformation. It requires the ability to translate enterprise priorities into actionable technology choices, investment roadmaps, governance models, and transformation programs that are commercially viable, operationally executable, and future\-ready.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Support technology strategy engagements across Cloud \& IT strategy, data and AI strategy, application strategy, operating model design, and IT cost management.
* Conduct cloud readiness assessments \& perform 6R analysis to recommend best\-suited migration strategy for the client
* Counduct technology, cloud and AI maturity assessments and provide reccomendations on improving maturity
* Advise on Cloud FinOps, TCO, cost optimization, consumption governance, vendor strategy, and commercial models.
* Define enterprise data and AI strategies linked to business outcomes, and priorities
* Identify, structure, and prioritize high\-value traditional AI, generative AI, agentic AI and automation use cases using feasibility, value, risk, data availability, and execution complexity criteria
* Design technology, cloud or AI roadmaps, implementation strategies, transformation plan and high\-level architecture for the clients
* Craft technology, cloud AI \& cloud adoption business cases to demonstrate value driven by these modernizations
* Align cloud strategy with data and AI priorities, including scalable data platforms, AI compute needs, model deployment environments, security, and cost governance.
* Assess enterprise application portfolios using business value, technical health, cost, risk, user experience, and modernization potential. Perform TIME analysis and provide recommendations to the client
* Design future\-ready technology, cloud and AI operating models aligned to business strategy and enterprise transformation goals.



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* 3\-5 years of experience in technology strategy consulting, digital transformation, data and AI strategy, cloud advisory, or enterprise IT transformation.
* Advanced MS PowerPoint and MS Excel skills are a must
* Knowledge of technology, cloud \& AI operating models including ways of working and governance models
* Relevant certifications across cloud, data, AI, enterprise architecture, or Agile are desirable
* MBA with outstanding academic credentials is an advantage. B.Tech mandatory

627783da.title: Delivery Lead Manager

**Skill required:** 
 Sourcing \- Sourcing
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Manager
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 Any Graduation
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 13 to 18 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 699,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 As a member of the technology sourcing practice, you will be responsible for identifying cost/productivity improvement opportunities in technology spend across a wide array of leading companies and industries. You will lead sourcing projects, including all key steps such as strategy development, RFx management, risk management/mitigation, supplier negotiation, award recommendations, business case presentations, and supplier contract execution. You will be working as a part of Procurement management team which uses a systematic approach for buying all the goods and services needed for a company to stay sustainable. They are involved in the identification of need, finding and qualifying the suppliers, requesting proposals, negotiating with suppliers, contracting, delivery and analyzing results. Understand when \& how to use a request for proposal (price and non\-price factors) and RFQ (price only) and how to develop, execute and analyze the results. Collect and analyze quantitative and qualitative information to assess, screen and select suppliers.
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 To be successful in this role, you should be a strong critical thinker and self\-starter who can take the initiative with high\-level direction and deliver client work with minimal supervision. You should have a passion for continuous self\-learning across industries, such as IT, banking, retail, industrial, healthcare, etc., with end\-to\-end technology sourcing exposure. You should possess proven analytical skills in terms of numeric and text\-based analysis, converting information into tangible recommendations to clients. You should be an effective collaborator, able to manage in a matrix organization structure with multiple internal and client stakeholders, and influencing at the executive level to drive transformational changes. You should also have a passion for process improvement and innovation, specifically aligned to applying generative AI use cases to augment sourcing delivery. Awareness of generative AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot) and their responsible use in sourcing and procurement activities. Ability to leverage generative AI to improve efficiency in tasks such as RFP drafting, spend classification, data summarization, and contract review. You will be responsible for identifying cost/productivity improvement opportunities in technology spend across a wide array of leading companies and industries. You will lead sourcing projects, including all key steps such as strategy development, RFx management, risk management/mitigation, supplier negotiation, award recommendations, business case presentations, and supplier contract execution.
   

  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** 
 You will work with the legal and technical teams to facilitate the negotiations of the legal and technical terms in a contract and execute them. You will also provide industry and supplier research, market intelligence, and robust commercial analyses to clients, support the development of market insights from cross\-client sourcing activity, and collaborate with Technology Practice advisors to develop content that enables knowledge sharing across the organization. You will pursue and develop senior\-level stakeholder relationships at priority accounts and support account relationship plans. Your role will span from individual contributor, leading high complexity sourcing projects, to team leader, coaching and developing expertise and sourcing excellence in others., Any Graduation
