**Architecture \& Design**
 Strong knowledge of:
   

  

 Microservices \& distributed systems
   

  

 API\-first design
   

  

 Event\-driven architectures
   

  

 Security best practices
   

  

**DevOps \& Cloud**
 Experience with:
   

  

 Azure / AWS / GCP
   

  

 CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, etc.)
   

  

 Docker, Kubernetes
   

  

 Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM, etc.)
   

  

**Soft Skills**
 Strong problem\-solving and system thinking
   

  

 Excellent communication and stakeholder management
   

  

 Ability to mentor and uplift engineering teams
   

  

 Job responsibilities
   

  

 This role is expected to:
   

  

 Architect the system
   

  

 Build alongside the team
   

  

 Inject AI into engineering workflows
   

  

 Make developers faster, smarter, and more efficient
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

**Exciting Projects:** 
 We focus on industries like High\-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.
   

  

**Collaborative Environment:** 
 You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global centers or client facilities!
   

  

**Work\-Life Balance:** 
 GlobalLogic prioritizes work\-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.
   

  

**Professional Development:** 
 Our dedicated Learning \& Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training(GL Vantage, Toast Master),Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.
   

  

**Excellent Benefits:** 
 We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Group Term Life Insurance, Group Personal Accident Insurance , NPS(National Pension Scheme ), Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonuses.
   

  

**Fun Perks:** 
 We want you to love where you work, which is why we host sports events, cultural activities, offer food on subsidies rates, Corporate parties. Our vibrant offices also include dedicated GL Zones, rooftop decks and GL Club where you can drink coffee or tea with your colleagues over a game of table and offer discounts for popular stores and restaurants!
   

  

**About GlobalLogic**
 GlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partner to the world’s largest and most forward\-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’ve been at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of the most innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today we continue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefining industries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.

c6e0990f.title: Solution Architect
c6e0990f.description:
ABOUT US:
   

  

 LSEG (London Stock Exchange Group) is more than a diversified global financial markets infrastructure and data business. We are dedicated, open\-access partners with a dedication to excellence in delivering the services our customers expect from us. With extensive experience, deep knowledge and worldwide presence across financial markets, we enable businesses and economies around the world to fund innovation, manage risk and create jobs. It’s how we’ve contributed to supporting the financial stability and growth of communities and economies globally for more than 300 years. Through a comprehensive suite of trusted financial market infrastructure services – and our open\-access model – we provide the flexibility, stability and trust that enable our customers to pursue their ambitions with confidence and clarity.
   

  

 LSEG is headquartered in the United Kingdom, with significant operations in 65 countries across EMEA, North America, Latin America and Asia Pacific. We employ 25,000 people globally, more than half located in Asia Pacific. LSEG’s ticker symbol is LSEG.
   

  

**OUR PEOPLE:**
 People are at the heart of what we do and drive the success of our business. Our values of Integrity, Partnership, Excellence and Change shape how we think, how we do things and how we help our people fulfil their potential. We embrace diversity and actively seek to attract individuals with unique backgrounds and perspectives. We break down barriers and encourage teamwork, enabling innovation and rapid development of solutions that make a difference. Our workplace generates an enriching and rewarding experience for our people and customers alike. Our vision is to build an inclusive culture in which everyone feels encouraged to fulfil their potential.
   

  

 We know that real personal growth cannot be achieved by simply climbing a career ladder – which is why we encourage and enable a wealth of avenues and interesting opportunities for everyone to broaden and deepen their skills and expertise. As a global organisation spanning 65 countries and one rooted in a culture of growth, opportunity, diversity and innovation, LSEG is a place where everyone can grow, develop and fulfil your potential with meaningful careers.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 We are looking for a
 **Solution Architect who thrives on turning vision into reality** 
 . This role combines strategic thinking with hands\-on execution. You will design and deliver distributed systems, create architecture documentation, guide development teams, and ensure solutions meet the highest standards of performance and reliability.
   

  

**Why This Role Matters**
 You’ll play a pivotal role in building systems that handle
 **high availability, low latency, and complex data flows** 
 —critical to LSEG’s success. If you enjoy solving tough technical challenges and influencing technology direction, this is your opportunity to make a global impact.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design \& Delivery: Architect distributed systems optimised for scalability, resilience, and performance.
* Documentation Excellence: Produce clear Architecture Design Documents and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) with well\-reasoned analysis and proposals.
* Technical Leadership: Advise developers on technology choices and validate implementation against approved designs.
* Integration Expertise: Work on solutions involving third\-party data ingestion, analytics, and advanced data platforms.
* Stakeholder Engagement: Communicate effectively with technical and non\-technical audiences, including senior leadership.
* Transformation Support: Contribute to strategic technology initiatives and optimise delivery performance across teams.


**Essential Skills**
* Ability to understand the architecture of existing systems and identify risks and propose solutions
* Proven track record in designing and delivering distributed systems.
* Ability to write ADRs and maintain design integrity throughout delivery.
* Excellent communication skills for diverse audiences.
* Ability to clearly articulate options, discuss pros and cons, focus on factors that drive the solution
* Past programmer experience is preferred
* Hand\-on attitude to work with engineering organisation on addressing open questions and help eliminate implementation issues
* Understanding of various SQL and NO\-SQL database systems
* Practical experience with delivering projects in Cloud


**Preferred Experience**
* Building systems for high availability and low latency.
* Ingesting third\-party data and analytics solutions.
* Familiarity with data mesh, data fabric, and lakehouse technologies.
* Experience in highly regulated environments (e.g., banking).


 Proud to share LSEG in the India is Great Place to Work certified (Jun ’25 – Jun ’26\).
   

  

 Learn more about life and purpose of our company directly from India colleagues’ video: Bengaluru, India \| Where We Work \| LSEG
   

  

**Career Stage:**
 Manager
   

  

**London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) Information:**
 Join us and be part of a team that values innovation, quality, and continuous improvement. If you're ready to take your career to the next level and make a significant impact, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 LSEG is a leading global financial markets infrastructure and data provider. Our purpose is driving financial stability, empowering economies and enabling customers to create sustainable growth.
   

  

 Our purpose is the foundation on which our culture is built. Our values of
 **Integrity, Partnership** 
 ,
 **Excellence** 
 and
 **Change** 
 underpin our purpose and set the standard for everything we do, every day. They go to the heart of who we are and guide our decision making and everyday actions.
   

  

 Working with us means that you will be part of a dynamic organisation of 25,000 people across 65 countries. However, we will value your individuality and enable you to bring your true self to work so you can help enrich our diverse workforce.
   

  

 We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. This means that we do not discriminate on the basis of anyone’s race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. Conforming with applicable law, we can reasonably accommodate applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs.
   

  

 You will be part of a collaborative and creative culture where we encourage new ideas. We are committed to sustainability across our global business and we are proud to partner with our customers to help them meet their sustainability objectives. Our charity, the LSEG Foundation provides charitable grants to community groups that help people access economic opportunities and build a secure future with financial independence. Colleagues can get involved through fundraising and volunteering.
   

  

 LSEG offers a range of tailored benefits and support, including healthcare, retirement planning, paid volunteering days and wellbeing initiatives.
   

  

 Please take a moment to read this privacy notice carefully, as it describes what personal information London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) (we) may hold about you, what it’s used for, and how it’s obtained, your rights and how to contact us as a data subject.
   

  

 If you are submitting as a Recruitment Agency Partner, it is essential and your responsibility to ensure that candidates applying to LSEG are aware of this privacy notice.

da17e001.title: Senior Solution Architect, Cloud Infrastructure - DevOps
da17e001.description:
NVIDIA is the world leader in computer graphics, artificial intelligence, and accelerated computing. For over 25 years, we have been at the forefront of research and engineering around the greatest advances in technology. Our history of innovation drives us to solve the worlds hardest problems.
   

  

 NVIDIA is looking for Senior Cloud Infrastructure/DevOps Solutions Architect to join its NVIDIA Infrastructure Specialist Team. Academic and commercial groups around the world are using NVIDIA products to revolutionize deep learning and data analytics, and to power data centers. Join the team building many of the largest and fastest AI/HPC systems in the world! We are looking for someone with the ability to work on a dynamic customer focused team that requires excellent interpersonal skills. This role will be interacting with customers, partners and internal teams, to analyze, define and implement large scale Networking projects. The scope of these efforts includes a combination of Networking, System Design and Automation and being the face to the customer!
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Develop and maintain continuous integration and delivery pipelines .
* Develop tooling to automate deployment and management of large\-scale infrastructure environments, to automate operational monitoring and alerting, and to enable self\-service consumption of resources.
* Deploy monitoring solutions for the servers, network and storage.
* Perform troubleshooting bottom up from bare metal, operating system, software stack and application level.
* Being a technical resource, develop, re\-define and document standard methodologies to share with internal teams Support Research \& Development activities and engage in POCs/POVs for future improvements .


**What We Need To See**
* BS/MS/PhD or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Data Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, other Engineering fields with at least 8 years work or research experience in networking fundamentals, TCP/IP stack, and data center architecture.
* 5\+ Years of Design, implement and maintain large scale HPC/AI clusters with monitoring, logging and alerting Manage Linux job/workload schedulers and orchestration tools.
* Knowledge of HPC and AI solution technologies from CPU’s and GPU’s to high speed interconnects and supporting software.
* Direct design, implementation and management experience with cloud computing platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
* Experience with job scheduling workloads and orchestration technologies such as Slurm, Kubernetes and Singularity.
* Excellent knowledge of Windows and Linux (Redhat/CentOS and Ubuntu) networking (sockets, firewalld, iptables, wireshark, etc.) and internals, ACLs and OS level security protection and common protocols e.g. TCP, DHCP, DNS, etc.
* Experience with multiple storage solutions such as Lustre, GPFS, zfs and xfs. Familiarity with newer and emerging storage technologies.
* Python programming and bash scripting experience.
* Comfortable with automation and configuration management tools including Jenkins, Ansible, Puppet/Chef, etc.
* Deep knowledge of Networking Protocols like InfiniBand, Ethernet Deep understanding and experience with virtual systems (for example VMware, Hyper\-V, KVM, or Citrix).
* Strong written, verbal, and listening skills in English are critical.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**
* Knowledge of CPU and/or GPU architecture .
* Knowledge of Kubernetes, container related microservice technologies.
* Experience with GPU\-focused hardware/software (DGX, CUDA.)
* Background with RDMA (InfiniBand or RoCE) fabrics.


 NVIDIA is widely considered to be one of the technology world’s most desirable employers. We have some of the most forward\-thinking and hardworking individuals in the world working for us. If you're creative and autonomous, we want to hear from you.
   

  

 , , JR2017866

2025c96d.title: Principal Cloud Solutions Architect - Applications & AI
2025c96d.description:
**Title**
 Principal Cloud Solutions Architect \- Applications \& AI
   

  

 KBR is looking for a Principal Cloud Solutions Architect \- Applications \& AI to serve as a senior technical leader responsible for defining enterprise architecture standards, cloud\-native application strategies, artificial intelligence solutions, and integration patterns across KBR's global technology landscape. This role provides architectural leadership for custom applications, Azure platform services, enterprise integration, Microsoft Power Platform, Microsoft 365, and AI\-enabled business solutions.
   

  

 The Principal Cloud Solutions Architect \- Applications \& AI will work within a globally distributed Strategy and Architecture organization. This position will partner with stakeholders across North America, Europe, Asia\-Pacific, and other global regions to guide application modernization, cloud adoption, AI enablement, and technology governance initiatives. The ideal candidate will combine a deep expertise in enterprise application architecture, Azure cloud services, AI platforms, and DevSecOps practices with a proven ability to influence technology strategy, establish standards, and mentor technical teams across a complex enterprise environment.
   

  

 In September 2025, KBR announced that we are spinning our Mission Technology Solutions business into a separate public company.
 *This role will ultimately be part of the new company* 
 . The Mission Technology Solutions business partners with governments and defense, intelligence, space, aviation, and critical infrastructure customers to deliver high\-end engineering, science, technology, and mission support solutions.
   

  

* Ability to work a regular 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM IST schedule\*\*


**Key Responsibilities**
* Enterprise \& Application Architecture
+ Define and maintain enterprise application architecture standards, principles, reference architectures, and reusable design patterns
+ Lead architecture design for custom applications, cloud\-native solutions, integration initiatives, and modernization programs
+ Provide architectural leadership for solutions leveraging Microsoft technologies, including .NET, .NET Core, C\#, ASP.NET, Blazor, Web APIs, and modern application frameworks
+ Establish architecture patterns for microservices, distributed systems, API\-first architectures, event\-driven solutions, and domain\-driven design
+ Evaluate application portfolios and recommend modernization strategies that improve scalability, security, maintainability, and operational efficiency
+ Ensure solutions align with enterprise architecture, security, integration, supportability, and lifecycle management standards
+ Serve as a trusted advisor to business and technology stakeholders on application architecture and technology decisions

* Azure PaaS \& Cloud\-Native Architecture
+ Lead adoption of Azure PaaS and cloud\-native technologies as preferred enterprise application hosting models
+ Design solutions utilizing Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, API Management, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, Container Apps, Key Vault, Azure Front Door, and related Azure services
+ Establish reusable architecture patterns that promote scalability, security, reliability, observability, operational excellence, and cost optimization
+ Guide application teams in selecting appropriate Azure services, deployment models, and cloud\-native design approaches
+ Ensure solutions align with Microsoft Azure Well\-Architected Framework principles

* AI Architecture \& Intelligent Platforms
+ Define enterprise AI architecture standards, governance models, reference architectures, and implementation frameworks
+ Design and govern AI\-enabled solutions utilizing Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Services, AI Agents, Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), intelligent search, vector databases, and enterprise knowledge platforms
+ Guide integration of AI capabilities within custom applications, Power Platform solutions, and Microsoft 365 environments
+ Ensure AI solutions align with responsible AI principles, security, privacy, compliance, data governance, and operational support requirements
+ Evaluate emerging AI technologies and recommend enterprise adoption strategies

* Enterprise Integration \& Platform Architecture
+ Define enterprise integration strategies, standards, and reusable architecture patterns
+ Design architectures leveraging APIs, messaging platforms, event\-driven architectures, Microsoft Graph, and hybrid integration models
+ Provide governance and architectural guidance for Power Platform, Microsoft 365, SharePoint Online, Teams, Dataverse, and related platforms
+ Establish secure and scalable integration patterns across Azure services, SaaS applications, enterprise systems, and low\-code platforms
+ Guide teams on the appropriate use of low code versus custom development approaches

* Architecture Governance, Security \& DevSecOps
+ Lead architecture review boards, solution governance reviews, and technical design assessments
+ Ensure alignment with enterprise architecture standards, technology roadmaps, security requirements, and operational support models
+ Define architecture standards supporting Secure SDLC, DevSecOps, software quality, and software supply chain governance
+ Review security findings, software quality metrics, vulnerability assessments, and compliance controls
+ Partner with development, cloud, and cybersecurity teams to integrate security, quality, and compliance requirements into delivery pipelines
+ Ensure solutions align with organizational security standards and industry best practices

* Technology Strategy \& Leadership
+ Lead proof\-of\-concepts, technology evaluations, vendor assessments, and strategic recommendations
+ Partner with technology vendors and platform providers to support enterprise solution adoption and modernization efforts
+ Contribute to cloud, application, AI, integration, and enterprise technology roadmaps
+ Support critical architecture decisions, major initiatives, and complex production escalations
+ Mentor architects, engineers, and development teams
+ Serve as a senior technical leader across globally distributed teams and initiatives


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field required; equivalent experience may be considered
* 9 \+ years of overall Information Technology experience
* 7 \+ years of experience in Solution Architecture, Application Architecture, Cloud Architecture, AI Architecture, or Enterprise Architecture roles
* 5\+ years of hands\-on Microsoft Azure architecture experience
* Proven ability in designing enterprise\-scale custom applications and modernization initiatives
* Highly skilled in developing architecture standards, governance frameworks, and technology roadmaps
* Deep expertise in Microsoft technologies, including .NET, .NET Core, C\#, ASP.NET, Blazor, Web APIs, and cloud\-native application architectures
* Proficiency in designing Azure PaaS and cloud\-native solutions
* Familiar with Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Services, AI Agents, RAG architectures, and intelligent application platforms
* Skilled in designing or governing enterprise solutions utilizing Azure services, APIs, Microsoft Power Platform, and Microsoft 365 technologies
* Strong understanding of enterprise integration architecture, API management, and event\-driven design patterns
* DevOps, DevSecOps, software quality governance, and software supply chain risk management experience
* Knowledge of secure application architecture, governance, compliance, and enterprise security principles
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Proven expertise to influence technical strategy and architectural decisions across large organizations
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making capabilities
* Demonstrated ability to mentor architects, engineers, and development teams
* Ability to communicate complex technical concepts effectively to both technical and executive audiences
* Experience working across globally distributed teams and business functions


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ\-305\)
* Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate (AI\-102\)
* TOGAF Certification
* Ability to design and govern enterprise solutions utilizing Azure cloud\-native services, integration platforms, container technologies, DevOps toolchains, Microsoft Power Platform, and Microsoft 365 technologies
* Proficiency with Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, AI Agents, RAG architectures, intelligent search, vector databases, Copilot technologies, and enterprise AI governance
* SonarQube, Sonatype Nexus Lifecycle/IQ, GitHub Advanced Security, SAST, DAST, and secure CI/CD practices experience
* Knowledge of NIST, ISO 27001, CIS Benchmarks, and enterprise governance frameworks
* Exposure to AWS and Google Cloud Platform environments


***We are IT***
 We are strategic enablers of the business, delivering scalable, secure, and innovative technology solutions that drive operational excellence and support enterprise growth. We partner closely with functions across the organization to modernize systems, unlock data\-driven insights, and enhance the digital employee experience. Our global footprint and commitment to transformation position us at the forefront of leveraging technology to create lasting business value.
   

  

**R2126749**

f83a021c.title: ServiceNow Technical Architect
f83a021c.description:
Overview:
**ServiceNow Technical Architect \-** **ITSM, integration, Custom app development \& Architecture**
Experience* Overall Experience: 15\+ years in IT Service Management / IT Operations / Enterprise Monitoring
* Relevant Experience: 8\+ years in ServiceNow platform with deep focus on TSOM


Job Summary
We are seeking an experienced ServiceNow TSOM Architect to lead the design, architecture, and implementation of ServiceNow Technology Service Operations Management (TSOM) solutions. The ideal candidate will be responsible for defining scalable IT Operations architectures, driving observability and AIOps initiatives, and enabling proactive operations through ServiceNow TSOM modules.
This role requires strong technical leadership, hands\-on architectural expertise, and the ability to work with enterprise stakeholders to transform IT Operations using ServiceNow best practices.
Responsibilities:

Key Responsibilities
Architecture \& Solution Design* Define end‑to‑end ServiceNow TSOM architecture aligned to enterprise IT Operations strategy
* Design scalable and resilient solutions leveraging:
* + ITOM Discovery
	+ Service Mapping
	+ Event Management
	+ Operational Intelligence
	+ Cloud Observability
	+ AIOps capabilities
* Drive architectural decisions for hybrid, multi‑cloud, and on‑prem environments


Implementation \& Delivery* Lead and oversee implementation of TSOM solutions across large enterprise landscapes
* Define integration patterns with:
* + Monitoring tools (Splunk, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, Azure Monitor, AWS CloudWatch, etc.)
	+ CMDB data sources
	+ Third‑party observability platforms
* Ensure CMDB health, governance, and data accuracy using Discovery and Service Mapping


Technical Leadership* Act as Technical Authority for TSOM solutions and best practices
* Review and approve technical designs, configurations, and customizations
* Mentor developers, administrators, and consultants on TSOM architecture and standards
* Conduct technical workshops and design sessions with stakeholders


AIOps \& Observability* Design and implement AIOps\-driven event correlation and noise reduction
* Enable proactive operations through anomaly detection and predictive insights
* Optimize operational workflows using event rules, alerts, and automations


Governance \& Optimization* Define TSOM governance, standards, and architectural guardrails
* Drive performance optimization, stability, and scalability of ServiceNow platform
* Ensure alignment with ServiceNow best practices and upgrade strategies


Stakeholder \& Client Engagement* Partner with IT leadership, operations teams, and business stakeholders
* Translate business requirements into technical solutions
* Support pre‑sales activities including solution design, estimations, and proposals


Required Skills \& Qualifications
ServiceNow Expertise* 8\+ years of hands‑on experience with ServiceNow ITOM / TSOM
* Strong expertise in:
* + ITOM Discovery
	+ Service Mapping
	+ Event Management
	+ Operational Intelligence
	+ CMDB architecture \& data modeling
* Experience with ServiceNow scripting (JavaScript, Glide APIs)


IT Operations \& Monitoring* Strong understanding of:
* + ITSM, ITOM, and IT Operations processes
	+ Enterprise monitoring and observability architectures
	+ Hybrid infrastructure, cloud, containers, and microservices
* Experience integrating ServiceNow with leading monitoring tools


Architecture \& Design* Proven experience as Architect / Lead Consultant on large‑scale ServiceNow programs
* Deep understanding of:
* + Distributed systems
	+ Network, server, storage, and cloud technologies
* Strong documentation and design skills (HLDs, LLDs, architecture diagrams)


Soft Skills* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to influence senior leadership and technical teams
* Strong problem‑solving and analytical mindset


Requirements:

Certifications (Preferred / Mandatory)* ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – ITOM (Highly Preferred)
* ServiceNow Certified Technical Architect (CTA) – Preferred
* ITIL v3 or ITIL 4 certification
* Cloud certifications (AWS / Azure / GCP) – Preferred

  

Nice to Have* Experience with ServiceNow Cloud Observability
* Exposure to DevOps and SRE practices
* Experience in large transformation or CMDB remediation programs
* Pre‑sales and proposal solutioning experience


What We Offer* Opportunity to architect enterprise‑scale TSOM transformations
* Work with cutting‑edge observability and AIOps technologies
* Leadership role in high‑impact digital transformation programs

32f439f7.title: Oracle Cloud PLM Senior Consultant
32f439f7.description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* In the role of a Senior Consultant Oracle Agile PLM Java you will anchor the technical solution effort for Agile PLM implementations enhancements integrations upgrades and support engagements
* You will work closely with business stakeholders functional consultants and enterprise architects to translate business requirements into scalable secure and high performing Oracle Agile PLM solutions
* You will be responsible for designing and developing Agile PLM customizations Process Extensions PX Event Subscribers Web Services integrations reports data migration utilities and Java based applications supporting Product Lifecycle Management processes
* You will also contribute to architecture discussions code reviews performance optimization and best practices while mentoring junior team members
* Additionally you will support solutioning activities effort estimations proof of concepts and technical proposals to help clients accelerate their PLM transformation journey

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Design develop and support Oracle Agile PLM solutions across implementation enhancement and support projects
* Develop and maintain Agile PLM customizations using Agile SDK Process Extensions PX Event Subscribers and Java based components
* Configure and support Agile PLM modules including Product Collaboration PC Product Governance Compliance PG C Product Quality Management PQM and Product Portfolio Management PPM
* Design and implement integrations between Agile PLM and enterprise systems such as SAP Oracle ERP MES and third party applications
* Work closely with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions
* Support Engineering Change Management processes including ECO MCO SCO and workflow automation
* Perform system troubleshooting performance optimization root cause analysis and production support
* Participate in code reviews technical design discussions deployment planning and knowledge sharing initiatives
* Ensure adherence to development standards quality processes security guidelines and best practices

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* 5 12 years of total IT experience with 3 8 years of hands on Oracle Agile PLM technical experience
* Strong experience with Oracle Agile PLM modules
* Product Collaboration PC
* Product Governance Compliance PG C
* Product Quality Management PQM
* Product Portfolio Management PPM
* Hands on expertise in
* Agile SDK
* Process Extensions PX
* Event Framework
* Java J2EE Development
* Web Services SOAP REST
* XML JSON
* SQL PLSQL
* Strong understanding of Agile PLM business objects
* Items
* BOM Structures
* AML Manufacturers
* Changes ECO MCO SCO
* Quality and Compliance objects
* Experience integrating Agile PLM with SAP Oracle ERP MES and other enterprise applications
* Strong knowledge of Agile PLM workflows security administration and lifecycle management
* Experience in troubleshooting performance tuning and production support
* Hands on experience with version control tools such as Git SVN and deployment processes
* Excellent analytical problem solving and stakeholder communication skills

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Experience in Agile PLM upgrades migrations and global rollout programs is preferred
* Exposure to Oracle Cloud PLM and coexistence migration strategies from Agile PLM to Oracle Cloud PLM is an added advantage
* Experience in Manufacturing Automotive Aerospace Medical Devices High Tech or Industrial Equipment industries preferred
* Understanding of Product Lifecycle Management PLM Product Data Management PDM and New Product Introduction NPI processes
* Knowledge of CI CD DevOps practices and automated deployment frameworks is desirable
* Oracle Agile PLM certification and Java certifications will be an added advantage
* Ability to work effectively in global delivery and client facing environments

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Oracle Cloud\-\>PLM

2f1912f1.title: Sr. Cloud Architect
2f1912f1.description:
**Job Summary**
 Serve as a senior cloud architect specializing in Azure platforms to design implement and optimize secure and scalable enterprise solutions for a global organization using deep expertise in Azure DevOps Azure AD and Azure PaaS to modernize applications and improve delivery efficiency in a hybrid work model with no travel required.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design end to end Azure PaaS architectures that support mission critical enterprise applications while aligning with organizational standards and long term scalability goals.
* Drive cloud solution blueprints that integrate Azure DevOps Azure AD and Azure PaaS services to streamline delivery pipelines and enhance platform reliability.
* Optimize cloud resource utilization by reviewing consumption patterns proposing right sizing strategies and guiding implementation to reduce total cost of ownership.
* Coordinate with product teams security experts and operations personnel to translate complex business requirements into clear and actionable Azure designs.
* Define and enforce standards for repository structure branching models build pipelines and release processes using Azure DevOps to achieve consistent deployment quality.
* Implement robust identity and access designs with Azure AD by configuring application registrations conditional access and role based access models that protect critical assets.
* Evaluate existing application portfolios and recommend modernization approaches using Azure PaaS components such as app services serverless compute and managed data services.
* Create reference architectures design patterns and documentation that guide delivery teams toward reusable and compliant Azure solutions across programs.
* Review solutions for security resilience observability and operational readiness by assessing logging monitoring backup and disaster recovery approaches for each workload.
* Mentor senior engineers and architects by sharing practical guidance on Azure DevOps practices infrastructure as code and automated testing strategies that improve quality.
* Collaborate with finance risk and accounting stakeholders to shape cloud solutions that respect regulatory constraints and data sensitivity across financial processes.
* Guide hybrid work model collaboration by setting expectations for remote design sessions documentation quality and knowledge sharing practices that keep teams aligned.
* Measure architecture effectiveness by defining technical success metrics and reviewing operational data to validate performance reliability and security outcomes.


**Qualifications**
* Showcase extensive experience in Azure architecture by demonstrating hands on design and implementation work using Azure PaaS data and integration services at enterprise scale.
* Apply expert working knowledge of Azure DevOps by describing prior work building complex pipelines automated deployments and integrated testing for large solutions.
* Demonstrate deep proficiency in Azure AD by explaining how identity models application security and conditional access policies were designed and improved in previous programs.
* Utilize strong background in infrastructure as code through tools such as Bicep or Terraform to achieve consistent repeatable and auditable Azure environments.
* Exhibit broad understanding of networking security and compliance concepts that are necessary to design Azure solutions for regulated industries and sensitive data workloads.
* Highlight experience collaborating with finance and accounting teams or related domains to design solutions that support financial controls reporting and audit needs.
* Bring excellent communication and analytical skills that enable clear explanation of complex cloud concepts to technical and non technical stakeholders across global teams.
* Display a career history of 20 to 24 years in technology with a strong focus on cloud architecture modern engineering practices and continuous improvement outcomes.

0d10edc0.title: Sales Manager - Managed Services, IT
0d10edc0.description:
As Sales Manager you will be responsible for expanding the business, through named accounts and strong account management with large SI's, via direct and indirect channels to global clients. The role requires development of their own strategic customer base. You will partner with the Solutions team to offer innovative solutions to support targeted business growth. Critically this role is responsible for leading, developing, supporting and inspiring sales globally.
   

  

 This role is to define and implement account/sale plans that develop and grow new and existing client relationships and opportunities for A\&O IT service offerings, to secure profitable expansion to lines of business across specific key clients.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Revenue Generation: Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve revenue targets and exceed expectations from India based customers .
* Customer Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with key customers and prospects. Understand their needs and provide tailored solutions to meet their business objectives.
* Market Analysis: Conduct market research and analysis to identify new business opportunities and stay abreast of industry trends and competitor activities.
* Sales Process Management: Implement and oversee a structured sales process to ensure efficient lead generation, qualification, and closure.
* Sales Forecasting and Reporting: Prepare accurate sales forecasts and provide regular reports on sales performance, pipeline development, and customer satisfaction.
* Negotiation: Successfully negotiate contracts and pricing terms with customers to maximize revenue and profitability.


 Required experience:
   

  

* Minimum 5 years of experience in sales management within the IT services industry, specifically with large SI's
* Proven track record of achieving sales targets and exceeding expectations in a competitive market.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, both verbal and written.
* Strong negotiation and problem\-solving abilities.
* In\-depth knowledge of the IT services market and selling IT Services
* Proficiency in using CRM and sales enablement tools.
* Flexibility: Willingness to work irregular hours and adjust schedules to accommodate clients and willing to travel across India
* Fluency in English and local languages


 If you are a dynamic and results\-oriented sales professional with a passion for IT services, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

**ABOUT US:**
 A\&O IT Group is an award\-winning, fast\-growth, global IT services and cyber security consultancy operating in over 130 countries. A\&O IT Group is proud to sit within the Stock Exchange's Top 1000 most inspirational companies in the UK.
   

  

**OUR VALUES:**
 Our team prides itself on our core values and commitment to
 **doing the basics brilliantly** 
 . If you too strive to
 **engage \& delight** 
 , we would love to hear from you.

0374e74f.title: BT Delivery Manager AI Automation
0374e74f.description:
**LiveRamp is the data collaboration platform of choice for the world’s most innovative companies. A groundbreaking leader in consumer privacy, data ethics, and foundational identity, LiveRamp is setting the new standard for building a connected customer view with unmatched clarity and context while protecting precious brand and consumer trust. LiveRamp offers complete flexibility to collaborate wherever data lives to support the widest range of data collaboration use cases—within organizations, between brands, and across its premier global network of top\-quality partners.**
**Hundreds of global innovators, from iconic consumer brands and tech giants to banks, retailers, and healthcare leaders turn to LiveRamp to build enduring brand and business value by deepening customer engagement and loyalty, activating new partnerships, and maximizing the value of their first\-party data while staying on the forefront of rapidly evolving compliance and privacy requirements.**
**LiveRamp is the data collaboration platform of choice for the world’s most innovative companies. A groundbreaking leader in consumer privacy, data ethics, and foundational identity, LiveRamp is setting the new standard for building a connected customer view with unmatched clarity and context while protecting precious brand and consumer trust. LiveRamp offers complete flexibility to collaborate wherever data lives to support the widest range of data collaboration use cases—within organizations, between brands, and across its premier global network of top\-quality partners.**
**Hundreds of global innovators, from iconic consumer brands and tech giants to banks, retailers, and healthcare leaders turn to LiveRamp to build enduring brand and business value by deepening customer engagement and loyalty, activating new partnerships, and maximizing the value of their first\-party data while staying on the forefront of rapidly evolving compliance and privacy requirements.**
******You Will:******
* Own end\-to\-end delivery of AI and automation initiatives, from intake and scoping through launch, adoption, and ongoing optimization,with accountability for your team’s outcomes and ways of working.
* Lead and develop a small AI and automation delivery team (e.g., project managers, business analysts, and/or configuration specialists), providing clear direction, coaching, and regular feedback to support performance and growth.
* Translate ambiguous business problems into clear automation roadmaps, delivery plans, and measurable outcomes across service management, employee experience, and internal operations.
* Run a structured discovery process with stakeholders to prioritize high\-impact use cases, define requirements, and align on success metrics, SLAs, and value realization targets.
* Build and manage detailed project plans, resource plans, and delivery milestones for multiple concurrent AI and automation projects in an agile environment, balancing capacity and priorities across your team.
* Drive execution across cross\-functional teams (BT, engineering, security, data, operations, business owners, vendors) to ensure on‑time, on‑budget, high\-quality delivery; removing blockers and making trade‑off decisions on behalf of your team.
* Establish and track delivery KPIs (e.g., sprint delivery, deflection rates, productivity gains, CSAT, adoption) and regularly report performance; using these insights to coach your team and refine the portfolio roadmap.
* Implement and continuously refine delivery standards, playbooks, and governance for AI and automation, ensuring compliance with LiveRamp’s security, privacy, and risk requirements.
* Manage vendor relationships and SOWs for AI and automation platforms and implementation partners, ensuring clear deliverables and accountability; aligning external partners with your team’s objectives and standards.
* Champion structured change management, including communications, stakeholder readiness, documentation and training to drive strong adoption and behavior change.
* Proactively identify delivery risks, dependencies, and blockers
* Lead structured issue resolution and escalation to keep initiatives on track, including coaching team members on effective risk management and stakeholder communication.
* Maintain a transparent intake and backlog process, ensuring stakeholders understand priorities, trade‑offs, and timelines for AI and automation delivery.
* Document and socialize lessons learned, best practices, and reusable components to accelerate future delivery across the portfolio; and embed these into how your team operates.
* Act as an escalation point for technical issues for the AI and Automation team; partnering with technical leads and managers to ensure timely resolution and clear communication.


******Your Team Will:******
* Operate as an internal delivery “squad” focused on AI and automation, combining project management, business analysis, and light technical configuration or orchestration skills.
* Maintain and evolve the AI and automation delivery backlog, ensuring that the highest\-value, most feasible use cases are clearly defined, sized, and ready for execution.
* Coordinate with platform and engineering teams to integrate automation solutions with LiveRamp’s core systems (e.g., ITSM, HR, collaboration tools, identity, and data platforms).
* Create and maintain documentation, runbooks, and support models for launched automations so that IT operations and business teams can own day‑to‑day use.
* Monitor production automations and AI solutions, partnering with technical owners to address incidents, quality issues, and performance degradations.
* Collect feedback from end users, support teams, and business owners to identify enhancement opportunities and inform the ongoing roadmap.
* Support structured experimentation and pilots (e.g., new tooling, workflow automations, or chat interfaces), ensuring tests are safe, compliant, and measurable.
* Embed delivery discipline and repeatable ways of working (standups, sprint reviews, retros, health checks) across the AI and automation portfolio; role‑modeling these practices and holding your team accountable to them.
* Act as ambassadors for responsible AI and automation practices, reinforcing LiveRamp’s commitments to privacy, security, and data ethics in every initiative.


******About You:******
* 3\-5\+ years of experience in technology delivery, program management, or consulting, with at least 3 years focused on automation, AI, or intelligent workflow solutions; including 1–3 years directly leading teams or complex cross‑functional programs.
* Proven track record leading complex, cross‑functional initiatives from concept through launch, ideally within Corporate IT, Business Technology, or enterprise operations.
* Demonstrated experience managing, coaching, and developing individual contributors (or matrixed delivery teams), including setting goals, providing feedback, and driving accountability for results.
* Strong project and program management skills, including scope definition, planning, stakeholder management, and status reporting.
* Experience delivering solutions using one or more automation or AI‑adjacent platforms (e.g., workflow/orchestration tools, low‑code platforms, ITSM automation, RPA, or AI copilots).
* Demonstrated ability to translate business problems into structured requirements, user stories, and measurable success metrics.
* Comfortable operating in an agile or hybrid delivery environment with multiple parallel workstreams and changing priorities.
* Excellent communication and facilitation skills, including the ability to align diverse stakeholders, run workshops, and communicate trade‑offs to senior leaders.
* Strong analytical and problem‑solving skills; able to interpret data, dashboards, and qualitative feedback to drive decisions and continuous improvement.
* Familiarity with information security, privacy, and risk considerations relevant to AI and automation in an enterprise environment.
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Business, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.


******Preferred Skills:******
* Experience delivering AI‑enabled solutions such as large‑language‑model–based copilots, virtual agents, or knowledge assistants in a corporate setting.
* Exposure to or certification in AI/ML, data analytics, or responsible AI frameworks.
* Prior experience in a SaaS, data, or high‑growth technology company.
* Familiarity with iPaaS tools like Workato, Okta Workflows, and Zapier.
* Deep experience of cross\-department AI development, including working with MCP servers, APIs and agentic frameworks.
* Understanding of data pipelines (e.g., BigQuery).
* Cloud infrastructure knowledge such as GCP or AWS.
* Experience contributing to or leading people processes (e.g., hiring, onboarding, performance reviews, or career development conversations) for a technical or Business Technology team is a plus.


******Benefits:******
* People: Work with talented, collaborative, and friendly people who love what they do.
* Location: India \- work in the heart of the Hyderabad office.


******More About Us:******
**LiveRampers are empowered to live our values of committing to shared goals and operational excellence. Connecting LiveRampers to new ideas and to one another is one of our guiding principles—one that informs how we hire, train, and grow our global teams across nine countries and four continents. By continually building inclusive, high belonging teams, LiveRampers can deliver exceptional work, champion innovative ideas, and be their best selves. Click here to learn more about Diversity, Inclusion, \& Belonging (DIB) at LiveRamp.**
***To all recruitment agencies: LiveRamp does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, LiveRamp employees or any other company location. LiveRamp is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes***
****Benefits** 
 :**
* Flexible paid time off, paid holidays, options for working from home, and paid parental leave.
* Comprehensive Benefits Package: LiveRamp offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to help you be your best self in your personal and professional lives. Our benefits package offers medical, dental, vision, accident, life and disability, an employee assistance program, voluntary benefits as well as perks programs for your healthy lifestyle, career growth, and more. Your medical benefits extend to your dependents including parents.


**More About Us:**
*LiveRamp’s mission is to connect data in ways that matter, and doing so starts with our people. We know that inspired teams enlist people from a blend of backgrounds and experiences. And we know that individuals do their best when they not only bring their full selves to work but feel like they truly belong. Connecting LiveRampers to new ideas and one another is one of our guiding principles—one that informs how we hire, train, and grow our global team across nine countries and four continents. Click* 
*here* 
*to learn more about Diversity, Inclusion, \& Belonging (DIB) at LiveRamp.*
 We use automated decision systems (ADS) as part of our recruitment and hiring process. If you require an accommodation or believe that the use of an ADS may create a barrier to your application or participation in the hiring process due to a disability or other protected characteristic, please let us know. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations and ensuring an equitable hiring experience for all candidates.
   

  

**To all recruitment agencies** 
 : LiveRamp does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, LiveRamp employees or any other company location. LiveRamp is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

dfb15fa9.title: Delivery Manager
dfb15fa9.description:
At PwC, our people in software and product innovation focus on developing cutting\-edge software solutions and driving product innovation to meet the evolving needs of clients. These individuals combine technical experience with creative thinking to deliver innovative software products and solutions.
   

  

 Those in software engineering at PwC will focus on developing innovative software solutions to drive digital transformation and enhance business performance. In this field, you will use your knowledge to design, code, and test cutting\-edge applications that revolutionise industries and deliver exceptional user experiences.
   

  

 Enhancing your leadership style, you motivate, develop and inspire others to deliver quality. You are responsible for coaching, leveraging team member’s unique strengths, and managing performance to deliver on client expectations. With your growing knowledge of how business works, you play an important role in identifying opportunities that contribute to the success of our Firm. You are expected to lead with integrity and authenticity, articulating our purpose and values in a meaningful way. You embrace technology and innovation to enhance your delivery and encourage others to do the same.
   

  

**Skills**
 Examples of the skills, knowledge, and experiences you need to lead and deliver value at this level include but are not limited to:
   

  

* Analyse and identify the linkages and interactions between the component parts of an entire system.
* Take ownership of projects, ensuring their successful planning, budgeting, execution, and completion.
* Partner with team leadership to ensure collective ownership of quality, timelines, and deliverables.
* Develop skills outside your comfort zone, and encourage others to do the same.
* Effectively mentor others.
* Use the review of work as an opportunity to deepen the expertise of team members.
* Address conflicts or issues, engaging in difficult conversations with clients, team members and other stakeholders, escalating where appropriate.


 Uphold and reinforce professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), the Firm's code of conduct, and independence requirements.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
* Join our Acceleration Center India and help shape the future of business for our diverse client portfolio across geographies and jurisdictions. You’ll work at the heart of global teams across Advisory, Assurance, Tax and Business Services—solving real client challenges through connected collaboration. We’ll help you grow your skills so you can go further. With hands\-on learning, cutting\-edge tools and an inclusive culture, this is your opportunity to do inspiring work that makes a difference—every day.
* As a Scaled Engineering Services
* Application Development and Operations Manager, you will lead the charge in driving innovation within our Advisory practice. You will be at the forefront of software and product innovation, overseeing the development and operations of cutting\-edge applications. As a Manager, you will guide and mentor teams, leveraging your strategic planning skills and business acumen to deliver exceptional client support. You will play a pivotal role in managing client service accounts, developing high\-quality deliverables, and fostering meaningful client relationships.
* In this role at PwC Acceleration Center India, you will be responsible for leading teams and managing client accounts, focusing on strategic planning and mentoring junior staff. You will take ownership of projects, confirming their successful planning, budgeting, execution, and completion. Your leadership will inspire others to deliver quality, while you embrace technology and innovation to enhance delivery. You will also be expected to uphold and reinforce professional and technical standards, articulating our purpose and values in a meaningful way. This is an opportunity to develop your leadership style and contribute to the success of our firm.


**Responsibilities**
* Leading the development and operations of scalable software applications within a managed services environment
* Overseeing the implementation of application development methodologies, including Acceptance Test Driven Development (ATDD) and Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD)
* Managing client relationships and expectations to deliver exceptional service and support
* Guiding teams in the use of programming languages such as Java, Python, and C\#.NET for software engineering projects
* Lead development and support engagements, accelerating practical AI adoption across software engineering workflows.
* Coordinating the integration of enterprise applications and microservices to enhance system functionality
* Conducting code reviews and enforcing coding standards to maintain quality software development practices
* Facilitating business process improvement initiatives through strategic questioning and analytical thinking
* Promoting the adoption of innovative technologies and software development methodologies across teams
* Confirming the integrity and security of software applications through rigorous testing and troubleshooting


**What You Must Have**
* At least 12 years of experience
* Bachelor's Degree
* In lieu of a degree, individuals may be considered if they have demonstrated three years of specialized training and/or progressively responsible work experience for each missing year of college in addition to the 12 years of experience required.
* Oral and written proficiency in English required


**What Sets You Apart**
* Demonstrating proficiency in Acceptance Test Driven Development (ATDD)
* Utilizing advanced skills in API Management and Application Development
* Excelling in Business Process Management and Improvement
* Leading teams in Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) practices
* Managing complex Software Engineering projects with strategic planning
* Hands on experience developing AI agents and institutionalizing AI adoption in day\-to\-day tasks
* Mentoring junior staff in Software Development Methodologies and Practices

43554665.title: Senior Delivery Lead
43554665.description:
DeepIntent is leading the healthcare advertising industry with data\-driven solutions built for the future. From day one, our mission has been to improve patient outcomes through the artful use of advertising, data science, and real\-world clinical data. For more information visit, www.DeepIntent.com.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 The Senior Delivery Lead is a strategic operator who redesigns how the Business Line (BL) runs: AI\-native intake, breakdown, reporting, and team health. Paired with a Senior Delivery Operations as a daily working partner and growth\-path mentee, you lead outcomes, not process.
   

  

* BL Delivery Ownership
+ Hold the delivery contract for your BL: committed scope, milestones, and quality bar each quarter.
+ Diagnose systemic delivery failures — not one\-off sprint misses — and drive structural fixes.
+ Run pre\-mortems on high\-risk initiatives before they become post\-mortems for leadership.
+ Escalate with context and a recommendation, not just a flag.

* AI\-Native SDLC Redesign
+ Identify the highest\-friction points in the BL's delivery chain — intake, refinement, estimation, reporting — and redesign them using AI\-native tooling.
+ Ship at least one published SDLC experiment per quarter (Claude, Cursor, Jira automation, AI delivery agents).
+ Contribute proven patterns back to the DAO's Agentic Framework for cross\-BL adoption.
+ Be the person your BL looks to when they ask "can AI help us do this better?"

* Cross\-BL Program Leadership
+ Lead assigned cross\-BL programs from charter to completion.
+ Own program\-level dependency mapping, milestone sequencing, and executive reporting.
+ Align Engineering Directors, PMs, and Senior Delivery Leads across BLs without direct authority.
+ Surface program\-level risks to DAO leadership with recommended mitigations, not open questions.

* Delivery Intelligence Platform Co\-Ownership
+ Partner with the Delivery Engineer owning your BL's Delivery Intelligence Platform module on quarterly milestone planning and delivery.
+ Define what "ready" looks like for each module milestone and hold the quality bar.
+ Use platform data to inform BL\-level delivery insights — connecting intelligence signals to delivery decisions.

* Strategic Narrative \& Stakeholder Communication
+ Maintain an always\-current strategic view of your BL: what's on track, what's at risk, what needs a decision.
+ Deliver concise, executive\-ready updates to Directors and senior leadership — no data dumps, just signal.
+ Partner with PM and Engineering Director to translate roadmap intent into delivery reality, and flag when those diverge.

* Senior Delivery Operations Mentorship
+ Serve as the daily working partner and growth\-path mentor for your paired Senior Delivery Operations.
+ Define explicit milestones for their movement toward Lead readiness — and track them.
+ Model the delivery leadership behaviors you want the next generation of DAO talent to internalize.


**Who You Are**
* 5\+ years in Agile delivery, program management, or a hybrid PMO role in a fast\-moving technology company.
* Track record of owning BL or program\-level delivery outcomes — not just running ceremonies.
* Demonstrable ability to identify systemic delivery problems and fix them at the structural level.
* Strong cross\-functional influence: you've aligned PMs, Engineering, and senior stakeholders without direct authority.
* Executive communication fluency — you can compress a complex delivery picture into three clear sentences.
* Hands\-on with Jira (advanced queries, dashboards, workflow automation) and Confluence.
* Hands\-on use of AI tools (Claude, Cursor, or equivalent) in delivery or operational workflows — demonstrated, not aspirational.
* Ability to treat process debt the way engineers treat tech debt — proactively identifying and fixing it.
* Strong bias toward action, with a default approach of providing “recommended actions” rather than just highlighting problems.
* Experience treating the growth of a paired Senior Delivery Operations partner as a measurable deliverable, not a side responsibility.
* Comfort working in ambiguity, with the ability to build structure and clarity while executing in parallel.
* Good to have experience redesigning SDLC processes, not just running them.
* Comfort with data: you use throughput, cycle time, and blocker patterns to drive decisions, not just report them, is a plus.
* Experience leading cross\-functional programs with shared ownership and no single chain of command is a plus.


 We believe great work starts with great support. That’s why DeepIntent offers a competitive, holistic benefits package designed to empower you both professionally and personally.
   

  

 Here’s what you can expect when you join our team based in the US: Competitive base salary plus performance based bonus or commission, comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance, 401K match program, Unlimited PTO policy and paid holidays, remote friendly culture with flexible work options, career development and advanced education support, WFH and internet stipends, plus many more perks and benefits!
   

  

 Here’s what you can expect when you join our team based in India: Competitive base salary plus performance based bonus, comprehensive medical insurance, and paid holidays. Hybrid\-friendly culture with flexible work options, professional development reimbursement, WiFi reimbursement and health and wellness allowance plus many more perks and benefits!
   

  

 Here's what you can expect when you join our team based in Europe: Competitive base salary plus performance\-based bonus, comprehensive medical insurance, and flexible PTO. Hybrid\-friendly culture with flexible work options, professional development reimbursement, WiFi reimbursement, and parental leave plus many more perks and benefits!
   

  

 DeepIntent is committed to bringing together individuals from different backgrounds and perspectives. We strive to create an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive, feel a sense of belonging, and do great work together. DeepIntent is an Equal Opportunity Employer, providing equal employment and advancement opportunities to all individuals. We recruit, hire and promote into all job levels the most qualified applicants without regard to race, color, creed, national origin, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), parental status, age, disability, genetic information, citizenship status, veteran status, gender identity or expression, transgender status, sexual orientation, marital, family or partnership status, political affiliation or activities, military service, immigration status, or any other status protected under applicable federal, state and local laws. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know in advance. DeepIntent’s commitment to providing equal employment opportunities extends to all aspects of employment, including job assignment, compensation, discipline and access to benefits and training.
   

  

 CCPA Notice: If you are a California resident applying for a role at DeepIntent, we may collect personal information as part of the application process in accordance with the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). To learn more about the categories of information we collect and your rights, please contact PeopleOps@deepintent.com to see our full Applicant Privacy Notice.

3f4dba76.title: Learning Program Manager
3f4dba76.description:
**Your Journey at Crowe Starts Here:**


At Crowe, you can build a meaningful and rewarding career. With real flexibility to balance work with life moments, you’re trusted to deliver results and make an impact. We embrace you for who you are, care for your well\-being, and nurture your career. Everyone has equitable access to opportunities for career growth and leadership. Over our 80\-year history, delivering excellent service through innovation has been a core part of our DNA across our audit, tax, and consulting groups. That’s why we continuously invest in innovative ideas, such as AI\-enabled insights and technology\-powered solutions, to enhance our services. Join us at Crowe and embark on a career where you can help shape the future of our industry.

**Job Description:**


Crowe seeks a dynamic **Learning Manager** who will be crucial in developing and delivering innovative, high\-impact learning solutions. This position requires a blend of project management, quality control, critical thinking, and vendor oversight to ensure the successful execution of learning programs.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Project Management and Quality Control:**

* Collaborate with the India Talent Leader, India BU Directors, firmwide Learning team and other stakeholders to manage multiple high\-priority learning projects from inception to completion, ensuring timely and successful implementation.
* Develop and maintain detailed project plans, timelines, and budgets, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
* Serve as a project manager liaising with multiple stakeholders to support the development and delivery of learning solutions end\-to\-end.
* Conduct thorough quality reviews to ensure learning materials meet high standards.
* Implement quality control processes to enhance the accuracy and effectiveness of learning solutions.
* Ensure meticulous attention to detail in course development and delivery.

**Learning Content Curation and Design**

* Develop innovative and engaging learning programs (e.g., in\-person, virtual, e\-learning, microlearning) aligned to the business strategy
* Curate content (e.g., courses, microlearning, videos, podcasts) from existing learning assets and vendor content
* Oversee and manage large in\-person and/or virtual training events

**Stakeholder Engagement and Communication:**

* Liaise with key stakeholders, internal business partners, and design teams to translate internal partners' needs while managing tight timelines.
* Maintain effective and appropriate written and verbal US business communication skills in a business environment.

**Technology and Innovation:**

* Utilize technology such as AI tools like ChatGPT and CoPilot to acquire knowledge and skills for various content development and delivery engagements.
* Incorporate online and technology\-enhanced course components to improve learning across different delivery modes.

**Facilitation and Vendor Management:**

* Support the facilitation of in\-office learning events in Crowe India offices, including logistics, course designs, communication, and course follow up.
* Establish and maintain strong relationships with Crowe’s existing and new external vendors to ensure the delivery of high\-quality learning solutions.

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Instructional Design, Education, Instructional Systems Design, Adult Education, Project Management, or a related field.
* 12\-15 years of experience with at least 5\-6 years of experience developing learning solutions based on industry\-recognized adult learning theory and learning design.
* Experience with LMS systems (preferred)
* Experience with AI tools specifically ChatGPT and CoPilot (preferred)
* Working knowledge of designing and developing in Articulate 360 and other digital solutions.
* Strong planning, project management, communication, and coordination abilities specifically working in Microsoft Teams and Planner
* Ability to work collaboratively across cross\-functional teams to guide the development of extraordinary learning experiences.
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills to collaborate effectively with subject matter experts, stakeholders, and cross\-functional teams
* Critical thinking skills to analyze course goals and instructional strategies, ensuring they align with evidence\-based practices.


This role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of innovative learning solutions while ensuring the highest standards of quality and efficiency. If you are a proactive and detail\-oriented professional with a passion for learning and development, we encourage you to apply.


We expect the candidate to uphold Crowe’s values of Care, Trust, Courage, and Stewardship. These values define who we are. We expect all of our people to act ethically and with integrity at all times.

**Our Benefits:**  

At Crowe, we know that great people are what makes a great firm. We value our people and offer employees a comprehensive benefits package. Learn more about what working at Crowe can mean for you!  

  

**How You Can Grow:**  

We will nurture your talent in an inclusive culture that values diversity. You will have the chance to meet on a consistent basis with your Career Coach that will guide you in your career goals and aspirations. Learn more about where talent can prosper!  

  

**More about Crowe:**


Crowe Capability Center – India, operating under the legal entity C3 India Delivery Centre LLP (formerly known as Crowe Horwath IT Services LLP) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Crowe LLP (U.S.A.), a public accounting, consulting and technology firm with offices around the world. Crowe LLP is an independent member firm of Crowe Global, one of the largest global accounting networks in the world. The network consists of more than 200 independent accounting and advisory firms in more than 130 countries around the world.


Crowe does not accept unsolicited candidates, referrals or resumes from any staffing agency, recruiting service, sourcing entity or any other third\-party paid service at any time. Any referrals, resumes or candidates submitted to Crowe, or any employee or owner of Crowe without a pre\-existing agreement signed by both parties covering the submission will be considered the property of Crowe, and free of charge.


We are committed to a merit\-based hiring process, evaluating all candidates consistently using objective, job\-related criteria such as relevant experience, demonstrated skills, measurable impact, and alignment with the role’s responsibilities, and making employment decisions in a fair and inclusive manner free from discrimination.

953ed7cb.title: Sr. Engagement Manager, AWS Professional Services India
953ed7cb.description:
**Description**
 AWS Global Services includes experts from across AWS who help our customers design, build, operate, and secure their cloud environments. Customers innovate with AWS Professional Services, upskill with AWS Training and Certification, optimize with AWS Support and Managed Services, and meet objectives with AWS Security Assurance Services. Our expertise and emerging technologies include AWS Partners, AWS Sovereign Cloud, AWS International Product, and the Generative AI Innovation Center. You’ll join a diverse team of technical experts in dozens of countries who help customers achieve more with the AWS cloud.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Engagement Manager to lead and deliver complex, multi\-workstream cloud transformation programs for AWS Professional Services (ProServe) India. In this role, you will own the end\-to\-end delivery lifecycle of large and complex customer engagements, shaping cloud strategies, driving business outcomes, and acting as a trusted advisor to senior customer stakeholders.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is an experienced program leader with deep IT consulting expertise, a proven track record in delivering complex technical programs across enterprise customers, and the ability to navigate ambiguity with limited guidance. You thrive in a fast\-paced, growth environment, insist on incredibly high standards, and are passionate about mentoring others and scaling delivery best practices across teams.
   

  

 You will lead matrixed teams of AWS consultants, partners, and customer resources across multiple workstreams simultaneously. You are expected to drive delivery excellence, maximize engagement value, manage risks proactively, and serve as a force multiplier for your peers and the broader organization. You will actively contribute to pre\-sales, build deep customer trust, and leverage AI/GenAI to drive delivery innovation.
   

  

 In this capacity you will be based in India and are expected to travel occasionally (30\-40%). You will report into the India ProServe Engagement Management Delivery Practice Manager.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own and lead end\-to\-end delivery of complex, multi\-workstream cloud transformation programs, ensuring business outcomes are achieved within schedule, scope, and financial constraints.
* Shape and validate cloud delivery strategies for complex engagements, applying frameworks such as the Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF), Well\-Architected Framework (WAF), and Engagement Delivery Framework (EDF).
* Serve as a strategic advisor to senior customer stakeholders, leading steering committees, driving alignment, and building deep trusted relationships.
* Proactively identify, manage, and escalate risks and issues; develop and execute mitigation plans; redirect distressed programs to delight customers.
* Maximize engagement value by negotiating conditions of acceptance, managing scope changes, and amending contractual terms within project constraints.
* Drive delivery excellence across engagements by defining and sharing EM best practices, creating reusable mechanisms, and establishing operational excellence.
* Actively mentor and develop team members; perform Technical Promotion Assessments (TPAs) and coach Engagement Managers to raise the bar.
* Participate in pre\-sales activities, contributing to proposals, scoping, and business development for complex services engagements.
* Leverage Agentic AI and GenAI to optimize delivery processes, improve team productivity, and drive innovative customer outcomes.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional AWS teams including Delivery Consultants, Account Executives, Cloud Architects, and Partner teams to solution and deliver cloud programs.


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship \& Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of leading multiple Agile teams (like Scrum Masters, Product Owners) concurrently or at scale experience
* 7\+ years of leading and delivering enterprise\-level IT engagements experience
* Knowledge of the value proposition of the public cloud and cloud engagement delivery (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)
* Experience with Agile and project management toolsets like Jira, Rally, VersionOne or Taiga
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent, or 7\+ years of project/program management experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with and presenting to C\-level executives, IT, and lines of businesses across organizations or equivalent
* PMP, Prince2, PgMP, SAFe or SCRUM/Agile certification
* 9\+ years of working with Data \& AI related technologies, including, but not limited to, AI/ML, GenAI, Analytics, Database, and/or Storage experience
* AWS certification, such as, AWS Solutions Architect, or a similar cloud certification
* Partner delivery experience — enabling and managing delivery through third\-party partners


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

 \- AWS ProServe IN \- Karnataka
