885b1c6b.title: Cloud Platform Architect
885b1c6b.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Oversee application architecture and deployment in cloud platform environments \-\- including public cloud, private cloud and hybrid cloud. This can include cloud adoption plans, cloud application design, and cloud management and monitoring.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Google Cloud Platform Architecture
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 7\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

**Summary**
 As a GenAI \& Agent Development Lead, you will be responsible for developing and delivering agent\-based AI applications and platforms using Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Google Cloud AI services. Your typical day will involve applying Generative AI models (Gemini), RAG\-based retrieval, and agent orchestration patterns to build intelligent, scalable, and production\-ready AI solutions.
   

  

 You should have strong hands\-on experience in designing, building, deploying, and optimizing AI agents, with a growing ability to guide teams and contribute to solution design.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities
   

  

 Solutioning and designing agent\-based GenAI applications and systems using Google ADK and Vertex AI
   

  

 Design, develop, and maintain AI agents and agent workflows, including single\-agent and multi\-agent patterns and Agent\-to\-Agent (A2A) communication flows
   

  

 Implement MCP\-based orchestration concepts for agent execution, control, and coordination
   

  

 Build RAG pipelines, including data ingestion, chunking strategies, embedding generation, and retrieval optimization
   

  

 Contribute to Graph RAG implementations, leveraging knowledge graphs for enhanced reasoning and context
   

  

 Implement Gemini Enterprise–based solutions, grounding models on first\-party (1P) enterprise data and third\-party (3P) systems and data sources
   

  

 Apply Vertex AI Machine Learning services for embeddings, inference, evaluation, and pipelines
   

  

 Integrate agents with enterprise systems, APIs, tools, and workflows
   

  

 Apply prompt engineering techniques, including role prompting and prompt chaining
   

  

 Assist in implementing agent observability, including logging, tracing, and quality monitoring
   

  

 Follow secure agent design practices, including controlled tool access and safe execution
   

  

 Document technical designs, agent workflows, and deployment setups
   

  

 Provide technical guidance to L9/L10 team members and support Manager in delivery execution
   

  

 Professional \& Technical Skills
   

  

 Must Have Skills
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
   

  

 Strong understanding of Generative AI and Gemini models
   

  

 Experience with RAG architectures and chunking strategies
   

  

 Working knowledge of Agent\-to\-Agent (A2A) patterns
   

  

 Familiarity with MCP or similar agent orchestration concepts
   

  

 Experience with Vertex AI Machine Learning services
   

  

 Prompt engineering and agent workflow design
   

  

 Strong programming skills in Python (or Node.js)
   

  

 Good To Have Skills
   

  

 Knowledge of Graph RAG / Knowledge Graph integration
   

  

 Cloud data architecture on Google Cloud
   

  

 Google Cloud certifications (Google Cloud Machine Learning Services / Cloud Architect)
   

  

 Experience with enterprise\-grade CI/CD and production pipelines
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 10\+ years of relevant experience
   

  

 Proficient in Google Cloud Machine Learning Services, GenAI, and agent\-based systems
   

  

 Strong foundation in computer science, AI/ML, or related fields

76641d11.title: Consultant - Cloud Infrastructure Services
76641d11.description:
**About The Job**
 The Red Hat Global Telco Services team is looking for a Consultant to join us in Pune/Bangalore/Chennai/Delhi\-NCR, India. As Consultant, you are a highly skilled professional who shall be engaged in Red Hat Cloud (RH OCP, OSP, OSO, Custom Clouds based on RH OCP and OSP) based solution delivery projects, spanning the Red Hat Cloud portfolio as well 3rd party Cloud infrastructures. As a Consultant you will participate in Customer’s Cloud/NFV/SDN delivery projects, with focus on OCP, OSP. NCP, NHRO, OSO components of Cloud portfolio, and leveraging your seniority to lead the creation and evolution of High and Low Level Design, Test \& Customer acceptance Design (Strategy, Test Cases), Red Hat and Customer lab integration \& validation, delivery (install and commissioning in the field) and customer field acceptance, to be used as reference by the rest of the delivery organization. You shall perform solution\-based install, configuration and acceptance of pre\-architected solutions, either remote or on\-site – to that end, some travel to customer sites will be required. Hence your willingness to travel abroad for short trips. You shall also provide remote or on\-site expert support for on\-site solution engineers during installation, acceptance and diagnosis activities and take care of integration issue handling during deployment \& upgrade. You will also ensure knowledge transfer and coaching of the rest of the Consultants community. You will be required to understand the culture and needs of the customers and internal teams in terms of technology and competencies. You need to be motivated and curious with a passion for contributing to the success of the business by contributing in a winning team.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
* Participation in customer’s projects activities related to Red Hat Cloud projects.
* Understand our customers product functional and technical requirements
* Understand how Red Hat products integrate into our customer’s environment.
* Understand customization requirements that the customer will need.
* Assistance as consultant in customer’s presentations, documentation and workshops.
* Participates in the High Level Design (HLD) approval cycle of the customer’s solution.
* Responsible for Low Level Design (LLD), with detailed architecture and design of the Red Hat Solution.
* Responsible for following the design and process and accordingly implement the Cloud solution (Deployment/Upgrade/Configuration) in the customer environment.
* Responsible for Test Design (Strategy, Test Cases and Reports) Producing Customer Documentation, e.g. MOPs, Integration \& Configuration files.
* Execute the integrations as per requirements and verify the functionality as per the test strategy defined and cases finalized for the verification.
* Upgrade and tests customer specific software/hardware before it is implemented to the customer’s environment.
* Perform solution\-based install, configuration and acceptance of pre\-architected solution, either remote or on\-site.
* Provide expert support for integration/Solution/Associate consultant engineers during installation, acceptance and diagnosis activities, and handling integration Issue Handling during deployment.
* Develop enough knowledge on our customer’s environment to participate in customer discussion and facilitate integration recommendation.
* Some travel to customer Sites to conduct troubleshooting, and assist with the migration, particularly in Production Environments
* Manage customer technical requests and regularly update customer on progress.
* Contribute to the creation of common artifacts and tools for usage by the Solution Engineering community and lead knowledge transfer and ramp up
* You ensure solution feasibility of the solution from technical, migration, integration, operation and maintenance perspective.
* You maintain the integrity \& the consistency of the solution on its domain over the whole project cycle


**What Will Yo Bring**
* Expertise in OCP/OSP/OSO components of Red Hat cloud portfolio. Nokia NCP/NHRO would be added advantage
* Hands\-on Expertise Openstack \& Kubernetes is a must
* Expertise in HEAT templates for application to be hosted on Cloud platforms. Ansible, Mistral concepts would be advantageous.
* Expertise in NFVI/VIM, VNFM, NFVO and SDN technologies.
* Experience and background in infrastructure, system and IT (Linux servers, Virtualization, containerization, External Storage Solutions
* Expertise in Containers, Kubernetes and Microservices concepts.
* OCP 280 (EX\-280\) training and Certification preferable.
* You have gained extended (practical) knowledge of L2 and L3 IP architectures and network models (MPLS, routers,), IP/MPLS access, aggregation \& edge, IP/MPLS/DWDM converged core
* Previous design and deployment experience with at least 10\+ years on business experience in a customer service or technical support environment within a technology\-oriented company or department
* Proven ability to learn and apply new skills and processes rapidly and coach, mentor, influence others around them
* Ability to adapt to changes quickly and be a change catalyst
* Demonstrated leadership experience with focus on improving associate and customer experience
* Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work under pressure
* Ability to work in process\-driven environments as well as in contexts where consultation with colleagues, taking initiative, and making judgement calls is necessary
* Ability to communicate courteously and effectively with customers, third party vendors, and Red Hat associates
* Knowledge of support systems and tools considered
* An appreciation of, and passion for open source software would be an advantage
* Personally committed to quality, and love working in a customer facing environment
* Operate autonomously and are result driven ensuring ownership and accountability
* You are flexible in taking up different roles and tackling multiple technologies


**About Red Hat**
 Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community\-powered approach to deliver high\-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40\+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in\-office, to office\-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at Red Hat**
 Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**
 Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
   

  

 Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.
   

  

 Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email application\-assistance@redhat.com. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.

02716a01.title: Cloud Platform Architect
02716a01.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Design and develop cloud native architectures (2 tier, 3 tier, serverless, etc.) to build and run scalable applications using containers, microservices, immutable infrastructure and declarative APIs.
   

  

**Must have skills :**

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA

 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Platform Architect, a typical day involves designing and developing cloud native architectures that support scalable applications. This includes working with various architectural patterns such as two\-tier, three\-tier, and serverless models. The role requires building and managing applications using containers, microservices, immutable infrastructure, and declarative application programming interfaces. The architect collaborates with different teams to ensure the solutions are robust, scalable, and aligned with business needs, while continuously innovating to improve cloud platform capabilities and performance.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Expected to provide solutions to problems that apply across multiple teams.
* Lead the design and implementation of cloud platform strategies to meet evolving business requirements.
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and mentorship within the team to foster professional growth and technical excellence.
* Coordinate cross\-functional efforts to ensure seamless integration and deployment of cloud solutions.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Accenture Delivery Architectures (ADA).
* Strong expertise in designing scalable cloud native architectures including two\-tier, three\-tier, and serverless models.
* Experience with containerization technologies and microservices architecture.
* Knowledge of immutable infrastructure concepts and declarative APIs.
* Ability to architect solutions that support continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines.
* Familiarity with cloud security best practices and compliance requirements.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in Accenture Delivery Architectures (ADA).
* This position is based at our Pune office.

0dea61f1.title: Cloud Hosting Infrastructure Engineer
0dea61f1.description:
Job Title: Cloud Hosting Infrastructure Engineer
   

  

 Job Location: Mumbai
   

  

 Posting Start Date: 09/07/2026
   

  

 Job Description:
   

  

**Role Title: Cloud Hosting Infrastructure Engineer**
**Function and Department: Digital Technology \- Infrastructure Management**
**Location: Mumbai, India**
**Position Summary:**
 The Infrastructure System Specialist is responsible for maintaining and improving Infineum’s global cloud infrastructure and network services. The role involves configuring and supporting infrastructure technologies, responding to cloud and network queries, and contributing to IT projects and service upgrades. Working within an ITIL\-based framework, the specialist collaborates with application teams to manage environments and advises business groups on infrastructure solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities / What You'll Achieve:**
* Develop and implement strategies to optimise infrastructure performance using automation, monitoring, and secure networking tools.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure reliable and scalable cloud\-based and containerised hosting environments.
* Manage the lifecycle of core infrastructure components, including Windows OS, VMware, and enterprise applications, ensuring stability and performance.
* Analyse system performance data to identify opportunities for service improvement and cost reduction.
* Support global hosting operations by providing expertise in datacentre management and disaster recovery planning.
* Maintain documentation and ensure adherence to security and operational standards across infrastructure services.
* Coordinate third\-party service providers to ensure timely and high\-quality delivery of infrastructure support.


**What will you gain from this role?**
* Opportunity to deepen your expertise in infrastructure technologies through hands\-on involvement in cloud, containerisation, and automation projects.
* Gain exposure to a comprehensive IT Service Management Framework based on ITIL principles, enhancing your understanding of structured service delivery.
* Contribute directly to global IT operations and see the impact of your work on business continuity and innovation.
* Develop skills in technical project delivery and cross\-functional collaboration within a diverse, global IT team.
* Experience personal growth through continuous learning and engagement with emerging technologies in a supportive team environment.


**Skills \& Qualifications**
* Demonstrated expertise in virtualisation and containerisation technologies (e.g., Azure Container Apps, Docker, Kubernetes).
* Proven experience supporting global hosting operations and implementing infrastructure solutions.
* Ability to troubleshoot and maintain core infrastructure platforms, including Windows Server OS, VMware, Veeam backup.
* Knowledge of cloud networking and security principles, including Azure services and Zero Trust Architectures.
* Strong communication and documentation skills, with a proactive approach to problem\-solving and continuous improvement.


**Preferred**
* Familiarity with tools such as Zscaler (ZIA/ZPA), SCOM, SolarWinds, and Citrix Cloud.
* Experience working with hybrid cloud environments and Infrastructure as Code.
* Exposure to RedHat Linux, Microsoft Exchange, Active Directory, Certificate Management (PKI), AWS Route 53 and Office 365\.

 Infineum is a world\-class specialty chemicals company dedicated to groundbreaking specialty chemicals through innovative research. Our purpose is to create a sustainable future through innovative chemistry, and we are proud of our global footprint and commitment to safety.

Join Infineum for a rewarding career where innovation and support are at the forefront.

a70e465b.title: Architect
a70e465b.description:
**Job Summary**
 Architect role focused on designing and optimizing ServiceNow ITSM solutions for a global enterprise environment requiring ten to twelve years of experience in complex platform implementations and integrations with accountability for high quality delivery in a hybrid day shift work model without mandatory business travel.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design ServiceNow ITSM architectures that align with enterprise standards and produce scalable resilient and maintainable solutions that support long term platform growth and stability.
* Define ServiceNow ITSM implementation roadmaps that prioritize value driven features and ensure predictable delivery aligned to stakeholder expectations and organization wide transformation goals.
* Collaborate closely with product owners process owners and business partners to translate service management requirements into clear ServiceNow ITSM designs that drive measurable operational improvement.
* Guide development teams in applying ServiceNow configuration patterns and best practices so that delivered ITSM modules remain consistent reliable and simple to maintain across environments.
* Review technical designs and solution documents to ensure that ServiceNow ITSM implementations follow security guidelines performance baselines and reuse oriented component design.
* Coordinate with integration specialists to define ServiceNow data and process integrations that ensure accurate information flow while protecting data quality and reducing manual effort.
* Oversee environment strategies for ServiceNow ITSM including instance usage configuration migration and regression validation to support safe and repeatable releases in a hybrid work model.
* Establish monitoring practices for ServiceNow ITSM performance availability and error handling so that incidents can be proactively detected investigated and resolved before business impact occurs.
* Create and maintain platform standards reference models and reusable configuration patterns that accelerate future ServiceNow ITSM enhancements and reduce delivery risk.
* Engage with operations and support teams to define runbooks and support procedures that enable efficient day to day platform operations and continuous service improvement.
* Document architectural decisions design rationales and configuration guidelines in a structured repository so that future teams gain clear insight into platform behavior and constraints.
* Mentor junior practitioners by sharing ServiceNow ITSM architectural techniques patterns and review feedback that strengthen overall team capability and solution quality.
* Align ServiceNow ITSM solutions with organizational purpose by enabling more reliable incident change and request processes that improve employee experience and indirectly strengthen services delivered to society.


**Qualifications**
* Require ten to twelve years of overall experience in enterprise information technology with significant focus on architecting and implementing large scale service management platforms.
* Require extensive hands on experience designing configuring and optimizing ServiceNow ITSM modules including incident problem change request and knowledge management in complex environments.
* Require strong exposure to hybrid work delivery models with proven ability to collaborate effectively using digital tools and to coordinate across distributed business and technical stakeholders.
* Require practical experience with ServiceNow scripting workflows and configuration management to the extent needed to review solutions and guide teams toward maintainable implementation choices.
* Require familiarity with IT service management frameworks such as ITIL and the ability to interpret process requirements into practical ServiceNow configurations that enhance operational efficiency.
* Prefer experience integrating ServiceNow with enterprise tools for monitoring identity management and asset management using commonly adopted integration techniques focused on reliability and security.
* Prefer background in performance tuning and capacity planning for ServiceNow instances including design choices that manage data growth maintain response time and uphold user satisfaction.
* Prefer prior involvement in migration or upgrade projects where legacy service management solutions were transitioned into standardized ServiceNow ITSM architectures with minimal disruption.
* Prefer strong communication and documentation skills that support clear explanation of architectural options tradeoffs and impacts to both business partners and technical contributors.


**Certifications Required**
 ServiceNow Certified System Administrator and ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist IT Service Management

* Ensure smooth transition of services from incumbent teams, client teams, or project delivery teams into steady\-state operations while maintaining service quality, governance, risk controls, and business continuity.

cloud infrastructure,cloud security,project management,itil,

53d3b8ac.description:

bde8a3ba.title: Global Real Estate Alternatives Technology Delivery Lead, VP
bde8a3ba.description:
**Position Overview**
**Job Title: Global Real Estate Alternatives Technology Delivery Lead, VP**
**Location: Pune, India**
**Role Description**
 Technology Management is responsible for improving the technological aspects of operations to reduce infrastructure costs, improve functional performance and help deliver Divisional business goals. Work includes:
   

  

* Partnering with key internal stakeholders to translate bank strategy into objectives and plans for implementation supporting the delivery of world class technology solutions
* Planning and managing computer operations and production support, systems and database administration, network operations, and client service
* Ensuring systems performance and service level requirements are met Managing and maintaining strategic relationships with key IT product and services providers
* Transferring business requirements into technical solutions or into Release Management
* Providing in\-depth technical expertise for both tactical and operational initiatives


 DWS Real Estate Technology is responsible for the support and development of the global IT platform for the DWS Alternative Real Estate Business with assets under management of in several open and closed/special real estate funds.
   

  

 We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Delivery lead to support the Real Estate Technology Team within the Alternatives Technology department. We are a global, client facing team with presence in Germany, UK, US and India. We are an essential part of DWS Technology platform and develop and manage applications for our business partners.
   

  

**What We’ll Offer You**
 As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy
   

  

* Best in class leave policy
* Gender neutral parental leaves
* 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
* Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
* Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
* Accident and Term life Insurance
* Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Accountable for end\-to\-end technology delivery, cross\-team coordination, dependency management, risk mitigation, stakeholder management, and successful release execution of the Real Estate Strategic programmes
* Collaborate closely with multiple Product Owners, Business Analysts, and Technical Leads to ensure clear understanding and prioritization of the product backlog and conversion of priorities into executable delivery plans.


- Define delivery plans, milestones, and release schedules and ensure sprint and release commitments are realistic and achievable.

- Support Stakeholder management:

* Serve as the primary technology contact for business stakeholders
* Communicate delivery progress, risks, issues, and dependencies

* Facilitate discussions between business, technology, operations, and support teams


- Support Agile delivery:

* Drive delivery predictability and continuous improvement, coordinate work across multiple Agile squads and delivery teams.
* Ensure Agile metrics and delivery objectives are tracked and achieved.
* Dependency Management
* Identify dependencies across applications, teams, vendors, and infrastructure groups
* Track and manage external dependencies that may impact delivery
* Resolve cross\-functional conflicts and prioritization challenges
* Risk \& Issue Management
* Maintain and manage RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies) logs.
* Identify delivery risks early and establish mitigation plans.
* Escalate critical issues to appropriate governance forums.
* Monitor technology, operational, compliance, and resource risks.
* Drive issue resolution through effective stakeholder engagement
* Governance \& Reporting
* Provide regular status reporting to leadership and governance forums.
* Track delivery KPIs, milestones, and release readiness.
* Ensure compliance with delivery standards and governance requirements.
* Support audits, risk reviews, and regulatory reporting where required.
* Technical Delivery Oversight
* Work with Solution Architects and Technical Leads to ensure solutions are robust and compliant
* Understand architecture, integration points, and technology constraints
* Ensure infrastructure, security, and operational readiness activities are completed
* Coordinate testing, deployment, and production release activities
* Support post\-implementation monitoring and stabilization


**Your Skills And Experience**
* Ensuring predictable delivery outcomes
* Managing dependencies across teams
* Delivery planning and execution
* Removing blockers and risks
* Stakeholder communication
* Release coordination
* Agile governance and reporting


**Proven ability to leverage AI tools to enhance productivity, optimise workflows to solve business problems, while applying critical judgment to ensure responsible and ethical use of data and AI outputs.**
**How We’ll Support You**
* Training and development to help you excel in your career
* Coaching and support from experts in your team
* A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
* A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs


**About Us And Our Teams**
 Please visit our company website for further information:
   

  

**https://www.db.com/company/company.html**
 We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.
   

  

 Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.
   

  

 We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

118b9ce4.title: Senior Manager- AI Strategy & Solutions
118b9ce4.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


Integral role in supporting AIM’s data analysis, system control, and database needs. Provide strategic ideas and thought leadership. Has/can apply solid financial industry data systems knowledge to support decision and strategy problems in key business areas. Demonstrates strong technical/problem solving skills. Manages multiple projects collaboratively. Works with HR in recruitment and performance appraisal process. Mentor the team members and layout their growth path.**Role Summary**


Leads the execution and operationalization of enterprise AI initiatives, ensuring AI strategy is translated into scalable, business\-impacting solutions. Partners across business and technology teams to drive delivery, adoption, and measurable outcomes, while maintaining strong alignment to enterprise priorities and governance. Acts as a senior program leader with end\-to\-end accountability for execution, value realization, and executive alignment across priority AI initiatives

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\) Enterprise AI Execution \& Operationalization:** Translate enterprise AI strategy into actionable roadmaps, delivery plans, and implementation milestones**.** Drive end\-to\-end execution of priority AI initiatives across multiple business areas. Ensure AI solutions move from concept to pilot to scaled deployment, and ultimately to sustained adoption. Own delivery outcomes across initiatives, including scope, timelines, and measurable business impact.

**2\) Program \& Portfolio Delivery:** Lead a portfolio of AI use cases and programs across the enterprise. Establish and manage delivery discipline (prioritization, dependencies, timelines, risk mitigation). Ensure outcomes are tied to clear business value (e.g., productivity, growth, cost, risk). Drive integrated program plans, track KPIs and milestones, and proactively manage risks, dependencies, and execution challenges, escalating as needed.

**3\) Cross\-Enterprise Partnership** Partner with Business leaders across functions, Technology, Data \& Analytics team, and Risk, Legal, and Governance teams.Align stakeholders around what gets delivered and how, while shaping execution priorities and ensuring alignment to enterprise AI strategy. Engage senior leaders, including ELT stakeholders, to drive alignment, inform decision\-making, and ensure transparency on progress, risks, and outcomes. Act as a clear point of accountability for progress and results.

**4\) Technical \& Solution Leadership:** Provide informed direction on AI/ML and GenAI solutions to ensure fit\-for\-purpose design.Bridge strategy and execution by helping teams define use cases, select appropriate approaches/models, and ensure scalability and integration. Stay current on emerging AI capabilities and translate into practical application.

**5\) Adoption, Change \& Value Realization:** Drive business adoption of AI solutions, not just delivery. Define metrics and success measures and track realization of expected outcomes. Partner with HR / change / comms teams to support workflow integration and behavior change. Ensure value realization is clearly defined, tracked, and communicated, with a focus on measurable outcomes.

**6\) Governance \& Responsible AI:** Ensure adherence to enterprise AI governance, risk, and compliance frameworks. Operationalize responsible AI practices (e.g., transparency, fairness, controls). Support approval processes and risk assessments for AI deployments. Ensure alignment to the enterprise AI operating model, embedding best practices across data, technology, risk, talent, and change management.

**7\) Matrix Team Leadership:** Lead through influence and build strong execution capability and accountability across a broad cross\-functional team. Create consistency in delivery methodologies and standards. Foster a high\-performance, results\-oriented environment; drive clarity, accountability, and continuous improvement across teams.

**Qualifications**

**Required**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 8–10\+ years in AI, data/analytics, digital, or large\-scale transformation (preferably experience in strategy consulting)
* Demonstrated success in operating with an enterprise mindset and delivering complex, cross\-functional initiatives
* Strong understanding of: AI/ML and GenAI applications, data platforms and enterprise technology environments
* Strong communication skills, including the ability to communicate clearly and influence across technical and business stakeholders to drive alignment and decisions
* Ability to build strong relationships and lead effectively in a matrixed environment without direct authority. Experience aligning stakeholders on priorities, trade\-offs, and timelines
* Experience driving execution across multiple stakeholder groups
* Ability to translate strategy into clear, actionable plans and delivered outcomes
* Experience driving adoption and change, ensuring solutions are embedded and delivering business value
* Proven ability to exercise sound judgment, make timely decisions, and navigate ambiguity confidently
* Experience leading large\-scale programs or transformation initiatives with clear accountability for outcomes
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to use data to inform decisions and optimize execution

**Preferred**

* Advanced degree (e.g., MBA, Data Science or related field)
* Experience leading enterprise programs
* Financial services or regulated industry experience
* Background balancing technical depth with program leadership
* Familiarity with AI governance and responsible AI frameworks
* Experience in consulting, strategy, or similar roles supporting enterprise transformation initiatives

**In\-Office Collaboration**


We are a client\-centric, relationship\-based business. Working together, in\-person, is foundational to how we achieve results. By fostering a culture of face\-to\-face collaboration, idea sharing, productivity and personal connection, we deliver for our stakeholders — clients, advisors, employees and shareholders. Our employees work in the office at least three (3\) days per week, with flexibility to work from home two (2\) days per week. Some roles may require additional in\-office time or different in\-office expectations, and specific requirements will be discussed during the hiring process.

**Full\-Time/Part\-Time**


Full time**Timings**


(2:00p\-10:30p)**India Business Unit**


AWMPO AWMP\&S President's Office**Job Family Group**


Data*Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, military status, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.*

*We are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible recruitment process for individuals with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to participate in the application or interview process, speak to your recruiter to discuss how we can support you.*

81862047.title: Principal Program Manager
81862047.description:
**Description**
 Synaptics is leading the charge in AI at the Edge, bringing AI closer to end users and transforming how we engage with intelligent connected devices, whether at home, at work, or on the move. As the go\-to partner for the world’s most forward\-thinking product innovators, Synaptics powers the future with its cutting\-edge Synaptics Astra™ AI\-Native embedded compute, Veros™ wireless connectivity, and multimodal sensing solutions. We’re making the digital experience smarter, faster, more intuitive, secure, and seamless. From touch, display, and biometrics to AI\-driven wireless connectivity, video, vision, audio, speech, and security processing, Synaptics is the force behind the next generation of technology enhancing how we live, work, and play.
   

  

**Overview**
 Synaptics is looking for a Principal Program Manager to join our Global Operations team. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in semiconductor design and manufacturing processes, coupled with exceptional program management skills. As the ASIC Program Manager, you will oversee the entire product lifecycle from concept through production, working closely with cross\-functional teams including design, verification, validation, and manufacturing to ensure timely delivery of high\-quality ASICs. The successful candidate will play a key project leadership role, acting as the primary owner of SOC program execution on the project planning scheduling, inter\-team coordination, status tracking and reporting. Sr. Director, Program Management.
   

  

**Responsibilities \& Competencies**
 Job Duties
   

  

* Own end\-to\-endprogram management of engineering programs from idea to mass production including planning, scoping, design, development, and change management
* Lead and coordinate all aspects of ASIC development programs from requirements gathering through to final product release, including design, verification, validation, and production rampup
* Work closely with internal engineering teams (ASIC design, firmware, validation, etc.), external partners, and vendors to manage deliverables and ensure alignment on project goals and schedules
* Support the teams in issue resolution and risk mitigation through well balanced and efficient processes leveraging tools and automation
* Actively support sustainable, effective cross\-functional communication at multiple levels in the organization
* Analyze technical issues and lead the team in generating creative mitigation options and solutions
* Act as the primary point of contact between engineering, product management, and senior leadership, providing regular status updates on program progress, issues, and risk management
* Monitor and manage the program budget, ensuring projects are delivered within financial constraints
* Manage relationships with operation team and external ASIC vendors, ensuring that they meet technical and delivery requirements
* Ensure proper documentation of program processes, designs, and decisions throughout the ASIC development lifecycle
* Drive continuous improvement of all processes, methodologies, and systems


 Competencies
   

  

* Well organized with strong attention to data and detail; proactively ensures work is accurate
* Ability to ask difficult but important questions and drive discussion to find answers
* Ability to influence horizontally across multiple internal functional organizations
* Developing talent, ability to inspire and excite team
* Highly structured planner with a strong discipline towards pragmatic and efficient processes
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with expertise in agile execution and facilitating multiple projects simultaneously
* Ability to synthesize and report complex matters simply for senior and executive management to grasp quickly
* Good verbal and written communication skills with the ability to work within a diverse team


**Qualifications (Requirements)**
* Bachelor's (Master’s preferred) in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or related field or equivalent
* A deep understanding of ASIC design, verification, and manufacturing processes is essential.
* 15\+ years of experience in Program Management, including 5\+ years of expertise in engineering program management Experience in rigorous life\-cycle management including capturing requirements, decomposition, architecture, design, unit testing and integration testing among others
* Proven expertise in planning tools and methodologies (Jira, MS Project / SCRUM, waterfall)
* Hands\-on technical experience preferred
* No travel required


*Belief in Diversity
   

  

 Synaptics is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to workforce diversity. Qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, color, age, religion, protected veteran or disability status, or genetic information.*

ccb73434.title: Deputy Manager - IA - Technical Project Solutions
ccb73434.description:
**Job Profile: PLC/HMI/SCADA Engineer**
 Job Title \- Deputy Manager \- IA \- Technical Project Solutions
   

  

**Experience:** 
 2\-4 Years
   

  

**Travel Requirement** 
 : 50%
   

  

**Location:** 
 Mahape, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
   

  

**Company: Lauritz Knudsen (Unit of Schneider Electric)**
**Job Summary:**
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced PLC and SCADA Engineer to lead and support the design, implementation, and maintenance of SCADA systems across industrial automation projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in PLC and SCADA, industrial networking, system integration, testing, and project execution. This role requires the ability to work independently and as part of a team to deliver robust and efficient automation solutions for various industrial applications. The engineer will be responsible for the full lifecycle of automation projects, from conceptualization to final handover and support.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
**Design and Development:**
* Design, configure, and deploy SCADA systems using SmartComm platform.
* Develop HMI screens, control logic, and data acquisition strategies.
* Integrate SCADA systems with PLCs, RTUs, and other field devices.


**Network \& Infrastructure**
* Design and maintain industrial communication networks (Modbus TCP, OPC etc)
* Ensure cybersecurity best practices are implemented in SCADA networks.
* Troubleshoot network issues and optimize system performance.


**Commissioning and Execution:**
* Lead SCADA system installation, configuration, and commissioning at client sites.
* Collaborate with electrical and instrumentation teams during field execution.
* Ensure compliance with industry standards and client specifications


**Testing \& Validation**
* Develop and execute test plans for SCADA systems.
* Perform Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT) and Site Acceptance Testing (SAT).
* Document test results and resolve issues identified during testing.


**Troubleshooting and Support:**
* Provide technical support for installed automation systems, including remote and on\-site troubleshooting.
* Diagnose and resolve PLC, HMI, and SCADA system malfunctions and implement effective solutions.
* Perform system upgrades, modifications, and expansions as required.


**Qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Instrumentation Engineering, or related field.
* 2\-4 years of proven experience in the design, programming, commissioning, and troubleshooting of PLC, HMI, and SCADA systems in industrial automation environments.
* Willingness to travel for project commissioning and support activities as required.


 Rewards designed for you
   

  

 Our Total Rewards is our way of saying: We see you and we value you. It’s more than just pay and benefits—it’s a meaningful investment in you. It is designed to help you perform, grow, feel safe, and elevate your potential. The package helps you care for yourself and your family, plan your future, grow your skills and career, collaborate in an inclusive workplace, and contribute to your community. At Schneider Electric, we’re here for what matters most to you. Discover more at our Career Page.
   

  

* Country\-specific programs and initiatives may be available.


**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €40 billion global revenue
   

  

 \+9% organic growth
   

  

 150 000\+ employees in 100\+ countries
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

b1dcf67f.title: Lead Presales Manager
b1dcf67f.description:
**Job Description**
 You will actively identify and develop significant business opportunities by understanding customer needs, the competitive landscape, and Nokia’s FWA Customer Premises Equipment (CPE) innovative products. Collaborating closely with cross\-functional teams, you will contribute to sales initiatives and pricing strategies. You will require a strong technical background in FWA and related technologies, coupled with excellent communication, sales, and problem\-solving skills.
   

  

 As a FWA Pre Sales Manager you are responsible to identify, define, defend, design and support the sales of FWA CPE solutions to customers in India with key focus on Airtel Bharti. You own all technical engagement with customers for pre\-RFP, RFP, offer defense and negotiation meetings. This role requires ability to develop strong relationships with the respective Sales Account Manager, delivery teams and FWA PLMs, as well as good understanding of customer’s business environment and strong business acumen.
   

  

 Our work environment fosters teamwork and creativity, encouraging you to leverage your expertise to solve complex challenges and deliver exceptional value. Here, you will have the opportunity to influence strategic decisions that shape our Customer Teams and enhance Nokia's market presence. Join us to make a real impact!
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Proactively identifying customers leads for the Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) related opportunities
* Understand customer needs; identify new market and technological trends; investigate/identify external/internal solution providers to complete the end\-to\-end solution
* Have complete knowledge of competitive products and Nokia value added against the same; Be abreast with technology advancements and next generation products and technologies.
* Engage with the customer to prepare pre\-RFP requirements
* Help Account team and customers to prepare RFP such that Nokia Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) products are best suited to the RFP
* Own and prepare solutions document, BoQ and best fit RFP response.
* Align with other units to complete the end\-to\-end customer requirements for the RFP.
* Own and conduct the demo / POC for the customer and complete it successfully
* Engage with customers for offer presentations and negotiations
* Understand and prepare roadmap aligned to the specific customer requirements.
* Transfer E2E solution for project Kick\-off Meeting (KoM) and support smooth transition to project execution at project start
* Support lessons learned process


**Key Skills And Experience**
 You have:
   

  

* Qualification: Minimum Engineering graduate from reputed institute
* Experience: 5\-7 years of experience in telecom industry with large customers and expertise in the relevant areas as described in Job description
* Knowledge of FWA CPEs, 3GPP end to end solutions, Wi\-Fi and Consumer and Enterprise networks
* Understanding of OSS and BSS work. (information flow, inventory, Order Management, Assurance, Activation, Performance, Fault, Device Management, Alarm Correlation)
* Preferably have working experience on Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) products and solutions

* Good Understanding of service platforms which includes

Delivering our strategy sustainably is fundamental to achieving our ambition to be a net zero company by 2050 or sooner!

f348ce5c.title: Pre sales
f348ce5c.description:
**Company Description** 
 Thorat Developers is a trusted real estate and construction company focused on quality\-driven development in residential projects. The organization specializes in plot development, bungalow construction, and row house projects, delivering well\-planned spaces that combine solid construction with contemporary design. With a strong commitment to quality, transparency, and timely delivery, Thorat Developers aims to create long\-term value for customers and surrounding communities. Every project reflects a dedication to building not just structures, but lasting trust and reliable relationships.
 



**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time, on\-site Pre Sales role based in the Pune Division. The Pre Sales professional will respond to inquiries from prospective customers, provide detailed information about projects, and support the sales team in qualifying leads. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include conducting initial consultations, understanding customer requirements, preparing and presenting project proposals, and maintaining accurate records of interactions in CRM or other tracking systems. The role involves coordinating with internal teams to gather technical and pricing information, organizing site visits, and ensuring a smooth transition of qualified prospects to the sales closing process. The individual will also contribute to market research and competitor analysis to strengthen sales pitches and customer engagement.
 



**Qualifications** 







* Candidates should possess strong Analytical Skills to assess customer needs, evaluate project fit, and support data\-driven decision\-making.
* Candidates should possess excellent Communication and Customer Service skills to interact effectively with prospects, explain project details clearly, and build reliable relationships.
* Candidates should possess Consulting and Presales skills to conduct requirement gathering, offer suitable solutions, prepare presentations, and support the sales team in closing opportunities.
* Relevant experience in real estate, construction, or property consulting is beneficial, especially in residential projects.
* Ability to work on\-site in the Pune Division, manage multiple leads simultaneously, and collaborate with cross\-functional teams.
* Proficiency in basic office software and CRM tools, along with strong organizational and time\-management capabilities.
* Graduate degree in Business, Marketing, Real Estate, or a related field is preferred, or equivalent practical experience in sales or presales functions.

Meraki Dezine is looking for an experienced and highly motivated Senior Architect to lead the design and execution of prestigious projects across healthcare, hospitality, commercial, and high\-end residential sectors.

The ideal candidate is a strong design professional with proven experience in leading multidisciplinary teams, managing client relationships, and delivering projects from concept through completion. This role requires both creative excellence and strong project leadership capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities**

Lead architectural and interior design projects from concept design through construction completion.

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while ensuring quality, timelines, and budget compliance.

Lead, mentor, and coordinate a team of architects, designers, and drafting professionals.

Develop design concepts, presentations, detailed drawings, and construction documentation.

Coordinate with consultants including structural, MEP, HVAC, landscape, lighting, and specialty consultants.

Conduct client meetings, understand project requirements, present design proposals, and manage stakeholder expectations.

Review drawings and specifications to ensure compliance with design intent, applicable codes, and project standards.

Monitor project progress and provide timely design solutions during execution.

Coordinate with contractors, vendors, and project management teams during construction.

Ensure timely delivery of project milestones while maintaining high design and documentation standards.

**Required Qualifications**

Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Architecture from a recognized institution.

Minimum 7 years of professional architectural experience.

Strong experience in managing architectural teams and mentoring junior professionals.

Demonstrated ability to independently manage projects from inception to handover.

Excellent client management and presentation skills.

Strong understanding of construction methodologies, detailing, and project coordination.

Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, MS Office, and presentation software.

Excellent communication, leadership, and organizational skills.

**Preferred Experience**

Candidates with experience in large\-scale healthcare, hospital, medical infrastructure, hospitality, or mixed\-use developments will be given preference.

Experience working on projects involving multidisciplinary consultant coordination and large project teams will be an added advantage.

**Key Competencies**

Design Leadership

Project Management

Client Relationship Management

Team Leadership \& Mentoring

Technical Documentation

Consultant Coordination

Construction Administration

Problem Solving

Time Management

Attention to Detail

**What We Offer**

Opportunity to work on landmark healthcare, hospitality, and commercial projects.

Collaborative and design\-driven work environment.

Exposure to nationally significant projects and leading industry clients.

Opportunities for professional growth and leadership.

Competitive compensation based on experience and capability.

If you are passionate about creating meaningful spaces,and thrive on delivering exceptional projects from concept to completion, send your resume to careers@merakidezine.com

d351d8c0.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
d351d8c0.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* **Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem**
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* **DevOps \& ALM**
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* **Experience with:**
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* **Development \& Customization Skills**
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**


* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**


**Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.


**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.


**Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.


**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

11be85c9.title: Enterprise Architect - Cloud & Virtualization
11be85c9.description:
**Job Role : Enterprise Architect – Cloud \& Virtualization Strategy** 




**Job Location :** 
 Work from Office @ Hyderabad
 



  





**Role Summary** 




 Senior, customer\-facing Enterprise Architect responsible for advising large enterprises on
 



 virtualization strategy, private cloud architecture, and data centre modernization, with a strong
 



 focus on KVM adoption, and hybrid cloud enablement.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 • Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CTOs, and infrastructure leaders.
 



 • Lead enterprise assessments and define virtualization and private cloud roadmaps.
 



 • Design VMware to KVM migration and coexistence strategies.
 



 • Build TCO/ROI business cases and executive\-level proposals.
 



 • Define hybrid cloud integration with AWS, Azure, and GCP.
 



 • Support large deal pursuits, RFPs, and solution positioning.
 



 • Mentor architects and help build reusable solution frameworks.
 



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




  





 • 12–15\+ years of infrastructure experience; 5\+ years in enterprise architecture or consulting.
 



 • Strong hands\-on expertise in VMware, KVM, and OpenStack.
 



 • Proven experience with large enterprise, customer\-facing engagements.
 



 • Ability to operate across technology, business, and financial discussions.
 



 • Strong Linux and virtualization background.
 



  





**Nice to Have** 




 • TOGAF, VMware VCP/VCAP, RHCA, OpenStack certs
 



 • AWS/Azure Architect, CKA
 



  





**Ideal Profile** 




 • Technically credible, executive\-level communicator.
 



 • Practical advocate of open\-source virtualization.
 



 • Comfortable handling enterprise concerns around risk, support, and cost.
 



 • Balances commercial realities with sound architecture.
