e309dca5.title: Sr. Managed Services Consultant - CCAAS
e309dca5.description:
Sprinklr is the definitive, AI\-native platform for Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM), empowering brands to deliver extraordinary experiences at scale — across every customer touchpoint.
   

  

 By combining human instinct with the speed and efficiency of AI, Sprinklr helps brands earn trust and loyalty through personalized, seamless, and efficient customer interactions. Sprinklr’s unified platform provides powerful solutions for every customer\-facing team — spanning social media management, marketing, advertising, customer feedback, and omnichannel contact center management — enabling enterprises to unify data, break down silos, and act on real\-time insights.
   

  

 Today, 1,900\+ enterprises and 60% of the Fortune 100 rely on Sprinklr to help them deliver consistent, trusted customer experiences worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Our Managed Services Team at Sprinklr is responsible for driving product retention, consumption, adoption and growth across a global portfolio of customers. We believe that listening and developing a deep understanding of each customers’ objectives, together with the application of purpose\-built solutions to address those requirements at scale, is the winning formula for long term success and growth of the business.
   

  

**Responsibilitie**
 Ensure that every customer derives the most value possible from the platform leading to retention and business expansion.
   

  

* Identify, comprehend and clearly articulate customers' requirements to generate an end\-to\-end solution to their business challenges.
* Develop a deep understanding of customer needs and tie them to specific Sprinklr use cases, product features, benefits and value propositions.
* Analyze and elevate customer’s consumption of contract, adoption of the product and generation of upsell or cross\-sell.
* Act as day\-to\-day contact for stakeholders in brand, agencies and for System


 Administrators.
   

  

* Assist world’s leading brands and their agencies in seamlessly building social media campaigns \& process\-flows mapped to their business needs, through Sprinklr.
* Identify platform gaps, and optimization opportunities; designing and configuring the appropriate solutions so client expectations regarding platform use\-cases and functionalities are fulfilled.
* Provide oversight on any additional enablement of the software deployment to be in line with current architecture and future client needs or business requirements.
* Proactively identify opportunities to improve operational efficiencies and find suitableentities which could benefit from utilising AI to drive greater ROI.
* Establish and nurture senior level relationships built on trust, develop client champions and identify key stakeholders.
* Capture development areas for product improvement and collaborate with product managers and engineering for necessary corrective actions.
* Actively make sure you are knowledgeable on native channel’s products package.
* Work with clients to improve the social service itself and its alignment with the client's core business.
* Provide on\-going training support and ad hoc training sessions to always keep


 customers educated on Sprinklr’s know\-hows.
   

  

* Actively make sure that you are knowledgeable on all Sprinklr software products.


**What Makes You Qualified**
* 4\+ years of experience in account management at a brand, agency or tech company.
* Experience in web technologies, CRM or SaaS platforms and digital marketing


 experience across social platforms.
   

  

* Strong product acumen \& evangelization experience with the aptitude to learn new products.
* Analytical mind\-set with attention to detail along with excellent problem\-solving and critical\-thinking skills.
* Ability to think independently and learn as a member of a team.
* Ability to identify and clearly articulate issues clients are facing and capability of devising \& implementing their solutions.
* Ability to work in a highly challenging \& competitive environment while delivering high quality of customer service.
* Ability to work effectively under tight deadlines and juggle several assignments \& projects simultaneously, while maintaining high standard of excellence.
* Intrinsically motivated to tackle unique client use cases, passion to solve business challenges and commitment to client delight.
* Ability to interpret industry trends across different verticals \& lines of businesses.
* Ability to operate in an autonomous way, engage with stakeholders across the globe and lead customers through change management.
* Advanced analytical skills with proven competency in data tools \& methodologies.
* Ability to collate, harmonise and visualise data and present the statistical merit in a business case.
* Industry specific knowledge across different verticals or lines of business preferred.
* Demonstrated experience with, and a passion for, the social technology universe (i.e., Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Snapchat, TikTok).
* Direct experience in working with a social media management software is preferred.
* Strong time management skills including the ability to prioritize tasks and maintain accurate time tracking for billing purposes


**We focus on our mission** 
 : Sprinklr was founded in 2009 to solve a big problem: growing enterprise complexity that separated brands from their customers. Our vision was clear: to unify fragmented teams, tools and data — helping large organizations build deeper, more meaningful connections with the people they serve. Today, Sprinklr has a unified, AI\-native platform for four product suites: Sprinklr Service, Sprinklr Social, Sprinklr Marketing, and Sprinklr Insights. Sprinklr is here to do three things:
   

  

* Lead a new category of enterprise software that we call Unified\-CXM.
* Empower companies to deliver next generation, unified engagement journeys that reimagine the customer experience.
* Create a culture of customer obsession, with trust, teamwork, and accountability.


**We believe in our product** 
 : Customers who value exceptional customer experiences have what they need on our single unified platform, built with an operating system approach on a single codebase. That means that everything — and everyone — can work together to service, respond, sell, and market to customers on the channels they prefer. While Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM) as a category is just getting started, we are well on our way to creating a no\-compromise, unified approach to better customer experiences for the world’s leading enterprise brands.
   

  

**We invest in our people** 
 : We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits designed to help each member of our team thrive. Sprinklr believes that you should be able to get the type of care you need for your personal well\-being when you need it. We offer you and your family voluntary healthcare coverage in countries where applicable. We believe it is important to take time off – it is essential for your mental and physical wellbeing. We provide Sprinklrites with paid time off to recharge and spend time with loved ones. We want to grow our talent with purpose. Our open Mentoring Program is designed to create meaningful connections that support growth and amplify our focus.
   

  

 To learn more about employee benefits by region, click here.
   

  

 To learn more about all\-things\-Sprinklr, visit our candidate resource hub here.
   

  

**EEO \- Our philosophy** 
 : Our goal is to ensure every employee feels like they belong and are operating in a collaborative environment. We fervently believe every employee matters and should be respected and heard. We believe we are stronger when we belong because collectively, we’re more innovative, creative, and successful.
   

  

 Sprinklr is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, ethnicity, sex (including gender, pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), age, physical or mental disability, citizenship, past, current, or prospective service in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request during the interview process. To request an accommodation, please work directly with your recruitment coordinator or recruiter.
   

  

**Warning about Recruiting Scams:** 
 Please be vigilant for recruiting scams impersonating Sprinklr. Sprinklr will never ask you for money, to pay for equipment, or for unnecessary personal information during the interview process. Sprinklr will also never pay in Bitcoin or send email communications from our executives. Please review the Federal Trade Commission's advice to avoid these types of scams.
   

  

 If you are contacted by someone whom you suspect may not be appropriately representing Sprinklr, please do not engage and block their email or phone number immediately.

131b6120.title: Delivery Manager
131b6120.description:
Job Description: Delivery Manager
   

  

 This exciting opportunity is responsible for leading all aspects of assigned delivery projects within FNZ India Centre and actively drives projects to deliver to agreed time and quality commitments.
   

  

 The Delivery Manager has responsibility for managing the day\-to\-day activities of all the Solution Consultants, Analyst Developers, Analyst Testers and other assigned team members for the project.
   

  

 The Delivery Manager will liaise on a regular basis with the client engagement Project Managers.
   

  

 The Day\-to\-Day
   

  

* Scope management: Maintaining an accurate understanding of project scope, deliverables and schedule and delivery expectations from Project Managers and Client Directors.
* Estimation: Creating, owning and maintaining accurate and detailed estimates of project activities and determining the most efficient project approach and resource utilisation.
* Planning and scheduling: Creating, owning and maintaining project schedules/plans, detailing all activities to be completed by the Solution Centre on a project.
* Delivery focus: Ensuring the project team tracks and delivers against the milestones in the project schedule and being ultimately accountable for the success or failure of the work the team is responsible for delivering. You will have:
* Strong leadership ability and interpersonal skills
* Experience in project management with a track record of successfully delivering complex projects
* Significant experience of software development delivery preferably with the financial services industry
* Strong background in software development, ideally with relevant technologies to FNZ. Degree qualified or equivalent
* An independent, self\-directed and delivery\-focused working style
* Highly outcome focused, seeking the best outcome for FNZ and its clients
* Excellent relationship and stakeholder engagement skills and experience
* Confidently able to take the initiative in a client and delivery focused environment
* Excellent planning, organising, time management and administration skills
* Project management professional qualifications (e.g. PMP, PRINCE2, Agile project management)
* Familiarity with the Agile project methodology desirable Why join the FNZ journey?
* Be part of a highly successful, rapidly growing, global business that is leading the delivery of financial services via cloud computing and partners with some of the world’s largest companies.
* Remuneration and career advancement is based on individual contribution and business impact rather than tenure or seniority.
* We provide significant financial rewards for high performing individuals; and
* We provide global career opportunities for our best employees at any of our offices in the UK, Czech Republic, Australia, New Zealand or China


**About FNZ**
*FNZ is committed to opening up wealth so that everyone, everywhere can invest in their future on their terms. We know the foundation to do that already exists in the wealth management industry, but complexity holds firms back.*
*We created wealth’s growth platform to help. We provide a global, end\-to\-end wealth management platform that integrates modern technology with business and investment operations. All in a regulated financial institution.*
*We partner with the world’s leading financial institutions, with over US$2\.4 trillion in assets on platform (AoP).
   

  

 Together with our clients, we empower nearly 30 million people across all wealth segments to invest in their future.*

4fcb9bcb.title: Senior Delivery Management Leader - AI productivity solutions
4fcb9bcb.description:
We are seeking a
 **Senior Delivery Management Leader** 
 for AI productivity solutions to drive the successful delivery of high\-impact AI programs across enterprise clients.
 



 This role requires deep expertise in AI, cloud platforms, and application development, as well as the ability to lead large, distributed teams and manage complex client portfolios.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Oversee the end\-to\-end delivery lifecycle for client engagements, including strategic planning, implementation, governance and post\-implementation support
* Ensure delivery metrics such as scope, schedule adherence, quality, budget compliance and operational KPIs are consistently met across all engagements
* Manage multi\-project portfolios and large cross\-functional teams, ensuring collaboration across engineering, quality assurance, business analysis, architecture and DevOps
* Own the program governance model (SteerCo, WSR, MSR), engaging stakeholders at all delivery levels to maintain alignment on key deliverables and risks
* Take full accountability for the financial health of the client portfolio, including revenue recognition, profitability, margin improvement, budget forecasting and corrective action planning
* Identify areas for cost optimization and drive OPEX reduction through automation, resource optimization or enhanced delivery models
* Monitor resource utilization and productivity metrics across multiple projects
* Serve as the primary client liaison for senior\-level relationships (Directors, VPs, CXOs) and translate client business challenges into actionable delivery strategies
* Build, lead and mentor large distributed teams of 100–150\+ resources across nearshore, offshore and onshore delivery locations, cultivating high\-performing teams and driving talent development
* Mediate resource conflicts and escalations while ensuring delivery deadlines are met and proactively identify, assess and mitigate program risks
* Plan for contingencies by implementing robust mitigation actions and escalation protocols to ensure continuity of services during high\-pressure situations
* Identify up\-sell and cross\-sell opportunities within accounts, develop strategies for expanding the organization’s footprint and partner with sales and pre\-sales teams for RFPs, SOWs and business proposals
* Work with Account Managers to leverage successful delivery outcomes for further client engagement growth and drive new logo acquisitions by showcasing delivery leadership and engineering excellence
* Drive continuous innovation for client projects through automation, process enhancements and the adoption of emerging technologies, promoting best practices across delivery teams
* Lead end\-to\-end AI program delivery, including the execution of Agentic AI and AI productivity solutions, implementation of AI accelerators, and establishment of measurable KPIs to track and improve delivery efficiency through AI on AWS and Azure platforms







**Requirements** 



* 15 to 18 years of IT experience, with 8\+ years in delivery leadership roles and 3\+ years in AI/ML projects
* Proven track record of delivering enterprise AI programs (LLMs, RAG, Agentic AI, automation use cases)
* Deep understanding of cloud\-native AI services on AWS or Azure
* Expertise in large\-scale enterprise programs across industries such as BFSI, Telecom, Healthcare, Retail or Life Sciences
* Strong ability to influence and manage senior\-level client stakeholders (Directors, VPs, CXOs) while building trusted relationships
* Pragmatic leadership approach to resolve escalations, handle conflicts within delivery teams and overcome program challenges effectively
* Familiarity with modern engineering technologies and delivery methods, including cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), microservices \& DevOps, data analytics platforms (Tableau, Power BI, BigQuery) and automation frameworks like RPA (UiPath, Blue Prism)
* Understanding of ITIL/ITSM frameworks and SLA\-driven managed services delivery
* Knowledge of Agile development methodologies (Scrum, SAFe) and traditional Waterfall\-based delivery
* Exceptional leadership, negotiation and decision\-making skills for managing high\-pressure situations and improving delivery performance
* Ability to thrive in ambiguity and deliver results under challenging timelines
* Strong analytical, communication and interpersonal abilities for fostering team and client collaboration

57838cba.title: Senior Technical Delivery Manager - Java/.NET
57838cba.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Technical Delivery Manager** 
 to join our Digital Solutions team in India. As a key leader in our organization, you will drive the design, development, and successful delivery of cutting\-edge digital solutions to address complex business challenges.
 



 Your expertise in engineering, leadership, and project execution will play a critical role in meeting business objectives while maintaining high delivery standards.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Coordinate the preparation of customer proposals and statements of work
* Participate in new business development and ensure effective project acquisition
* Deliver customer projects successfully, aligning with agreed scope, time, and cost metrics
* Manage customer expectations and maintain productive client relationships
* Ensure that projects comply with EPAM process standards and methodologies
* Address customer concerns during engagements in collaboration with the Account Manager
* Ensure clients effectively execute their responsibilities during project delivery
* Identify and manage risks on engagements, escalating major issues promptly
* Lead project management tasks such as time estimation and resource scheduling
* Prepare engagement revenue projections, timesheets, and billing information
* Develop and present weekly or monthly engagement reports to stakeholders
* Create accurate project estimations, incorporating key delivery variables
* Establish key criteria for deliverability, performance, maintenance, and cost parameters
* Assist in analyzing client workflows and propose innovative solutions to optimize processes







**Requirements** 



* 15\-18 years of overall experience in IT
* Hands\-on coding expertise for 10\-13 years, ideally in software development
* 4\+ years of project management experience with responsibility for end\-to\-end delivery
* Proficiency in core technologies such as Java and .Net, with deep technical understanding
* Expertise in leveraging generative AI to drive productivity and efficiency in project execution
* Strong experience in executing projects under Agile Methodology
* Capability to create both High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) documents
* Excellent communication, presentation, and strategic planning skills
* Demonstrated organizational, leadership, and stakeholder management expertise

43c33977.title: Engagement Manager
43c33977.description:
While technology is the heart of our business, a global and diverse culture is the heart of our success. We love our people and we take pride in catering them to a culture built on transparency, diversity, integrity, learning and growth.
   

  

 If working in an environment that encourages you to innovate and excel, not just in professional but personal life, interests you\- you would enjoy your career with Quantiphi!
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced Engagement Manager – Generative AI to lead client programs focused on AI and GenAI solutions. This role is responsible for managing end\-to\-end project delivery, partnering closely with clients, and ensuring successful execution of AI\-driven initiatives. You will serve as the key link between business stakeholders, technical teams, and leadership.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Lead end\-to\-end client engagements for Generative AI and AI/ML initiatives
   

  

 Partner with clients to understand business challenges and identify AI use cases
   

  

 Drive project planning, execution, and on\-time delivery within budget
   

  

 Work closely with data scientists, AI engineers, and product teams to implement solutions
   

  

 Convert business needs into well\-defined technical requirements
   

  

 Manage stakeholder communication and share regular project updates
   

  

 Ensure high levels of client satisfaction and identify opportunities for account growth
   

  

 Support pre\-sales efforts including solution discussions, proposals, and estimations
   

  

 Track risks, dependencies, and maintain delivery quality
   

  

**Required Skills \& Experience**
 8\+ years of experience in IT services, consulting, or project delivery
   

  

 Demonstrated experience managing AI, ML, or Generative AI projects
   

  

 Strong understanding of LLMs, chatbots, NLP, and AI\-powered automation
   

  

 Experience working with cross\-functional technical teams
   

  

 Excellent client communication and stakeholder management abilities
   

  

 Solid knowledge of Agile, Scrum, and project management methodologies
   

  

 Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions
   

  

 Good to Have
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with GenAI platforms (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Google Vertex AI, etc.)
   

  

 Understanding of Prompt Engineering, RAG, and LLM\-based applications
   

  

 Previous experience in consulting or client\-facing delivery roles
   

  

 PMP or Scrum certification
   

  

**Soft Skills**
 Strong leadership and decision\-making skills
   

  

 Excellent communication and presentation abilities
   

  

 Problem\-solving mindset
   

  

 Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced, client\-facing environment
   

  

*If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over\-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us* 
*!*

e83a67ca.title: Partner and Solutions Development Manager - India
e83a67ca.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.
   

  

**Partner \& Solutions GSI Development Manager\- India**
**Your Contribution**
 Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech.
   

  

 The Partner and Solution Development Manager is a high\-impact, strategic role designed to drive Logitech’s growth through its most critical global partnerships.
   

  

 This role ensures Logitech continues to lead the market in partner\-driven innovation, revenue growth, and global influence through strategic enablement of our partners
   

  

 The Partner and Solution Development Manager is a unique Go to Market role that will embody a partner centric and results\-oriented approach, leveraging exceptional relationship\-building skills to accelerate partner sales performance, and enable Logitech’s expansion across its portfolio of innovative business solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Business Development \& Strategic Partnerships**
* Drive expansion and adoption of Logitech’s portfolio by fostering and strengthening strategic relationships with GSI partners and enterprise customers.
* Identify, pursue, and influence new business opportunities in collaboration with, Sales, Partner, and Alliance teams.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to key stakeholders, supporting partner business plans and joint go\-to\-market initiatives.
* Share market and customer insights with internal business groups to inform portfolio development and competitive positioning.


**Technical Enablement \& Solution Design**
* Architect end\-to\-end technical solutions tailored for global and regional partners, integrating Logitech offerings across Managed Services, Personal Workspace, and Video Collaboration platforms.
* Lead cross\-functional teams internally, developing compelling and innovative solution designs for global customers.
* Develop and templatize persona\-driven solution bundles (such as meeting space Personas), and educate partners on go\-to\-market strategies with customers.
* Influence reference designs and establish standards with global partners across regions, driving awareness of solution design implications with local sales and technical teams.


**Partner Enablement \& Sales Acceleration**
* Align proposed solutions with partner capabilities, and help partners build expertise to lead with Logitech’s offerings.
* Enable partners to transition from selling individual products to solution\-based selling, increasing confidence across the global partner ecosystem.
* Guide partners on API integration requirements, enriching partner and customer experience.


**Pre\-Sales \& Bid Support**
* Own the pre\-sales and RFI/RFP response journey for solutions, ensuring timely and standardized responses across varying partner sizes.
* Establish customer journey frameworks and expectations for implementing solutions.
* Guide Bill of Materials creation focused on value for customers, and act as a trusted advisor throughout the sales cycle.
* Present technical architectural approaches, perform demos, and create documentation; drive successful Proof of Concept (POC) implementations.


**Thought Leadership \& Market Influence**
* Lead workshops and forums with sales teams and partner executives to drive improvements, share best practices, and foster preferential mindshare for Logitech.
* Educate partners on Logitech’s alliance ecosystem (Microsoft, Google, Zoom, etc.).
* Serve as a subject matter expert, engaging technology councils and delivering design workshops and sessions.


**Portfolio Expansion \& Cross\-Sell Initiatives**
* Help partners expand their focus across Logitech’s entire solutions portfolio, targeting diverse verticals and segments for broader market reach.


**Relationship Management \& Influence**
* Develop influential relationships at both partner and customer organizations, guiding key decisions for Logitech offerings.
* Become a go\-to strategic resource for global partners and central presales teams.


**Leading with Logitech’s Differentiation**
* Adapt and deliver strategic training to help partners recognize Logitech’s competitive advantages, including APIs, sustainability, and ecosystem integration.
* Ensure differentiation is woven through partner engagement and enable partners to deliver Logitech’s value propositions convincingly.


**Core Behavioral Contribution**
 Success in this role hinges on embodying Logitech’s cultural values:
   

  

* Be Yourself: Bring authenticity and confidence.
* Be Open: Foster trust and transparency in partnerships.
* Stay Hungry and Humble: Strive for continuous growth while collaborating effectively.
* Collaborate \& Challenge: Work cohesively while constructively pushing boundaries.
* Decide \& Execute: Take initiative, make decisions, and own results.


**Key Qualifications**
**Education**
* Bachelor’s degree (B.A., B.S.) required, or relevant technical certifications.


**Experience**
* Many years of demonstrated success in solutions engineering, supporting global partners and driving channel\-sourced revenue growth.
* Proven capability in leading change initiatives and ambitious, multi\-year business projects within strategic partnerships.
* Strong knowledge of enterprise integration patterns, APIs, and modern IT architectures.


**Skill Set**
* Executive presence with the ability to influence and gain mindshare with strategic and technical advisory teams at a global scale.
* Operationally savvy, with a track record of building templates and repeatable frameworks to accelerate organizational go\-to\-market capabilities.
* Deep understanding of IT and business trends, especially in Unified Communication and Collaboration Technologies.
* Experience serving as a trusted technology advisor to large, complex, and matrixed organizations, both internally and externally.


**Additional Skills**
* Organizational Excellence: Highly self\-motivated, capable of thriving in a fast\-paced environment with minimal supervision.
* Adaptability: Flexible and quick to adjust approaches based on evolving circumstances and priorities.
* Influence \& Advocacy: Ability to inspire alignment and drive shared goals across diverse stakeholders and teams.
* Communication: Exceptional interpersonal and listening skills that enable strong collaboration, trust, and accountability.
* Creativity: Innovative thinker, skilled in developing efficient and customer\-focused solutions that deliver strategic objectives.


 Across Logitech we empower collaboration and foster play. We help teams collaborate/learn from anywhere, without compromising on productivity or continuity so it should be no surprise that most of our jobs are open to work from home from most locations. Our hybrid work model allows some employees to work remotely while others work on\-premises. Within this structure, you may have teams or departments split between working remotely and working in\-house.
   

  

 Logitech is an amazing place to work because it is full of authentic people who are inclusive by nature as well as by design. Being a global company, we value our diversity and celebrate all our differences. Don’t meet every single requirement? Not a problem. If you feel you are the right candidate for the opportunity, we strongly recommend that you apply. We want to meet you!
   

  

 We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits packages and working environments that are designed to be flexible and help you to care for yourself and your loved ones, now and in the future. We believe that good health means more than getting medical care when you need it. Logitech supports a culture that encourages individuals to achieve good physical, financial, emotional, intellectual and social wellbeing so we all can create, achieve and enjoy more and support our families. We can’t wait to tell you more about them being that there are too many to list here and they vary based on location.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, sex, age, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or on the basis of disability.
   

  

 If you require an accommodation to complete any part of the application process, are limited in the ability, are unable to access or use this online application process and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact us toll free at \+1\-510\-713\-4866 for assistance and we will get back to you as soon as possible .

1937034f.title: Program Manager
1937034f.company: Talent Mappers Consulting India Private Limited
1937034f.description:
About Hero Motors  

  

Hero Motors Limited is a part of Hero Motors Company (HMC), a diversified conglomerate with a presence in cycles,  

automotive components, e\-Mobility, real estate and premium retail, with a group revenue of USD 500 million  

(approx.). Hero Cycles Ltd., the flagship company of HMC is the oldest and the largest cycle company in the Indian  

subcontinent.  

  

Hero Motors Limited (HML) is the automotive businesses of the HMC group with operations in Asia and Europe and  

several joint ventures with reputed companies in the automotive and e\-mobility space. HML comprises of 3  

business verticals, namely Gears \& Transmission (we do business with BMW, Ducati etc) Bike Powertrain (making  

CVT engines for the European market), Alloys \& Metallics (working with clients like the Indian Railways and other  

eminent companies in India). The joint ventures companies are in the space of Chassis Systems (ZF\-Hero) and  

brake discs \& drums (Munjal Kiriu).  

HML's latest division, Bike Powertrain is expanding into new product segments like EV Motors \& E\-Drive Systems,  

under the brand name of ESYNC. Under the ESYNC brand the company develops complete e\-bike systems for the  

European and for other key emerging markets. The joint venture with Yamaha has enabled HML to develop State\-  

of\-the\-art e\-bike HUB motors.  

Position Details  

Position : Manager Function : Program Management  

Reports to : Deputy General Manager  

Location : Narasapura Industrial Area, Kolar  

(Bengaluru)  

Specifications  

Experience (in years) : 8 to 10 years  

Industry Preferred : Gear manufacturing industries  

Qualifications : BE/B. Tech. (Mechanical)  

Roles \& responsibilities  

Customer interaction for technical and commercial finalisation of project  

RFQ disposal received from customer, with collaboration of cross functional team  

Quote preparation and submission within defined timeframe  

Conducting project kick\-off meeting to distribute the necessary information about the project  

Define timeline of the project  

Daily meeting with all stakeholders for project updates  

Expedite the process if required and escalation to management in case of risk of failure  

Identify the risk and it's mitigation plan  

Samples submission to customer within defined timeline  

Payment follow\-ups with customers for development tooling and samples  

Charter preparations and discussion with all team members  

Responsible for handling internal and external customer audits  

Functional competencies Behavioral competencies  

Basic Knowledge of Gear manufacturing.  

Knowledge of project Management.  

Capex and Customer handling.  

Good attitude and eager to learn.  

Innovative.  

Goal\-oriented.  

Good written \& verbal communication.  

  

Our website : Home \- Hero Motors**Skills:** Program Management

e235e0d6.title: Semiconductor AI Solutions Architect
e235e0d6.description:
**AI Strategy \| Engineering Automation \| Smart Manufacturing**
**Location:** 
 Bengaluru / Hyderabad / Pune / Noida, India
   

  

**Work Mode:** 
 Onsite
   

  

**Experience:** 
 10 18 Years
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Semiconductor \| Artificial Intelligence \| EDA \| Smart Manufacturing
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Semiconductor AI Solutions Architect** 
 to define, design, and deploy enterprise\-scale AI solutions across semiconductor design, manufacturing, test, quality, supply chain, and engineering operations.
   

  

 The role requires a strong combination of
 **semiconductor domain knowledge, AI/ML architecture, Generative AI, data platforms, cloud infrastructure, and engineering automation** 
 . The successful candidate will identify high\-value AI use cases, translate engineering challenges into scalable solution architectures, and guide cross\-functional teams from proof of concept through production deployment.
   

  

 This position will work closely with semiconductor design, EDA, CAD, manufacturing, process, equipment, yield, product engineering, IT, data engineering, and digital transformation teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Define AI solution architecture for semiconductor design, manufacturing, test, quality, and engineering productivity.
* Identify and prioritize AI use cases based on technical feasibility, business value, data readiness, and deployment complexity.
* Design scalable solutions using Machine Learning, Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, AI agents, knowledge graphs, and advanced analytics.
* Architect AI applications for RTL automation, verification, physical design, timing analysis, yield improvement, predictive maintenance, process optimization, and defect analytics.
* Develop enterprise AI platforms integrating EDA data, MES, SPC, FDC, APC, equipment data, wafer maps, ATE results, engineering documents, and product lifecycle systems.
* Lead the development of semiconductor engineering copilots, manufacturing assistants, knowledge systems, and decision\-support platforms.
* Define cloud, on\-premise, and hybrid architectures for secure AI deployment in engineering and manufacturing environments.
* Establish MLOps, LLMOps, model governance, monitoring, security, access control, and lifecycle management practices.
* Collaborate with data engineering teams to define data models, pipelines, feature stores, vector databases, and model\-serving infrastructure.
* Evaluate AI platforms, foundation models, EDA integrations, and third\-party technology solutions.
* Lead proof\-of\-concept development and transition validated solutions into production.
* Define technical roadmaps, reusable architecture patterns, and enterprise AI standards.
* Mentor AI, data, software, and semiconductor engineering teams.
* Communicate solution strategy, technical trade\-offs, risks, and business value to senior stakeholders.
* Measure adoption, engineering productivity, yield improvement, cycle\-time reduction, and other business outcomes.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor s or Master s degree in Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related discipline.
* 10 18 years of experience in semiconductor engineering, enterprise architecture, AI/ML, data platforms, EDA, manufacturing systems, or digital transformation.
* Proven experience designing and deploying enterprise\-scale AI solutions.
* Strong understanding of semiconductor design or manufacturing workflows.
* Experience leading cross\-functional technical programs from concept through production.
* Strong software, data, cloud, and systems architecture knowledge.


**Technical Skills** 
**Artificial Intelligence**
* Machine Learning
* Deep Learning
* Generative AI
* Large Language Models
* Retrieval\-Augmented Generation
* AI Agents
* Agentic AI
* Prompt Engineering
* Computer Vision
* Predictive Analytics
* Anomaly Detection
* Optimization Algorithms


**Semiconductor Engineering**
* ASIC / SoC Design Flow
* RTL Design
* Design Verification
* Physical Design
* DFT
* Static Timing Analysis
* EDA Automation
* Wafer Fabrication
* Process Integration
* Yield Engineering
* Equipment Engineering
* Assembly and Test
* Advanced Packaging


**Semiconductor Manufacturing Systems**
* MES
* SPC
* FDC
* APC
* SECS/GEM
* Equipment Data Collection
* Wafer Maps
* Metrology Data
* ATE and Test Data
* Manufacturing Analytics
* Smart Factory


**AI Frameworks**
* PyTorch
* TensorFlow
* Hugging Face
* LangChain
* LlamaIndex
* NVIDIA NeMo / NIM
* MLflow
* Vector Databases
* Knowledge Graphs
* GraphRAG


**Programming \& Integration**
* Python
* SQL
* Java or C\+\+
* REST APIs
* Microservices
* Linux
* Git
* Shell Scripting


**Cloud \& Platform Architecture**
* AWS
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud Platform
* Databricks
* Snowflake
* Kubernetes
* Docker
* Apache Spark
* Kafka
* Data Lakehouse
* HPC and GPU Infrastructure


**MLOps, LLMOps \& Governance**
* Model Deployment
* Model Monitoring
* Feature Stores
* CI/CD
* Data Lineage
* AI Governance
* Responsible AI
* Role\-Based Access Control
* Model Risk Management
* IP and Data Security

de44b4d2.title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (F&O) Solution Architect – Finance & Supply Chain
de44b4d2.description:
Spectra Solutions is looking for an experienced Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance \& Operations (F\&O) Solution Architect with deep expertise in Finance and Supply Chain Management. This role will serve as the technical and functional leader for enterprise D365 F\&O implementations, working closely with business stakeholders to design, implement, and optimize scalable ERP solutions that support financial operations and end\-to\-end supply chain processes.
 
  
 




  





**Key Responsibilities** 




* Lead end\-to\-end Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance \& Operations implementation and transformation projects.
* **Design scalable solution architectures across Finance and Supply Chain Management modules.**
* **Conduct business process workshops and gather functional and technical requirements.**
* **Collaborate with business users to recommend best practices and optimize ERP processes.**
* **Lead solution design, fit\-gap analysis, and functional architecture reviews.**
* **Configure and support core Finance modules including General Ledger, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Fixed Assets, Cash \& Bank Management, Budgeting, and Cost Accounting.**
* **Experience integrating ISV solutions and third\-party add\-ons**
* **Design and support Supply Chain processes including Procurement \& Sourcing, Inventory Management, Warehouse Management, Sales Order Processing, Master Planning, and Production.**
* **Define integration strategies with Microsoft Azure, Power Platform, CRM, third\-party applications, and external systems.**
* **Support data migration, testing, user acceptance testing (UAT), deployment, and post\-go\-live stabilization.**
* **Prepare functional design documents, solution architecture documentation, and implementation standards.**
* **Mentor functional consultants, developers, and client teams throughout the project lifecycle.**



  





**Requirements** 




* 10\+ years of ERP consulting experience with at least 5 years in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance \& Operations.
* **Strong functional expertise in D365 Finance and Supply Chain Management modules.**
* **Experience leading multiple full lifecycle D365 F\&O implementations.**
* **Strong understanding of financial accounting, procurement, inventory, manufacturing, warehouse, and distribution processes.**
* **Experience with solution architecture, business process reengineering, and enterprise integrations.**
* **Knowledge of Azure Integration Services, Power Platform, Dataverse, REST APIs, and Microsoft ecosystem technologies.**
* **Experience with data migration strategies, testing methodologies, and deployment planning.**
* **Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.**



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 




* Microsoft Certified: Dynamics 365 Finance Functional Consultant Associate and/or Supply Chain Management Functional Consultant Associate.
* **Experience with global, multi\-company, and multi\-currency implementations.**
* **Knowledge of Microsoft Power BI, Power Apps, Power Automate, Microsoft Fabric, and Azure services.**
* **Experience integrating D365 F\&O with CRM, eCommerce platforms, SAP, or other enterprise applications.**
* **Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field (advanced degrees or Microsoft certifications preferred).**



  





**What We Offer** 




* Flexible remote or hybrid work options.
* **Opportunity to work on enterprise\-scale Microsoft Dynamics 365 implementation projects.**
* **Collaborative, innovation\-driven work environment.**
* **Continuous learning, Microsoft certifications, and professional growth opportunities.**



  





**How to Apply** 




* Send your resume to jobs@spectrasoln.com or apply via LinkedIn.

5a3e75b2.title: Senior Solutions Engineer - Mumbai (Presales experience is a must)
5a3e75b2.description:
**SonicWall** 
  is a cybersecurity forerunner with more than 30 years of expertise and is recognized as a leading partner\-first company, ensuring our partners and their customers are never alone in the fight against cybercrime. With the ability to build, scale and manage security across the cloud, hybrid and traditional environments in real\-time, SonicWall provides relentless security against the most evasive cyberattacks across endless exposure points for increasingly remote, mobile and cloud\-enabled users. With its own threat research center, SonicWall can quickly and economically provide purpose\-built security solutions to enable any organization—enterprise, government agencies and SMBs—around the world. For more information, visit 
 **www.sonicwall.com** 
  or follow us on 
 **Twitter** 
 , 
 **LinkedIn** 
 , 
 **Facebook** 
  and 
 **Instagram** 
 .
 



  

 This is a
 **Solution Engineering** 
 role typically is 70% office or remote working in the regional country you are aligned to, supporting sales and channel technical activities and up to 30% traveling.
   

  

 This role is aligned to someone who is a self\-starter, passionate about technology, enabling teams and connecting with people to help solve their requirements. The ideal candidate must have proven hands\-on experience in cyber security products, excellent communication, and presentations skills. This is a perfect opportunity for an individual with previous Pre\-Sales, Support, or Professional Services proven experience at a Vendor, Channel, Customer or Distribution role, who is looking to have a balance of channel and technical sales activities and build trusted relationships with partners.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include**



* Proactive leader of technical discovery conversations to qualify and validate the customer requirements and use cases to build out a bill of materials that meets the customer needs and aligns to the desired outcomes
* Conduct technical sales presentations, product, and solution demonstrations across SonicWall portfolio to an audience typically between 1\-100 persons, keeping partners and customers informed of our new solutions and industry trends
* Talk to and demonstrate SonicWall unique value proposition and to know our key competitive offerings in this space
* Builds out a minimum of 10 trusted relationships with channel partners, holding reoccurring meetings with their channel technical decision makers
* Builds out and maintains personal lab for most common demo requests and personal development
* Support remote partner product trials
* Technical lead for proof of concepts that are either with a partner or direct with a customer
* Participate in beta testing and feedback of products, working alongside the product management teams
* Teaming with support where necessary to preserve relationships with partners and customers
* Support key technical marketing initiatives, builds out collateral, presenting on virtual or external events
* Develop expertise to a PoC level between 3\-6 x SonicWall product areas and a subject matter expert and go to persons for region
* Shares best practices with fellow peers
* Provides support for onboarding new solutions engineers
* Keeps regional sales informed of roadmap insights, product updates and technical best practices
* Adheres to the company values, guidelines, and solution engineering regional reporting tasks



**Characteristics Of The Role:**



* Demonstrates a balance of business and technical acumen, proactively seeks to take a technical sales lead without instruction
* Develops skills and uses experience in business focused discussions to envision and describe how a technical solution compliments existing customer and partner business practices
* Proven ability using formal best practice methods to present a convincing presentation, solution selling, demonstrate whiteboarding skills, objection handling and excellent time management
* Receives little instruction on day\-to\-day work and general instructions on new assignments.
* Working in an effective way that maximizes the available time, optimize teaming discussions to deliver the required outcomes on time and to the required ask
* Exhibits advanced wide\-ranging experience, using in\-depth professional knowledge, acumen, concepts, and company objectives to develop, resolve complex models and procedures
* Exercises judgment in selecting methods, evaluating, adapting of complex techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results.
* Work is reviewed upon completion and is consistent with departmental objectives.
* Networks with key contacts including product management, support, marketing, and peers within the Solution engineering organization.
* Adapts style and uses persuasion in delivering messages that relate to the wider firm business. Frequently advises others on complex matters



**Desired education and experience:**



* Typically requires a
 **minimum of 8\+ years** 
 of experience working in a Presales/Solution engineering or equivalent role .
* **Cyber Security CISSP Certified**
* ****Microsoft Azure or AWS Associate****
 desired
* Retaining specialist knowledge across SonicWall products to the desired level
* ****SNSA \& SNSP SonicWall Certified\*****
 Training will be provided
* Familiarity with governance and compliance issues and management/reporting solutions and requirements. Working knowledge of HIPAA, PCI, SOX, FERPA, CIPA, GDPR, etc.
* In addition, the candidate must have experience with the following technologies: Full range o

4896568f.title: AWS Solution Architect
4896568f.description:
Title \- Principal AWS Solution Architect – Data \& Analytics
 



 Exp \- 12 to 18 years
 



 Location\- Pune, Chennai,Hyderabad,bangalore,kolkata,noida
 



 NP \- Immediate to 30 Days
 



 Role Overview
 



 Job Summary
 



 We are looking for a Principal AWS Solution Architect – Data \& Analytics to serve as the technical authority and strategic leader for enterprise data platforms on AWS. This role is responsible for defining the long\-term data \& analytics architecture vision, establishing organization\-wide standards, and guiding multiple teams and programs to deliver scalable, secure, and business\-critical analytics solutions.
 



 This is a hands\-on architecture leadership role, combining deep technical expertise with executive\-level influence.
 



**Job Description** 




  





**Must Have** 




 1\)12\+ years in data, analytics, or platform engineering; 8\+ years on AWS.
 



 2\)Proven experience leading enterprise\-scale data \& analytics architectures.
 



 3\)Deep hands\-on expertise with AWS data services: S3, Lake Formation, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EMR, Kinesis/MSK
 



 4\)Enterprise Architecture \& Strategy
 



 5\)Data lakes \& lakehouse platforms
 



 6\)Warehousing \& analytical querying
 



 7\)Streaming \& real\-time analytics
 



 8\)Metadata, governance, and data sharing
 



 9\)Evaluate and recommend build vs buy decisions and new AWS services or ecosystem tools.
 



 AWS Data Platform Architecture
 



 10\)Design and govern solutions using AWS services such as:
 



 Storage \& Lake: Amazon S3, AWS Lake Formation, Glue Data Catalog
 



 Processing: AWS Glue, EMR (Spark), Lambda, Step Functions
 



 Analytics: Amazon Athena, Amazon Redshift (incl. Spectrum)
 



 Streaming: Amazon Kinesis, MSK (Kafka)
 



 AI \- AWS sagemaker/bedrock
 



  





**Good to have** 




 1\)Security, Governance \& Compliance
 



 2\)Establish enterprise\-grade security architecture:
 



 IAM strategy, fine\-grained data access, encryption with KMS
 



 Network isolation, private connectivity, cross\-account patterns
 



 3\)Drive governance frameworks for:
 



 Data cataloging, lineage, classification, and access control
 



 Regulatory compliance (PII, financial, or industry\-specific constraints)
 



 Partner with Security and Risk teams to ensure alignment with enterprise policies.
 



 4\)Reliability, Performance \& Cost Excellence:
 



 Embed AWS Well\-Architected Framework principles into all data solutions.
 



 Lead performance optimization and cost management (FinOps) initiatives.
 



 Define observability standards for data pipelines and analytics workloads.
 



**Roles and responsibilities:** 




 At the Principal level, you will:
 



  





 1\)Own enterprise\-wide data \& analytics architecture strategy on AWS
 



 2\)Act as the final technical escalation point for complex data challenges
 



 3\)Influence technology roadmap, investment decisions, and platform modernization
 



 4\)Mentor Senior/Lead Architects and raise the overall architectural bar
 



 5\)Partner closely with CIO/CTO, Data Office, Security, and Product leadership

fd755c24.title: Architect
fd755c24.description:
Job Summary:

The Architect is responsible for planning, designing, and overseeing the construction of residential, commercial, and industrial projects. The role involves preparing architectural drawings, coordinating with clients and project teams, conducting site visits, and ensuring projects are completed according to design, quality, and regulatory standards.

Roles \& Responsibilities:

* Develop architectural concepts and detailed building designs.
* Prepare 2D and 3D drawings using AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, or similar software.
* Create architectural plans, elevations, sections, and construction drawings.
* Conduct site visits to assess project progress and ensure design compliance.
* Coordinate with clients to understand project requirements and present design solutions.
* Work closely with civil engineers, structural engineers, MEP consultants, and contractors.
* Ensure designs comply with local building codes, safety regulations, and statutory approvals.
* Prepare project documentation, specifications, and material schedules.
* Review and approve shop drawings and construction details.
* Monitor construction quality and resolve design\-related issues at the project site.
* Assist in material selection and interior/exterior finishing decisions.
* Attend project meetings and provide technical guidance during execution.
* Ensure projects are completed within budget and scheduled timelines.
* Maintain accurate project documentation and progress reports.

Required Skills:

* Proficiency in **AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Lumion, 3ds Max**, or similar design software.
* Strong knowledge of architectural design principles and construction methods.
* Understanding of building codes, regulations, and approval processes.
* Excellent drawing, visualization, and presentation skills.
* Good communication and client\-handling abilities.
* Strong problem\-solving and coordination skills.
* Ability to conduct site inspections and manage multiple projects.

Qualification:

* **Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch)** (Mandatory)
* Registration with the **Council of Architecture (COA)** is preferred.

Preferred Industry Experience:

* Residential Projects
* Commercial Buildings
* Industrial Projects
* Interior Design
* Construction \& Infrastructure

Pay: ₹20,000\.00 \- ₹30,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Experience:

* Architect: 3 years (Preferred)
* Sketchup: 3 years (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

e0ded789.title: Solutions Architect
e0ded789.description:
Responsible for leading the development of comprehensive solution architecture strategies, ensuring seamless integration of application solutions across teams and domains while maintaining robust technical foundations. The role involves collaboration with other architects to validate feasibility, oversee compliance with quality attributes, manage technical risks, and guide IT architects to enhance their solution architecture leadership skills, all while aligning with FedEx best practices and technological standards.
   

  

* Lead and define solution architecture strategies, encompassing technology and architecture for seamless integration of application solutions across various teams and domains.
* Establish and maintain the architectural runway at a solution level, ensuring a robust technical foundation for the rapid and reliable creation of new functionalities and features across teams and ARTs.
* Collaborate with other architects to validate the feasibility and sustainability of solution architectures and application portfolio lifecycle planning, ensuring alignment with FedEx best practices and design standards.
* Oversee the management of non\-functional requirements and compliance to ensure that solution architectures meet essential quality attributes such as performance, scalability, security, and maintainability, meeting stakeholder acceptance criteria.
* Collaborate with other architects to define the appropriate delivery approach for solution services, encompassing processes, methodologies, tooling, and partnerships for agreement on service design and delivery.
* Identify and manage technical risks and continuous improvement opportunities for solution architectures, leveraging expert business knowledge to mitigate risks and capitalize on opportunities.
* Continuously monitor and evaluate new or emerging technologies utilized by internal teams, ensuring alignment with FedEx technological standards and potential integration into solution architectures.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to other IT architects to develop their skills and expertise in solution architecture leadership and execution.


 Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information systems and/or equivalent formal training or work experience. Relevant Master’s degree, TOGAF certification and SAFe Agile certification strongly preferred.
   

  

 Experience: Eight (8\) years equivalent work experience in information technology or engineering environment with a direct responsibility for strategy formulation and solution/technical architecture, as well as designing, architecting, developing, implementing and monitoring efficient and effective solutions to diverse and complex business problems.
   

  

**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Fluency in English
* Accuracy \& Attention to Detail
* Influencing \& Persuasion
* Planning \& Organizing
* Problem Solving
* Project Management


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Pay Transparency:**
**Pay**
**Additional Details:**
 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer and we are committed to a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce in which we enforce fair treatment, and provide growth opportunities for everyone.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of age, race, color, national origin, genetics, religion, gender, marital status, pregnancy (including childbirth or a related medical condition), physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances.
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People\-Service\-Profit philosophy (P\-S\-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy, or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People\-Service\-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P\-S\-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well\-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions, and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure, and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

4d67d39a.title: Solution Architect Finance- D365 Finance & Operations
4d67d39a.description:
The Solution Architect Finance \- D365 Finance \& Operations (F\&O) is responsible for defining, governing, and evolving the architectural landscape across the finance domain within D365 F\&O platform and its related applications, integrations, and data flows.
   

  

**Are You Looking to Build a Career That Contributes to a Brighter Future?**
* The role ensures that Finance solutions are scalable, secure, compliant, and fully aligned with business strategy and enterprise architecture. Act as a finance architect on projects/ Changes and Rollouts. Who can guide and mentor team in all finance related modules.
* This architect will work closely with business stakeholders, Enterprise Architecture, product owners, and implementation teams to guide the design of end‑to‑end processes and technical solutions across Finance using D365 F\&O.
* Design and optimize D365 F\&O solutions across customizations, integrations, reporting, and automation using X\+\+, Azure Integration Services, and Power Platform—following modern engineering best practices \& Ensure environment stability through effective DevOps, deployments, performance tuning, and global compliance.
* Lead full cycle ERP delivery including LCS management, RSAT automation, data migration, UAT, Go\-live, and hyper care to maintain long\-term system reliability and scalability \& Shape solution architecture and process optimization across Finance.
* Drive cloud, data, and AI innovation by advancing
* integrations, automation, Power Platform, and D365 Copilot capabilities across the enterprise \& Mentor cross\-functional teams worldwide, resolve complex issues, and influence continuous improvement


**What are we looking for?**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
* 12\+ years working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance \& Operations or AX (2012/2009\) in architecture, lead solutions design, or senior technical roles.
* Knowledge of D365 Finance \- GL, AP, AR, FA, Expense Management and PMA is required.
* Knowledge of Manufacturing, Inventory, and Master Planning is required.
* Experience leading large D365 F\&O programs involving multi\-entity rollouts, complex integrations, and heavy transaction volumes.
* Experience customizing Copilot or building AI\-driven solutions with Copilot Studio.
* Experience in large\-scale D365 migrations or upgrades.
* Experience with other finance applications like vertex/edicom, exflow, Avalara etc.
* Strong knowledge in .NET, SQL, JavaScript, and extension frameworks \& Strong functional background in finance, and enterprise process improvement, with experience leading UAT, hyper care, and environment management
