1ee4633e.title: IT Architect II
1ee4633e.description:
**Work Schedule**
 Flex Shifts 40 hrs/wk
   

  

**Environmental Conditions**
 Office
   

  

 As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you'll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world's toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.
   

  

**Description**
 Join our team as an IT Architect II specializing in Oracle EPM solutions, where you'll contribute to designing, developing, and supporting enterprise performance management applications that drive business success. You'll leverage your expertise to create solutions that enhance our financial planning and consolidation processes. Working with extended IT team to develop and support the Oracle EPM applications. Your expertise in Oracle EPM technologies, including EPBCS, PCMCS, EDMCS, FCCS, will be valuable in identifying and implementing opportunities for system and process improvements. In this role, you'll contribute to innovative solutions that support our mission of enabling our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Finance, Accounting, or related field plus 3\-5 years of relevant experience
* Preferred Fields of Study: Computer Science, Information Technology, Finance, Accounting, or related field
* 3\+ years of experience as an Oracle EPM Techno Functional Consultant
* Development and functional expertise in Oracle EPM applications including EPBCS, PCMCS, EDMCS, FDMEE, and FCCS
* Strong proficiency in Batch Scripting and Python programming
* Experience with Oracle EPM implementations, configurations, and customizations
* Ability to gather business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
* Experience with financial consolidation and reporting processes
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills
* Effective presentation and communication abilities
* Ability to work effectively in diverse team environments
* Experience managing technical projects and delivering results
* Demonstrated experience with Agile methodologies
* Fluency in English required
* Commitment to continuous learning in a technical environment

d5a356ef.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
d5a356ef.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* **Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem**
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* **DevOps \& ALM**
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* **Experience with:**
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* **Development \& Customization Skills**
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**


* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**


**Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.


**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.


**Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.


**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

92c21505.title: Senior Solutions Architect
92c21505.description:
**Senior Technical Architect / Technical Lead – Telecom AI Platform
 



  





 Company: Kubernetikos Infosec LLP
 



 Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu (Work from Office)
 



 Experience: 8–10 Years
 



 Employment Type: Full\-Time
 



 Notice Period: Immediate to 30 Days Preferred
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 About Kubernetikos Infosec LLP
 



  





 Kubernetikos Infosec LLP is a technology company specializing in AI\-powered Network Operations (NOC), Cloud Infrastructure, Observability, Telecom Analytics, Enterprise Software Engineering, and Intelligent Automation. We build next\-generation cloud\-native platforms that enable telecom operators and large enterprises to achieve intelligent operations through AI, real\-time analytics, and automation.
 



  





 We are looking for an experienced Senior Technical Architect / Technical Lead with strong telecom domain expertise and hands\-on full\-stack development capabilities to lead the architecture, design, and delivery of enterprise\-scale AI platforms.
 



  





 This is a highly technical, hands\-on leadership role requiring deep expertise across software architecture, frontend and backend development, DevOps, cloud platforms, and telecom operations.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Role Summary
 



  





 As a Senior Technical Architect / Technical Lead, you will define the technical architecture, lead engineering teams, mentor developers, and deliver scalable cloud\-native telecom applications. You will work closely with product management, engineering, DevOps, QA, and customer teams to build world\-class enterprise platforms.
 



  





 This is a hands\-on leadership role, where you are expected to actively contribute to architecture, coding, technical reviews, problem\-solving, and engineering excellence.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 Technical Leadership
 



  





 \* Lead the architecture and design of enterprise\-scale telecom software platforms.
 



 \* Define engineering standards, coding guidelines, and architectural best practices.
 



 \* Conduct architecture reviews and code reviews.
 



 \* Mentor and guide software engineers.
 



 \* Drive engineering excellence and continuous improvement.
 



 \* Own technical decisions across the complete software development lifecycle.
 



 \* Collaborate with product teams to convert business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
 



 \* Ensure applications are highly available, secure, scalable, and performant.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Full Stack Development
 



  





 Frontend
 



  





 Develop modern web applications using:
 



  





 \* React.js
 



 \* TypeScript
 



 \* Redux
 



 \* Material UI / Ant Design
 



 \* HTML5
 



 \* CSS3
 



 \* JavaScript (ES6\+)
 



 \* WebSocket
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 



  





 \* Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces.
 



 \* Build reusable UI components.
 



 \* Integrate REST APIs and real\-time WebSocket services.
 



 \* Optimize frontend performance and user experience.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Backend
 



  





 Develop enterprise\-grade backend services using:
 



  





 \* Python
 



 \* FastAPI
 



 \* Django
 



 \* Flask
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 



  





 \* REST API development
 



 \* Authentication \& Authorization
 



 \* Microservices development
 



 \* API Gateway integration
 



 \* Async programming
 



 \* Secure coding
 



 \* Performance optimization
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Database \& Big Data (Mandatory)
 



  





 The ideal candidate must have strong hands\-on experience with:
 



  





 ClickHouse (Mandatory)
 



  





 \* Database architecture and schema design
 



 \* Cluster deployment and administration
 



 \* Replication and sharding
 



 \* Partitioning strategies
 



 \* Materialized Views
 



 \* Query optimization
 



 \* Performance tuning
 



 \* Data retention management
 



 \* High\-volume analytical workloads
 



 \* Real\-time event analytics
 



 \* Time\-series data management
 



  





 Additional database experience:
 



  





 \* PostgreSQL
 



 \* Redis
 



 \* MongoDB
 



 \* Elasticsearch / OpenSearch
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Telecom Data Engineering
 



  





 Experience working with high\-volume telecom datasets including:
 



  





 \* Network alarms
 



 \* Performance metrics
 



 \* Fault events
 



 \* Telemetry streams
 



 \* Network inventory
 



 \* SLA analytics
 



 \* Telecom KPIs
 



 \* Real\-time event processing
 



 \* Billion\-record analytical datasets
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Messaging \& Streaming
 



  





 Hands\-on experience with:
 



  





 \* Apache Kafka
 



 \* RabbitMQ
 



 \* Event Streaming
 



 \* Message Queues
 



 \* Event\-Driven Architecture
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Cloud \& DevOps (Mandatory)
 



  





 Strong experience designing, deploying, and managing cloud\-native infrastructure on:
 



  





 \* Amazon Web Services (AWS)
 



 \* Microsoft Azure
 



 \* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
 



  





 Hands\-on expertise with:
 



  





 \* Docker
 



 \* Kubernetes
 



 \* Helm
 



 \* Terraform
 



 \* Jenkins
 



 \* GitHub Actions
 



 \* GitLab CI/CD
 



 \* ArgoCD
 



 \* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
 



 \* Container orchestration
 



 \* Auto Scaling
 



 \* Load Balancers
 



 \* Cloud Networking
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Observability \& Monitoring
 



  





 Hands\-on experience implementing and managing:
 



  





 \* Prometheus
 



 \* Grafana
 



 \* OpenTelemetry
 



 \* ELK / OpenSearch Stack
 



 \* Distributed Tracing
 



 \* Application Performance Monitoring
 



 \* Log Analytics
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Telecom Domain Experience (Mandatory)
 



  





 Candidates must have experience working with telecom operators, ISPs, managed service providers, or telecom technology companies.
 



  





 Strong understanding of:
 



  





 \* Network Operations Center (NOC)
 



 \* OSS/BSS
 



 \* Service Assurance
 



 \* Fault Management
 



 \* Performance Management
 



 \* Alarm Correlation
 



 \* Network Monitoring
 



 \* SLA Monitoring
 



 \* Incident Management
 



 \* Capacity Planning
 



 \* Root Cause Analysis
 



  





 Exposure to:
 



  





 \* IP/MPLS Networks
 



 \* Enterprise Networks
 



 \* Fiber Networks
 



 \* LTE / 4G / 5G
 



 \* Core Networks
 



 \* Broadband Networks
 



 \* SD\-WAN
 



  





 Integration experience with:
 



  





 \* SNMP
 



 \* Syslog
 



 \* NetFlow
 



 \* Streaming Telemetry
 



 \* gNMI
 



 \* REST APIs
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Software Architecture
 



  





 Design and implement:
 



  





 \* Microservices Architecture
 



 \* Event\-Driven Architecture
 



 \* Distributed Systems
 



 \* Multi\-Tenant SaaS Platforms
 



 \* High Availability
 



 \* Disaster Recovery
 



 \* Horizontal Scalability
 



 \* Secure APIs
 



 \* Performance Optimization
 



 \* Enterprise Integration Patterns
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 AI \& Intelligent Automation
 



  





 Exposure to:
 



  





 \* Artificial Intelligence
 



 \* Machine Learning integration
 



 \* Large Language Models (LLMs)
 



 \* Predictive Analytics
 



 \* Anomaly Detection
 



 \* AI\-assisted Operations (AIOps)
 



 \* Intelligent Automation
 



 \* Vector Databases (Preferred)
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Required Skills
 



  





 Mandatory
 



  





 \* 8–10 years of hands\-on software development experience.
 



 \* Minimum 3 years as a Technical Lead, Technical Architect, or Solution Architect.
 



 \* Strong telecom domain experience.
 



 \* Expert\-level React.js development.
 



 \* Strong Python development (FastAPI/Django).
 



 \* Hands\-on expertise in ClickHouse database design and optimization.
 



 \* Experience with Apache Kafka.
 



 \* Strong DevOps expertise.
 



 \* Production experience with Kubernetes and Docker.
 



 \* CI/CD implementation using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, or similar.
 



 \* Hands\-on experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP.
 



 \* Strong REST API development experience.
 



 \* Experience building Microservices and Distributed Systems.
 



 \* Excellent debugging, troubleshooting, and performance optimization skills.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Preferred Skills
 



  





 \* Elasticsearch / OpenSearch
 



 \* Neo4j
 



 \* Redis
 



 \* MongoDB
 



 \* OpenTelemetry
 



 \* Grafana
 



 \* Prometheus
 



 \* AI/ML integration
 



 \* LLM integration
 



 \* Kubernetes Operators
 



 \* Service Mesh (Istio / Linkerd)
 



 \* Terraform Enterprise
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Education
 



  





 \* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics \& Communication Engineering, or a related discipline.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Soft Skills
 



  





 \* Strong technical leadership and mentoring skills.
 



 \* Excellent communication and presentation skills.
 



 \* Customer\-facing architecture and solutioning experience.
 



 \* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities.
 



 \* Ability to lead cross\-functional engineering teams.
 



 \* Ownership mindset with a strong focus on quality and delivery.
 



 \* Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 What You’ll Build
 



  





 As part of the engineering leadership team, you will architect and deliver:
 



  





 \* AI\-powered Network Operations Center (NOC) platforms.
 



 \* Telecom observability and analytics solutions.
 



 \* Real\-time alarm correlation and event processing platforms.
 



 \* High\-performance ClickHouse\-based analytics systems.
 



 \* Cloud\-native enterprise applications.
 



 \* AI\-powered operational dashboards.
 



 \* Predictive monitoring and intelligent automation platforms.
 



 \* Large\-scale distributed systems processing billions of telecom events every day.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Why Join Kubernetikos Infosec LLP?
 



  





 \* Architect and build cutting\-edge AI\-powered telecom platforms.
 



 \* Work on cloud\-native, enterprise\-scale products.
 



 \* Lead the technical direction of innovative engineering initiatives.
 



 \* Build distributed systems processing billions of telecom events.
 



 \* Work with modern technologies including React, Python, ClickHouse, Kafka, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Azure, and GCP.
 



 \* Collaborate with a highly skilled engineering team in a fast\-growing technology company.
 



 \* Opportunity to influence product architecture and technology strategy from the ground up.
 



 \* Competitive compensation and excellent career growth opportunities.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu (Work from Office)
 



 Experience: 8–10 Years
 



 Employment Type: Full\-Time
 



 Notice Period: Immediate to 30 Days Preferred
 



  





 Join Us
 



  





 If you are passionate about building high\-performance telecom platforms, designing scalable cloud\-native architectures, and leading engineering teams to deliver innovative AI\-driven solutions, we’d love to hear from you**

57a49cea.title: Gen AI Architect
57a49cea.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Position: Gen AI Architect (Enterprise Architect Level 0\)Company: Wipro Technologies – Technology Services (TTMS \- Tech Transformation \& Adv (ICD))
 
 Wipro Technologies is seeking a skilled and visionary
 **Gen AI Architect** 
 to join our Technology Services team, driving innovative Artificial Intelligence solutions that transform business processes and empower our clients in their digital transformation journey. This is an exciting opportunity to work at the forefront of Generative AI technologies within a dynamic and purpose\-driven organization.
 


 About the Role
 
 As a Gen AI Architect, you will be responsible for designing and implementing advanced generative AI (GenAI) architectures to meet strategic business goals. You will establish reference frameworks and technology standards for deploying Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, and AI Agents on cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform. You will collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams to translate complex business challenges into effective AI solutions, providing technical leadership and ensuring alignment with industry best practices.
 



 This role calls for an experienced enterprise architect with substantial expertise in AI, machine learning, and cloud architectures, along with a strong commitment to ethical AI deployment and compliance.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * Design and develop architectural blueprints and reference architectures for GenAI solutions, setting technology standards that enable scalable and secure deployment of LLMs, RAG systems, and autonomous AI Agents.
* Build and deliver proof\-of\-concept models and prototypes to validate new AI ideas and accelerate solution development cycles.
* Architect and implement GenAI solutions on leading cloud platforms, applying performance and cost optimization techniques to maximize value.
* Collaborate with product owners, data scientists, engineers, and business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into robust AI architectures.
* Lead the technical direction of AI projects, ensuring solutions meet security, privacy, and regulatory standards, instituting AI guardrails and compliance frameworks.
* Continuous learning and research to keep abreast of emerging Artificial Intelligence trends, tools, and methodologies, integrating new innovations into the company’s AI roadmap.


 Skills and Experience Required
 * 8\-10 years of relevant experience in AI/ML and enterprise cloud architecture with proven contributions to GenAI projects from concept to production.
* Strong expertise in deploying AI applications into production environments, with a focus on monitoring, reliability engineering, and iterative improvement.
* Proficient in enterprise\-level architectural design frameworks with mandatory competency in enterprise architecting.
* Hands\-on experience with cloud AI services across AWS, Azure, or GCP, including containerization and orchestration technologies.
* In\-depth knowledge of Agentic AI concepts and tools such as GitHub Copilot and Copilot Studio.
* Solid background in Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques and their application within large\-scale AI systems.
* Experience with microservices architectures, APIs, and DevOps tooling including Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and Terraform.
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross\-functional teams and influence technical decisions in complex environments.


 What We Offer
 
 At Wipro, we are building a modern organization fueled by innovation and bold ambitions. Joining our team means more than just starting a new job – it means growing your career in a company that values reinvention, continuous learning, and professional development. We foster a diverse and inclusive workplace where every individual is empowered to design their own path and thrive.
 



 As a Gen AI Architect, you will have the opportunity to work on cutting\-edge AI initiatives that shape the future of technology services globally. We offer a collaborative culture, access to leading technologies, and a platform where your expertise will significantly impact the company's AI strategy and client success.
 


 Why Join Wipro?
 * Be a part of an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with a purpose\-driven approach.
* Work alongside passionate professionals committed to innovation, inclusivity, and continuous evolution.
* Engage with diverse projects that challenge your skills and expand your expertise.
* Access resources and learning opportunities to fuel your career reinvention.
* Contribute to AI solutions that responsibly advance technology while ensuring security and ethical standards.


 Application Details
 
 If you are ready to bring your expertise in enterprise architecture and generative AI to a forward\-thinking environment, Wipro Technologies welcomes your application. Join us to reinvent your world and help us design the future of AI\-enabled digital transformation.
 



**Mandatory Skills:** 
 Enterprise Architecting
 



**Experience:** 
 8\-10 years
 



 Mandatory Skills: Enterprise Architecting .
 



  
 



 Experience: 8\-10 Years .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

419b3724.title: Technical Architect Freelancer
419b3724.description:
**Company Description** 
 Digiprima Technologies is a next\-generation AI software development company that turns data\-driven innovation into practical business results. The team builds scalable, intelligent web and mobile applications for enterprises across the USA, UK, Europe, South Africa, the Middle East, and Australia.
 



  





 With over 10 years of experience, 2,000\+ projects delivered, and clients in more than 40 countries, Digiprima maintains high satisfaction rates and strong technical credentials, including Microsoft Azure partnership and ISO 9001:2015 certification.
 



  





 The company offers a wide range of AI and digital services, such as generative AI, NLP, predictive analytics, computer vision, IoT, and enterprise software development. Digiprima works with organizations in diverse sectors including fintech, healthcare, smart manufacturing, retail, edtech, real estate, automotive, supply chain, and more.
 



  





**Role Description** 




  





 This is a full\-time, on\-site Technical Architect Freelancer role based in Indore. The Technical Architect will design and validate end\-to\-end technical architectures for AI\-driven and enterprise software solutions, ensuring scalability, performance, security, and maintainability.
 



  





 Day\-to\-day responsibilities include collaborating with product owners and development teams to translate business requirements into solution architectures, selecting appropriate technologies and tools, and defining integration patterns across systems and services. The role involves creating architectural blueprints and technical documentation, guiding software developers through implementation, performing code and design reviews, and troubleshooting complex technical issues.
 



  





 The Technical Architect will also help establish best practices, contribute to DevOps and cloud architecture decisions, and support pre\-sales or client discussions with clear technical guidance.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Candidates should possess strong Technical Architecture skills, including designing scalable, secure, and high\-availability systems.
* Candidates should possess robust Software Development skills with experience in modern programming languages, frameworks, and design patterns.
* Candidates should possess Solution Architecture skills, including translating business needs into technical solutions and creating detailed architectural diagrams.
* Candidates should possess Integration skills, such as API design, microservices integration, data flows, and working with third\-party platforms.
* Candidates should possess Enterprise Architecture skills, including understanding of enterprise standards, cloud architectures, and long\-term technology roadmaps.
* Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, or GCP), DevOps practices, and CI/CD pipelines is highly beneficial.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities, with the capacity to make sound technical decisions and manage trade\-offs.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work closely with cross\-functional teams and stakeholders.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Lead technical design discussions and define application architecture, design principles, and development standards. Translate complex telecom business requirements into scalable and maintainable software solutions. Design and implement modular, extensible, and high\-performance enterprise applications. Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including business, operations, QA, DevOps, and architecture groups. Participate in project planning, sprint reviews, backlog grooming, and Agile ceremonies. Support CI/CD initiatives and deployment automation. Provide technical leadership and mentorship to development teams
   

  

 Telecom Provisioning \& Activation PON Network Architecture ONT/OLT Management Circuit Management Service Order Processing Telecom Inventory Management Equipment Management Workflow Automation Telecom Data Modeling Business Rule Implementation Build \& Release Engineering Makefiles CMake Build Automation Release Management Version Control Systems (Git) Performance Engineering Application Performance Optimization Memory Profiling Performance Tuning Root Cause Analysis Troubleshooting Tools: Valgrind gprof perf Quality Engineering Unit Testing Integration Testing Google Test Framework Test Automation Security \& Reliability Secure Coding Practices Memory Corruption Prevention Buffer Overflow Prevention SQL Injection Prevention Error Handling Frameworks Audit Trails Rollback Mechanisms

bba03b2a.title: Software Architect
bba03b2a.description:
**Software Architect either based in Hyderabad OR Bangalore.** 




  





 we are redefining the economics of AI infrastructure. Our mission is to democratise AI by significantly reducing the Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) of hardware systems — a critical barrier to scalable adoption.
 



  





 Our proprietary MIMO\-over\-copper technology powers a high\-performance, chiplet\-based AI memory fabric that is both scalable and energy\-efficient. Unlike traditional interconnects, our solution reduces power consumption significantly while preserving high bandwidth and ultra\-low latency — unlocking unprecedented efficiency for AI training and inference at scale.
 



  





 our architecture is not just an incremental improvement — it’s a foundational shift in how AI hardware is built for the future.
 



**Software Architect either based in Hyderabad OR Bangalore.** 




  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Architect CMIS 5\.x stack (DataPath State Machine, VDM, I2C/MCTP, FW\-SW interface)
* Lead host interop tests for hyperscalers (Meta, AWS, etc.), build test matrix and regression suite
* Develop manufacturing test orchestration (ATE integration, yield analytics, on\-chip stimulus)
* Build telemetry pipeline from FW to host/cloud (formats, compression, SDK APIs)
* Own customer SDK and tools (C/Python, CLI, log analysis), release management
* Ensure standards compliance (CMIS 5\.x, OSFP MSA, SFF\-8024, OIF)
* Travel: Up to 25% (customer engagement, manufacturing, standards)



  





**Skills:** 



* Good knowledge of C/C\+\+, Python, systems language (Go/Rust); CI/CD, conformance tests
* Good knowledge of I2C/MCTP, SFF\-8024, vendor extensions
* Good understanding of standards implementation (OIF, SFF, IEEE mgmt\-plane)
* Good knowledge of architecture documentation (SHALL/MUST, REQ traceability)
* Self\-motivated, with strong sense of ownership and responsibility
* Good communication and reporting skills



  





**Experience:** 



* Principal / Senior Staff (8\-10 years post\-degree)
* 8\+ years high\-speed interconnect software (module SW, management, test, SDK)
* CMIS 4\.x/5\.x implementation and OSFP MSA experience
* Hyperscaler interop with NIC/switch ASICs (Nvidia, Broadcom)
* Test software architecture with ATE/yields
* Manufacturing and field support experience



  





**Education:** 



* BS in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Computer Science (MS preferred)



  





  





 If this is the role you have been looking for and you want to be part of a growing Company, with an exciting future then we would really love to hear from you
 



  





***Contact***




 Uday
 



 muday\_bhaskar@yahoo.com
 



***Mulya Technologies***




***"Mining the Knowledge Community"***

5e982b6c.title: Principal Solution Architect, SAP FICO
5e982b6c.description:
**Description**
 At West, we’re a dedicated team that is connected by a purpose to improve patient lives that has been at the center of our Company for more than a century. Our story began when Herman O. West solved the problem of supplying penicillin in mass quantities to the US Government during World War 2\. Through our work to deliver thousands of life\-saving and life\-enhancing injectable medicines to millions of patients daily, West’s indelible mark on the healthcare industry has just begun. A name started our story. How will yours help write our future?
   

  

 There’s no better place to join an inclusive community of professionals with opportunities for lifelong learning, growth and development. Supported by benefit programs, we empower the physical, mental, emotional and financial health of our team members and their families.
   

  

 We believe in giving back to help those in need in the communities where we live and work. And are equally committed to creating a healthier environment and planet through our sustainability efforts.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The
 **Principal Solution Architect, D\&T, SAP FICO** 
 collaborates with the Finance function to define, deliver and support D\&T enabled business solutions. This role will also help define strategic direction, determine business needs and design \& deliver technical solutions for Finance processes. This role has primary accountability for the delivery of Finance system services including project delivery, system enhancement and production support in alignment with West D\&T and company policies and procedures.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**
* Possesses deep understanding of the overall vision and business needs and utilizes this knowledge to collaborate with Finance to define detailed business requirements for D\&T enablement of business needs. This includes interpreting any issues and recommending solutions or best practices.
* Utilizes knowledge of best practices to define strategic direction, determine business needs and design \& deliver technical Finance solutions, doing so in partnership with Application and Infrastructure. This includes interpreting up to the most complex issues and recommending solutions or best practices.
* Spearhead the mapping of business requirements to optimal technical solutions.
* Provide technical delivery of functionality to meet defined business requirements.
* Create and maintain project charters and plans, capital requests, budgeting and project management in accordance with the Project and Portfolio Management process and West policies and procedures.
* Uses breadth of expertise to solve complex problems. Provide system support and maintenance in alignment with standards and process set within the ERP Services Delivery model, West policies and procedures as well as Regulatory requirements including but not limited to Sarbanes\-Oxley and FDA GMP.
* Create and maintain system lifecycle documents in accordance with West policies and procedures, including creation and maintenance of SOPs, SOIs and Job Aids.
* Work within and participates in the Change Control process.
* Other duties as assigned


**Education And Experience**
* 8\-10 years of related work experience
* Professional qualifications such as CA, ICMA, CFA or MBA Finance or any Masters Degree with financial accounting as a key subject


**Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Deep expertise, understanding and knowledge of SAP especially Finance applications – business processes, system functionality and technical understanding
* Project experience in all applications of SAP FICO including its integration with other modules is a must.
* Experience or knowledge of SAP FSCM module including Treasury and Banking processes will be highly preferred.
* Proficiency in financial accounting and reporting concepts, principles and applications is a must.
* Must be up to date on latest ERP release.
* Ability to work in a virtual environment in a global organization and to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a high\-pressure environment.
* Ability to work autonomously in a fast\-paced \& complex environment with a self\-motivated work ethic; utilize sound judgment with an ability to manage multiple priorities with a sense of urgency.
* Proficient English language skills
* Willingness to global travel
* Able to be aware of all relevant SOPs as per Company policy as they are related to the position covered by this Job Description
* Support and contribute in Lean Sigma programs and activities towards delivery of the set target
* Able to always comply with the company’s safety and quality policies


**Competencies/Authorities**
* Preferred but not required: SAP certification in FICO
* Preferred but not required: Agile/ITIL or similar certification


**Physical And Travel Requirements**
* 15% travel, including global travel
* Occasional on\-call work required
* Prefer 12pm – 9pm India time. Willingness to work outside of these hours as needed.


 West is an equal opportunity employer and we value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. If you have a special need that requires accommodation in order to apply to West, please send an email to Apply.Accommodation@westpharma.com . Where permitted by law, an offer of employment with West Pharmaceutical Services, or any of its subsidiary or affiliate companies, is contingent upon the satisfactory completion of background screening and/or a pre\-employment drug screening.

fdd28713.description: Lead SAP Analytics Cloud BI and analytics implementations. Design enterprise analytics solutions and mentor teams on advanced analytics capabilities.

ceb8392b.title: Consultant - GESTC - R&A (Work force solutions) - Hyderabad
ceb8392b.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
 As a consultant in the workforce solution/Technology team, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining data integration and reporting solutions with a strong focus on SQL Server and SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services). You will work closely with business stakeholders and technical teams to deliver scalable data pipelines, ETL processes, and reporting solutions that enable data\-driven decision\-making. This role requires strong technical expertise in SQL development and ETL processes, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced environment.
   

  

**Work you'll do**
 As a Tax Consultant II on the Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC) team, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Designing, developing, and maintaining ETL workflows using SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services)
* Writing, optimizing, and maintaining SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and views in SQL Server
* Performing data extraction, transformation, loading, validation, and quality checks to support reliable data pipelines
* Developing and supporting reporting solutions using SSRS or similar reporting tools, and assisting with enhancements or migration activities
* Collaborating with business stakeholders and technical teams to gather requirements, troubleshoot data issues, support deployments, and maintain process documentation


**The team**
 Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (“Deloitte Tax in India”) commenced operations in June 2004\. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines and regions have obtained support services through Deloitte Tax in India.
   

  

 We provide support through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services by combining technology and tax technical resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.
   

  

 We provide opportunities to transform tax operations using contemporary technologies in the market. Individuals work to transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions. Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations using new technologies? If the answer is “Yes,” come join Global Employer Services Technology Center (GESTC)
   

  

**Location: Hyderabad**
**Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM**
**Qualifications**
 Required:
   

  

* 2\-3 years of experience in SQL development, data engineering, or ETL development
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field
* Experience with SQL Server and T\-SQL development
* Experience with SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services) for ETL development
* Experience writing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and views
* Experience with data warehousing concepts, including fact tables, dimension tables, and star schema
* Experience with SSRS or similar reporting tools


 Preferred:
   

  

* Experience with Azure Data Factory or AWS ETL tools
* Experience with AWS cloud services and PostgreSQL
* Experience with Python or scripting for automation
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control tools, including Azure DevOps or Git
* Experience in database performance tuning and query optimization
* Experience working in Agile development environments


**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 355027

4f55fdf0.title: Partner Solutions Architect
4f55fdf0.description:
**SLSQ127R200**
 As a
 **Partner Solutions Architect** 
 (PSA) for India, you will work with the technical and sales team members who work directly with our customers. You will develop 'technical champions' within our top Partners, providing enablement on technical matters related to the Databricks product. Working with our partners, you will help our customers to achieve tangible data\-driven outcomes through the use of our Databricks Lakehouse Platform, helping data teams complete projects and integrate our platform into their enterprise Ecosystem. As a member of our team, you will exercise and develop expertise in those areas, using open\-source projects such as Apache Spark™, MLflow, and Delta Lake; and major public cloud infrastructure and services. the product. You will use this expertise to become a trusted advisor to C\&SI partners.
   

  

**The Impact You Will Have**
* Provide partners with the level of enablement they need to assist their clients in evaluating and adopting Databricks including hands\-on Apache Spark™ programming and integration with the wider cloud ecosystem
* Engage with the partner technical community by leading workshops, seminars, and meet\-ups
* You will be a Big Data Analytics expert on aspects of architecture and design and will share this with our partner network
* Show expertise by producing creative technical solutions and blog posts


**What We Look For**
* 8 years of customer facing experience working with external clients or partners across a variety of industry markets
* Core strength in either data engineering or data science
* Experience demonstrating technical concepts, including presenting and whiteboarding
* Experience developing architectures within a public cloud (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Hands on experience in SQL, Python, Scala, or Java
* Expertise in at least one of the following:
* Data Engineering technologies (Ex: Apache Spark™, Hadoop, Kafka)
* Data Warehousing (Ex: SQL, OLTP/OLAP/DSS)
* Data Science and Machine Learning technologies (Ex: pandas, scikit\-learn, HPO)


**About Databricks**
 Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click here.
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio\-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.
   

  

**Compliance**
**If access to export\-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.**

f8e2ece3.title: Solution Architect
f8e2ece3.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Solution Architect for EIKO Insurance Platform
   

  

**Department** 
 : ETO Strategic Protection Platform (IT Tribe Business Platforms)
   

  

**About Business Line/Function**
 BNP Paribas Cardif is a world leader in bancassurance partnerships, providing its customers with products and services that let them realize their goals while protecting themselves from unforeseen events. BNP Paribas Cardif is committed to having a positive impact on society and to making insurance more accessible. A subsidiary of BNP Paribas, the insurer has a unique business model anchored in partnerships. It creates solutions for more than 500 partner distributors in a variety of sectors – including banks and financial institutions, automotive sector companies, retailers and telecommunications companies – as well as for financial advisors and brokers who market the products to their customers. With a presence in 30 countries and strong positions in Europe, Asia and Latin America, BNP Paribas Cardif is a global specialist in personal insurance, the world leader in creditor insurance and a major contributor to financing for the real economy. With 9,000 employees worldwide, BNP Paribas Cardif had gross written premiums of €40\.5 billion in 2025\.
   

  

 Within BNPP Cardif, the mission of ETO (Efficiency, Technology \& Operations) Directorate is to deliver our value proposition by steering and transforming our operational setups and information systems to support the company’s development and serve our clients and partners safely, sustainably, and efficiently.
   

  

 The Protection business line is currently confronting strong industrial challenges that limit Cardif’s ability to operate with a competitive cost‑to‑serve and to sustain activity growth at marginal cost. This overall situation stems from a highly fragmented, locally‑focused industrial set‑up with heterogeneous processes, operations, and IT systems.
   

  

 The creation of a new Global COO Protection department aims to address these issues by deploying the new Protection platform (EIKO) and its Target Operating Model on a global scale. The IT BizPlatform team will be responsible for the rollout and maintenance of the technology platform. The establishment of a new Global Protection Operations team is intended to define and implement the Target Operating Model linked to the new Protection platform.
   

  

 In this context
 **, EIKO Platform application** 
 has been developed to support any protection business relative to B2B2C model.
   

  

 EIKO Platform is based mainly on micro\-services architecture using EDA and DDD models. Component are mainly based on Spring Framework.
   

  

**Position Purpose**
 Provide architectural leadership for the
 **operational stability, performance and continuity** 
 of the insurance‑product distribution platform. The focus is on “run” activities – monitoring, incident resolution, capacity \& performance management, security hardening and service‑level adherence – while ensuring the solution remains aligned with business, compliance and technology standards.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Platform Operations \& Governance
   

  

* Participate in daily/weekly/monthly operational review meetings with on‑shore and off‑shore stakeholders.


 Monitoring \& Incident Management
   

  

* Design and maintain monitoring, alerting and logging architectures (Dynatrace).
* Lead Tier‑2/3 incident investigations, root‑cause analysis and post‑mortems.
* Coordinate with support teams, external vendors and business owners to ensure timely resolution.


 Performance \& Capacity Management
   

  

* Conduct regular performance profiling and tuning of services (DB, middleware, APIs).
* Build capacity‑planning models, forecast growth and drive scaling actions (horizontal/vertical, cloud‑burst, auto‑scaling).


 Security \& Compliance
   

  

* Ensure the platform complies with internal BNP security policies.
* Oversee vulnerability scanning, patch management and security incident response.


 Change Control \& Release Oversight
   

  

* Review change requests for operational impact, approve/reject based on risk, and ensure proper rollback plans are in place.


 Architecture \& Documentation
   

  

* Keep the solution architecture diagram up‑to‑date (logical, physical, integration layers). Using standard tool provided by BNP Paribas Cardif (BizDesign)
* Document run‑time configurations, dependencies, data flows and disaster‑recovery procedures.


 Continuous Improvement
   

  

* Identify automation opportunities (IaC, CI/CD pipelines for operational tasks).
* Drive adoption of SRE/DevOps best practices (service‑level objectives, error‑budget policies).


**Technical**
* Cloud Architecture and all MZR BNP eco\-systems
* Micro‑services, API‑gateway patterns, event‑driven architecture, cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP) or hybrid environments, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* APM tools (Dynatrace, New Relic), logging/metrics stacks, incident‑management platforms (ServiceNow, JIRA)
* APIM Management (Apigee)
* Relational (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra) performance tuning.
* EIS Solution
* Security : entity \& access management, encryption, vulnerability management, security incident response.
* Kafka
* Automation \& IaC


**Specific Qualifications**
 Minimum 7 years of experience.
   

  

**Behavioral Skills**
**Skills Referential (Required knowledge, skills and abilities)**
* Ability to collaborate in an international environment (Europe, Asia, India and LATAM indirectly)


**Soft Skills**
* Strong analytical and problem‑solving abilities
* Proactive and continuous‑improvement orientation
* A good team player with problem\-solving attitude.


**Education Level:** 
 Master Degree or equivalent
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai
   

  

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \& Services for the Group’s commercial \& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\-growing business in Asia\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\-in\-class solutions.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in.

e266e8ef.title: Senior Anaplan Consultant / Solution Architect
e266e8ef.description:
**Job Description**

**About the Company**

We are hiring on behalf of a Software Solutions company headquartered in East Brunswick, NJ. Incorporated in 2003, It provides comprehensive range of solutions in the area of GRC, Technology, Procurement, Healthcare Provider and Oracle to customers across the globe. Combining our unparalleled experience of over a decade in the software industry and global reach, we have grown with extensive capabilities across industry verticals.

**Position Summary**

We are seeking an experienced **Anaplan Consultant / Solution Architect** to partner with business stakeholders and deliver enterprise Connected Planning solutions across Finance, Supply Chain, Sales, Workforce Planning, and Operations.

The ideal candidate combines strong consulting skills with deep Anaplan technical expertise. This role requires engaging with business users to understand planning challenges, define future\-state solutions, assess existing planning platforms, lead migration initiatives, build scalable Anaplan models, and provide executive\-level reporting and analytics.

You will work closely with business leaders, IT teams, data architects, and project managers to deliver high\-quality planning solutions that improve business decision\-making and operational efficiency.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Business Consulting \& Stakeholder Engagement**

* Engage with business users to understand current planning processes and pain points.
* Conduct discovery workshops, requirement gathering sessions, and solution assessments.
* Translate business requirements into scalable Anaplan solution designs.
* Recommend industry best practices and Connected Planning approaches.
* Act as a trusted advisor throughout the project lifecycle.

**Solution Design \& Architecture**

* Design scalable Anaplan solution architectures following DISCO and Planual best practices.
* Define model architecture, data hubs, integrations, security, and governance.
* Recommend reusable design patterns and standardized model structures.
* Collaborate with enterprise architects to align with broader technology strategy.

**Legacy Assessment \& Migration Planning**

* Assess existing planning environments including:
* Microsoft Excel
* SAP BPC
* SAP Analytics Cloud
* Oracle Hyperion
* Oracle EPM
* Workday Adaptive Planning
* IBM Planning Analytics (TM1\)
* Custom Planning Applications
* Prepare migration roadmaps and implementation strategies.
* Define phased migration plans with risk assessments.
* Identify opportunities for process optimization and automation during migration.
* Develop data migration, validation, and reconciliation strategies.

**Anaplan Model Development**

* Build enterprise\-grade Anaplan models from business requirements.
* Develop:
* Lists
* Modules
* Line Items
* Actions
* Processes
* UX Pages
* Dashboards
* Management Reports
* Data Hubs
* Configure workflow and planning scenarios.
* Implement forecasting, budgeting, scenario planning, allocations, and simulations.
* Optimize model performance and workspace utilization.

**Data Integration**

* Design and implement integrations with enterprise systems including:
* SAP S/4HANA
* Oracle ERP
* Workday
* Salesforce
* Snowflake
* Azure Data Factory
* Informatica
* MuleSoft
* Boomi
* REST APIs
* Support automated data loads and scheduled integrations.
* Ensure data quality, consistency, and reconciliation.

**Reporting \& Analytics**

* Develop executive dashboards and management reports.
* Build KPIs, planning metrics, forecasting models, and scenario analysis.
* Create periodic operational, financial, and executive reporting.
* Deliver ad hoc analysis for business leadership.
* Support board\-level reporting requirements.

**Testing \& Deployment**

* Prepare unit, integration, and user acceptance testing plans.
* Coordinate testing with business stakeholders.
* Support deployment using Application Lifecycle Management (ALM).
* Validate migrated models and production readiness.

**Governance \& Documentation**

* Maintain technical and functional documentation.
* Establish model governance standards.
* Prepare solution design documents, process flows, and user guides.
* Ensure compliance with enterprise architecture and security standards.

**User Enablement**

* Conduct user demonstrations and workshops.
* Train business users and model owners.
* Provide hypercare and post\-go\-live support.
* Mentor junior model builders and consultants.

**Continuous Improvement**

* Identify opportunities to improve planning processes.
* Recommend automation and optimization initiatives.
* Evaluate new Anaplan platform capabilities.
* Drive adoption of Connected Planning across business functions.

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Business, or a related discipline.
* 5\+ years of experience implementing enterprise planning solutions.
* 3\+ years of hands\-on Anaplan implementation experience.
* Experience delivering multiple end\-to\-end Anaplan implementations.
* Strong consulting and client\-facing experience.
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Outstanding communication and stakeholder management abilities.

**Technical Skills**

**Anaplan**

* Model Building
* Connected Planning
* Data Hubs
* New UX
* ALM
* Lists
* Modules
* Line Items
* Actions
* Processes
* Formula Optimization
* Model Performance Tuning
* Security
* Workspace Management

**Planning Domains**

* Financial Planning \& Analysis (FP\&A)
* Budgeting
* Forecasting
* Sales Planning
* Supply Chain Planning
* Workforce Planning
* Demand Planning
* Inventory Planning
* S\&OP
* Scenario Planning

**Integration Technologies**

* Anaplan Connect
* CloudWorks
* REST APIs
* ETL Platforms
* SAP Integration
* Oracle Integration
* Azure Data Factory
* Boomi
* MuleSoft
* Informatica

**Reporting**

* Executive Dashboards
* KPI Reporting
* Variance Analysis
* Forecast Reporting
* Operational Reports
* Board Reporting
* Management Information Systems (MIS)

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Anaplan Certified Model Builder (Level 2\)
* Anaplan Solution Architect Certification
* Master Anaplanner (Preferred)
* Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies
* Knowledge of ERP and EPM platforms
* Experience in global enterprise implementations

**Key Competencies**

* Business Consulting
* Solution Design
* Requirements Analysis
* Enterprise Architecture
* Stakeholder Management
* Strategic Thinking
* Process Improvement
* Analytical Problem Solving
* Client Relationship Management
* Communication \& Presentation Skills
* Cross\-functional Collaboration
* Change Management

**Success Measures**

* Deliver scalable, maintainable, and high\-performing Anaplan models.
* Successfully migrate legacy planning solutions with minimal business disruption.
* Improve planning accuracy, forecasting quality, and reporting efficiency.
* Achieve high user adoption through effective stakeholder engagement and training.
* Deliver projects on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives.

e949fa62.title: Solution Engineer (GxP)
e949fa62.description:
VERIXA — by Navira Quality Systems
 



 Governed AI for regulated life sciences
 



 Solution Engineer / Product Lead track — GxP (Hyderabad)
 



 Full\-time · Hyderabad, India (on\-site / customer\-facing) · Early\-team role with ESOP
 



  





 The one\-line version: Be the founder's second\-in\-room: run the demos, map the workflows, and walk Heads of Quality through the evidence — with a defined track to Product Lead as our first design partnerships convert.
 



  





 ABOUT VERIXA
 



  





 Verixa is a governed\-AI workflow platform for regulated life sciences, built by Navira Quality Systems. We apply bounded AI assistance inside regulated quality workflows — deviation investigation, RCA, CAPA, audit preparation — with human review, source traceability, controlled approvals and workflow\-level audit records on every AI\-assisted step. AI can propose; qualified humans determine and approve the regulated decision.
 



  





 The product is built and internally tested, and we are entering paid design\-partner engagements with emerging pharma, biotech and CDMO quality teams — India first, US in parallel. The founder spent 20\+ years in pharma quality — from large biopharma to clinical\-stage biotech — and leads every sale personally. You would be hire \#1 in the Hyderabad market team.
 



  





 THE ROLE
 



  





 Every buyer conversation we have is with a Head of Quality, VP Quality, or QA/CSV leader — people who detect hand\-waving instantly. Your job is to make Verixa concrete in those rooms:
 



  





 • Run the demo. Own the demo environment, demo scripts and scenario data. Show a deviation→RCA→CAPA workflow credibly to people who live it daily.
 



 • Map workflows live. Sit with a customer's QA team, take their SOP/process reality, and map it to a bounded Verixa workflow — scope, roles, review gates, exclusions.
 



 • Walk the evidence. Present AI output provenance, supporting sources, reviewer history, system records and validation\-support documentation — and answer "how would this hold up in an inspection?" without overclaiming.
 



 • Be the founder's second\-in\-room. Join design\-partner meetings, capture what was actually said and agreed, challenge our own optimism, and own same\-day follow\-ups.
 



 • Feed the product. Turn what buyers say into precise input for the product and engineering team — workflow scope, priorities and honest claims. This is where the Product Lead track begins.
 



  





 THE PRODUCT LEAD TRACK
 



  





 This role is deliberately built to grow. Prove the solution\-engineering seat through our first paid design partnerships, and the product\-definition mandate — workflow roadmap, scope decisions, the bridge to our engineering team — formalizes into a Product Lead title. We would rather promote the person who has sat in fifty buyer meetings than hire a product leader who hasn't.
 



  





 WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU
 



  





 • 4–10 years in pharma/biotech quality reality: plant or clinical QA, CSV/CSA, QMS/eQMS implementation, or quality consulting. You can read a deviation SOP and find the pain in it.
 



 • You can demo software. Vendor solution\-engineering, implementation consulting, or having led an eQMS/LIMS rollout from the customer side all count.
 



 • You speak both languages — QA ("root cause, impact assessment, Part 11") and product ("workflow, config, role model") — and translate between them.
 



 • Startup pace, regulatory discipline. You move quickly without compromising evidence, accuracy or claim discipline.
 



 • Claim discipline. Verixa is internally tested and provides validation\-support documentation; each regulated customer remains responsible for validating the system for its intended use within its quality system. If stating that plainly resonates rather than frustrates, you'll fit.
 



 • Based in Hyderabad or ready to relocate.
 



 • Bonus: exposure to AI/ML tools in a regulated context; Annex 11 / Part 11 working knowledge; CDMO or sterile\-manufacturing background; existing Hyderabad pharma network.
 



  





 WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT
 



  





 Not a pure sales quota role (the founder leads sales). Not remote. Not a support desk. It is the most customer\-facing technical seat in the company.
 



  





 WHAT YOU GET
 



  





 • Ground\-floor seat in one of India's largest life\-sciences and pharma hubs, as the market team's first hire — employed by Navira Quality Systems with meaningful early\-employee ESOP.
 



 • Direct daily work with a domain\-expert founder; your fingerprints on the product, the demo and the first reference customers — and a defined Product Lead growth track.
 



 • A front\-row seat to the evolving AI and computerized\-systems regulatory landscape — including draft EU Annex 22, Annex 11 developments, FDA Part 11 expectations and, for medical\-device applications, FDA CSA.
 



 • Compensation: competitive salary \+ ESOP, calibrated to experience.
 



  





 HOW TO APPLY
 



  





 Email vimalv@verixa.ai with subject "Solution Engineer — Hyderabad": your CV/LinkedIn plus 5–10 lines on one quality workflow you know deeply and what breaks in it today. No cover letter needed — that paragraph is the first screen.
 



  





 Verixa product · Navira Quality Systems Pvt Ltd (employer of record). We hire on merit; quality people know evidence beats narrative.

88b33ab6.title: Advanced Specialist, Solutioning
88b33ab6.description:
Job Title: Advanced Specialist, Solutioning (Enterprise)
 



 Location: India (Hybrid)
 



 About Us:
 



 At Pearson, we are dedicated to delivering innovative solutions that empower our enterprise customers to achieve their business goals. We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Strategic Solution Consultant to join our dynamic team and drive success for our clients.
   

  





**Job Description** 
 :
 



 As Advanced Specialist, Solutioning Consultant, you will play a pivotal role in understanding the unique needs of our enterprise customers and providing tailored solutions that align with their strategic objectives. You will collaborate closely with sales, product development, and customer success teams to ensure the successful implementation and adoption of our solutions.
   

  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



  

  
* Engage with enterprise customers to understand their business challenges and objectives.
* Develop and present customized solution proposals that address customer needs and demonstrate the value of our products and services.
* Develop and deliver high\-impact sales presentations, proposals, and solution overviews using PowerPoint and related tools.
* Translate complex product and service offerings into compelling value propositions for customers.
* Lead strategic discussions and workshops with customers to identify opportunities for optimization and innovation.
* Collaborate with internal teams to ensure seamless delivery and implementation of solutions.
* Provide expert guidance and support to customers throughout the solution lifecycle.
* Stay up\-to\-date with industry trends and best practices to continuously enhance our offerings.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders and decision\-makers within customer organizations.
  


  


**Qualifications:** 



  

  
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Information Technology, or a related field (Master's degree preferred).
* Minimum of 7 years of experience in a solution consulting or similar role, with a focus on enterprise customers. EdTech industry experience preferred.
* Proven track record of successfully selling/delivering complex solutions to large organizations.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast\-paced environment.
* Ensure solutions drive measurable business value while meeting company revenue objectives.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
* Deep understanding of enterprise technology landscapes and trends.
* Expertise in developing presentations and proposals using Microsoft PowerPoint, with proficiency in related tools such as Excel, Word, Adobe Creative Suite (for enhanced visuals), and visualization tools like Tableau, Power BI, or Miro being an add on.
  


  


**What We Offer:** 



  

  
* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.
* A collaborative and inclusive work environment.
* The chance to work with cutting\-edge technologies and innovative solutions.
  


  


**Who we are:** 




 At Pearson, our purpose is simple: to help people realize the life they imagine through learning. We believe that every learning opportunity is a chance for a personal breakthrough. We are the world's lifelong learning company. For us, learning isn't just what we do. It's who we are. To learn more: We are Pearson.
 



 Pearson is an Equal Opportunity Employer and a member of E\-Verify. Employment decisions are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, national origin, protected veteran status, disability status or any other group protected by law. We actively seek qualified candidates who are protected veterans and individuals with disabilities as defined under VEVRAA and Section 503 of the Rehabilitation Act.
 



 If you are an individual with a disability and are unable or limited in your ability to use or access our career site as a result of your disability, you may request reasonable accommodations by emailing TalentExperienceGlobalTeam@grp.pearson.com.
