9e9ef059.title: Director - Salesforce Delivery Lead
9e9ef059.description:
\#Hiring \#Director \#Salesforce Delivery \#Hybrid Interested candidates share resume on Azim.baig@Riveron.com or DM Azim Baig
   

  

 Role: Director \- Salesforce Delivery Lead
   

 Exp: 15\+ Years
   

 Loc: Pune
   

 Work Mode: Hybrid
   

 Type: Full time
   

  

 About the Role
   

 Riveron is seeking a Director, Salesforce India Delivery Lead to lead and scale our offshore Salesforce delivery organization. This leadership role is responsible for driving delivery excellence, technical governance, operational maturity, and organizational growth across enterprise Salesforce engagements while partnering with global leadership and client teams.
   

 Qualifications
   

 15\+ years of Salesforce consulting and delivery experience
   

 5\+ years leading offshore or global delivery organizations
   

 Experience delivering multiple enterprise Salesforce programs
   

 Expertise in Salesforce Architecture, Apex, LWC, Flow, integrations, security, and data architecture
   

 Experience across Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, Revenue Cloud, CPQ, and Billing
   

 Strong knowledge of Agile, SDLC, release management, QA, and delivery governance
   

 Experience managing KPIs, forecasting, utilization, financial performance, and operational excellence
   

 Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and people development skills
   

 Key Responsibilities
   

 Own delivery across multiple Salesforce engagements, ensuring quality, predictability, and client satisfaction
   

 Lead delivery planning, governance, risk management, forecasting, and operational performance
   

 Scale offshore teams across Architecture, Development, QA, Functional Consulting, Release Management, and DevOps
   

 Establish delivery standards, reusable assets, governance frameworks, and AI\-enabled delivery practices
   

 Drive technical excellence across architecture, code quality, integrations, security, testing, and deployment
   

 Mentor delivery leaders and build a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning
   

 Standardize Agile delivery, release management, estimation, documentation, and quality processes
   

 Measure delivery performance using KPIs, utilization, forecast accuracy, defect trends, SLA adherence, and client satisfaction
   

 Partner with Sales, PMO, Engagement Leaders, Clients, and Global Delivery teams to ensure seamless execution
   

 Develop innovative delivery capabilities that strengthen Riveron's global Salesforce practice
   

  

  

  

 \#Hiring \#Salesforce \#SalesforceLeadership \#SalesforceCareers \#SalesforceJobs \#DeliveryLeadership \#TechnologyLeadership \#EnterpriseDelivery \#DigitalTransformation \#Consulting \#LeadershipHiring \#TechCareers \#Riveron \#SaleesforcePM \#SalesforceDirector \#PuneJobs \#Salesforcehybrid

2d0c448b.title: Junior Program Manager ( NON IT ROLE)
2d0c448b.description:
Job Title: Junior Program Manager

Company: AAFT Online

Location: Noida SECTOR 5

Work Timings: 9:30am\- 5:30pm

Job Description:

We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic Junior Program Manager to join our team at AAFT Online. As

a Junior Program Manager, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth functioning of our online

learning platform by focusing on learner\-centric tasks. Your responsibilities will include

managing learners, resolving their day\-to\-day queries, facilitating their onboarding process, and

maintaining accurate attendance data.

Key Responsibilities:

 Manage the learner experience on AAFT Online, ensuring high levels of engagement and

satisfaction.

 Facilitate the onboarding process for new learners, providing guidance and support as

they navigate the platform.

 Monitor and track learner attendance, ensuring compliance with program requirements

and deadlines.

 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to address learner concerns and enhance the

overall learning experience.

 Analyze learner feedback and data to identify areas for improvement and implement

solutions accordingly.

 Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in online education to continuously

enhance program effectiveness.

Qualifications:

 Bachelors degree from any relevant field.

 Proven experience in program management, preferably in the Edtech industry.

 Strong understanding of learner\-centric principles and practices.

 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage effectively

with learners and stakeholders.

 Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail.

 Proficiency in learning management systems and related software applications.

 Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast\-paced environment.

* Interested candidates can share their updated resume at simran.p@aaftonline.com

Pay: Up to ₹400,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

* Our budget is upto 3\.5\- 4 LPA maximum for this role, Are you comfortable with this budget?
* Expected CTC?
* Current CTC?
* Notice Period?

Education:

* Bachelor's (Required)

Work Location: In person

f2b085b9.title: Presales Consultant
f2b085b9.description:
**Presales Consultant – DPDP** 




**Compliance \& Consent** 




**Management Solutions** 




**Location:** 
 \[Noida / Hybrid]
 



**Department:** 
 Sales / Presales Engineering
 



**Reports to:** 
 Head of Presales / VP Sales
 



**Experience:** 
 3–8 years (adjust per seniority band)
 



**About the Role** 




 We're looking for a Presales Consultant who can be
 



 the technical and regulatory backbone of our sales
 



 cycle for our DPDP (Digital Personal Data Protection
 



 Act) compliance and Consent Management platform.
 



 You'll sit at the intersection of privacy law, enterprise
 



 software, and consultative selling — translating
 



 complex DPDP Act and DPDP Rules, 2025
 



 requirements into a compelling, credible product
 



 narrative for CXOs, DPOs, legal teams, and IT/security
 



 buyers.
 



 This is a customer\-facing, quota\-influencing role. You
 



 won't carry a number, but your demos, POCs, andtechnical credibility will directly determine whether
 



 deals close.
 



**What You'll Do** 




**Discovery \& Solutioning** 




 Lead technical and regulatory discovery calls to
 



 understand a prospect's data processing
 



 landscape, consent touchpoints, DPO/Significant
 



 Data Fiduciary status, and current compliance
 



 gaps under the DPDP Act.
 



 Map prospect pain points (consent capture,
 



 withdrawal, grievance redressal, DPIAs, breach
 



 notification, cross\-border transfer, data principal
 



 rights requests) to specific product capabilities.
 



 Design and deliver tailored product
 



 demonstrations and proof\-of\-concepts (POCs)
 



 that show, not tell, how the platform
 



 operationalizes DPDP compliance.
 



**Sales Cycle Support** 




 Partner with Account Executives as the technical
 



 co\-pilot through the full sales cycle — from first
 



 call to contract signature.
 



 Own responses to RFPs/RFIs/security
 



 questionnaires, working with legal, product, and
 



 engineering to ensure accuracy and speed.Build and deliver business cases / ROI narratives
 



 that connect compliance risk (penalties up to
 



 ₹250 crore under the DPDP Act) to platform value.
 



 Support contractual and commercial
 



 conversations alongside sales and legal,
 



 particularly around data processing terms and
 



 SLAs.
 



**Trusted Advisor \& Industry Voice** 




 Stay current on DPDP Act, DPDP Rules 2025,
 



 Consent Manager registration requirements,
 



 MeitY guidance, and Data Protection Board
 



 developments — and translate regulatory shifts
 



 into talk tracks for the sales team.
 



 Act as a credible voice in client conversations on
 



 broader privacy frameworks (GDPR, CCPA/CPRA)
 



 for multinational prospects, drawing comparisons
 



 to DPDP where relevant.
 



 Represent the company at webinars, industry
 



 events, and analyst briefings as a subject\-matter
 



 expert.
 



**Internal Enablement** 




 Feed competitive intelligence, objection patterns,
 



 and win/loss insights back to product and
 



 marketing.
 



 Build reusable demo scripts, POC templates, and
 



 battlecards to scale the presales function.Mentor or enable junior presales/sales hires on
 



 the regulatory and technical fundamentals.
 



**What You Bring** 




 3–8 years in presales, solutions consulting, or
 



 technical sales — ideally in privacy tech, GRC,
 



 SaaS security, or compliance software (OneTrust,
 



 Securiti, TrustArc, BigID, Osano, or similar
 



 backgrounds are a strong plus).
 



 Working knowledge of the DPDP Act 2023 and
 



 DPDP Rules 2025 — consent architecture, Data
 



 Principal rights, Significant Data Fiduciary
 



 obligations, Consent Manager framework, breach
 



 notification timelines. Exposure to GDPR/CCPA is
 



 a bonus, not a substitute.
 



 Demonstrated ability to run technical demos and
 



 POCs for enterprise buyers (legal, IT, security, and
 



 business stakeholders simultaneously).
 



 Comfort owning RFP/RFI/security questionnaire
 



 responses under deadline pressure.
 



 Strong consultative communication — able to flex
 



 between a DPO's legal lens and a CTO's
 



 architecture lens in the same room.
 



 Privacy or compliance certification a plus: CIPP/E,
 



 CIPM, DCPP, ISO 27701, or equivalent.
 



 Bachelor's degree in law, technology, business, or
 



 related field; advanced degree or legal background a plus but not required.
 



**What Success Looks Like (First 6–12** 




**Months)** 




 Ramped on product, DPDP regulatory framework,
 



 and competitive landscape within 60–90 days.
 



 Running discovery calls and demos independently
 



 within the first quarter.
 



 Recognized internally as the go\-to voice on "what
 



 does DPDP actually require" — not just product
 



 features.
 



 Directly contributing to pipeline velocity: shorter
 



 sales cycles, higher demo\-to\-POC conversion,
 



 fewer technical stalls in deals.

ad00944f.title: Presales Consultant
ad00944f.description:
**Position:** 
 Pre\-sales Consultant
 



**Location:** 
 Jaipur, Rajasthan
 



**Job Type:** 
 Full Time
 



  





**About Company:** 
 Axestrack is India's leading provider of Digital Logistics Solutions for Heavy Commercial Vehicles, and the only Indian company to be ever featured in Gartner's Market Guide for Fleet Management. We are proud to hold a dominant position in the Indian market and are actively expanding across Africa, the Middle East, and the US. Our innovative approach and scalable platforms are transforming logistics for the modern world.
 



  





**Position Overview:** 
 At Axestrack, we don't believe in "throwing it over the fence." We are looking for a Presales Consultant who will own the customer journey from the first technical discovery call to the final "Go\-Live" moment. You will be the primary technical authority, ensuring that the visionary solutions promised during the pre\-sales phase are seamlessly integrated into the client’s operational DNA.
 



**Core Responsibilities** 




**Phase** 
 1:
 **Pre\-Sales \& Strategy (The Architect)** 
 · · ·
 



**Solution Design:** 
 Partner with Sales to lead technical discovery and design bespoke IoT/Logistics workflows.
 



**RFP Ownership:** 
 Lead the technical response for RFIs and RFPs, ensuring Axestrack’s USPs are highlighted, and all technical requirements are addressed.
 



**Custom Demonstrations:** 
 Build and present customised product environments that mirror the prospect's specific use cases.
 



**Phase 2: Implementation \& Delivery (The Builder)** 
 · · · ·
 



**End\-to\-End Deployment:** 
 Lead the technical onboarding of new enterprise clients, ensuring hardware (IoT/Sensors) and software (SaaS platforms) are configured to the client’s specifications.
 



**Integration Management:** 
 Oversee API integrations between Axestrack and the client’s existing ERP/TMS (e.g., SAP, Oracle).
 



**UAT \& Training:** 
 Conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and lead "Train the Trainer" sessions to ensure high user adoption.
 



**Project Governance:** 
 Manage timelines, identify implementation risks, and navigate technical roadblocks to ensure projects are delivered on schedule.
 



  





**Candidate Profile:** 




**Experience** 




 4–7 years in a hybrid Pre\-Sales/Implementation role within the SaaS or Supply Chain domain.
 



**Project Management** 




 Proficiency in project management tools (Jira, Asana, or Monday.com) and a "get\-it\-done" attitude.
 



**Technical Breadth** 




 Strong grasp of API protocols (REST/SOAP), database logic, and IoT hardware troubleshooting. Consultative DNA The ability to manage difficult client expectations during the "messy middle" of an implementation.
 



  





**Education** 




 B.Tech/B.E. or MBA with a strong technical background.
 



**The "Full\-Cycle" Advantage** 
 · · ·
 



**Continuity:** 
 You eliminate the "sales\-to\-service" gap, becoming the trusted advisor for the client from day one.
 



**Product Influence:** 
 Because you see the implementation struggles first hand, you have the highest authority to influence the Product Roadmap.
 



**Total Ownership:** 
 You get the satisfaction of seeing your proposed solutions move from a slide deck to a functional, value\-generating reality.

923fe1c0.title: Senior Presales Consultant
923fe1c0.description:
**Role Summary**




  





 We are looking for an experienced Azure Presales Consultant to join our team in Chennai. The ideal candidate will work closely with sales, delivery, and partner teams to design and present compelling cloud solutions for prospective clients. This role requires a strong blend of technical expertise in Microsoft Azure and consultative selling skills, with the ability to lead client engagements from opportunity qualification through to solution sign\-off.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:**




  





**Client Engagement \& Solution Design** 



* Engage with prospective clients to understand business challenges and translate them into Azure based cloud solutions.
* Design and present solution architectures for Azure IaaS, PaaS, and hybrid cloud environments
* Prepare Azure TCO analyses, sizing estimates, and pricing proposals using Azure Calculator and related tools
* Develop technical proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and Statements of Work (SOW)
* Conduct product demonstrations, technical workshops, and proof\-of\-concept (PoC) engagements
* Collaborate with sales teams to qualify opportunities and build a strong technical pipeline
* Support landing zone design, migration planning, and managed services scoping
* Stay current with Azure service updates, certifications, and competitive positioning
* Engage with Microsoft partner teams and participate in co\-sell motions
* Provide inputs for go\-to\-market strategies and service offerings



  





**Required Qualifications: Experience \& Education**




  




* Experience: 5–8 years in IT, with at least 3 years in a cloud presales or solution architect role focused on Microsoft Azure
* Education: Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Information Technology.



  





**Technical Skills**




  




* **Ability to design Azure architecture and should have worked on the Hub \& Spoke Model**
* **Experience handling a minimum of two large\-scale migration solution**
* Strong knowledge of Azure core services: Compute: Virtual Machines, VMSS, Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD), App Services, Azure Batch
* Networking: VNet, ExpressRoute, Front Door, Application Gateway, Azure Firewall, Traffic Manager,
* Private Link, DNS Zones, VPN Gateway (S2S/P2S)
* Storage: Blob Storage, Azure Files, Azure NetApp Files, Managed Disks, Data Lake Storage Gen2
* Databases: Azure SQL (Managed Instance \& Single DB), Cosmos DB, PostgreSQL Flexible Server, Azure Database for MySQL, Azure Cache for Redis
* Security: Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Key Vault, Azure DDoS Protection, Network Security Groups,
* Azure Policy, Microsoft Sentinel: Identity: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Conditional Access, Privileged Identity Management (PIM),
* RBAC, Multi\-Factor Authentication:Monitoring \& Observability: Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights, Network Watcher,
* Azure Alerts, Workbooks \& Dashboards:Hands\-on experience with Azure Landing Zones (CAF\-aligned), Azure Migrate, Azure Arc, and Azure
* Governance (Policy, Blueprints, Management Groups):Proficiency in Infrastructure\-as\-Code (IaC) tools – Terraform, Bicep, ARM Templates
* Experience with Azure DevOps (CI/CD Pipelines, Repos, Boards, Artifacts), GitHub Actions, and
* containerization using AKS and Azure Container Apps Familiarity with serverless architectures – Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Event Grid, Service Bus, and API
* Management (APIM)
* Hands\-on experience with Azure Cost Management, Azure Advisor, Azure Reservations, Savings Plans, and Azure Pricing Calculator for TCO/ROI analysis
* Understanding of hybrid cloud architectures using Azure Stack HCI, Azure Arc\-enabled servers, and
* ExpressRoute/VPN configurations



  





**Certifications (Required – at least one)**




 Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ\-305\)
 



 Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ\-104\)
 



  





**Preferred Qualifications**




  




* Experience with Azure Managed Services scoping and SLA frameworks
* Knowledge of Azure security and compliance (Azure Security Center, Defender, Sentinel)
* Exposure to SAP on Azure or enterprise application workloads
* Familiarity with AWS or multi\-cloud environments
* Prior experience in a cloud consulting or professional services company
* Additional certifications: AZ\-500 (Security), AZ\-700 (Networking), SC\-100 (Cybersecurity Architect), or FinOps Certified Practitioner

8d8db7f2.title: Solution Consultant
8d8db7f2.description:
Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers \- amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life\-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility \- our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.


We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!


Job Description


**Job Description**

Solution Consultant


Hyderabad


You will support sales at main customer pursuits by providing specific solution expertise in a defined geographical area. The Solution Consultant is the solution expert for the sales organisation by assisting with delivering outcome\-based messaging to customers at executive and management levels. The Solution Consultant has a broad understanding of all related products and delivery offerings from RA, partners and competitors in the designated solution area.


You will report to the Consultant Leader and work onsite in Hyderabad, India.


**Your Responsibilities:**

* Be the focal point in the defined geography for the solution(s), of which you have been designated as an expert.
* Participate in account planning and sales strategy focusing on new customer acquisition and existing customer expansion.
* Facilitate and provide training to the sales team on the values and outcomes of specific solution(s).
* Co\-operate with the sales team in promoting the solution to all customers with presentations and demonstrations.
* Advise Technology Consultants and sales on proposal generation and validation.
* Assist sales at proposal presentations for executive level customers
* Define and articulate differentiators and values versus competition for the solution. Analyse products, have knowledge of competitor's strategy, further define competitive differentiators.
* Translate competitive solutions into a RA solution that meets customer's expectations.
* Seek out and participate in training opportunities to develop technical skills.
* Provide product gap and development feedback for the solution to appropriate organisations.
* Share insights with peers.
* Focus on opportunities that support Rockwell Automation's strategy.
* Understand business models, organisation, and go\-to\-market strategy.
* Knowledge of industry strategies, familiarity with outcome\-based selling.
* Share industry knowledge of customers based on their important causes at the appropriate role level with all customers
* Keep sales and customer relationship management data up to date in local agreed upon tools such as SFA, optimising by using these tools.

**The Essentials \- You Will Have:**

* Bachelor's degree in an engineering/technical related field or equivalent experience.
* Value of larger Rockwell Automation application value, without the need to demonstrate individual products with hands\-on demonstrations
* Solution and application expertise, and related demonstrated sales experience.
* Fluency in native language and command of English (written and spoken).
* Work with and gain confidence of senior level personnel (internal and external) in a collaborative, matrixed organisation.
* Align and influence critical stakeholders.
* Support customer centricity. Understand the importance of demonstrating concern for satisfying customers. Passionate about developing goals to improve our customer experience.
* Set, be accountable for and achieve challenging targets.
* empower, coach and motivate others.
* Communication style and messaging to different audiences.

**The Preferred \- You Might Also Have:**

* Proficiency in hands\-on engineering
* High level of expertise in Continuous and Batch Process Control which shall include knowledge of multiple ISA standards, practical experience designing and deploying control and electrical systems and solutions, High level of Application Knowledge.
* Practical knowledge of process unit operations and typical automation requirements of such process units
* Experience of the Process industry goals.
* Intermediate level of expertise in MES/Information Solutions, Networks and Services and Solutions, with a basic understanding of automation and electrical devices.
* Intermediate level of Industry Knowledge and Selling Skills.

**What We Offer:**

Our benefits package includes …


* Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
* Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
* Company volunteer and donation matching program – Your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity can be matched with a charitable donation.
* Employee Assistance Program
* Personalized wellbeing programs through our OnTrack program
* On\-demand digital course library for professional development

... and other local benefits!

e9c725b8.title: Oracle Cloud EPM Lead consultant
e9c725b8.description:
Hyderabad, Telangana
  
Job Summary
  
  

The Lead Consultant for Oracle Hyperion will be responsible for managing and administering and upgrading the Hyperion version for the organization. This role involves overseeing the implementation, configuration, and maintenance of the Oracle Hyperion, ensuring its alignment with business objectives and requirements.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Assess current Hyperion versions, database compatibility, and hardware capacity (DB \& Windows).
  
Validate DEV, TEST, and PROD environments and perform prerequisite checks for installation.
  
Install and configure Hyperion 11\.2\+ across distributed environments.
  
Migrate Hyperion schemas by importing backups into new databases.
  
Reconfigure Hyperion 11\.2\+ in DEV, QA, and PROD using migrated schemas.
  
Apply patches and upgrades (11\.2\.14 11\.2\.15 11\.2\.23\) for HFM, Foundation, Essbase, and FDMEE.
  
Configure MSAD/LDAP, integrations (FDMEE), load balancer, and LCM (exports/imports with access validation).
  
Perform data validation, troubleshooting, sanity checks, version verification, and maintain documentation (runbooks, configs, guides).
  
Configure SSL in Hyperion and ODI environments
  
Skill Requirements
  
  

1\. Proficiency in Oracle Hyperion and its modules, including but not limited to administration, management, patching.
  
  

2\. Experience in implementing and supporting Oracle Hyperion solutions in an enterprise environment.
  
  

3\. Strong analytical skills to interpret complex financial data and trends within the Oracle Hyperion platform.
  
  

4\. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate with cross functional teams and stakeholders.
  
  

5\. Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to Oracle Hyperion.
  
  

6\. Certification or training in Oracle Hyperion administration is preferred.
  
  

Other Requirements
  
  

Certification or training in Oracle Hyperion administration, Oracle Essbase, ODI

51dde5f7.title: Solutions Architect
51dde5f7.description:
Job Title: Junior Architect
 



 About the Role
 



  





 We are seeking a Junior Architect to join our team and contribute to the design, documentation, and evolution of software architecture across our product ecosystem. You will work closely with senior leadership to model system architectures using the C4 model and Structurizr, while collaborating with engineering teams across a polyglot tech stack including Node.js, Python, .NET, and React.js on Azure.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Create and maintain architecture diagrams across all four C4 levels — Context, Container, Component, and Code — using Structurer DSL.
 



 Support the design of distributed systems built on Node.js, Python, .NET, and React.js, ensuring scalability and consistency.
 



 Assist in architecting and reviewing Azure\-based solutions involving Azure Functions, Service Bus, App Services, SQL, Blob Storage, and Durable Functions.
 



 Collaborate with engineering teams to evaluate technology choices, define service boundaries, and establish integration patterns.
 



 Contribute to CI/CD pipeline design and DevOps practices, including infrastructure as code, automated testing, and deployment workflows.
 



 Prepare and maintain Architecture Decision Records (ADRs), ensuring alignment between documentation and implementation.
 



 Participate in design and code reviews from an architectural perspective.
 



 Research architectural patterns, cloud services, and emerging technologies to support informed design decisions.
 



 Document integration flows, event\-driven architectures, and multi\-tenant system designs.
 



 Qualifications
 



 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
 



 6\+ years of experience in software development or architecture.
 



 Working knowledge of Node.js and Python for backend development.
 



 Familiarity with .NET (C\#) (Mandatory) for enterprise applications.
 



 Experience with React.js for frontend development.
 



 Understanding of Azure services, especially Azure Functions, Service Bus, App Services, and SQL.
 



 Familiarity with the C4 model and Structurizr DSL.
 



 Hands\-on experience with DevOps tools such as Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions, Docker, and infrastructure as code (Terraform, Bicep, or ARM).
 



 Strong problem\-solving, communication, and diagramming skills.
 



 Preferred Qualifications
 



 Experience with Azure Durable Functions and orchestration patterns.
 



 Exposure to event\-driven architectures and message\-based systems.
 



 Familiarity with MongoDB and multi\-tenant system design.
 



 Understanding of API gateway patterns and microservices architecture.
 



 Knowledge of Kubernetes or container orchestration platforms.
 



 Experience with observability tools such as Application Insights, Grafana, or ELK stack.
 



 Azure certifications (AZ\-900, AZ\-204, AZ\-305\) are a plus.
 



 What We Offer
 



 Direct mentorship from senior architecture leadership.
 



 Hands\-on exposure to complex distributed systems.
 



 Opportunities to contribute to architectural standards and technical strategy.
 



 Competitive compensation and benefits.

15df3cfa.title: AWS Solutions Architect
15df3cfa.description:
**Job Summary:**




  





 As an AWS Solution Architect, your primary responsibility will be to design and deploy secure, scalable, and highly available AWS cloud\-based solutions for clients. You will work closely with clients, understanding their business requirements, and architecting cost\-effective and efficient solutions that align with their goals. You will also collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including developers, engineers, and project managers, to ensure successful implementation and delivery of AWS solutions.
 



  





**Responsibilities:**




  





 · Design and architect AWS cloud\-based solutions that meet client requirements, ensuring scalability, reliability, security, and performance.
 



 · Collaborate with clients to understand their business needs and translate them into technical requirements and solution designs.
 



 · Assess existing infrastructure and systems, identify opportunities for migration or adoption of AWS services, and create migration plans.
 



 · Develop highly available and fault\-tolerant architecture patterns using AWS services such as EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, and others.
 



 · Create technical documentation including solution architecture diagrams, design documents, and deployment guides.
 



 · Conduct code reviews and provide technical guidance to development teams to ensure adherence to AWS best practices and standards.
 



 · Implement and configure AWS services, infrastructure automation, and orchestration using tools like AWS Cloud Formation, Terraform, or Ansible.
 



 · Monitor and optimize AWS resources and services, identifying opportunities for cost optimization and performance improvements.
 



 · Collaborate with operations teams to ensure smooth deployment and ongoing management of AWS solutions.
 



 · Stay up\-to\-date with the latest AWS technologies, services, and best practices, sharing knowledge and insights with the team and clients.
 



  





**Requirements:**




  





 · Proven experience as an AWS Solution Architect or similar role, designing and implementing AWS cloud\-based solutions.
 



 · Strong understanding of AWS services and experience with core services like EC2, S3, VPC, RDS, Route 53, Lambda, and CloudFront.
 



 · Hands\-on experience with infrastructure automation and provisioning tools such as AWS CloudFormation, Terraform, or Ansible.
 



 · Proficient in scripting languages such as Python, PowerShell, or Bash.
 



 · Familiarity with containerization technologies like Docker and orchestrators like Kubernetes.
 



 · Strong knowledge of network and security concepts within AWS, including IAM, Security Groups, VPC peering, and VPN.
 



 · Experience working in an Agile/Scrum environment and collaborating with cross\-functional teams.
 



 · Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills, with the ability to present complex technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
 



  





 · AWS certifications, such as AWS Certified Solutions Architect \- Associate or Professional.

9f4feba8.title: Solutions Architect, Data Center MEP
9f4feba8.description:
Job Requisition ID
   

  

 JR2021050
   

  

 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Time Type
   

  

 Full time
   

  

 We are currently seeking a Senior MEP / Datacenter Infrastructure Engineer to join our SA team. At NVIDIA, we are leading the AI computing revolution, delivering deep learning and high‑performance computing solutions that power many of the world’s largest and fastest data centers and supercomputers. As a member of our team, you will play a vital role in planning, designing, and deploying AI/HPC data center infrastructure with a strong focus on power, cooling, and telemetry/control systems. If you have a strong passion for mission‑critical facilities, data center MEP design, and a successful history of engaging with customers and partners on complex infrastructure deployments, this is an excellent opportunity to make a substantial contribution.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Lead end‑to‑end planning and deployment of AI/HPC data centers, from concept and reference design through construction, commissioning, and go‑live, ensuring infrastructure aligns with NVIDIA reference architectures and operational requirements.
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to understand NVIDIA’s guidance for data center infrastructure, including power distribution, liquid/air cooling, controls and monitoring, and network/cabling architecture, and translate this rapidly into robust, scalable customer designs.
* Review and evaluate customer and partner design packages (architectural, electrical, mechanical, controls), ensuring consistency with NVIDIA reference architectures, industry standards, and regulatory requirements, and provide recommendations to improve performance, scalability, cost‑effectiveness, and sustainability.
* Develop and implement comprehensive pre‑deployment audit plans to assess the readiness, reliability, and efficiency of data center infrastructure components prior to AI/HPC cluster deployment, identifying risks and mitigation actions early.
* Oversee construction, integration, and bring‑up activities, working closely with contractors, OEMs, service providers, and customers to resolve infrastructure issues and ensure on‑time, high‑quality delivery.
* Establish and drive quality assurance and commissioning processes for power systems, liquid/air cooling systems, rack/server power and cooling integration, telemetry, and control systems to validate functionality and performance against design specifications and benchmarks.
* Act as the key liaison and domain expert for customers and partners on all data center infrastructure topics, facilitating productive technical discussions and ensuring clear alignment from planning through steady‑state operations.
* Develop and sustain a strong ecosystem of design firms, contractors, integrators, and service providers to enable rapid, reliable deployment of NVIDIA solutions globally.
* Mentor and guide Infra SA team members and partner engineering teams, sharing best practices in MEP design, data center operations, and deployment methodologies to ensure overall program success.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across infrastructure design and processes, identifying opportunities to increase reliability, resilience, efficiency, and automation in AI/HPC data centers.


**What We Need To See**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field; an advanced degree, equivalent experience, or relevant certifications is preferred.
* 8\+ years of overall experience in enterprise and/or hyperscale data centers with a focus on MEP design, construction, and deployment for high‑density AI/HPC or mission‑critical environments.
* Proven experience in data center engineering, operations, or infrastructure management roles, with responsibility for large‑scale deployments and cross‑functional coordination.
* Strong technical knowledge of data center systems, including power distribution (UPS, switchgear, PDUs, rack power), liquid/air cooling (chillers, CDU, CRAH/CRAC, direct‑to‑chip or immersion), rack/server mechanical and power integration, and structured cabling for high‑density deployments.
* Demonstrated technical and project leadership in fluid, rapidly changing environments, with the ability to drive complex programs from design through commissioning and hand‑off.
* Excellent analytical and problem‑solving skills, with a keen attention to detail and a strong commitment to quality and operational excellence.
* Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage expertly with diverse stakeholders including customers, partners, contractors, and internal engineering teams, and to lead productive technical discussions.
* Strong organization and time‑management capabilities, able to plan, schedule, and coordinate multiple infrastructure projects and tasks to meet or exceed agreed timelines.
* Willingness to travel up to customer sites, partner facilities, and NVIDIA data center locations as required.


 Relevant certifications
   

  

* BICSI
* CNCDP
* FOA Data Center – CFOS/DC (Certified Fiber Optics Specialist, Datacenter)


**Ways to stand out from the crowd**
* Experience with data center operations processes, safety practices, and security measures in enterprise or hyperscale environments.
* Solid understanding of the full data center infrastructure stack, from building shell and core through power, cooling, racks, cabling, and monitoring/controls for AI/HPC platforms.
* Background working closely with server and rack manufacturers, integrators, and colocation providers on high‑density deployments.
* Outstanding interpersonal skills, with a track record of building long‑term relationships with customers, partners, and internal stakeholders and serving as a trusted technical advisor.

2dcc70a0.title: Sr Technical Lead-Cloud & Infra Engg
2dcc70a0.description:
Country/Region: IN
Requisition ID: 37726
Work Model:
Position Type:
Salary Range:
Location: INDIA \- NOIDA\- BIRLASOFT OFFICE
**Title:** **Sr Technical Lead\-Cloud \& Infra Engg**
=====================================================

Description:
**Area(s) of responsibility**
-----------------------------



Job Title: Senior Microsoft 365 Migration Engineer



Experience: 8–10 Years



Job Summary



We are seeking an experienced Microsoft 365 Migration Engineer with strong expertise in Tenant\-to\-Tenant (T2T) migrations, Exchange Hybrid deployments, and end\-to\-end migration of all M365 workloads. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on experience with migration tools such as Quest On Demand Migration / Migration Manager and BitTitan MigrationWiz, and a deep understanding of enterprise identity, messaging, and collaboration platforms.



Key Responsibilities


* Lead and execute Microsoft 365 Tenant\-to\-Tenant migrations across multiple workloads
* Plan and implement Exchange Hybrid (On\-Premises \+ Exchange Online) environments
* Migrate workloads including:
* + Exchange Online (Mailboxes, Public Folders, Archives)
	+ OneDrive for Business
	+ SharePoint Online (Sites, Document Libraries)
	+ Microsoft Teams (Chats, Channels, Permissions)
	+ Power Platform (PowerApps, Power Automate, Power BI) – Optional
* Perform assessment, discovery, and migration planning activities
* Design and implement identity solutions (Azure AD / Entra ID, Azure AD Connect, SSO)
* Execute migrations using:
* + Quest (On Demand Migration / Migration Manager)
	+ BitTitan MigrationWiz
* Manage mail flow, coexistence, and cutover strategies
* Handle user/device identity mapping, permissions, and access controls
* Perform post\-migration validation, troubleshooting, and hypercare support
* Ensure security, compliance, and governance during migration
* Prepare technical documentation, runbooks, and reports
* Coordinate with stakeholders, vendors, and business teams


**Required Skills \& Expertise:**


* Strong experience in M365 Tenant\-to\-Tenant migrations
* Hands\-on expertise in Exchange Hybrid configuration and troubleshooting
* Deep knowledge of:
* + Exchange Online \& Exchange Server
	+ SharePoint Online \& OneDrive
	+ Microsoft Teams
	+ Power Platform (PowerApps, Power Automate, Power BI) Optional
* Experience with migration tools:
* + Quest On Demand Migration / Migration Manager
	+ BitTitan MigrationWiz
* Good understanding of:
* + Azure AD / Entra ID, Azure AD Connect
	+ Identity lifecycle and access management
	+ DNS, mail routing, SPF/DKIM/DMARC
* Strong troubleshooting and scripting skills (PowerShell preferred)

  



Preferred Qualifications


* Microsoft certifications (e.g., M365, Azure, Messaging)
* Experience in large\-scale enterprise migrations (1000\+ users)
* Knowledge of compliance and security standards
* Experience in multi\-tenant or multi\-geo environments

  



Soft Skills


* Strong communication and stakeholder management
* Ability to work in fast\-paced migration projects
* Problem\-solving and analytical thinking
* Documentation and presentation skills

  



Nice to Have


* Experience with Intune / Endpoint Manager
* Knowledge of Active Directory migrations (Quest, ADMT)
* Automation using PowerShell

bd235cbe.title: Lead - Solution Engineer
bd235cbe.description:
**Company Description**  

Organizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of “solutions” that promise to simplify their lives. To create a better experience for their customers and employees. To help them grow. Software is a choice that can make or break a business. Create better or worse experiences. Propel or throttle growth. Business software has become a blocker instead of ways to get work done.  

  

**There’s another option. Freshworks. With a fresh vision for how the world works.**  

  

At Freshworks, we build uncomplicated service software that delivers exceptional customer and employee experiences. Our enterprise\-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people\-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S\&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks’ customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world.  

  

***Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.***

 **Job Description**  

We are looking for a passionate and technically skilled **Solution Engineer** to be part of our SMBC Sales Support team for Freshservice. You will be instrumental in solving complex customer problems, designing tailored solutions — including AI\-driven use cases built on Freddy AI and Agent Studio — and delivering impactful demonstrations of the Freshworks platform. This role suits individuals with strong pre\-sales experience who thrive on customer interaction, solutioning, and collaborating with internal teams to drive business outcomes, and who are genuinely curious about applying AI to real customer problems rather than just talking about it.

**Pre\-Sales Engagement \& Customer Solutions:**

* Engage with SMB, mid\-market customers to understand their business and technical challenges.
* Conduct discovery sessions, architect solutions, and deliver tailored product demonstrations and Proofs of Concept (POCs).
* Address technical objections and ensure alignment with customer needs.

**AI Solutioning \& Positioning:**

* Understand and clearly explain core AI/LLM concepts (prompting, agents, model context/tooling) to both technical and business audiences without over\-selling or over\-simplifying.
* Position Freddy AI Copilot, Freddy AI Agent, and Agent Studio within customer discovery, tying AI capabilities to concrete outcomes (ticket deflection, resolution time, agent productivity) rather than generic AI messaging.
* Build and configure simple AI agents and automated workflows in Agent Studio (or comparable agent\-builder tools) to bring AI use cases to life in demos and POCs.
* Field technical AI questions on integration, data handling, and governance, looping in specialists for deeper architecture discussions when needed.

**Solution Design \& Documentation:**

* Participate in gathering requirements and scoping complex engagements.
* Create technical documentation including solution proposals, SoWs, and RFP/RFI responses.
* Evaluate opportunities from a technical feasibility standpoint and proactively mitigate risks.

**Collaboration \& Execution:**

* Collaborate closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Implementation teams.
* Align technical strategies with sales initiatives to accelerate deal closures.
* Continuously improve pre\-sales tools, processes, and enablement assets.

**Customer Advocacy \& Product Evangelism:**

* Articulate the value and capabilities of the Freshworks platform to both technical and business audiences.
* Represent Freshworks at customer meetings, events, and forums as a trusted technical advisor.
* Keep abreast of product developments and industry trends to provide relevant, up\-to\-date guidance.

  

**Qualifications**  

* **5–8 years** of experience in pre\-sales/solution engineering, technical consulting, or a similar customer\-facing technical role.
* Strong background in SaaS, cloud technologies, APIs, and enterprise software environments.
* Proven experience designing and delivering technical demonstrations and POCs.
* Ability to work with mid\-market and enterprise customers, understand their pain points, and craft effective solutions.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* Familiarity with ITSM products and market is a must.
* Solid conceptual understanding of AI/LLM technology — prompting, RAG, agentic workflows, and how AI features are typically integrated into SaaS products; hands\-on experience configuring or building AI agents/copilots (e.g., Agent Studio, similar low\-code agent builders, or LLM APIs) is strongly preferred.
* Ability to credibly position and sell AI value to both business and technical stakeholders, including addressing common AI concerns (accuracy, data privacy, change management).
* This is a Night Shift role only, prior North America Market experience is a must

**Key Skills:**

* Pre\-sales consulting \& technical storytelling
* Solution architecture \& demo delivery
* API, integrations, SaaS product understanding
* Discovery, qualification \& objection handling
* RFP/RFI response and technical documentation
* Stakeholder collaboration (Sales/Product/Engineering)
* Strong communication \& relationship\-building
* AI/LLM concepts (prompting, RAG, agentic workflows) \& positioning
* Hands\-on AI agent/copilot building (Agent Studio or equivalent)

  

**Additional Information**  

At Freshworks, we have fostered an environment that enables everyone to find their true potential, purpose, and passion, welcoming colleagues of all backgrounds, genders, sexual orientations, religions, and ethnicities. We are committed to providing equal opportunity and believe that diversity in the workplace creates a more vibrant, richer environment that boosts the goals of our employees, communities, and business. **Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.**

5330afa8.title: Presales Engineer
5330afa8.description:
**Key Responsibilities** 



1. Deliver end\-to\-end pre\-sales technical support for SEUIC’s AIDC product lines in the local market.
2. Conduct product demonstrations, solution presentations and technical workshops for local prospects and enterprise clients.
3. Collaborate with the local sales team to match and recommend the most suitable SEUIC hardware products (PDA, industrial tablet, RFID devices) based on client’s on\-site usage scenarios and functional requirements.
4. Respond to technical inquiries, prepare pre\-sales documents including technical proposals, solution briefs and quotation supporting materials.
5. Participate in local industry events, partner meetings and product promotion activities to showcase SEUIC’s technical advantages.
6. Collect local market technical demands, competitor product information and feed back optimization suggestions to SEUIC’s global R\&D and product team.



**Qualifications** 



1. Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Electronic Engineering, Automation or related technical fields.
2. 2\+ years of pre\-sales experience in AIDC, industrial mobile devices, RFID or related enterprise IT industries.
3. Solid technical knowledge of PDA, industrial tablets, RFID hardware and typical industry application scenarios.
4. Fluent in English (working proficiency) and local languages, with excellent presentation and cross\-team communication skills.
5. Capable of independent remote work, with strong self\-management ability to coordinate multi\-party tasks across different time zones.
6. Prior experience serving local enterprise clients in logistics, manufacturing, retail, or public sectors is a strong plus.

e56d2367.title: Solution Engineer / Product Lead track — GxP (Hyderabad)
e56d2367.description:
**The one\-line version:** 
 Be the founder’s second\-in\-room: run the demos, map the workflows, and walk Heads of Quality through the evidence — with a defined track to Product Lead as our first design partnerships convert.
 



  





**About Verixa** 




 Verixa is a governed\-AI workflow platform for regulated life sciences, built by Navira Quality Systems. We apply bounded AI assistance inside regulated quality workflows — deviation investigation, RCA, CAPA, audit preparation — with human review, source traceability, controlled approvals and workflow\-level audit records on every AI\-assisted step. AI can propose; qualified humans determine and approve the regulated decision.
 



 The product is built and internally tested, and we are entering paid design\-partner engagements with emerging pharma, biotech and CDMO quality teams — India first, US in parallel. The founder spent 20\+ years in pharma quality (Genentech/Roche, BMS, Arcellx, Alumis) and leads every sale personally. You would be hire \#1 in the Hyderabad market team.
 



  





**The role** 




 Every buyer conversation we have is with a Head of Quality, VP Quality, or QA/CSV leader — people who detect hand\-waving instantly. Your job is to make Verixa concrete in those rooms:
 


* **Run the demo.** 
 Own the demo environment, demo scripts and scenario data. Show a deviation→RCA→CAPA workflow credibly to people who live it daily.
* **Map workflows live.** 
 Sit with a customer’s QA team, take their SOP/process reality, and map it to a bounded Verixa workflow — scope, roles, review gates, exclusions.
* **Walk the evidence.** 
 Present AI output provenance, supporting sources, reviewer history, system records and validation\-support documentation — and answer “how would this hold up in an inspection?” without overclaiming.
* **Be the founder’s second\-in\-room.** 
 Join design\-partner meetings, capture what was actually said and agreed, challenge our own optimism, and own same\-day follow\-ups.
* **Feed the product.** 
 Turn what buyers say into precise input for the product and engineering team — workflow scope, priorities and honest claims. This is where the Product Lead track begins.



  





**The Product Lead track** 




 This role is deliberately built to grow. Prove the solution\-engineering seat through our first paid design partnerships, and the product\-definition mandate — workflow roadmap, scope decisions, the bridge to our engineering team — formalizes into a Product Lead title. We would rather promote the person who has sat in fifty buyer meetings than hire a product leader who hasn’t.
 



  





**What we need from you** 



* **4–10 years in pharma/biotech quality reality:** 
 plant or clinical QA, CSV/CSA, QMS/eQMS implementation, or quality consulting. You can read a deviation SOP and find the pain in it.
* **You can demo software.** 
 Vendor solution\-engineering, implementation consulting, or having led an eQMS/LIMS rollout from the customer side all count.
* **You speak both languages —** 
 QA (“root cause, impact assessment, Part 11”) and product (“workflow, config, role model”) — and translate between them.
* **Startup pace, regulatory discipline.** 
 You move quickly without compromising evidence, accuracy or claim discipline.
* **Claim discipline.** 
 Verixa is internally tested and provides validation\-support documentation; each regulated customer remains responsible for validating the system for its intended use within its quality system. If stating that plainly resonates rather than frustrates, you’ll fit.
* Based in Hyderabad or ready to relocate.



*Bonus: exposure to AI/ML tools in a regulated context; Annex 11 / Part 11 working knowledge; CDMO or sterile\-manufacturing background; existing Hyderabad pharma network.* 




  





**What this role is not** 




 Not a pure sales quota role (the founder leads sales). Not remote. Not a support desk. It is the most customer\-facing technical seat in the company.
 



  





**What you get** 



* Ground\-floor seat in one of India’s largest life\-sciences and pharma hubs, as the market team’s first hire — employed by Navira Quality Systems with meaningful early\-employee ESOP.
* Direct daily work with a domain\-expert founder; your fingerprints on the product, the demo and the first reference customers — and a defined Product Lead growth track.
* A front\-row seat to the evolving AI and computerized\-systems regulatory landscape — including draft EU Annex 22, Annex 11 developments, FDA Part 11 expectations and, for medical\-device applications, FDA CSA.



 Compensation: competitive salary \+ ESOP, calibrated to experience.
 



  





**How to apply** 




 Email
 **vimalv@verixa.ai** 
 with subject “Solution Engineer — Hyderabad”: your CV/LinkedIn plus 5–10 lines on
 **one quality workflow you know deeply and what breaks in it today** 
 . No cover letter needed — that paragraph is the first screen.
 



*Verixa product · Navira Quality Systems Pvt Ltd (employer of record). We hire on merit; quality people know evidence beats narrative.*

1f656eb7.title: Presales Engineer
1f656eb7.description:
**Company Description** 
  

  

 D\-Link India Limited is part of a global organization focused on connecting people, businesses, and cities through advanced computer networking solutions and technology. The company delivers innovative products and services tailored for digital homes, small and medium\-sized businesses, enterprises, and service providers. D\-Link provides unified network solutions that integrate Switching, Wireless, Cloud\-Based Network Management, and Structured Cabling. As a recognized leader in the networking domain, D\-Link offers opportunities to work with cutting\-edge infrastructure and diverse customer environments, supported by a dedicated Business Solution team.
   

  

**Role Description**
 This is a full\-time, on\-site Presales Engineer role based in Chennai/Coimbatore/Madurai. The Presales Engineer will collaborate with the sales team to understand customer requirements, design appropriate networking solutions, and prepare technical proposals, bill of materials, and solution architectures. The role involves conducting product demonstrations, presentations, and proof\-of\-concept activities for prospective customers and partners. Daily responsibilities include providing technical guidance on D\-Link’s portfolio (Switching, Wireless, Cloud, and Structured Cabling), responding to RFPs/RFQs, and ensuring solutions are aligned with customer needs and industry best practices. The Presales Engineer will also support post\-sales handover to implementation teams, maintain up\-to\-date product and technology knowledge, and contribute to training sessions and technical documentation.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Candidates should possess strong Presales and Sales skills, including solution consulting, proposal creation, and support for the sales cycle.
* Candidates should possess solid Technical Support skills, with the ability to troubleshoot, resolve technical queries, and assist customers and partners effectively.
* Candidates should possess Integration skills to design and validate end\-to\-end solutions that combine Switching, Wireless, and Structured cabling Solutions.
* Candidates should possess Security\-related skills to address network security considerations and recommend secure architectures and configurations.
* Good understanding of networking technologies (LAN/WAN, routing, switching, Wi\-Fi, VLANs, VPNs) and familiarity with cloud\-based network management platforms.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and documentation skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Ability to work collaboratively with sales, engineering, and partner teams, manage multiple opportunities, and meet timelines.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field; relevant networking certifications (e.g., CCNA, Network\+, vendor\-specific) are an advantage.
* Prior experience in a presales,Networking Engineer, solution engineering, or technical consulting role within networking or IT infrastructure is preferred.

The company’s consultative and design\-thinking approach empowers societies worldwide, enhancing the efficiency and productivity of businesses. As part of the multibillion\-dollar diversified CKA Birla Group, Birlasoft with its 12,000\+ professionals, is committed to continuing the Group’s 170\-year heritage of building sustainable communities.)

Job Overview  

Key Responsibilities:  

Education: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.  

Job Description:  

Power Platform \& AI Architect:  

Job Description  

* 12\+ years of relevant IT experience in solution architecture, Azure services, AI\-led solutions, and Microsoft Power Platform technologies.
* Architect end\-to\-end enterprise solutions leveraging Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, Azure Document Intelligence, Logic Apps, Dataverse, Power Automate, Power Apps, and Power Pages.
