174de9ba.title: Engagement Manager_Strategy
174de9ba.description:
Please share resumes to sapna@recruiseindia.com
 



  




* **Job Description for an Engagement Manager Role**
* Designation: Engagement Manager
* Educational Qualification: Bachelor’s degree (Engineering) from a top\-tier university with an MBA with minimum of eight years of relevant Consulting Experience.








**Job Objective:** 




 As an Engagement Manager you will be closely working with the Management Team for
 **practice development, project delivery in the technology domain, TMT domain, Automotive, Manufacturing, Telecom, Semiconductor and/or other domains** 
 . You will need to work with the project team to provide data\-driven and analysis\-rich deliverables deriving strategic insights as per the client requirements. You are also expected to assist with business development activities and provide thought leadership. Possess subject matter knowledge to lend additional credibility and add value at all stages and levels.
 



**Job Overview:** 




 You would typically be working on multiple projects and responsible for end\-to\-end project delivery. You will be working closely with your project teams to guide them to conduct in\-depth secondary research and primary research, apply analysis techniques and derive interesting and meaningful insights for our clients.
 



 You may be required to travel within India/ overseas (typically emerging markets) for client meetings/primary research.
 



**Primary Responsibilities:** 




**Project Delivery** 



* You would be typically working with other Seniors for Project Delivery and in some cases, deliver projects end to end.
* Manage projects from first contact to final delivery and ensure adherence to scope, timelines, budgets, quality standards, and risk management to ensure customer delight
* Demonstrate in\-depth understanding of the practice area, provide thought leadership internally as well as to clients, including overall guidance, mentoring and supervision to the team
* Coach team with respect to conducting primary and/or secondary research and validate findings of team members
* Review project plans as well as deliverables and validate insights and strategic recommendations by the teams. Ensure the teams are:
* Validating the data obtained, and analysing it to extract insights and identify patterns (qualitative as well as qualitative)
* Identifying trends, patterns and insights and applying them to arrive at solutions/ recommendations
* Over\-manage client communication process (as applicable) including understanding requirements, expectation management and delivering quality outputs.
* Manage research partner relationships (as applicable).



**Business Development and Solutions** 



* Contribute to the business development process, support sales teams in closing deals by participating in client calls and pitching solution
* Design solutions based on client’s requirements; define engagement structure including resource requirements, project travel, effort estimates and proposal pricing strategies
* Develop proof of concept of the solution (if required)



**Practice and Organizational Development** 



* Assist in development and building of the practice team
* Collaborate with senior management in development and enhancement of knowledge nuggets and thought pieces, methodologies and frameworks, website content development, etc. Also build sales collaterals such as whitepapers and capability decks



**People Management** 



* Lead and motivate all resources in the team, help them in coaching and skill sets buildings, including practice specific training and development initiatives.



  





**Required Skills \& Personal Attributes:** 



* **Expertise required in projects dealing with parts of the go\-to\-market (GTM) problems for multiple Indian / Global clients (channel strategy, market sizing / estimation, consumer behaviour etc.)**
* Excellent business writing and verbal communication skills including presentation skills
* Extremely detail\-oriented with high standards for written and visual presentation of information as well as idea
* Excellent research, analytical, and numerical skills
* Ability to develop and articulate strategic recommendations based on rigorous data analysis
* High degree of proficiency in MS Office Suite (PowerPoint, Word, Excel etc.)
* Strong inter\-personal skills, ability to work with teams in a time\-line driven high pressure environment (typical of consulting firms)
* Should be hands\-on with exceptional execution/delivery capabilities
* Process orientation and high level of comfort with usage as well as customization of Technology tools
* The candidate should be able to work on client engagements at CXO as well as lower levels
* Self\-driven with a high level of motivation and energy; a strong ‘can do’ attitude; ability and willingness to work in a small and fast\-growing set\-up
* Ability to pro\-actively identify ways to contribute to firm’s goals \& mission
* International experience will be an added advantage
* Professional appearance as well as manner of speaking

ee54bed6.title: Senior Engagement Manager (Remote)
ee54bed6.description:
Senior Engagement Manager (Remote)
 



  





**Company:** 
 Blue Genes Research (BGR)
 



**Location:** 
 Remote (based in Mumbai or Pune) with in\-person client meetings as needed
 



**Type:** 
 Full\-time, Individual Contributor
 



**Experience:** 
 2–6 years in executive search business development
 



  





**ABOUT BGR\-GLOBAL** 




  





 Blue Genes Research is a global boutique executive search and advisory firm operating across 40\+ countries. For over 20 years, we have delivered retained, exclusive, precision permanent, interim, and fractional executive search solutions, placing 500\+ leaders for clients worldwide. We work at the intersection of precision, discretion, and long\-term partnership.
 



  





 Why BGR?
 


* **Boutique, expert\-led:** 
 a specialized, high\-touch firm where every engagement is led by seasoned experts, not junior handlers.
* **Global footprint:** 
 reach across 40\+ countries through our memberships with NPA Worldwide and IXPA Global, giving clients truly international access.
* **Big\-4 rigour:** 
 precision, globally benchmarked and acclaimed processes backed by dedicated in\-house research.



  





 THE ROLE
 



  





 We are looking for an Engagement Expert to own the full sales cycle for our executive search services across the Mumbai and Pune markets. This is a hunter role for someone who can independently generate leads, build relationships with decision\-makers, and convert opportunities into retained search mandates. You will be the face of BGR in one of India's most important business corridors.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Generate qualified leads independently and build a healthy pipeline of executive search mandates.
* Own the end\-to\-end sales cycle, from prospecting to closing retained and exclusive assignments.
* Build and nurture relationships with founders, CXOs, and HR leaders across target industries.
* Conduct in\-person client meetings in Mumbai and Pune on a need basis.
* Position BGR's full suite of solutions, including permanent, interim, and fractional search.
* Represent BGR's brand and values with credibility and discretion in the market.



  





 Who We're Looking For
 


* 2–6 years of business development experience specifically within executive search or retained recruitment (this is non\-negotiable).
* Proven ability to generate leads and convert them into closed business on your own.
* Strong network or the demonstrated ability to build one quickly among senior decision\-makers.
* Based in or willing to operate primarily out of Mumbai or Pune.
* Self\-driven, comfortable in a remote, autonomous, target\-led environment.



  





 Note: Only candidates from the executive search industry with direct BD experience will be considered.
 



  





 COMPENSATION
 



  




* Fixed monthly salary plus quarterly performance\-linked variable of up to 200% of fixed pay.
* Annual retention bonus equivalent to one month's salary.
* Uncapped earning potential for high performers.

8996b73f.title: Senior Program Manager
8996b73f.description:
**Title:** 
 Senior Programme Manager \- Client Success
 



**Location:** 
 India
 



**Department/Client:** 
 Product Strategy \& Client Success (Technology)
 



**Reporting to:** 
 Chief of Staff
 **(dotted line Product, Success Director)** 




  





 Within Publicis Groupe’s Intelligent Creativity business, we specialize in bringing creative ideas to life, and to consumers. By combining 100 years of craft excellence with 6,000 experts across 52 locations of the world’s biggest studio network, we leverage the industry’s richest data, through the power of agentic AI, to radically redefine content production with Intelligent Content. We intuitively deliver this through Marcel Make, the world’s first Intelligent Content agent. The result? Predictively performing content that unlocks business growth in unprecedented ways. No more guesswork. No more waste.
 



 Just content that works, working a lot harder.
 



 About the role
 



 The
 **Senior Programme Manager (Client Success)** 
 is a senior, client‑facing role responsible for overseeing
 **complex, multi‑stream technology programmes** 
 for Publicis Production’s clients across markets. The role ensures that
 **technology implementation, adoption, and success activities** 
 —including platform rollouts, integrations, training, testing, and adoption support to Product Success Directors (PSDs)—are delivered
 **predictably, transparently, and in line with client expectations** 
 .
 



  





 Operating across
 **multiple client programmes concurrently** 
 , the Senior Programme Manager provides
 **programme‑level governance, structure, and oversight** 
 , supporting Product Success Directors through progress tracking,
 **structured stakeholder communication** 
 ,
 **RAID management** 
 , and executive‑ready reporting. The role is accountable for defining and maintaining
 **programme reporting frameworks** 
 and for
 **analysing programme data** 
 to generate meaningful insight for both internal leadership and client stakeholders.
 



  





 Working closely with
 **workstream and cross‑workstream leads** 
 , including Product Managers, Engineering Leads, Transition, Operations, and Technology Implementation Project Managers, the Senior Programme Manager translates business needs into
 **clear programme plans, milestones, and deliverables** 
 . By connecting
 **people, processes, and platforms** 
 , the role enables effective coordination across multi\-stream programmes and contributes to delivering high\-quality, confidence\-building
 **outcomes for clients** 
 .
 



**Key responsibilities** 



* Own and manage end\-to\-end Client Technology Implementation and Adoption Plan, ensuring clear planning, governance, and execution.
* Define program goals, scope, success metrics, and delivery roadmap in alignment with client objectives.
* Build, manage, and optimise Monday.com boards
* Act as the primary program interface for providing clear communication, status, and risk management for the client account.
* Create and maintain detailed end\-to\-end program plans, including timelines, dependencies, risks, and resource allocations.
* Track progress of ongoing milestones and maintain up\-to\-date status reports.
* Follow up with internal stakeholders to gather required information and documentation.
* Coordinate with Operations Technology Leads and other team members to ensure alignment on project timelines.
* Identify potential delays or blockers and escalate as needed.
* Support the preparation of project dashboards, summaries, and reports for leadership, Internal \& External
* Translate complex requirements into structured plans, milestones, and trackers.
* Ensure programmes are delivered on time, and to agreed quality standards.
* Identify risks, issues, dependencies, and Mitigation, taking action early and pragmatically.
* Support reporting, forecasting, and performance tracking through advanced Excel and Monday.com dashboards (Internal Stakeholder \& Clients)
* Own programme reporting frameworks and data analysis to equip Product Success Directors with accurate, insight‑led reporting for internal governance and client management.



  





  





**Key skills** 




  




* 10\+ Years Proven experience as a Senior Programme Manager / Senior Project Manager in an integrated, production environment.
* Knowledge of Monday.com, with the ability to operate confidently at the enterprise licence level, would be beneficial.
* Advanced Excel skills, including tracking, reporting, and analysis.
* Strong operational mindset with the ability to move easily between detail and big‑picture thinking.
* Highly detail‑oriented, with excellent follow‑through and organisational skills.
* A true self‑starter and do‑er—comfortable rolling up sleeves and driving work forward without heavy oversight.
* Experience working across multiple workstreams, stakeholders, and priorities simultaneously.
* Ambitious, curious, and ready to grow — eager to expand scope and impact.
* Collaborative and strategic confident communicator, able to work across technical, product, transition and operation client teams.
* Calm under pressure, solution‑focused, and delivery‑driven.
* Experience within production, media, creative, or agency environments
* Exposure to supporting enterprise‑level transformation.
* Familiarity with client success models or platform‑driven delivery environments.
* Comfortable working in fast\-paced environments with evolving priorities and ambiguity, and is a Proactive do\-er

5140705f.title: Technical Program Manager — LMS Platform Solutions
5140705f.description:
**Technical Program Manager — LMS Platform Solutions** 




  





**Location:** 
 \[Remote / Hybrid / Office Location]
 



  





**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a Technical Program Manager who can operate at the intersection of client engagement, solution design, and delivery execution. This is a hands\-on, client\-facing role: you will engage prospects and clients during pre\-sales, shape technical solutions, translate them into actionable plans, and work closely with engineering, QA, and DevOps teams to deliver them. You will typically run multiple client engagements in parallel, owning outcomes across a portfolio of projects rather than a single delivery. The primary focus is on enterprise eLearning / LMS platform solutions, but the role extends to any technical integration or platform engagement across our portfolio.
 



 The ideal candidate combines strong project management discipline with genuine technical depth — able to hold their own in architecture discussions, evaluate integration approaches, and speak credibly about AI capabilities and their practical application in client solutions.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Pre\-Sales \& Solutioning** 



* Participate in pre\-sales engagements: discovery calls, technical Q\&A, capability presentations, and client workshops.
* Lead technical discussions with client stakeholders, translating business requirements into solution architectures and delivery approaches.
* Design end\-to\-end solutions for LMS platform implementations, integrations, and customizations in collaboration with solution architects.
* Create, review, and refine proposals, SoWs, effort estimates, and RFP/RFI responses — ensuring technical accuracy, feasibility, and commercial viability.



**Program \& Delivery Management** 



* Manage a portfolio of concurrent client engagements, balancing priorities, timelines, and shared engineering resources across projects.
* Own project planning, scoping, and execution across the delivery lifecycle — from kickoff through UAT and production go\-live.
* Identify and manage cross\-project dependencies, resource contention, and sequencing decisions; escalate trade\-offs to leadership with clear options.
* Work with development, QA, and DevOps teams to break down solutions into tasks, track progress, remove blockers, and ensure timely delivery.
* Manage cross\-functional and multi\-vendor coordination, including third\-party content providers, client IT teams, and partner organizations.
* Drive scope, risk, and change management with clear documentation and stakeholder alignment.



**Technical Scope** 



* Lead LMS platform setup, configuration, and customization projects (e.g., Open edX, Moodle, or comparable enterprise LMS platforms).
* Oversee integration workstreams, including:
* **SSO / Identity integration** 
 — OAuth 2\.0, OIDC, SAML, JWT\-based flows with identity providers (e.g., Keycloak, Entra ID, Okta).
* **Content integration and migration** 
 — course content packaging and transfer, LTI / SCORM / xAPI / CMI5 standards, bulk migration between environments (staging/UAT/production).
* **Platform and API integrations** 
 — CRM, eCommerce, analytics pipelines, notification systems, and other enterprise systems.
* Apply working knowledge of AI technologies (LLMs, AI\-assisted learning features, automation, RAG/chatbot patterns) to solution design and client conversations.



**Reporting \& Governance** 



* Provide regular, structured status reporting to internal leadership and client stakeholders — progress, risks, dependencies, and milestones — at both the individual project and portfolio level.
* Maintain project governance artifacts: RACI matrices, project plans, meeting minutes, decision logs, and escalation paths.
* Track delivery metrics and communicate outcomes clearly across technical and non\-technical audiences.



**Required Qualifications** 



* 7\+ years of experience in technical program/project management, technical account management, or solution delivery roles, with at least 3 years in client\-facing positions.
* Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent projects or client engagements, including prioritization and dependency management across a shared delivery team.
* Demonstrated experience in pre\-sales support: solutioning, proposal writing, estimation, and technical presentations.
* Solid technical foundation — able to understand and discuss system architecture, APIs, authentication protocols, data flows, and integration patterns.
* Hands\-on familiarity with SSO / identity concepts (OAuth 2\.0, OIDC, SAML, JWT).
* Experience with LMS platforms or enterprise SaaS product implementations; content standards knowledge (SCORM, LTI, xAPI) is a strong plus.
* Working knowledge of AI/ML concepts and current AI tooling, with the ability to evaluate and articulate AI use cases in client solutions.
* Strong stakeholder management skills across clients, vendors, and internal engineering teams.
* Excellent written and verbal communication — proposals, reports, and documentation must be clear, structured, and client\-ready.
* Proficiency with project management tools (JIRA, MS Project, or equivalent) and Agile/Scrum delivery practices.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Prior experience with Open edX or similar open\-source LMS ecosystems.
* Exposure to cloud platforms (Azure, AWS) and containerized deployments (Kubernetes/AKS).
* Experience working with government, education, or large enterprise clients, including multi\-vendor consortium environments.
* Experience managing content migration projects between UAT and production environments.
* PMP, PRINCE2, CSM, or equivalent certification.
* Background in software engineering or solution architecture before moving into project management.



**What Success Looks Like** 



* Proposals and estimates that win business and hold up during delivery.
* Client stakeholders who trust you as both a technical advisor and a delivery owner.
* Engineering teams that have clear priorities, unblocked paths, and realistic timelines — even when multiple engagements compete for the same people.
* A portfolio of projects delivered on schedule with transparent, proactive reporting throughout, and no engagement left drifting because attention went elsewhere.

2c418c44.title: Senior Technical Program Manager – Windows Client AI
2c418c44.description:
Job Requisition ID
   

  

 JR2021480
   

  

 Job Category
   

  

 Program Manager
   

  

 Time Type
   

  

 Full time
   

  

 NVIDIA is leading the next era of AI computing, bringing AI from the cloud to local devices. The Windows Client AI team develops the software platform that enables developers, enterprises, and creators to build and run AI applications on NVIDIA client platforms, including GeForce RTX PCs, RTX PRO workstations, RTX Spark, DGX Spark, and DGX Station.
   

  

 We are looking for a highly technical Senior Technical Program Manager to lead the execution of NVIDIA's Windows Client AI software platform. In this role, you will work closely with engineering, product management, architecture, developer technology, and strategic partners to deliver the next generation of AI experiences on Windows. You will drive complex cross\-functional programs spanning AI frameworks, inference runtimes, model optimization, Windows integration, developer tools, and AI applications. This is a highly visible role requiring technical depth, exceptional execution, and the ability to influence engineering decisions across multiple organizations.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Drive end\-to\-end execution of the Windows Client AI software roadmap across globally distributed engineering teams, ensuring alignment, transparency, and predictable delivery.
* Partner with product management and architects to translate product strategy into engineering plans, milestones, and successful releases with measurable outcomes.
* Lead cross\-functional programs influencing technical direction, trade\-offs, and prioritization spanning AI frameworks, inference runtimes, model optimization, Windows integration, SDKs, and AI applications.
* Work closely with engineering teams to identify technical risks, resolve cross\-team dependencies, and drive execution from concept through release.
* Collaborate with Microsoft, OEMs, ISVs, and internal teams to enable new AI capabilities across NVIDIA client platforms.
* Drive planning and execution for emerging AI technologies, including LLMs, multimodal AI, AI agents, model optimization, and hybrid AI applications.
* Communicate program status, milestones, risks, and key decisions to engineering leadership and executives.
* Champion engineering best practices in planning, release management, and program execution across globally distributed teams.


**What We Need To See**
* BS/MS in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* 8\+ years of experience leading complex technical programs in software engineering, AI/ML infrastructure, developer platforms, or systems software.
* Strong understanding of modern AI software stacks, including deep learning frameworks, inference engines, and AI developer workflows.
* Excellent communication, organizational, and cross\-functional leadership skills with a proven ability to influence across organizations.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with experience driving large\-scale software programs from concept to release.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**
* Software engineering background with experience in C\+\+, Python, or AI/ML systems.
* Familiarity with modern AI inference technologies such as TensorRT, vLLM, PyTorch, ONNX Runtime, DirectML, or llama.cpp.
* Experience with LLMs, multimodal AI, agentic AI, model optimization, or GPU acceleration.
* Knowledge of Windows platform technologies, GPU architecture, CUDA, or NVIDIA AI software.
* Experience collaborating with Microsoft, OEMs, ISVs, or contributing to open\-source AI projects.


 NVIDIA is widely considered one of the technology world's most desirable employers. We have some of the most forward\-thinking engineers and researchers solving the hardest problems in AI computing. If you're passionate about AI, enjoy solving complex technical challenges, and thrive in a collaborative environment, we'd love to hear from you.

b237fee1.description:
**Job Description**
 As a Solution Specialist, you will support pre\-sales activities in the IP and Optical Network Services domain by developing customer\-focused solutions, proposals, and service offers. You will prepare key deliverables including Solution Descriptions, Statements of Work (SoW), service costings, CCRs, and compliance documents. Working closely with global sales teams and customers, you will contribute to successful bid and tender responses and help drive business growth.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Develop and support service solutions, proposals, and proactive business offerings aligned with customer and organizational requirements.
* Prepare and maintain solution documentation, including Statements of Work (SoW), compliance documentation, change requests, and service cost estimates.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, stakeholders, and customers to gather requirements and support solution development activities.
* Create, standardize, and maintain business documents, templates, and process\-related materials to improve efficiency and consistency.
* Utilize knowledge of IP networking technologies and related services to contribute to solution design and service delivery initiatives.
* Apply analytical thinking and creativity to address challenges, adapt to changing priorities, and deliver effective solutions within demanding timelines.


**Must\-Have Skills**
**KEY SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE**
* A Bachelor's degree in Electronics \& Communications, Computer Science, or equivalent with 5\+ years of experience on IP technologies and related services
* Experience in deployment, care, and professional services costing.
* Experience in pre\-sales, bid management, tendering, and proposal development activities.
* Demonstrated accountability, initiative, adaptability, and the ability to deliver high\-quality results while collaborating effectively in a global team environment.


**Good\-to\-Have Skills**
* Ability to develop creative, out\-of\-the\-box solutions and work effectively under tight timelines and dynamic business conditions.
* Cross\-cultural collaboration skills, global mindset, and experience engaging with stakeholders across diverse geographies.


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .

d0819830.title: Solution Engineer
d0819830.description:
**About Mitsogo** 
**\| Hexnode:** 




 Mitsogo is a global organization that highly values the contributions of each employee. Our ability to attract top talent is a testament to our commitment to fostering a sense of belonging for everyone. We recognize the rapid evolution of technology and society that impacts our industry, and we prioritize equipping our employees with diverse opportunities and empowering them with a wide range of skills.
 



 Hexnode, the Enterprise software division of Mitsogo Inc., was founded to simplify how people work. Operating in over 100 countries, Hexnode UEM empowers organizations in diverse sectors. Fueling the transformation to a seamless ecosystem of connected tools, Hexnode is revolutionizing the enterprise software and cybersecurity landscape.
 



**Job Overview:** 




 As an Solution Engineer, you will be a key player in shaping the success of our product by collaborating with the sales and product development teams. You will be responsible for understanding customer needs, presenting product demonstrations, and showcasing the value of our product.
 



**Responsibilities:** 



* Engage with potential clients to understand their business requirements and challenges.
* Conduct a thorough needs analysis to align our product with customer needs.
* Conduct compelling and informative product demonstrations to showcase the features and benefits of our solution.
* Customize demonstrations to address specific customer requirements and pain points.
* Develop a deep understanding of the technical aspects of our product and its integration with diverse IT environments.
* Collaborate with the product development team to stay informed about the latest features and updates.
* Work closely with the sales team to provide technical expertise during the sales process.
* Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and enhance sales collateral and presentations.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including IT decision\-makers.
* Address customer inquiries and concerns during the presales process.
* Stay informed about industry trends, competitor products, and market demands.
* Provide feedback to the product development team based on customer interactions.



**Requirements:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in a relevant technical field or equivalent work experience.
* Minimum 3\+ years of professional Pre\-sales experience required specifically in technical sales or a similar customer\-facing role within the SaaS industry, with a strong focus on complex structured products.
* Proven experience in presales, technical sales, or a similar customer\-facing role within the SaaS industry.
* Strong technical acumen and the ability to understand and articulate complex technical concepts.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast\-paced environment.
* Prior experience in the MDM/UEM (Unified Endpoint Management) domain is a plus.

2ac11f4e.title: Presales Engineer
2ac11f4e.description:
**Job Title: Pre\-Sales Engineer** 




**About Gurucul** 




 Gurucul is a cybersecurity analytics company delivering Next\-Gen SIEM, UEBA, Insider Risk Management, and identity/threat detection solutions. We help enterprises reduce noise, detect threats faster, and improve security outcomes using advanced analytics and AI.
 



  





**Role Summary** 




 Gurucul is seeking an experienced Sales Engineer with a track record in building, managing, and delivering high\-performing sales results. The ideal Sales Engineer will have an extensive technical background. This individual will play a key role in growing Gurucul’s revenue and market share within their assigned territory.
 



 This position requires an understanding of complex, business\-based cybersecurity requirements and expertise in positioning Gurucul products and solutions to a variety of audiences, including C\-Level Executives, technical cybersecurity personnel, and business partners. Qualified candidates should have prior experience selling security solutions, including SIEM, UEBA, Identity and Endpoint solutions.
 



 While this role is primarily remote, candidates should be based in
 **Mumbai Delhi \& Bangalore, India** 
 .
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop expertise with Gurucul products and solutions so as to perform customer demos and technical pre\-sales activities
* Present Gurucul products’ technology and processes and explain them to technical and nontechnical audiences
* Work with sales executives throughout the sales cycle: opportunity identification, sales meetings, product demonstrations, POCs, scoping meetings, etc.
* Assess customer needs and environments, identify technical criteria/requirements and decision drivers
* Use technical features to calculate and demonstrate business value
* Collaborate with Sales Executives to show the business reason and value documentation for the customer
* Build win\-win relationships with external customers/prospects as well as internal departments
* Provide expertise regarding architecture design, strategy, and planning
* Help with solution training/partner engagement and enablement
* Represent Gurucul’s solution at industry or customer events



**Required Qualifications** 



* BS in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent experience
* Minimum 5 years of experience in a Sales Engineer, Solution Architect, and/or client\-facing cybersecurity consultant
* 5\+ years of relevant experience selling support within the information security space; experience with SIEM technologies is preferred
* Successful track record of new business production in several industries and ability to exceed quotas
* Hands\-on knowledge of security related products and technologies (e.g. IDS/IPS, SIEM/Log Management, Network/Endpoint Security, Incident Response, and OS in mid\-senior level etc.)
* Technical understanding of cybersecurity products, methods, and technology trends in current market
* Understanding of SOC environment
* Working knowledge of routing principles and networking architecture, protocols and services
* Able to effectively present solutions via live presentations and remote webinars
* Knowledge of security threats, solutions, security tools and network technologies



 Preferred Qualifications (Nice\-to\-Have)
 


* Expertise in at least one of the following (preferred): IBM QRadar, ArcSight, Splunk, SumoLogic, LogLogic, LogRhythm, RSA EnVision, UEBA, and other similar marketplace products



 Core Competencies
 


* Must have excellent communication, presentation, and project management skills
* Self\-motivated, resourceful, and comfortable in a nimble environment



  





 Equal Opportunity Employer
 



 Gurucul Solutions, LLC is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
 



  





 To apply:
 



 Please send resumes to dadasaheb.dhonde@gurucul.com for consideration.

ba337336.title: Solutions Engineer, South
ba337336.description:
TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk.
   

  

 At TrendAI™, we’re always seeking exceptional talent; people who want to collaborate with the best and push boundaries together. Here, your work goes beyond building a career. You will help protect what matters and play a vital role in shaping a safer, more trustworthy AI\-powered future.
   

  

 AI Fearlessly.
   

  

**Presales Engineer, Bangalore**
**About Trendai™**
 TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk. Trusted by the largest enterprises and governments across 185 countries, TrendAI™ secures the entire organization, from identities to infrastructure to data. AI Fearlessly. Learn more: trendaisecurity.com
   

  

**Solutions Engineer \- South**
**Position Overview**
 The Solutions Engineer (SE) with Delhi/Bangalore, will be the technical bridge between our Sales Representatives and their pre\-sales customers. As a TrendAI product expert will guide customers and prospects in the selection and deployment of Trend Micro Next\-Gen security solutions and take joint ownership with Sales team in developing customer relationships, providing leadership in security architecture and help influence customer’s technical strategy with strong problem\-solving skills. A Solutionsan an architecturesolutionsunderstandingpre\-sales supportan skillspanellisteventswebinarsworkshopsDevelopcustomerssolvesolutionsproducts'the more the the the cybersecuritycustomers Engineer is a trusted advisor to customers by developing an understanding of customer needs, risks, tolerance and technology gaps and implementation.
   

  

**PRIMIRY RESPONSIBILITY**
* Apart from being a technologist, you are expected to understand customer journey with product and it’s experience and help customer to navigate through it smoothly
* Obsessed with Customer Success during entire part of his engagement, onboarding and product experience journey
* A strong pillar to build and train sales organisation. You shall be an extremely good storyteller and help sales team to sell better and effectively
* Understand emerging ecosystem of cyber security partners like SOC services partner, CSP (cloud service partners), MSSP etc.
* Leveraging channel partners by upscaling and training for customer engagement is integral part of the role
* Conduct routine update on the new product/ technology to the internal sales staff
* Work closely with Regional / Global Product Manager and Product Marketing Manager to obtain the latest Product/ Technology know how
* Confidently deliver engaging technical demonstrations highlighting Trend Micro products advantages and benefits via solid messaging, presentation skills and public speaking
* Encourage and empower the partners and channel to propose, position and convince the customers with our products and solution
* Present to all levels of an organisation complex technical issues and solutions in a meaningful, engaging, and digestible manner
* Apply strong problem\-solving skills to design solutions that solves the customer problems
* Developing close relationships to help influence the technical strategy of the customer
* Deliver training to customer and prospects about Trend Micro solutions
* Working with company technical support personnel to ensure ongoing quality of support and customer health
* Contribute to departmental best practices, strategies, methodologies and documentation for increased efficiencies
* Continuous self\-improvement and learning to maintain current technical knowledge, participate in technical communities of interest
* Most of the sales engineers actively participate in webinar, workshop and other industry event as a speaker or panelist. Very good public speaking skill will be added advantage to the role


**Experience**
* Rich experience in delivering highest quality presales Support and Solution by bringing unique value on to the table for customers
* Strong understand and knowledge on SOC operations, security analytics capabilities, cloud architect understanding, cloud native application security, SASE, CASB, Zero trust model will be key advantage.
* Knowledge and understating on Microsoft O365, Azure, google, AWS services will be added advantage.
* Exposure to security software solutions like Firewall, Content Security, Intrusion prevention, encryption, data leakage, data protection and monitoring security will be added advantage
* Good written and spoken communication skills in English
* A strong interest in all aspects of cybersecurity and a passion for customer security
* Excellent of understanding of public cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure


 TrendAI™ strives to build an environment of equity and inclusion, which reflects diverse points of view. We welcome, value, promote, and celebrate diversity – the very experiences and attributes that make us who we are, including but not limited to race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, level of ability, age, religion, veteran status, socio\-economic status, and political philosophy.
   

  

 We embrace change, empower people, and encourage innovation. Join Trend Micro and Thrive with us.

fecb4290.title: Specialist - Presales | Redhat
fecb4290.description:
Ingram Micro is a leading technology company for the global information technology ecosystem.
   

  

 With the ability to reach nearly 90% of the global population, we play a vital role in the worldwide IT sales channel, bringing products and services from technology manufacturers and cloud providers to business\-to\-business technology experts.
   

  

 Our market reach, diverse solutions and services portfolio, and digital platform Ingram Micro Xvantage™ set us apart
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are looking for a
 **Red Hat Pre\-Sales Engineer / Product Technical Specialist** 
 to support our distribution business across the Red Hat portfolio, with strong emphasis on
 **Red Hat OpenShift and OpenShift Virtualization** 
 .
   

  

 The role involves close engagement with
 **partners and customers** 
 , technical pre\-sales support, solution positioning, enablement, and participation in partner/customer\-focused initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Pre\-Sales \& Technical Support**
* Provide technical pre\-sales support for the Red Hat portfolio, including OpenShift, OpenShift Virtualization, RHEL, and related technologies.
* Work closely with sales teams to understand customer requirements and map them to Red Hat solutions.
* Deliver technical presentations, demos, and solution walkthroughs to partners and customers.
* Assist partners in solution design, sizing, and architecture discussions.


**Partner \& Customer Engagement**
* Participate in Distribution Managed Partner Round Tables, Partner Round Tables, and Customer Round Tables.
* Act as a technical point of contact for partner queries, POCs, and technical validations.
* Support partners during customer meetings, workshops, and proposal discussions.


**Training \& Enablement**
* Conduct partner enablement sessions, technical trainings, and onboarding programs on Red Hat technologies.
* Help onboard new partners by explaining Red Hat offerings, use cases, and best practices.
* Create and maintain basic technical documentation, presentations, and demo materials.


**Internal Collaboration**
* Work closely with Red Hat vendor teams, internal sales, and technical stakeholders.
* Stay updated with new Red Hat releases, features, and positioning.
* Provide feedback from partners and customers to internal teams for continuous improvement.


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* 1–3 years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Technical Support, or Product Specialist roles.
* Good working knowledge of:
+ Red Hat OpenShift
+ OpenShift Virtualization
+ Linux fundamentals (RHEL preferred)
+ Containers, Kubernetes basics, and virtualization concepts

* Strong presentation and communication skills.
* Ability to explain technical concepts to non\-technical audiences.
* Willingness to travel locally for partner and customer engagements


**Good to Have**
* Exposure to Red Hat certifications (RHCSA / OpenShift\-related certifications).
* Experience working in a Distributor, System Integrator, or Partner ecosystem.
* Hands\-on exposure to POCs, demos, or lab environments.

ac211a5e.title: Solution Consultant
ac211a5e.description:
Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers \- amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life\-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility \- our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.
   

  

 We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Description**
 Solution Consultant
   

  

 Hyderabad
   

  

 You will support sales at main customer pursuits by providing specific solution expertise in a defined geographical area. The Solution Consultant is the solution expert for the sales organisation by assisting with delivering outcome\-based messaging to customers at executive and management levels. The Solution Consultant has a broad understanding of all related products and delivery offerings from RA, partners and competitors in the designated solution area.
   

  

 You will report to the Consultant Leader and work onsite in Hyderabad, India.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Be the focal point in the defined geography for the solution(s), of which you have been designated as an expert.
* Participate in account planning and sales strategy focusing on new customer acquisition and existing customer expansion.
* Facilitate and provide training to the sales team on the values and outcomes of specific solution(s).
* Co\-operate with the sales team in promoting the solution to all customers with presentations and demonstrations.
* Advise Technology Consultants and sales on proposal generation and validation.
* Assist sales at proposal presentations for executive level customers
* Define and articulate differentiators and values versus competition for the solution. Analyse products, have knowledge of competitor's strategy, further define competitive differentiators.
* Translate competitive solutions into a RA solution that meets customer's expectations.
* Seek out and participate in training opportunities to develop technical skills.
* Provide product gap and development feedback for the solution to appropriate organisations.
* Share insights with peers.
* Focus on opportunities that support Rockwell Automation's strategy.
* Understand business models, organisation, and go\-to\-market strategy.
* Knowledge of industry strategies, familiarity with outcome\-based selling.
* Share industry knowledge of customers based on their important causes at the appropriate role level with all customers
* Keep sales and customer relationship management data up to date in local agreed upon tools such as SFA, optimising by using these tools.


**The Essentials \- You Will Have**
* Bachelor's degree in an engineering/technical related field or equivalent experience.
* Value of larger Rockwell Automation application value, without the need to demonstrate individual products with hands\-on demonstrations
* Solution and application expertise, and related demonstrated sales experience.
* Fluency in native language and command of English (written and spoken).
* Work with and gain confidence of senior level personnel (internal and external) in a collaborative, matrixed organisation.
* Align and influence critical stakeholders.
* Support customer centricity. Understand the importance of demonstrating concern for satisfying customers. Passionate about developing goals to improve our customer experience.
* Set, be accountable for and achieve challenging targets.
* empower, coach and motivate others.
* Communication style and messaging to different audiences.


**The Preferred \- You Might Also Have**
* Proficiency in hands\-on engineering
* High level of expertise in Continuous and Batch Process Control which shall include knowledge of multiple ISA standards, practical experience designing and deploying control and electrical systems and solutions, High level of Application Knowledge.
* Practical knowledge of process unit operations and typical automation requirements of such process units
* Experience of the Process industry goals.
* Intermediate level of expertise in MES/Information Solutions, Networks and Services and Solutions, with a basic understanding of automation and electrical devices.
* Intermediate level of Industry Knowledge and Selling Skills.


**What We Offer**
 Our benefits package includes …
   

  

* Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
* Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
* Company volunteer and donation matching program – Your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity can be matched with a charitable donation.
* Employee Assistance Program
* Personalized wellbeing programs through our OnTrack program
* On\-demand digital course library for professional development
* and other local benefits!

6f2df013.title: Technical Presales Manager
6f2df013.description:
**Company Description** 
 Quantzig is a global analytics and AI solutions provider with over 20 years of experience across Retail, CPG, Pharma, Life Sciences, and other industries. The company specializes in data\-driven, AI\-powered strategies that deliver measurable business outcomes, from process optimization to growth enablement. With a strong customer\-centric culture, Quantzig focuses on tailor\-made solutions that adapt and scale with client needs. Backed by experienced analysts and data scientists, the company has delivered more than 5,000 projects for over 120 Fortune 500 organizations. Quantzig operates from offices in the US, UK, Canada, China, and India, offering diverse global exposure and collaboration opportunities.
   

**Role Description** 
 The Technical Presales Manager is a full\-time, hybrid role based in India, with flexibility for partial work\-from\-home. This role involves supporting the sales team by translating complex analytics and AI solutions into clear value propositions for prospective clients. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include leading technical discovery sessions, designing solution architectures, preparing demos and proof\-of\-concept engagements, and responding to RFPs/RFIs with detailed technical inputs. The Technical Presales Manager collaborates closely with delivery, product, and R\&D teams to align client requirements with Quantzig’s capabilities, ensuring feasibility and scalability of proposed solutions. The role also includes managing presales projects, mentoring team members, and contributing to continuous improvement of presales processes and collateral.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong analytical skills, including problem\-solving, data interpretation, and the ability to connect technical capabilities to business outcomes.
* Demonstrated team management experience, including mentoring, cross\-functional collaboration, and coordination with sales, delivery, and product teams.
* Hands\-on technical support experience in analytics, data, or AI solutions, with the ability to conduct demos, solution walkthroughs, and technical presentations.
* Exposure to research and development (R\&D) activities, such as evaluating new tools and technologies and contributing to solution innovation.
* Project management skills, including planning presales engagements, managing timelines, and ensuring high\-quality deliverables for client proposals.
* Background in data analytics, business intelligence, or AI/ML platforms; familiarity with cloud ecosystems and modern data stacks is highly beneficial.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Data Analytics, Business, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience working with global clients and comfort operating in a fast\-paced, consultative, and customer\-centric environment.

8b487bf1.title: Product segment lead - Power Quality solutions
8b487bf1.description:
We're improving the way we live and work by intelligently connecting energy systems, buildings, and industries!!  

Smart infrastructure from Siemens makes the world a more connected and caring place – where resources are valued, where impact on the world is considered, where sustainable energy is delivered optimally and efficiently. It provides the flexible infrastructure to allow society to evolve and respond to changing conditions. Technology and the ingenuity of people come together to be at one with our environments and to care for our world. We do this from the macro to the micro level, from physical products, components, and systems to connected, cloud\-based digital offerings and services. Siemens offers a broad portfolio of grid control and automation; low\- and medium\-voltage power distribution, switching and control; and building automation, fire safety and security, HVAC control and energy solutions.  

JOIN US! WE MAKE REAL WHAT MATTERS. THIS IS YOUR ROLE  

The Position is a coveted All India Business development responsibility.  

Product Business Development – PQM (Power Quality \& Energy Management \- All India)
